subject: More Trump chaos
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Padora for Colorado
body:
| | | Friend, Lauren Boebert wants the House to codify Donald Trump’s executive orders. Most of his executive orders to date haven’t just been extreme — **they have been challenged in court, blocked by judges, or outright struck down as unconstitutional.** From reckless trade wars, imprisoning and deporting people without due process, stripping away health care, and assaulting our democracy, Trump’s executive orders created legal chaos, deepened division, and often collapsed under legal scrutiny. And now Lauren Boebert is cheering that record on — and promising more of the same if she holds onto power in Colorado’s 4th District. We must defeat her. **[That’s why John is in this race. Will you support him in this fight by pitching in a donation today?](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/s/c/UCHY4_HCrBuHECp3X-WoOLm3XIUE5APWTdJyf4fcLKB1AvyG5sHdBExIRkeoouSXl-8d01BQvixVonypnUtO834GOJyAhMsh01Pa_hZtA5nqt6AxFCu69GKdm7Jgg4pzsIDWQ8FolTD5rHuZqWdvXY-pRu9aNv6YL6wUM0ueIzQTFlW51Gb9Q1l9g8o8sG5wPgLN2X4rQiA4rzMTiJIAv0h6K-1bd7G1IuFLDyMO2lunZf1Ah9Hwripxo7wNSub-oj3GWOA5gWBKvLwY5eE70DD-TrDodJNzCA3S5lIVXtSrIciN3h5s76dOKb44i-31QMaRbdchBx2GrdxWO6litZKiv03sBbQpJefh1e3mi3aSGb-_RVnLkY3Im7_ezmDOYbR1fdg05-lZkFP9B8XSFdycijMK3AafRmZQqDyFC3u3v2vNue3yxqPnHi7l9sEY-lhzllH3MEeO92SI6LU/ywc-9XZjaCvtg3LweWnwPsBBowYkBehJ/9)** Boebert and Trump are not leaders. He’s a manufacturing engineer running for Congress to solve problems —**not create new ones.** Here’s what John is all about: ✅ The Constitution matters.
✅ Policy should be built to last — not just to “win” a news cycle.
✅ Eastern Colorado needs real infrastructure, rural health care, and economic opportunity — not performative politics and bullsh*t. **[We have a real shot to flip this seat and send Boebert packing. But to do it, we need your help right now. name: Bryan
subject: My Opponent Opposes ICE
body:
A Democrat just announced their candidacy and he's supported abolishing ICE

| | | | | [|
---](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=a12ded3a3e&e=e907534017)
| | | | | **May 20, 2025**
---
| | | | | _**This morning, Randy Bryce announced he was running to take our seat.**_
---
[|
---](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=42446b32f6&e=e907534017)
| Just hours ago, perennial candidate Randy Bryce announced he is running for Congress. In the 2018 cycle, Bryce raised [**$8 million**](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=7ec3784da9&e=e907534017). You can bet he will look to raise millions more this year.
Bryce has supported [**abolishing ICE**](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=959a00ad57&e=e907534017) and has a criminal record [**including arrests**](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=477b260269&e=e907534017)**** for theft and property damage. Wisconsin families saw his record and rejected him by more than [12 points](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=df36abd577&e=e907534017) in 2018.
We've seen that [**Hakeem Jeffries** _****_](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=f8bd857f41&e=e907534017) and [**left-wing dark money** ](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=dc55e48d2c&e=e907534017)groups are looking to take control of the House and are targeting our district.
I am working to stop them.
---
[|
---](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=6a65ab9038&e=e907534017)
| We are running for reelection and we will win! Just like last cycle when **The Left** came after us, spent **MILLIONS** on negative ads, and we still beat Barca by 10 points!
_But I can’t do it alone._
---
| [**Can I count on you to chip in right now?**](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=b43be22f75&e=e907534017)
My opponent has already released his ad and is fundraising on **ActBlue**.
Our goal is to raise[ **$5,000** ](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=11ab564a7e&e=e907534017)in the next [**72 hours**](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=6cbdbf15d6&e=e907534017) and help build our resources to win this race.
---
| [JOIN OUR TEAM!](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=f89d479e0d&e=e907534017)
---
| Friends, I am ready to win, but I need your help.
[_**Can I count on your support by donating $25, $50, or even $75 today?**_](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=12d06d8e98&e=e907534017)
---
| [DONATE](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=67cde150f3&e=e907534017)
---
| **On Wisconsin,** Bryan Steil

name: Voter Action Project HQ
subject: Stop their purges and lies
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Opponents of voting rights have a vast network of dark money organizations -- from The Heritage Foundation and their partner Heritage Action to True the Vote and the Election Integrity Network. Their lies spread unchecked, repeated by sympathetic, partisan "news" organizations and into the ears of state legislators before the truth can catch up.
It's up to us to lead the fight and defend our fundamental right to vote. RUSH $25 or more today to help stop these voter purges and inform voters what is at stake >> [https://secure.everyaction.com/Z31SNww9Q0CZWIdx46cuSQ2]
Voter Action Project [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=25.00&contactdata=QcOwERiha56lXfpQFI9KD31WGFtWT5SLV1T8yWolTuGemxu4JiQEKdswmeZMxcyKbJ55Nya2XR8DGxXSEpL107z+F3zfqyKkPNP0iXwqTz4=]
Wired: Inside the ‘Election Integrity’ App Built to Purge US Voter Rolls [https://secure.everyaction.com/Z31SNww9Q0CZWIdx46cuSQ2?am=25.00&contactdata=QcOwERiha56lXfpQFI9KD31WGFtWT5SLV1T8yWolTuGemxu4JiQEKdswmeZMxcyKbJ55Nya2XR8DGxXSEpL107z+F3zfqyKkPNP0iXwqTz4=]
You've heard us talk about True the Vote (TTV) before, Folks, most notably for mass challenges to the registrations of voters in Georgia.
A little background: TTV is a Texas-based right-wing group whose self-described mission is “ to train citizens to protect election integrity at the polls .” Their founder is credited with “ becoming one of the earliest and most enthusiastic spreaders of ballot conspiracy theories .” Their “research” was the basis for the discredited election disinformation film “2000 Mules.”
Well, after taking a break in the wake of the 2024 election, they're back, and relaunched their voter suppression app -- called "IV3" -- to help their acolytes challenge legitimate voters across the country. This mass voter challenge platform -- which is riddled with errors and inaccurate data -- is up and running in 11 states : Colorado, Georgia, Kansas, Louisiana, Maryland, Missouri, Nevada, Ohio, South Carolina, Montana and Connecticut, with plans to roll out the app in all 50 states.
With legislation like the SAVE Act -- which would disenfranchise millions of women who changed their name after marriage -- held up in the Senate, opponents of voting rights are clearly pivoting to other methods of voter suppression, and we've got to stop them.
Team, chip in $25 or whatever you can to help stop these purges of legitimate voters and protect our fundamental right to vote >> [https://secure.everyaction.com/Z31SNww9Q0CZWIdx46cuSQ2]
If you've saved your payment information with FastAction, your donation will go through immediately:

GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.everyaction.com/Z31SNww9Q0CZWIdx46cuSQ2?am=100&amtOpts=&recurringAm=100&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&tknfa=J8Y6BKthtq81gKlQbQ2SUnOqnGjiMvTboeOfItevP9k=&contactdata=QcOwERiha56lXfpQFI9KD31WGFtWT5SLV1T8yWolTuGemxu4JiQEKdswmeZMxcyKbJ55Nya2XR8DGxXSEpL107z+F3zfqyKkPNP0iXwqTz4=] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.everyaction.com/Z31SNww9Q0CZWIdx46cuSQ2?am=250&amtOpts=&recurringAm=250&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&tknfa=J8Y6BKthtq81gKlQbQ2SUnOqnGjiMvTboeOfItevP9k=&contactdata=QcOwERiha56lXfpQFI9KD31WGFtWT5SLV1T8yWolTuGemxu4JiQEKdswmeZMxcyKbJ55Nya2XR8DGxXSEpL107z+F3zfqyKkPNP0iXwqTz4=] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.everyaction.com/Z31SNww9Q0CZWIdx46cuSQ2?am=20&amtOpts=&recurringAm=20&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=QcOwERiha56lXfpQFI9KD31WGFtWT5SLV1T8yWolTuGemxu4JiQEKdswmeZMxcyKbJ55Nya2XR8DGxXSEpL107z+F3zfqyKkPNP0iXwqTz4=]
True the Vote (TTV) brought mass voter challenges against nearly half a million Georgians in 2022 -- all from their HQ in Texas. They've been sued in Georgia for voter intimidation, but it's clear they won't be deterred in their mission to reshape our elections and suppress the people they don't think should be voting. And they are not alone.
Just after TTV relaunched their inaccurate, suppressive app, the Cleta Mitchell-led Election Integrity Network (EIN) announced “ the next phase in its mission .” Cleta Mitchell is an election denier who was a key advisor to Donald Trump as he attempted to overturn the 2020 election and she's also been a party to numerous court cases around the country, attempting to disenfranchise young voters in states like North Carolina.
EIN is continuing those attacks by pushing for citizenship checks, eliminating certain types of voter ID -- especially for college students -- and spreading conspiracy theories about how our votes are counted. Basically, all the things the Senate-stalled SAVE Act wants to do federally.
These groups are waging their war on voting at the state and local level, funded by dark money millions, and we've got to try and keep up. A little background: TTV is a Texas-based right-wing group whose self-described mission is “ to train citizens to protect election integrity at the polls .” Their founder is credited with “ becoming one of the earliest and most enthusiastic spreaders of ballot conspiracy theories .” Their “research” was the basis for the discredited election disinformation film “2000 Mules.” Well, after taking a break in the wake of the 2024 election, they're back, and relaunched their voter suppression app -- called "IV3" -- to help their acolytes challenge legitimate voters across the country. This mass voter challenge platform -- which is riddled with errors and inaccurate data -- is up and running in 11 states : Colorado, Georgia, Kansas, Louisiana, Maryland, Missouri, Nevada, Ohio, South Carolina, Montana and Connecticut, with plans to roll out the app in all 50 states. With legislation like the SAVE Act -- which would disenfranchise millions of women who changed their name after marriage -- held up in the Senate, opponents of voting rights are clearly pivoting to other methods of voter suppression, and we've got to stop them. # [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108068933/546745662/1606932672?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTE2NzRhNC1kODM1LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uk1f2uexSg5MrgRZWFCUMIGnM9nkB6P-gKV-_oTurIw=)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108068934/546745673/1606932672?refcode=em-5.20.25-all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTE2NzRhNC1kODM1LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uk1f2uexSg5MrgRZWFCUMIGnM9nkB6P-gKV-_oTurIw=)

Peter,

The road to re-election just got a whole lot more challenging: **The experts at _Sabato’s Crystal Ball_ recently ranked CA-27 as one of the most competitive districts in the nation. We’re dangerously close to becoming a toss-up race.**

It has always been a challenge to re-elect a Democrat in this critical district – and with so much at stake for our communities and our democracy, the time to make it happen is now.

If these last few months have shown us anything, it’s that there is no limit to what Republicans will do to tear down our democracy. Trump and his friends in Congress are killing our future and using corruption to uplift billionaires and corporations instead of working families.

Meanwhile, I’m fighting for the future and working against corruption in Congress. But there’s no way around it: **The best way to hold this administration accountable is to win control of the House.**

subject: Writing this is not the “safe” option

body:

Friend,
---
My law licenses have been taken away and I can no longer defend myself in court. I may even face a 20-YEAR prison sentence in a case so severe that President Trump cannot even save me with a pardon.
---
_So, the “safe” thing to do right now would be to keep quiet and not say anything that would anger the powers-that-be._
---
_But that’s not who I am._
---
**Throughout my life, I’ve never gone with the “safe” option. I do what’s _RIGHT_.**
---
_And so, I’m speaking out and I’ve prepared a memo for you on something deeply troubling._

subject: Part of my job as campaign manager
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR GOVERNOR
body:
GOP candidate John James has already received $5 million in super PAC support from the DeVos family.
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/203?t=1&akid=327%2E181023%2Ec0lo0J)
Hey team, it’s Nikki, Jocelyn’s campaign manager.
Part of my job is to make sure our team stays on track with our fundraising benchmarks.
After all, in a state as competitive as Michigan, and with GOP candidates backed by ultra-wealthy donors like the DeVos family, **we need to make sure Jocelyn has the resources to stay competitive and win this race.**
So I’m _already_ thinking about a fundraising deadline two months from today. I know it’s early, but this one will be really important.
**Our July 20 fundraising deadline is when we’ll close the books on our fundraising report and publicly disclose how much we’ve raised, and from how many donors.**
It might seem a long way away, but there’s no preparing too early in this race.
After all, GOP candidate John James has _already_ received $5 million in super PAC support from the DeVos family.
I know it’s early, but with two months’ notice, [**I’m hoping you’ll pitch in a few dollars to show you support Jocelyn’s campaign! Your contribution today will make hitting our fundraising goals possible, and you’ll be backing the best candidate to lead Michigan forward.**](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/854?c0=jmb-em-q22025.35DAUP&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250520_PM2_V1_S1&t=2&akid=327%2E181023%2Ec0lo0J)

body:
Trump’s scheme to DESTROY Medicaid

name: LaMonica McIver
subject: I was charged by the Trump administration because I was doing my job
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250520_2_split?refcode=em20250520-2081&refcode2=2081_400544_7e_OCt&akid=2081%2E400544%2E7e_OCt)
The Trump administration just charged me with crimes for engaging in congressional oversight. This is a first—and it’s a flashing red light for our democracy.
I went to an ICE facility in my district to conduct oversight because that is my job and my lawful right as a member of Congress. It’s clear: Trump and his administration don’t want transparency or oversight, and they want to punish any person who dares to speak up.
These baseless, politically motivated charges against me make that even more obvious. We must stand up together against an administration that weaponizes law enforcement to persecute its opponents before it's too late. Democrats stand ready to fight back against the Trump administration’s overreach, and protect democracy and our Constitutional separation of powers.
**[We need your help. I’m asking you to split a donation between me and Deb Haaland so we have the resources to win this battle for our democracy. We need 500 more grassroots donations before our deadline at midnight to make sure Republicans know we won’t be intimidated.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250520_2_split?refcode=em20250520-2081&refcode2=2081_400544_7e_OCt&akid=2081%2E400544%2E7e_OCt)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250520_2_split?refcode=em20250520-2081&refcode2=2081_400544_7e_OCt&akid=2081%2E400544%2E7e_OCt)**
This is far bigger than just me—the rule of law is at stake. Our democracy as we know it is under threat.
[**To ensure everyone who dares to speak truth to power is safe from political persecution, we must make as much noise and as big an impact as possible. Split a donation between me and Deb Haaland and share this with your friends.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250520_2_split?refcode=em20250520-2081&refcode2=2081_400544_7e_OCt&akid=2081%2E400544%2E7e_OCt)
We're in this together,
LaMonica
* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails-dh/?t=1&akid=2081%2E400544%2E7e_OCt)

name: Tobias Read
subject: Do you support voting from home?
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250520em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250520em]
Hi, it’s Oregon Secretary of State, Tobias Read.
I believe voting from home gives every Oregonian a fair and secure chance to hold politicians accountable—and it saves money and time, too.
But some Republicans want to block voting from home by imposing unnecessary barriers.
There’s only one explanation for this: Opponents to voting at home want to make it harder for regular people to participate in our democracy.
So I’m standing up to them and I’m fighting to protect the right to vote from home for all Oregon voters.
But I need to know you're with me: If you support my efforts to expand vote-by-mail access, please consider donating to help me continue fighting today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250520em]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250520em]
Thank you for using your voice – speaking out is the most powerful way to make an impact, and I’m grateful to have your support.
Tobias Read
Oregon Secretary of State
P.S. Don’t forget! The Oregon Political Tax Credit allows you to donate $50 (if you file single) or $100 (if you file joint) to a candidate, PAC, or party, which will be fully credited back as a rebate — so it’s free to donate! For more information, click here. [https://www.oregon.gov/omd/ONG/Documents/SMFS/Personal%20Financial%20Counselor/Political-Tax-Credit.pdf?]

name: Senator Vincent Hughes
subject: Today is Election Day!
body:
If you are having trouble viewing this message or would like to share it on a social network, you can [view the message online](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?gpiv=2100170029.172216.77&gen=1).
|
# **Today is Election Day!**
Today is Election Day, and polls are open from **7:00 AM to 8:00 PM.** If you're in line by 8:00 PM, you will be allowed to vote. To find your polling place, visit [vote.phila.gov](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100170029.172216.77&gen=1&mailing_linkid=14443) and enter your address.
* * *
**What's On the Ballot ** Voters will decide on key local races, including District Attorney, City Controller, several judicial seats, and ballot questions related to city governance. To preview your ballot, go to [vote.phila.gov/voting/voting-at-the-polls/sample-ballots](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100170029.172216.77&gen=1&mailing_linkid=14444).
* * *
**A Few Reminders**
* If this is your first time voting at your polling place, bring a valid form of ID.
* If you requested a mail-in ballot but want to vote in person, bring your ballot and return envelope with you. If you don't have them, you can still vote using a provisional ballot.

If you have any questions or run into issues while voting, call the Philadelphia County Board of Elections at 215-686-3469.
* * *
---
| [Update My Profile](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=profile&gpiv=2100170029.172216.77&gen=1) \- [Unsubscribe](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=unsubscribe&gpiv=2100170029.172216.77&gen=1) \- [Privacy Policy](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100170029.172216.77&gen=1&mailing_linkid=14445)
---
\- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - \- - - - - -

name: Ron Wyden
subject: Corporations over people
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108069355/546773267/2140832878?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YzUxNzIwOC1lMTM1LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8C6WgHU6bgrDfzx9GRg5eacLkr9w7swyoVAKxETZAhw=&emci=8b0e5daf-df35-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=4c517208-e135-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=9818364)
---

| | Since Donald Trump took office, nothing has been as clear as his intention to side with corporations over the American people at every possible opportunity. From the Republican bailout for billionaires and corporations, to their plans to slash billions from Medicaid, to going after the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau (CFPB). It's clear the Republican agenda begins and ends with helping corporations turn a profit. The CFPB is the single most important watchdog protecting consumers from predatory companies and their shady sales tactics that nickel and dime hard-working American families. As part of their initial battery of executive actions, designed to throw a wrench in the federal government's work, they've installed Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent as Acting Director of the agency. Since taking office, he has done everything in his power to kneecap the agency and all power it has to go after corporations. Now that they've stopped the creation of new rules, the GOP majority in Congress is hard at work trying to undo rules created under the Biden administration to protect Americans from unnecessary fees and predatory practices. Just a few weeks ago, they passed legislation to do away with overdraft fee caps. This is basically a green light for banks to further rip off consumers and working families. These caps were created to prevent big banks from padding their profits with the hard-earned cash of Americans living paycheck to paycheck. By targeting the cap on exorbitant overdraft fees, Congressional Republicans are sending a clear message that there's no one they won't sell out to please Donald Trump and his billionaire allies.
We quite literally **cannot afford** for these rubber-stamp Republicans to keep control of Congress. Democrats have a real path to taking it back in 2026, but the efforts to re-energize and organize our movement need to start now. [**Soplease, donate $3 today. With your help, we can take our message across the country and break through the noise created by right-wing media narratives.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108069356/546773268/-2044921950?refcode=2025-05-20-cfpb&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=4c517208-e135-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YzUxNzIwOC1lMTM1LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8C6WgHU6bgrDfzx9GRg5eacLkr9w7swyoVAKxETZAhw=) [Donate Today](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108069357/546773269/-2044921950?refcode=2025-05-20-cfpb&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=4c517208-e135-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YzUxNzIwOC1lMTM1LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8C6WgHU6bgrDfzx9GRg5eacLkr9w7swyoVAKxETZAhw=) Onward, _Ron_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Ron Wyden instantly:

clean_body: | | | | Since Donald Trump took office, nothing has been as clear as his intention to side with corporations over the American people at every possible opportunity. From the Republican bailout for billionaires and corporations, to their plans to slash billions from Medicaid, to going after the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau (CFPB). It's clear the Republican agenda begins and ends with helping corporations turn a profit. The CFPB is the single most important watchdog protecting consumers from predatory companies and their shady sales tactics that nickel and dime hard-working American families. As part of their initial battery of executive actions, designed to throw a wrench in the federal government's work, they've installed Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent as Acting Director of the agency. Since taking office, he has done everything in his power to kneecap the agency and all power it has to go after corporations. Now that they've stopped the creation of new rules, the GOP majority in Congress is hard at work trying to undo rules created under the Biden administration to protect Americans from unnecessary fees and predatory practices. Just a few weeks ago, they passed legislation to do away with overdraft fee caps. This is basically a green light for banks to further rip off consumers and working families. These caps were created to prevent big banks from padding their profits with the hard-earned cash of Americans living paycheck to paycheck. By targeting the cap on exorbitant overdraft fees, Congressional Republicans are sending a clear message that there's no one they won't sell out to please Donald Trump and his billionaire allies. We quite literally cannot afford for these rubber-stamp Republicans to keep control of Congress. Democrats have a real path to taking it back in 2026, but the efforts to re-energize and organize our movement need to start now. = = Onward, Ron | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Ron Wyden instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate. | This email was sent by Wyden for Senate P.O. Patriot,

This is a deeply personal email, but I want to tell you why it’s critical for us to secure America First victories against the radical left.

My story begins at the University of Kentucky. I was on the swim team. I am a 12-time NCAA all-American, 5x SEC champion, and SEC record holder in the butterfly.

But then it all changed _for a photo-op_.

In March 2022, I was forced to compete with a male going by the name Lia Thomas. I watched as this male swam to a title, beating out Olympians and other record holders. Despite tying Lia to the 100th of a second, the NCAA denied me the trophy because they claimed it was _necessary_ to have Lia Thomas hold the trophy while photos were being taken.

**The radical left robbed me of my victory and reduced everything I had worked for my entire life down to a photo op promoting woke gender ideology.**

But that’s not all...

I was forced to share locker rooms with a 6’4” man.

So when President Trump signed an executive order reaffirming the America First movement’s commitment to protecting female athletes, I knew this was a movement worth fighting for.

**If you and I want to ensure a lasting impact on girls’ safety, we need to secure America First victories in 2026 and beyond.**

That’s why I told Charlie Kirk, the founder of Turning Point PAC, that I would help him raise $47,000 before the end of the month to help them ramp up their ballot-chasing operations in critical battleground states.

Non-Contribution Account (For TTPAC, Inc.’s Expenditures Other Than Direct Contributions to Federal Committees)

As permitted by law, TTPAC, Inc. maintains a non-contribution account for the purpose of influencing federal, state, and local elections. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, address, occupation, and employer of individuals whose contribution exceeds $200 in an election cycle. For contributions from federal committees, corporations, and labor unions - regardless of contribution amount - federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the committee’s name and address. State and local law may require us to collect and report additional information.

Contributions to this account may be used to influence federal elections by making independent expenditures in support of or in opposition to federal candidates. Additionally, in state and local jurisdictions that permit non-individual type (e.g., corporate) contributions directly to candidates and/or committees, contributions to this account may be used for both independent expenditures and direct contributions to candidates and/or committees, as permitted by state and local law.

Individuals, federal committees, corporations, and labor unions may contribute to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account without limit. Contributions by national banks, foreign nationals (without lawful permanent resident status), and other foreign entities (e.g., foreign corporations) are prohibited. Contributions to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Paid for by Turning Point PAC, Inc. The radical left robbed me of my victory and reduced everything I had worked for my entire life down to a photo op promoting woke gender ideology. But that’s not all... I was forced to share locker rooms with a 6’4” man. So when President Trump signed an executive order reaffirming the America First movement’s commitment to protecting female athletes, I knew this was a movement worth fighting for. If you and I want to ensure a lasting impact on girls’ safety, we need to secure America First victories in 2026 and beyond. That’s why I told Charlie Kirk, the founder of Turning Point PAC, that I would help him raise $47,000 before the end of the month to help them ramp up their ballot-chasing operations in critical battleground states. One time, I recall being escorted down a hallway by police while a mob of “peaceful protestors” attempted to physically assault me for speaking out against their radical leftwing agenda. Police then barricaded me in another classroom for three hours before I could safely escape and avoid the far-left activists who were trying to hurt me. Why am I telling you this story? It underscores how unhinged the radical Left has become. And ever since President Trump took back our country, it’s only gotten worse! They hate that we’ve got a strong leader in the Oval Office, and they’re desperate to undo everything we’ve built. They want open borders, socialism, and to push their radical gender ideology on children. Winning the elections in 2026 and beyond is critical to keeping our country on the right track. God bless, Riley Gaines Non-Contribution Account (For TTPAC, Inc.’s Expenditures Other Than Direct Contributions to Federal Committees) As permitted by law, TTPAC, Inc. maintains a non-contribution account for the purpose of influencing federal, state, and local elections. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, address, occupation, and employer of individuals whose contribution exceeds $200 in an election cycle. For contributions from federal committees, corporations, and labor unions - regardless of contribution amount - federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the committee’s name and address. State and local law may require us to collect and report additional information. Contributions to this account may be used to influence federal elections by making independent expenditures in support of or in opposition to federal candidates. Additionally, in state and local jurisdictions that permit non-individual type (e.g., corporate) contributions directly to candidates and/or committees, contributions to this account may be used for both independent expenditures and direct contributions to candidates and/or committees, as permitted by state and local law. Individuals, federal committees, corporations, and labor unions may contribute to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account without limit. Contributions by national banks, foreign nationals (without lawful permanent resident status), and other foreign entities (e.g., foreign corporations) are prohibited. Contributions to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Paid for by Turning Point PAC, Inc. (www.tppac.com) and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

body:
The Trump administration just charged me with crimes for engaging in congressional oversight. This is a first—and it’s a flashing red light for our democracy. | | [ ](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquVf_rZQC1UluMlnL09Kq2Bnz_IclEhPA-wD9nLfAPH_D97f2mnxkgBx0cf4IV_yCmeKtFcf6IwJXj5Scbsl5wys3uORAdbp6XV_WFGjfmiE2Lo-n9LOezmNO6bDSYgUDAFSysFi0P7M-SOPAbcio-zaVDn0AwdMloo04Ig_HLNL0h95xcJkcYRf-ovJaAa5ur_qY0xrSaK2URGO7RZwlwrY6d3JBlzNoFWlsYv66eRMzKDDcOkSZkCfz4Ul5PWvgyZB8Dm4Ovl8rLEijjwNTxopopWg1JrOfIM3aTQi7zfvbKnoVyevT_7bLGXi5uQKvGignOlG0MeXQX3PXiJUAUZ-a21vjuLBxtWhUbukmaACcmZC8ooiUHmnNPvRn_UXFxhv7Z6QZlWhz9tzqRd-nSW/4go/n4-0gZsVQKuHUgBjdpuHWg/h0/h001.9H59x92HHWayX1xnuP22AwdIG7PijPxcVjGg5ZVK_f8)

Peter, The Trump administration just charged me with crimes for engaging in congressional oversight. This is a first--**and it 's a flashing red light for our democracy.** I went to an ICE facility in my district to conduct oversight because that is my job and my lawful right as a member of Congress. It's clear: Trump and his administration don't want transparency or oversight, and they want to punish any person who dares to speak up. These baseless, politically motivated charges against me make that even more obvious. We must stand up together against an administration that weaponizes law enforcement to persecute its opponents before it's too late. My lawyers stand ready to fight back against the Trump administration's overreach, and protect democracy and our Constitutional separation of powers. **[We need your help. I'm asking you to split a donation between me and Defend Our Courts so we have the resources to win this legal battle. We need 500 more grassroots donations before our deadline at midnight to make sure Republicans know we won't be intimidated.](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquVf_rZQC1UluMlnL09Kq2Bnz_IclEhPA-wD9nLfAPH_PJbyQltOtq-z0Q0j4Vgyw9fSH_2tJLBosaoiyddVRjj8pBPGfF1MHXc2GP4gN-7B6nqxGb2J6uWrh7vzThg1dHDxbcd4F_O7rB-Iczs_lCyxp6Dv1Mc7VBzIVDeZ_2aTxiqTpFhU1gabVwJv3WlU67FWkInmTtccQfgWhF-QdjtLhLwZOuIvSd3uF4jZ_1cFIGUUZaNHKefpadMV3jzJLOYlO3uEEofEaPNjwozxrRr1QKrzzVd-UK6mbpwEqnymNXkFEqdQZHQcvFBk0bSGhdu-FmXI-ZlqRxiGIdrIWA6Dfm77qxM1-wRYKFzaTQermjE8e-a8PakYzXQt4kZuZOT7-rCBNkdrXm7YgV2npwL/4go/n4-0gZsVQKuHUgBjdpuHWg/h1/h001.mTosr0EosvSeR32BM-E5SVzB1y0V0wrYvZY5oDSLHK4)**

clean_body: The Trump administration just charged me with crimes for engaging in congressional oversight. This is a first—and it’s a flashing red light for our democracy. | | Peter, The Trump administration just charged me with crimes for engaging in congressional oversight. This is a first--and it 's a flashing red light for our democracy. I went to an ICE facility in my district to conduct oversight because that is my job and my lawful right as a member of Congress. It's clear: Trump and his administration don't want transparency or oversight, and they want to punish any person who dares to speak up. These baseless, politically motivated charges against me make that even more obvious. We must stand up together against an administration that weaponizes law enforcement to persecute its opponents before it's too late. My lawyers stand ready to fight back against the Trump administration's overreach, and protect democracy and our Constitutional separation of powers. | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: This is far bigger than just me--the rule of law is at stake. Our democracy as we know it is under threat. We're in this together, LaMonica | | Mail checks to: Defend Our Courts P.O. Box 45569 Philadelphia, PA 19149 | | | Sent via . name: Kathryn Harvey
subject: 📣Your healthcare is on the line.
body:
Join me may 29 with Rep. Justin J. Pearson from the Tennessee Three

| | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/fd0c4c271d61/kathryn-harvey-for-congresscampaign-kickoff-6419573?e=edbde6c9b1)
---
|
---
|
---
| Welcome to Keeping Up with Kathryn Harvey. A weekly digest covering South Carolina politics and opportunities for engagement and action in the Upstate.
---
|
# Please join me next Thursday, May 29th for an evening with Rep Justin J. Pearson
---
| | | | | | | | | | [|
---](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=a393c80326&e=edbde6c9b1)
| Please consider joining me next Thursday for our **Fighting for Freedom Fundraiser.** This will be a special evening featuring Rep Justin J. Pearson of the Tennessee Three in support of the Spartanburg County Democratic Party and the Young Democrats of Spartanburg County. The reception starts at 6:00 PM at the Chapman Cultural in Spartanburg, followed by a special program honoring our young change makers in the community and a keynote by Rep Justin J. Pearson of the Tennessee General Assembly at 7:00 PM. Tickets include food & beverage.
---
| | | | | [Click here to purchase tickets today!](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=2857d0a924&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
|
---
|
# **Over 100,00 people in the Upstate rely on Medicaid, republicans wish to slash it.**
---
| | | | | | | | | | [|
---](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=d80d74535d&e=edbde6c9b1)
| [Watch my video here!](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=feace8c5ad&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
| |
---
| William Timmons and other House Republicans are proposing a budget that guts Medicaid while over 100,000 people here in Greenville and Spartanburg **alone** rely on it. Under the current proposal, sweeping changes would be made to the federal Medicaid program— that covers 71 million low-income Americans— the budget would cause [7.6 million Americans to lose their insurance over 10 years and strip certain providers of funding like Planned Parenthood (who have a majority of Medicaid patients).](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=bd8762b097&e=edbde6c9b1)
South Carolina ranks among the worst for healthcare access, yet Rep. Timmons and the rest of the South Carolina Republican delegation want to make it even harder for working families, children, and seniors to get care. This isn’t about the budget—it’s about priorities. Clearly, some of our representatives’ interests aren’t with the people they represent.
**CALL WILLIAM TIMMONS. TELL HIM TO VOTE NO ON MEDICAID CUTS.**
Rep. William Timmons' office: (202) 225-6030

Let him know: South Carolina can’t afford to compromise healthcare and vital federal programs for billionaire tax cuts.
---
|
---
|
---
| | | | | | | | | | | **The State of Alice in SC: 2025 Update on Financial Hardship****May 22 at 9:30am on Zoom** ALICE (Asset Limited, Income Constrained, Employed) households make more than the Federal Poverty Level but fall below the ALICE Threshold. That Threshold is the income at which individuals and families are able to afford their basic needs. Please join United Way of the Piedmont to learn more about financial stability and the struggles and resilience of families experiencing hardship in South Carolina.
---
| [Click here to register!](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=59dceb2442&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
| [|
---](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=34ec19a853&e=edbde6c9b1)
| | | | | | | | | | [|
---](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=8e42e09632&e=edbde6c9b1)
| | **SPCDP Monthly Meeting****June 2 at 6:00pm at Dr. T.K Gregg Center** Join us the first Monday of the month for our Spartanburg County Democratic Party Meeting at the Dr. TK Gregg Community Center from 6-7:30pm 650 Howard Street.
---
| [Click here to RSVP!](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=1d69c215ee&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
| May 22 The State of Alice in SC Financial Update via Zoom. [Register here!](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=31bf1ee639&e=edbde6c9b1) May 29 Fighting for Freedom Fundraiser. [RSVP here!](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=9c2aa7f62d&e=edbde6c9b1)May 30 & 31 South Carolina Democratic Convention. [Learn more & purchase tickets here! ](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=f893295b4c&e=edbde6c9b1)June 2 SPCDP Monthly Meeting. [R](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=99c08e2a40&e=edbde6c9b1)[SVP here!](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=5eef30a4a8&e=edbde6c9b1) June 9 Greenville Dem Women Monthly Meeting with Rep. Raskin. Stay tuned for more info! June 13th-15th Southern Workers Action Summit. [Learn more here!](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=67cf3caa4a&e=edbde6c9b1)June 14 Indivisible Upstate Veterans Rally. Stay tuned for more info! June 28 Greenville Black Pride Festival. [Learn more here!](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=546aa88b11&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
|
---
[|
---](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=379bae5e42&e=edbde6c9b1)
| In last week’s episode of **Upstate Tea** , we dive deep into the childcare crisis impacting Spartanburg and the broader Upstate South Carolina region. I had the honor of being joined by Molly Talbot Metz, CEO of the Mary Black Foundation, and Tina Belge, city planner and Greenville City Council candidate, they explore innovative local solutions to the challenges faced by families, childcare providers, and businesses. From the transformative Quality Counts program to the power of public-private partnerships, they discuss the critical role affordable, high-quality childcare plays in community health, economic growth, and workforce stability. Discover how Spartanburg is pioneering change and setting a model for the rest of the state.
---
| [Click here to listen!](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=ac39d366a4&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
|
---
| My new episode will drop Wednesday at 12pm featuring Krystal Watson, President & CEO of Project R.E.S.T and Sara Barber, Executive Director S.C. Coalition Against Domestic Violence and Sexual Assault (SCDVASSA) - talking about the impact of DOGE cuts on nonprofits in SC. Tune in to Frogmore Stew wherever you get your podcasts!
---
|
---
|
---
| | | | | | | | | | | | **CALL NOW: Tell your Republican Representative You Don’t Want To Pay The Price For Their Billionaire Tax Breaks** Under the GOP’s current plan, billionaires like Elon Musk will get even richer, while everyday Americans lose their health care and go hungry. We cannot let Trump and the Republicans get away with gutting vital programs that our communities rely on. We’ve got to speak out. Please [CLICK HERE](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=8de5729e71&e=edbde6c9b1) to fill out a form that will directly connect you to your Republican representative. Let them know you expect them to prioritize working families, not billionaires.
**South Carolina Supreme Court Upholds Abortion Ban** The South Carolina [Supreme Court](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=19649dd424&e=edbde6c9b1) ruled Wednesday the state can keep banning abortions around six weeks after conception by agreeing with the earliest interpretation offered of when a heartbeat starts. The justices unanimously ruled that while the medical language in the [2023 law](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=29aea0454d&e=edbde6c9b1) was vague, the six-week ban should not be challenged. Spartanburg House Rep. Harris has celebrated the ruling and filed a hearing for a**total abortion ban** that goes beyond six weeks. [Click here to contact your house representative.](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=b3d2461385&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
| |
---
| I had such a fun time over this weekend celebrating with the Northside! I had the honor of registering voters and passing out flyers for the May 29th fundraiser with Rep Justin Pearson of the Tennessee Three!
---
|
---
| I’m thrilled to be an Emerge SC cabinet member, and even more excited for our 2025 cohort, which includes the Upstate’s very own Dawn Maddux and Courtney McClain. [Emerge SC ](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=7ea8fa88e5&e=edbde6c9b1)supports democratic women across South Carolina to engage politically and run for office.
---
|
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
| | | | | | | | | | | READ: Post & Courier: [After backlash, Greenville Co. adjusts school budget plans](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=b9aca15e77&e=edbde6c9b1)READ: Post & Courier: [Naval Academy bans Bakari Sellers book](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=6977ef782c&e=edbde6c9b1)READ: Post & Courier: [SC Supreme Court upholds 6-week abortion ban](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=4574352388&e=edbde6c9b1)READ: FitsNews: [Ethics Investigation targets S.C. Freedom Caucus Leader](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=20acbdd812&e=edbde6c9b1)READ: SC Daily Gazette: [U.S. House right wing tanks Trump's budget](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=a4a79b902b&e=edbde6c9b1)READ: SC Daily Gazette: [What to know about the GOP's student loan overhaul ](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=9cd353517d&e=edbde6c9b1)READ: FOX Carolina: [Sheriff Chuck Wright returns to office following leave of absence ](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=19dbd93252&e=edbde6c9b1)READ: NYT: [Sesame Street coming to Netflix and signs new deal with PBS](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=f3f82f5d76&e=edbde6c9b1)READ: SC Daily Gazette: [Upstate Democrat challenges Lindsey Graham in bid for Senate seat](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=953aae0914&e=edbde6c9b1)

name: Liberty Gear - Oregon GOP
subject: Is Your Dad Tough Enough For This?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE OREGON REPUBLICAN PARTY (COMMITTEE ID 379) 187 HIGH ST
body:
Skip the mug. Get him something that roars liberty.

| | | | [ ](https://secure.winred.com/oregon-republican-party/dont-tread-on-dad-merch?utm_source=email&utm_medium=ac&utm_campaign=20250520_ORGOP_DontTreadDadMerch&utm_id=campaignengine)
---
---
| | Friend, Let’s be honest, your dad isn’t just “Dad.” **He’s the rock. The provider. The guy who taught you to work hard, stand tall, and never let the government push you around.** This Father’s Day, skip the store-bought mug and give him something that _actually_ aligns with his values. Introducing the **“Don’t Tread on Dad”** collection – _**designed for the man who loves his country, defends his freedom, and raises his kids with a little backbone.**_
---
| | [ ](https://links.infooregongop.com/els/v2/8RNmJ-vRDDMX/bEh1OE95ZGFqYUxzdmNFTnNOd0k1bnZ6ZnVxU05SVGRkbmNiS2pEWlEvUXBjUjBRN0lWVm5DZ3hWcGZoaElRdVhzYkZ2a0F6NjBIMytWRDI0YmF5K21NZzBpd2NpQjVwOFVUdDNEQUtHN1E9S0/)
---
| | | [ SHOP THE COLLECTION ](https://links.infooregongop.com/els/v2/V3YAs3LVNNBR/bEh1OE95ZGFqYUxzdmNFTnNOd0k1bnZ6ZnVxU05SVGRkbmNiS2pEWlEvUXBjUjBRN0lWVm5DZ3hWcGZoaElRdVhzYkZ2a0F6NjBIMytWRDI0YmF5K21NZzBpd2NpQjVwOFVUdDNEQUtHN1E9S0/)
---

name: Ken Mitchell for Virginia
subject: Ben Cline's Budget: Higher Costs, Lost Care, and Fewer Meals in VA-06
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ken Mitchell for Virginia**
body:
Families in the 6th District will pay more for health care, lose food aid, and more—all to fund tax breaks for billionaires. Help us stop it.

| | | | | [|
---](https://kenmitchellforvirginia.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=435990a56c5fdf5272fa9ea86&id=4ff91cbf57&e=0fced71d8c)
| | | | [|
---](https://kenmitchellforvirginia.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=435990a56c5fdf5272fa9ea86&id=2288500a22&e=0fced71d8c)
| Republicans have unveiled their budget plan—and it’s a disaster for working families in Virginia’s 6th District.
While billionaires and corporations get massive giveaways, everyday Virginians will be stuck paying the price.

### What Their Plan Really Means:
* **$7 trillion** in tax breaks for the wealthy and big corporations
* An average **$314,266 annual tax cut** for the richest 0.1%

To pay for it, Republicans are threatening vital services our neighbors rely on.
---
|
---
|

### 🩺 Health Care
* **40,000 people** in our district who rely on the Affordable Care Act would see their premiums go up by an average of **$810 per year** —a **64% increase**.

* A 60-year-old couple making $85,000 would see premiums jump by **$12,417 per year** —a **172% increase**.

* * *

### 🏥 Medicaid (Cardinal Care in Virginia)
* **188,992 residents** could lose their health care coverageThat includes **88,441 children** and over **16,000 seniors**

* * *

### 🍽️ Food Assistance
* **89,000 people** in the 6th District rely on SNAP to put food on the table

* Republicans want to slash it, making it harder for families to eat

* * *

### 🧒 School Meals
* **451,117 children** across Virginia get free meals through the Community Eligibility Provision

* These meals are at risk under the Republican plan

* * *

### 👩💼 Federal Jobs
* **10,896 federal employees** work in our district

* Republicans want to lay off essential workers to fund handouts for the wealthy

---
| | | | | | | | | | | [➡️ [DONATE NOW – STAND WITH KEN]](https://kenmitchellforvirginia.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=435990a56c5fdf5272fa9ea86&id=9ca860201f&e=0fced71d8c)
---
|
We can stop this—but only if we elect leaders who fight for our communities, not corporations.
Ken Mitchell has served his country for 24 years in uniform, started his own business, and worked across sectors to solve real problems. He’ll stand up to extremism and put the people of Virginia’s 6th District first.
---
|
---
| Every dollar helps us reach more voters, counter Republican attacks, and defend services families depend on.
---
|
---
| [➡️ [DONATE – HELP KEN WIN VA-06]](https://kenmitchellforvirginia.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=435990a56c5fdf5272fa9ea86&id=d9ca49a042&e=0fced71d8c)
---
| The billionaires and Trump have Ben Cline. **Ken Mitchell has you.** Let’s win this—together.
---
| Ken Mitchell is ready to lead. Let’s give him the support to get it done.
**—Team Ken Mitchell**
---
| [Donate Now!](https://kenmitchellforvirginia.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=435990a56c5fdf5272fa9ea86&id=2ef59bdcfa&e=0fced71d8c)

body:
Friend,

President Trump is calling for 20,000 more officers to assist with his deportation efforts.

**[He's doubling down on his successful strategy to secure the border and remove illegal immigrants from America in order to protect citizens like you!](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/6pNhHLATWmHHLlXqT8ciqQ~~/AAVLBhA~/nuxSd-MqJpSEIQwLSWP8DvHSydLCM33IzAcqjbt_imaFO8J_eIyM060qUi6iX4WGMfZyo8gz45YHhlauubBVZrgpFVfT7SnPo32PHCQ5vds9RG728Sz0Ilb0Nl7sTEUSWWeZWWQ2Pb8Wvyv8sFVE9n2Wzw1mgJH_Msz1qr_kDPtRdnFfAdb6qNeSuIgcOtqS67vVjC1oq8ldzkkAcNiNA8XQcTnYBTU-VJLwXRQDAaKHixmMiRxZ_-SwuBaJNOli9M0et8QG0hElrqPlvriubQdDO6NNt5owwkusoBaZK_vqwd_NzCg7WpZNo_5f3wYawcrx7LUvXCu493s4XHvpflt8EpWcmH8B6lR_B9JKN1uhCbNyNsWOzLebqHyNBtwt4hsKy-EJurZ6BG7Kj6K2xL2jF9Jc_nn6LjyuKJNiwnY~)**

Under Joe Biden and Kamala Harris, foreign criminals were able to smuggle drugs into America and menace law-abiding American citizens with near impunity.

President Trump and his allies in the Senate won't rest until we've fixed their mess by DEPORTING every last criminal illegal alien.

But radical Far-Left Democrats can't stand it...

The same politicians who happily hired 80,000 new IRS agents to spy on your bank account are now up in arms about hiring 20,000 officers to remove violent criminals from America.

_They 'd rather facilitate an invasion of our country than do the bare minimum to keep you safe._

From radical, terrorist-supporting Hamas sympathizers to violent MS-13 gang members, the Democrats are actually fighting to protect these criminals!

name: Hi, =?UTF-8?Q?I=E2=80=99m?= Addison
subject: Etched into my brain forever…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Losing a sibling is the kind of loss that scars you for life...

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zn76cltvtc4rorv6t7j8lqkvc9u0iqim2665hbtg_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c3h68or5c3h2bs)_Losing a sibling is the kind of loss that scars you for life ..._

The memory is etched into my brain forever. It was 10 days before the 2016 election. I was on the campaign trail with my boss, now-Senator Ted Budd when I got the call: _Fentanyl took my brother 's life._

It was the most painful experience of my life. And it's why I ran for Congress last year.

My name is Addison McDowell - I'm not here for photo ops, to play games, or get famous. I'm here to fight for families like mine who've felt the pain of open border policies.

_**[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zuoq6m6o1ahfftumo47qm4tra0ef4udftanrn3c8_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c3h68or5c3h2bs "Which brings me to the reason for this email.")[Which brings me to the reason for this email.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z4p6m6hkvdk9ksot2s56fa9fb4c4cd1eohq4kqj0_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c3h68or5c3h2bs)**_

Between now and the Midterm Elections, my colleagues and I are burning the candle at both ends to shut down the border, deport violent illegals, decimate the cartels, and drop the hammer of justice on the heads of fentanyl traffickers.

We know that work will COMPLETELY UNRAVEL if Democrats win back the House...

Don't believe me? They're jetting down to El Salvador and pleading for the return of a deported MS-13 gang member. Everyone knows they'll roll out the welcome mat for violent illegal immigrants from anywhere around the world.

We can't let that happen. And that's where you come in.

Majority Leader Steve Scalise and I _**[need you to stand with us and keep the border secure.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z8j1i0bsltuob5pe0hrtvml1rdt41evcprr0stq0_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c3h68or5c3h2bs)**_ Every penny you can send will help make sure President Trump has a GOP-controlled Congress for his entire term.

_Your support is central to our plans! Can you please help us out?_| [ YES >>
](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zjb7be1lsrd1jrktnj7lgh8e97nvorb25nngi7v0_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c3h68or5c3h2bs)| [NO >>
](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zjc345lb0rcc1m7die9v1q212utv8loil8mg2ji0_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c3h68or5c3h2bs)
---|---
Thanks for taking the time to read my email. It means a lot.

And it's an honor to fight for this country alongside you.

God bless,
Addison McDowell
* * *
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z60g5mgdkql745lijfa6ique4rq8p86nj5avcdb8_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c3h68or5c3h2bs)
\- Democrat Leadership formed an _anti-Trump task force_
\- More than a dozen Attorneys General are _suing_ the Trump Administration
\- A House Democrat just introduced _7 Articles of Impeachment_
_
_
If they manage to strip us of our House Majority, they 'll have the power to impeach, investigate, and bring his entire legislative agenda to a SCREECHING HALT!

**We're PLEADING WITH YOU to do your part to help SAVE our Pro-Trump House Majority >>**
[DO YOUR PART
](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zhljo0664a4r3t6tk3k82ptj7dp4e8fis8t48ipg_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c3h68or5c3h2bs)
| |

name: Hillsdale College via 1600 Daily
subject: Now Available: “Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer”
body:
I am excited to announce that Hillsdale’s online teaching series, “Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer,” is now available to own as a DVD box set.

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zr380eiqsslv1hsvs09c170t41mgl26q4kb1rino_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c3h68or5c3h2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zqucjik3sgtcp5upjul97nmu7qdr197o2m0r6foo_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c3h68or5c3h2bs) Dear Fellow American,

I am excited to announce that Hillsdale's online teaching series, ["Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer,"](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zdu1aht2tlhkqabshi1lq8df8ola4eunebomraeo_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c3h68or5c3h2bs) is now available to own as a DVD box set.

In this series, you will discover how taxation, regulation, money, government spending, and trade influence our decisions and impact our lives. Joined by Steve Forbes, Stephen Moore, Larry Kudlow, Amity Shlaes, Brian Domitrovic, and Larry P. Arnn, Dr. Laffer explains how supply-side economics holds the key to unleashing American prosperity once again.

But we need the support of citizens like you to promote this series to millions of Americans along with our other nationwide outreach.

# **Buy And Store _Your Own_ Gold & Silver!**
---
|
---
| | Stability. Wealth Protection. Long Term Financial Growth. This is what many Americans are searching for when they purchase precious metals like gold and silver. But what’s the best way to buy these precious metals? Do you buy an ETF (Exchange Traded Fund), or do you get your hands on the real thing? Here’s the thing about ETFs...
---
| |
---
| You don’t actually own the gold or silver.
---
| |
---
| You can’t take physical delivery of the metal.
---
| |
---
| Taxes and fees can eat away at your gains.
---
| |
---
| Shares may or may not have sufficient gold or silver backing.
---
| | But with physical gold or silver, you are the one in the driver’s seat. You have the control you’re looking for with your hard earned money. Here are the top 5 reasons why you should own physical gold and silver...
---
1. **Immediate Access**
Being able to open your safe and put your hands on the physical gold and silver coins you own brings reassurance to many gold and silver owners.
2. **Complete control**
You can stick it under your mattress, hide it in a wall, store it in a safe, bury it in your backyard or put it in a bank safe deposit box.
3. **Easy Portability**
If you think there’s ever a potential situation in which you may have to leave your house at short notice, you’ll want personal possession of your metals.
4. **Convenient Flexibility**
Taking physical possession of gold and silver is just one more tool in the toolbox, one more way to diversify your retirement savings.
5. **No Pricey Fees**
With ETFs and other forms of owning precious metals, you are forced to deal with fund managers, exchanges, custodial storage, and even sales of fund assets that can carry pesky fees that add up over time.

name: Hi, =?UTF-8?Q?I=E2=80=99m?= Addison
subject: Etched into my brain forever…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Losing a sibling is the kind of loss that scars you for life...

[](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z8pgbaqi7idjs2eukg2tn7cuu8fkeqql51v17ac0_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c3h64pb2clh2bs)_Losing a sibling is the kind of loss that scars you for life ..._

The memory is etched into my brain forever. It was 10 days before the 2016 election. I was on the campaign trail with my boss, now-Senator Ted Budd when I got the call: _Fentanyl took my brother 's life._

It was the most painful experience of my life. And it's why I ran for Congress last year.

My name is Addison McDowell - I'm not here for photo ops, to play games, or get famous. I'm here to fight for families like mine who've felt the pain of open border policies.

_**[](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zfp12cqgmmtjaph0hjb2eeftai7tj592gojgkt0o_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c3h64pb2clh2bs "Which brings me to the reason for this email.")[Which brings me to the reason for this email.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z9koltjt7o6dbqku00nb99i7chec7j6hi66qtpeo_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c3h64pb2clh2bs)**_

Between now and the Midterm Elections, my colleagues and I are burning the candle at both ends to shut down the border, deport violent illegals, decimate the cartels, and drop the hammer of justice on the heads of fentanyl traffickers.

We know that work will COMPLETELY UNRAVEL if Democrats win back the House...

Don't believe me? They're jetting down to El Salvador and pleading for the return of a deported MS-13 gang member. Everyone knows they'll roll out the welcome mat for violent illegal immigrants from anywhere around the world.

We can't let that happen. And that's where you come in.

Majority Leader Steve Scalise and I _**[need you to stand with us and keep the border secure.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zucg2sh6coj1p0k93ofm23jopk1mlmoh6ahku050_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c3h64pb2clh2bs)**_ Every penny you can send will help make sure President Trump has a GOP-controlled Congress for his entire term.

And it's an honor to fight for this country alongside you.

God bless,
Addison McDowell

name: Hillsdale College via First Look News
subject: Now Available: “Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer”
body:
I am excited to announce that Hillsdale’s online teaching series, “Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer,” is now available to own as a DVD box set.

This sponsored message from First Look News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zolm8v175frgm0gk0m7ft0nvderb3jl9flrhbus8_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c3h6cob6c3h2bs)
---
| | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zsgr586ldrkne2790mci74ma44427ugi3k3bdjdg_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c3h6cob6c3h2bs) Dear Fellow American,

I am excited to announce that Hillsdale's online teaching series, ["Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer,"](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zf9ts1r3hlltjcckucv724d8tr68js2j5n4porho_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c3h6cob6c3h2bs) is now available to own as a DVD box set.

In this series, you will discover how taxation, regulation, money, government spending, and trade influence our decisions and impact our lives. Joined by Steve Forbes, Stephen Moore, Larry Kudlow, Amity Shlaes, Brian Domitrovic, and Larry P. Arnn, Dr. Laffer explains how supply-side economics holds the key to unleashing American prosperity once again.

But we need the support of citizens like you to promote this series to millions of Americans along with our other nationwide outreach.

Will you partner with us to promote this free online teaching series from Hillsdale College and expand other educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty? Your tax-deductible donation will help us to enroll thousands of Americans in this series.

And for a donation of $100 or more, we will send you this beautiful DVD box set of "Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer."

**To help support this course and get your copy of "Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer" on DVD, click the link below:**

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/supply-side-economics-support-dvd](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2ztm71krl2554fs0rs4g9sertp3mpj4p2a3m6av2o_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c3h6cob6c3h2bs)

I hope you enjoy this teaching series. Thank you for your support.

Warm Regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

subject: [Shocking New Report] U.S. Dollar To Crash?
body:
Stability. Wealth Protection. Long Term Financial Growth.

| | |
# **Buy And Store _Your Own_ Gold & Silver!**
---
|
---
| | Stability. Wealth Protection. Long Term Financial Growth. This is what many Americans are searching for when they purchase precious metals like gold and silver. But what’s the best way to buy these precious metals? Do you buy an ETF (Exchange Traded Fund), or do you get your hands on the real thing? Here’s the thing about ETFs...
---
| |
---
| You don’t actually own the gold or silver.
---
| |
---
| You can’t take physical delivery of the metal.
---
| |
---
| Taxes and fees can eat away at your gains.
---
| |
---
| Shares may or may not have sufficient gold or silver backing.
---
| | But with physical gold or silver, you are the one in the driver’s seat. You have the control you’re looking for with your hard earned money. Here are the top 5 reasons why you should own physical gold and silver...
---
1. **Immediate Access**
Being able to open your safe and put your hands on the physical gold and silver coins you own brings reassurance to many gold and silver owners.
2. **Complete control**
You can stick it under your mattress, hide it in a wall, store it in a safe, bury it in your backyard or put it in a bank safe deposit box.
3. **Easy Portability**
If you think there’s ever a potential situation in which you may have to leave your house at short notice, you’ll want personal possession of your metals.
4. **Convenient Flexibility**
Taking physical possession of gold and silver is just one more tool in the toolbox, one more way to diversify your retirement savings.
5. **No Pricey Fees**
With ETFs and other forms of owning precious metals, you are forced to deal with fund managers, exchanges, custodial storage, and even sales of fund assets that can carry pesky fees that add up over time.

---

Friend, my Senate race in 2022 was one of the most expensive and closely watched in the entire country.

The Democrat Machine, Hollywood elites, and far-left activists poured everything they had into Wisconsin because they know the path to control runs through our battleground state. And they came _incredibly_ close to winning.

But thanks to the strength of our grassroots movement--folks like YOU stepping up when it mattered most--we held the line. I'll __never__ forget that.

I first ran for office as a business owner who was sick of the bureaucratic red tape, the reckless spending, and the out-of-touch policies that hurt working families like mine. I believed that Washington needed more common sense and real-world experience, _and I still do._

**Recently, I became Chairman of the Senate 's Permanent Subcommittee on Investigations. I've made it my mission to shine a light on corruption, waste, and fraud that occurs in D.C. **

_We 're investigating the lies told to the American people about COVID.

We're uncovering how taxpayer dollars were funneled to Democrat cronies.

And we're demanding answers from the Deep State operatives who think they're above the law._

This work isn't easy, but I'm not backing down in this mission to deliver the TRUTH the American people deserve. Thank you for your support.

clean_body: A lot is at stake if we don’t meet this benchmark → Friend, President Trump's first month's back in the White House have been packed with major WINS for the American people. But the more we win, the more the radical Left tries to shut down our America First movement: ********** We're delivering real results. We're exposing their corruption. And if we keep going, their entire house of cards will come crashing down. That's why the Left will do whatever it takes to silence us. But I refuse to back down. And I know you won't either. ******** Thank you in advance for your support, Senator Ron Johnson Friend, my Senate race in 2022 was one of the most expensive and closely watched in the entire country. The Democrat Machine, Hollywood elites, and far-left activists poured everything they had into Wisconsin because they know the path to control runs through our battleground state. And they came incredibly close to winning. But thanks to the strength of our grassroots movement--folks like YOU stepping up when it mattered most--we held the line. I'll never forget that. I first ran for office as a business owner who was sick of the bureaucratic red tape, the reckless spending, and the out-of-touch policies that hurt working families like mine. I believed that Washington needed more common sense and real-world experience, and I still do. Recently, I became Chairman of the Senate 's Permanent Subcommittee on Investigations. I've made it my mission to shine a light on corruption, waste, and fraud that occurs in D.C. We 're investigating the lies told to the American people about COVID. We're uncovering how taxpayer dollars were funneled to Democrat cronies. And we're demanding answers from the Deep State operatives who think they're above the law. This work isn't easy, but I'm not backing down in this mission to deliver the TRUTH the American people deserve. If you believe in transparency and putting the American people back in charge, I hope you'll and help me keep this fight alive. Thank you for your support. \- Senator Ron Johnson ******** * Paid for by Ron Johnson for Senate Inc. name: Kirk Cameron
subject: The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers
body:
take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life...

| | |
---
| | Dear Friend, Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z208koau94fn63oi814gqt90i9mhm6b0md42bmh0_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c3h6aoj2chh2bs)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. [**Today, I'm inviting you to support the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4bagc9lh14lg5crjnejtgankqqn9ie1cq3qldvo_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c3h6aoj2chh2bs) And it’s only possible with the help of grandparents and seniors like you. Introducing:_ Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children’s show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of the truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children’s show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. **[Because I can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdo3ku18neqh2bthm73l6vnst8ufnb595joaf5n8_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c3h6aoj2chh2bs)** Millions of families are already watching Season One of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ on our streaming service BRAVE+, YouTube, and on DVD. And the reviews from parents, grandparents, and kids are incredible. One Mom of three little girls told us: “Our family was struggling through a pretty difficult day. But I turned on _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ and that was exactly what my heart needed as much as theirs.” It’s amazing that your simple response to this letter can make that kind of difference for a family. Each episode costs around $70,000 to produce. I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously we won’t work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. [**That’s why I’m asking you to help us finish Season Two of**** _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_****by giving a gift of $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $70,000 per episode.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zccq20apef1lk1dcjdun8bs38vq296naett3cihg_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c3h6aoj2chh2bs)**** Whether you can send $35, $25,000, anything in between, or anything higher or lower – please know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated. As a special “Thank You” for your **[gift of $50 or more](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfts22pondaa2pbjts9963fc0k7jbqkdban7fon0_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c3h6aoj2chh2bs)** , I’ll send you Season One of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ for your family to enjoy FREE on DVD. And with your [**gift of $100 or more**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zj9260g5nic832jalp18e55m158b98feveedc9h0_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c3h6aoj2chh2bs), I’ll also send you a copy of my children’s book: Pride Comes Before the Fall which teaches children to be humble before God instead of prideful. I wrote Pride Comes Before the Fall with the great team at BRAVE books – the same God-focused conservative team that’s bringing _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ to life. Maybe you’ve seen me and other BRAVE Books authors on Fox News, Newsmax, TBN or other media outlets. Unabashed conservatives like Riley Gaines, Lara Trump, Kevin Sorbo, Missy Robertson, Dinesh D’Souza, John Solomon, Jack Posobiec, and so many more have written a BRAVE Book to stop the Hollywood groomers. Supported by you, BRAVE Books gives parents the tools they need to rebuild our families and reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon. Now I know there are a lot of places you can spend your money in the next ten minutes. **[But I hope you’ll be a part of history by supporting _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_. ](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4vue804mkisa1d6abo4umb03ko5q7cf29t89j98_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c3h6aoj2chh2bs)** Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth. Thank you for joining us in the fight.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zst1tb4v8a1f3leapgrdb544q2m6coo7vin1qpto_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c3h6aoj2chh2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfi7p133hqdj6l2vl6a5lr56291hlnhcmli618so_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c3h6aoj2chh2bs)
---
**Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)** **Actor, Author, and Father**
---
|
---
| | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart – maybe even yours – is to support the very first children’s television show in history made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. **[Please send in your gift and help me reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqleperh5drtijojvb03u1lqe4b61iq10abhfjng_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c3h6aoj2chh2bs) **Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk

Now I know there are a lot of places you can spend your money in the next ten minutes. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.
