name: James =?UTF-8?Q?O=E2=80=99Keefe?=
subject: Our culture has a sick hatred for integrity and achievement
body:
I learned firsthand how our culture despises achievement and wishes to destroy anyone willing to challenge the status quo

|
---
| | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zhpasbqj1nkmbins4nfo2jtv8ms98kss8500odhg_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c3h6eo32cth2bs) Friend,

I learned firsthand how our culture despises achievement and wishes to destroy anyone willing to challenge the status quo, big government, or the Fake News media machine.

When I was ousted from Project Veritas, two big things (one you haven't heard about) happened to me.

FIRST: The media launched a vicious smear campaign against me like I've never seen before. **Make no mistake:** _They identified this as an opportunity to "cancel" me forever_ and tried everything in their power to destroy me and everything I've ever stood for.

They failed.

SECOND: I received an OVERWHELMING amount of support from patriots across the country. These brave men and women defended me, but more importantly, they stood up for the principles of liberty and free speech.

**One of my top supporters was The Atlas Society.**

Jennifer Grossman, the CEO of The Atlas Society, proudly stood by my side and even invited me to speak with a gathering of the organization's top student leaders about free speech and how Howard Roark, the fictional hero of _The Fountainhead_ by Ayn Rand, remains my inspiration to act with integrity.

Which is why I am personally reaching out to you.

I told Jennifer I would help The Atlas Society raise $25,000 in the next 48 hours by personally contacting my online supporters. [Please consider making an URGENT donation of any amount to The Atlas Society by clicking here.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zcpvp774psoul5c3eihk8rp58qj2iq69t3iirfa0_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c3h6eo32cth2bs)
[Donate >>](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zhqnkvtiteg41cs04u2n2mc6u8cfolcmk8ub2qmg_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c3h6eo32cth2bs)
Let me tell you more about The Atlas Society and how they are fundamentally changing the direction of our country.

_I will also tell you HOW The Atlas Society is spreading its message in what I consider one of the most innovative methods I 've EVER seen a nonprofit organization engage in before._

_**_So keep reading_!**_

My mentor, Andrew Breitbart, reminds us that politics is downstream from culture. But what is culture downstream from? Answer: Philosophy. That's where The Atlas Society shines, engaging young people with the virtues of reason, achievement, and benevolent self-interest in wildly creative, artistic ways.

Have you ever read Ayn Rand's _Atlas Shrugged_ or _The Fountainhead_?

These books changed how I saw the world and my role in it.

But they are 700+ pages long!

**Jennifer shared this terrifying statistic with me:** Daily reading of books among young people has fallen from 70% in the late 1970s to 12% today.

So, how do we preserve Rand's role as the greatest all-time recruiter for liberty? That's where The Atlas Society gets creative! They leverage art and technology to create programming for "_skimmers, swimmers, and deep divers_."
**Skimmers:** Social media memes and animated videos -- every single one of their 50 posts a week gets 40K comments, shares, and likes. The "Draw My Life" videos on concepts like Capitalism, Property Rights, and Free Speech reach MILLIONS of viewers. Links invite young people on a journey for deeper intellectual exploration.

**Swimmers:** Graphic novel adaptations of Ayn Rand's shorter books, Pocket Guides that distill big concepts like Postmodernism and Socialism into a 90-minute read. Weekly podcasts with top entrepreneurs and thought-leaders, and discussion groups like "Morals & Markets."

**Deep Divers:** They recruited an all-star academic faculty of philosophers and economists who guide students on a deeper study of Rand's philosophy, publish independent work, and provide programming at their summer conference for students (the Galt's Gulch Summit, where I spoke!).
Jennifer and The Atlas Society are accomplishing great things for our country, and I hope you will be one of the FIRST supporters of mine to make a donation and help me reach our $25,000 goal. Please use one of these links to donate:
[Donate $10 >>>](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z5jo7gfjcsi827m87ll2n9jk97om6o06mra7sri0_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c3h6eo32cth2bs)

[Donate $35 >>>](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z919vpaccfvem713a5nlbnjme9p3rjht5uvo8uq0_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c3h6eo32cth2bs)

[Donate $50 >>>](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z6s3rb5sem3ku3snvh6bvdbk1k8v7bsit8vv74rg_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c3h6eo32cth2bs)

[Donate $100 >>>](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zkf2tplcsi0674n9i0q8n0bcvuf5p3nushibk7jo_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c3h6eo32cth2bs)

[Donate $250 >>>](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z2gusek14uim4m8cnubvlbh70ffahu6ggv60ecng_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c3h6eo32cth2bs)

[Donate $500 >>>](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z6n0hkda9ggjbn5htmdg1k020ita48g1i76f2gbg_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c3h6eo32cth2bs)

[Donate $1,000 >>>](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z8u2rm7eumtch47l5977jvj4ricv161lofvd9bd0_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c3h6eo32cth2bs)

[Donate Any Amount >>>](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2ztsp59rrb2quk2aaso9h524i7kogak3shdj74o18_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c3h6eo32cth2bs)
Ultimately, here is what The Atlas Society is fighting FOR:
* Free market capitalism
* Rational self-interest
* Respect for achievement and success
* Free speech
* The future of young people and our great country

And here is what The Atlas Society is fighting AGAINST:
* Cancel Culture
* Our Educational system indoctrinating young people to embrace socialism
* Our sick culture that demonizes success and embraces twisted ideas
* Big government

I am inviting you to support The Atlas Society with a donation of ANY amount.

As a personal favor to me, please make your donation within the next 48 hours so I can help Jennifer reach our goal of $25,000.

[Here is the link to donate one more time.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zvvp0g9sk2bbovtk0vfesahgrmad07aogpvgu9r8_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c3h6eo32cth2bs)

Thank you for everything,

James O'Keefe

P.S. Here is a picture of me speaking with The Atlas Society's top student leaders.
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zjt5penu70ejpt8ur3kcregpg3iio5r5bqm68vpg_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c3h6eo32cth2bs) These students inspire me. Sadly, young people are learning to embrace socialism, reject critical thinking skills, and shed their creativity.

Well, NOT these students.

The Atlas Society is teaching students that they CAN accomplish great things, become leaders, and inspire others to do the same.

[Please take action by making a donation to The Atlas Society today. You can click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $500, $1,000, or ANY amount.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z8avgsotmaobfg21ftfu4p7n9ivlerd90i6hpk1g_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c3h6eo32cth2bs)

Thank you,

James

_The Atlas Society is a 501(c)(3) Not For Profit Organization. All donations are tax-deductible._

name: Aiden Buzzetti, 1776 Project Foundation
subject: Friend, reading this is the most important thing you can do as a parent or grandparent today.
body:
See why this is the most important book of the 21st century.

| | | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z5ftmsaaqlbtcue7seik1h1eqd7h69ifpn9ekg5g_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c3h6eo32cth2bs)
---
| | Friend, I'm coming to you first because I know this is something you truly care about. _**[I’m granting you access to my FREE 167 page blueprint conservatives are using to destroy CRT and transgender ideology in our schools.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z45bstqgg5p5ln0uge3hv47eoqkcvbpvjg7577k8_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c3h6eo32cth2bs)**_ **_But before you access it, I want you to know why this is so important and how you can help!_** After decades of radical leftist control of America’s school systems, Conservatives have finally made a critical headway in countering the infiltration of our classrooms by left wing activists. Patriots like you have successfully funded hundreds of local school board races across the country that elected pro-parent, pro-education Conservatives to school board positions in every corner of the country. But Friend, after all the damage leftists have inflicted, reversing the indoctrination and fully taking back our schools requires a thorough, well-organized strategy. That’s where the 1776 Project Foundation comes in. We’re working to DEMOLISH the radical left’s influence over our schools by arming THOUSANDS of school board members with the blueprint they need to CRUSH leftist indoctrination! Our guide is called **___[_The First 100 Days: Your Guide to Being an Effective School Board Member._ ](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zrukd006h33m6vjtf8ms93sii8c86ka73a48g03g_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c3h6eo32cth2bs)_** _**[Today, I’m UNLOCKING it for you for FREE!](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z3v49ao9g17oba39l7as9mj427qblpcqb0mkdli8_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c3h6eo32cth2bs)**_ This comprehensive HOW TO GUIDE for school board members focuses on our 3 D’s battleplan : **1\. DEFENDING****our classrooms from divisive ideologies like Critical Race Theory and Radical Gender Ideology.** **2\. DEVELOPING********academic environments that reward hard work and achievement, restoring meritocracy and excellence to their schools** **3\. DISRUPTING****organized pressure campaigns that seek to transform schools against the wishes of parents and communities.** The 1776 Project Foundation is committed to implementing an effective strategy that will win back our schools one school board at a time. All we need is to get our guide in the hands of AS MANY school board members as we possibly can as quickly as we can! That’s where you come in, Friend! name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Will I see you there?
body:
Before you do anything else today, will you please take a moment to sponsor a gift for our “See You at the Library Day” in the next 48 hours?

| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z9a4mabibo5i9ndckr9d7mum13nm9m0k8d6a0bio_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c3h61o76cdh2bs)
---
| | Fellow Conservative,Before you do anything else today, will you please take a moment to **[sponsor a gift for our “See You at the Library Day” in the next 48 hours?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zr8b4fc0q777st29a2p1702keo6kt8kfn710sjo8_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c3h61o76cdh2bs)** If you haven’t heard about the “See You at the Library Day” on Fox News or Newsmax or your other favorite news sources, please let me tell you why it’s so critical.
---
Back when you were growing up, you may remember lazy Saturdays at the library with a kind but stern librarian. She would fill your mind with classics like _Pat the Bunny_ and _The Little Engine That Could_. And eventually you got old enough to roam by yourself and discover adventures like the _Three Musketeers_ , _Treasure Island_ and _Charlotte’s Web_.But today, all that has changed.The president of the American Library Association (ALA) is a self-described “Marxist lesbian.”Radical librarians call _Adventure of Huckleberry Finn_ and _To Kill a Mockingbird_ “racist.” They’ve stripped Laura Ingalls Wilder’s name from a prestigious book award because of her “problematic” _Little House_ series.And they bring men in wearing full makeup, dresses, and high heels for “Drag Queen Story Hours” where books like these are read to children of all ages... A is for Activist. An ABC board book for “families who want their kids to grow up in a space that is unapologetic about activism, environmental justice, civil rights, LGBTQ rights, and everything else that activists believe in and fight for...”
---
| | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zeslk10plsnnsa9fcutl0nii56oii0fq5i5dgek0_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c3h61o76cdh2bs)
---
| Woke Baby. “For all the littlest progressives, waking up to seize a new day of justice and activism. Woke babies raise their fists in the air. Woke babies cry out for justice. Woke babies grow up to change the world.”
---
| | Woke Baby. “For all the littlest progressives, waking up to seize a new day of justice and activism. Woke babies raise their fists in the air. Woke babies cry out for justice. Woke babies grow up to change the world.”
---
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z6fb3d2k07o56vha0av297fj8aceot1933nj3tco_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c3h61o76cdh2bs)
---
| | Prince and Knight. The “premier queer-friendly fairy tale” about a prince who marries a knight instead of a princess.
---
| | And The Hips on the Drag Queen Go Swish, Swish, Swish. A “family-friendly celebration of drag” that encourages children to “work it.”
---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zrsoco50fgr4nvuuqp345odslusovtdpa123j4mg_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c3h61o76cdh2bs)
---
| | And The Hips on the Drag Queen Go Swish, Swish, Swish. A “family-friendly celebration of drag” that encourages children to “work it.”
---
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zbva09rp43scguhufcql9d7egp5qhbukl489borg_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c3h61o76cdh2bs)
---
| | I wish I could tell you this was only happening in places like New York City and San Francisco.
---
| | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z607i10vesqnbmt5dj2t9migfada6cl0ukibdd10_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c3h61o76cdh2bs)
---
| But that’s just not true.<\- THIS IS A MAN leading “Drag Queen Story Hour.”
---
| | But that’s just not true.THIS IS A MAN leading “Drag Queen Story Hour.”
---
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ztam8b1ivvrslchfsqoo6odvbh9mgj55db4no990_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c3h61o76cdh2bs)
---
| | For decades, the ultra-liberal Bill and Melinda Gates Foundation and George Soros’ Open Society have spent millions radicalizing the ALA.And as a result, a new generation of pink-haired, activist librarians have made it their mission to fill library shelves with anti-American, LGBTQ-friendly, and explicitly sexual content. Maybe you’ve noticed all the displays at your own library celebrating Pride Month or elevating “the environment” to a type of religion.The “Teen Zone” is filled with books like: _Rick_ about a cross-dressing Grandpa, _Melissa_ filled with graphic nudity, and _Darkstalker_ featuring gory violence and domestic abuse.But here’s what’s really alarming. We can’t just sit back and say, “Well, I’ll just make sure my family doesn’t go to “Drag Queen Story Hour” and we won’t check out those inappropriate books.”That may be good for your family – for now.But meanwhile, the ALA uses our taxpayer-funded libraries to lure in millions of other children who grow up to be the very activists who are destroying our country and conservative values!**[**I hope you see why I need your help today.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zqk6rfr5f7i6ndg8k4a9ecs6qkmmk624ckhsstbo_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c3h61o76cdh2bs)** My name is Kirk Cameron. Maybe you recognize me from the 1980’s family sitcom “Growing Pains” or from my work in inspirational movies like “Fireproof” and “Left Behind.”I know firsthand how dangerous it is to be indoctrinated by leftist values. Pride almost took me down as a young actor in Hollywood.But the gospel saved me. I love being an actor, but what’s far more important is being a husband, dad, grandad, and a Christian.When I saw what book publishers and libraries were doing to indoctrinate children with anti-God, anti-family, anti-America messages, I knew I had a duty to take action. So together with a small Christian book publisher aptly named **Brave Books** , I wrote “As You Grow” to teach children how to grow in wisdom through the fruit of the spirit.And then we decided to go one step further and counter those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” with a wholesome Story Hour of our own. Our idea was to read the classic books you and I grew up with plus new wholesome **Brave Books** that captivate children with lessons in bravery, honesty, kindness, and patriotism.And boy, the ALA and radical librarians didn’t like that one bit.>> Over 50 libraries rejected our request to host our Story Hour. >> The ALA helped local libraries scheme ways to keep us out including booking all the event rooms for themselves.>> Social media blew up with attacks: I was compared to a Nazi (that’s original), **Brave Books** was accused of trying to “confuse and demoralize children,” our supporters were described as “bored moms/busybodies who need something to feel good about,” and on and on. I can’t even print most things these radicals said because it’s so vile.In the end we got two libraries to reverse course by reminding them that their censorship violated the Constitution of the United States.And thousands of parents and grandparents brought their little ones to those Story Hours where we pledged allegiance to the flag, sang “God Bless America,” and read wholesome and Godly books.It was incredible.But here’s the greatest part...From there, parents and grandparents started asking **Brave Books** how they could host Story Hours of their own.And that’s how our nationwide “See You at the Library Day” was born. Last year, committed conservatives just like you booked event rooms at 360 libraries in 45 states.On the same day, we held hundreds of Story Hours to fill children’s hearts with goodness, gratitude, and God.**I went to as many "See You at the Library" events as I could in one day to stand shoulder-to-shoulder with conservative parents, grandparents, and patriots...**...for a very simple mission – to reject the Left’s radical ideas and reclaim childhood innocence in America’s libraries.And this year, our ambitious goal is to expand “See You at the Library Day” to over 1,000 libraries reaching over 100,000 children.The exact date in August will soon be announced. And before then, what we need is you!It’s going to be expensive to give these volunteers the resources they need to hold Story Hours for 100+ children at each library – that's 100,000+ children in all. **[That’s why I hope you’ll give a sponsorship gift of $175, $350, $525 or more today.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zjtpf00n536lnote1m22q42kr0p09t37n0nrc5jo_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c3h61o76cdh2bs)** Your sponsorship gift will be used to send a “Story Hour Kit” to every parent, grandparent, and patriot who’s organizing a “See You at the Library Day” event. The kit includes everything they need to bring your conservative values back into our public libraries: instructions for booking their library space and running their Story Hour, small American flags for the little ones, fun stickers, wholesome books, Bible memory verse cards, and other specialty items.**Brave Books** is a small Christian company. They don’t have the millions behind them like the giant taxpayer-funded ALA.Your sponsorship gift is the only way we can fund our 1,000 Story Hours to counter the radical leftists who’ve taken control of our libraries. Knowing that, **[**please consider a sponsorship gift of $175.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zkrm8m30k14mfjrt78kkohjm07i5vhq0c7chs4h0_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c3h61o76cdh2bs)** That’s enough to sponsor one entire “Story Hour Kit” yourself. Singlehandedly, you’ll be reaching 50 children with our wholesome, Godly, and patriotic message. **[Whatever you can give whether it’s $35, $175, or anything higher or lower please get your sponsorship gift in within the next 48 hours so we know how many libraries we can get into this August!](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zotupbkpeu2mkojvfg0tda5vohk4tbrvh7qkls6g_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c3h61o76cdh2bs)**
---
[ **DONATE ** ](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z3q2lur64tfgqvk7hfmf3rrb0uaqjq7scdf8pth0_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c3h61o76cdh2bs)
---
Thank you! God Bless You and God Bless America,
---
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2znahe98fj2s63l931l00bfaa6ci777l6sqmdbv00_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c3h61o76cdh2bs)
---
Kirk Cameron
---
|
---
| | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z7oebbq037eg2em8ln1ihgsfj1fp3movnq227vv8_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c3h61o76cdh2bs)
---
**Brave Books** 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304
---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z8o79ifd9u77ua8vomlhbvpir4j70ji1kekjpev0_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c3h61o76cdh2bs)| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z0dfks50lu3q1otk7gp3pqcbpgmr7vms7d2k7nog_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c3h61o76cdh2bs)| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zl2cdi35qmpkqh9et7n9ma8lvf07k8iibn5dlm50_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c3h61o76cdh2bs)
---|---|---

name: Jen Kiggans, Former Navy Helicopter Pilot
subject: If you’re reading this…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kiggans for Congress
body:
Please do me a favor

| | | | | | | Peter,

If you're reading this email, you are in the Top 18% of Conservatives. I know you are probably bombarded with texts and emails, _so**please** know how much I appreciate that you chose to hear me out today. _

**Can you do me a favor and just read this email through to the end?** It'll only take a minute...!

The truth is that I never thought I'd be reaching out to you out of the blue like this. Eight years ago, the only kind of running I did was my morning runs - I never considered running for office...

Eight years ago, I was just a former Navy helicopter pilot working as a Nurse Practitioner and raising my four kids with my husband, who's also a Navy veteran!
---
| | [](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.)
---
| | One night, I finally decided I had yelled at the TV for the last time! I was sick of seeing do-nothing politicians embarrass the meaning of the "service." I know what it's like to serve our country. Not only am I a former Navy Pilot married to a retired Navy Pilot... I've spent my career caring for the Greatest Generation as a Nurse Practitioner.

**I won my first race by 3.4%, and while I was able to hang on last year, the Democrat Dark Money PAC ALREADY named ME on their list of TOP Targets for the next election!**

**_You know what comes next:_ **

_-> Liberals will call up their billionaire donors and ask them to stroke a _massive check_ to defeat me. _

_-> They'll recruit some far-left liberal candidate who will put _power and ego above service to our country.__

_-> They're counting on conservatives to _fall asleep at the wheel_ now that we won the White House. _

This is why I'm reaching out to you, Peter...! As a political outsider and grassroots conservative, I rely on these texts and emails to hit my fundraising goals.
---
| | [ **DONATE TO JEN KIGGANS >>** ](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews._jOUz9X8Y1Pdg)
---
| | A lot of times when I'm talking to supporters, they say they haven't chipped in because they can't chip in thousands of dollars and don't think they can make a difference.

**Let me be clear:[You don't need to write a big check to make a difference! I rely on folks who can give $17.50 or even $25 when they can afford it:](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.)**
---
| | [ **DONATE $17.50 >>** ](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.)
---
| | [ **DONATE $25 >>** ](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.-Q)
---
| | [ **DONATE ANYTHING! >>** ](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews._IPXeuIQ)
---
| | If everyone who opened this email donates today - the Top 18% of Conservatives just like you, we can hit my upcoming fundraising goal and keep liberal dark money out of my targeted race.

**Unfortunately, on top of only 18% of folks reading my emails, only 2% of conservatives will step up and donate today.[I really hope I can count on you to donate your spare change today!](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews._vAy6ZDxyx4LWGEh-31iQ)**

Truly, every little bit adds up. We're on a shoestring budget facing the Democrat machine's millions.

I hope you'll be one of the few who steps up when I need you most.

Thank you in advance,
Jen Kiggans
---
| |
---
| | [](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.)
---
I would not be where I am today without the help of my incredible and faithful supporters like you. Because of your support, I can keep fighting to make our country stronger.

Together we will get our country back on the right track and secure America's success!
---
[ SUPPORT JEN KIGGANS ](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.-Qsg)
---
| |
---

clean_body: Please do me a favor | | | | | | | Peter, If you're reading this email, you are in the Top 18% of Conservatives. I know you are probably bombarded with texts and emails, soplease know how much I appreciate that you chose to hear me out today. Can you do me a favor and just read this email through to the end? It'll only take a minute...! The truth is that I never thought I'd be reaching out to you out of the blue like this. Eight years ago, the only kind of running I did was my morning runs - I never considered running for office... Eight years ago, I was just a former Navy helicopter pilot working as a Nurse Practitioner and raising my four kids with my husband, who's also a Navy veteran! | | | | One night, I finally decided I had yelled at the TV for the last time! I was sick of seeing do-nothing politicians embarrass the meaning of the "service." I know what it's like to serve our country. Not only am I a former Navy Pilot married to a retired Navy Pilot... I've spent my career caring for the Greatest Generation as a Nurse Practitioner. I won my first race by 3.4%, and while I was able to hang on last year, the Democrat Dark Money PAC ALREADY named ME on their list of TOP Targets for the next election! You know what comes next: -> Liberals will call up their billionaire donors and ask them to stroke a massive check to defeat me. -> They'll recruit some far-left liberal candidate who will put power and ego above service to our country. -> They're counting on conservatives to fall asleep at the wheel now that we won the White House. This is why I'm reaching out to you, Peter...! As a political outsider and grassroots conservative, I rely on these texts and emails to hit my fundraising goals. | | | | A lot of times when I'm talking to supporters, they say they haven't chipped in because they can't chip in thousands of dollars and don't think they can make a difference. Let me be clear: | | | | | | | | If everyone who opened this email donates today - the Top 18% of Conservatives just like you, we can hit my upcoming fundraising goal and keep liberal dark money out of my targeted race. Unfortunately, on top of only 18% of folks reading my emails, only 2% of conservatives will step up and donate today. Truly, every little bit adds up. We're on a shoestring budget facing the Democrat machine's millions. I hope you'll be one of the few who steps up when I need you most. Thank you in advance, Jen Kiggans | | | | I would not be where I am today without the help of my incredible and faithful supporters like you. Because of your support, I can keep fighting to make our country stronger. Together we will get our country back on the right track and secure America's success! | | | | Paid for by Kiggans for Congress USE OF MILITARY IMAGES OR RANK DOES NOT IMPLY ENDORSEMENT BY THE U.S. DEPT. President Trump's first month's back in the White House have been packed with major WINS for the American people.

But the more we win, the more the radical Left tries to shut down our America First movement:

We're delivering _real_ results. We're exposing their corruption. And if we keep going, their entire house of cards will come crashing down.

That's why the Left will do whatever it takes to silence us. But I refuse to back down. And I know you won't either.

Senator Ron Johnson

\- Senator Ron Johnson

They’re exposed to dangerous ideologies about race, gender, politics, religion, and more — [often disguised as “education.”](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z8vsctcr8bnat0fa078o95cf335a3954ipqp3f88_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c3j60or2chh2bs)

name: Ramaswamy, Vivek
subject: Indulge me for a moment.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VIVEK RAMASWAMY FOR OHIO
body:
Let me take you back to the last few elections in my home state of Ohio.

[](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews._9a0hsUD6g)My fellow Americans:
[Indulge me for a moment. Let me take you back to the last few elections in my home state of Ohio.](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.)
In 2022: There was a Senate race between our now-Vice President JD Vance and Democrat Tim Ryan. Everyone in the country was talking about this race. Tim Ryan scooped up 55 million bucks in hopes of giving him a fighting chance. They outspent us by over 300%, and it quickly became one of the most expensive Senate races of the entire cycle.
Despite all that, JD Vance wiped the floor with him, winning by 6.5+ points. It was a knock-down, drag-out fight for this seat, and we were lucky to have a stellar candidate in the race. Otherwise, we might not have made it out from under the tidal wave of Democrat fundraising. [](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.) In 2024: We had a lot of things going for us. First and foremost, President Trump was on the ballot. That helped a ton. Democrats also had multiple vulnerable incumbents to defend - including far-left liberal Sherrod Brown. Now former Senator Sherrod Brown. Our horse in the race was the excellent Bernie Moreno.
Sherrod Brown raised over 100 million dollars to cling to his seat. Democrat outside groups came in with another 70 million on top of that. It was one of the most expensive races in the history of our country. Luckily, Bernie Moreno was a better candidate, a better fit for our state, had the better story, and had the backing of President Trump. He won and helped deliver our Republican Senate Majority. [](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.) In 2026: We have a major opportunity to build on their success. I'm honored to have received the endorsement of the Ohio Republican Party with an overwhelming margin. I'm laser-focused on defeating the Democrat and winning this race. **
**One of my opponents is the Anthony Fauci of Ohio. She shuttered businesses, closed schools, and locked our state down. The AP called her a 'household name' in the state. And she's a well-connected, well-funded bigwig in Democrat circles. It's even possible that other big-name Democrats may enter this race too (maybe even some mentioned above...), and that's why this race is already gaining national attention.
I wouldn't be in this race if I didn't think I could win. I'm confident I can - especially with President Trump endorsing my campaign. However, I'm bracing for the fight of my life. Given the previous two big races here, this very well could be more expensive than BOTH OF THEM! That's why I'm readying my defenses right here and now. If there's anything I can say to convince you to donate to my campaign, I would be extremely grateful! I can't win this without good folks like you stepping up once again. [](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.)| | [**CONTRIBUTE $4 HERE** ](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.)
---
| [**CONTRIBUTE $40 HERE** ](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews._cDQRYVSWw)
---
| [**CONTRIBUTE $400 HERE** ](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.-9yNQ)
---
You see, Ohio has been a battleground state for a long time - especially lately. If the last few years are any indication, I'll need a LOT of help to win.
**
**
PLEASE:
**
**
[So if you 're willing to help win what could be the biggest race of the cycle, I humbly ask you to donate now.](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.)
**
**
God bless America,
**Vivek Ramaswamy**
| |
---
| | PAID FOR BY VIVEK RAMASWAMY FOR OHIO
---

350 E 1st Ave
Ste 100
Columbus, OH 43201

[Privacy Policy](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.-MOw)

To unsubscribe from Vivek Ramaswamy for Ohio, [click here](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.-2Q3QEPz3rYR-Q7YQ)

body:
| Dear Patriot, If you've been paying attention like I have, you know **THE ENTIRE SWAMP** is working overtime to slow down and stop President Trump from delivering the bold, *America First* agenda he was elected to lead. The media, Democrats, and even some Republicans are standing in his way at every turn. President Trump needs all the allies he can get, but I've got bad news. **He 's losing one of his best.** Arizona Congressman Andy Biggs has stood by President Trump from **DAY ONE** , on the border, against the Deep State, and fighting for the constitutional values we all hold dear. But Andy Biggs is leaving Washington, D.C. to run for Governor. That means his seat is vulnerable, at risk of falling to an "unreliable" Republican or even a Democrat. **_I 'm not going to let that happen._** I've spent my entire life in Arizona's 5th Congressional District. It's where I grew up, where I met my wife and got married, where I started my homebuilding business, and where I'm raising my three children. That's why I've decided to run for Congress. We need a proven conservative like Andy Biggs who will stand with President Trump when it matters most. **_Will you help me win by making an emergency donation right now at_** [https://DanielKeenanforCongress.com/Donate?](https://contact.rightstreetjournal.com/l/SA2g8e0zvnmRykSlCcaPiQ/o09n0LLVEDM0iE1763892eB4UQ/Nd0DiEut0vJbhbjALRP4UQ) [DONATE NOW ](https://contact.rightstreetjournal.com/l/SA2g8e0zvnmRykSlCcaPiQ/sh5vuAdP9g9u4mpaz1xT1Q/Nd0DiEut0vJbhbjALRP4UQ) Here's what I'm fighting for -- just simple, *commonsense conservative* policies: 📜 **Codify** every cut DOJ has made and all of President Trump's executive orders so courts and future presidents can't undo them with the stroke of a pen. 💊 **Back Trump 's plan** to stop Americans from getting ripped off on prescription drugs while foreign countries pay pennies on the dollar. 🗳️ **Secure our elections** using the authority the Constitution gives Congress under Article I: require proof of citizenship to register, ID to vote, ban hackable voting machines, and make sure all ballots are counted on election night. If Florida can do it, why can't every state? 🚫 **Ban stock trading by Members of Congress.** No more getting rich off insider knowledge. In the real world, that would get you sent to *prison* -- and it needs to stop. **_Do you agree with what I 'm fighting for, not just for my district but for the entire country?_** Then I urge you, make sure this district sends a **MAGA WARRIOR** to Congress who will have President Trump's back. **_Make a contribution today at:_** [https://DanielKeenanforCongress.com/Donate](https://contact.rightstreetjournal.com/l/SA2g8e0zvnmRykSlCcaPiQ/5235J892l76390rgOz8kBoy2lQ/Nd0DiEut0vJbhbjALRP4UQ) [DONATE NOW ](https://contact.rightstreetjournal.com/l/SA2g8e0zvnmRykSlCcaPiQ/ju3qjRDELQGc9V9xfNu8dw/Nd0DiEut0vJbhbjALRP4UQ) Thank you! Respectfully,
Daniel Keenan **P.S.** President Trump is losing one of his strongest allies in Congress. Andy Biggs is running for Governor and I'm running to replace him. Help me make sure this seat stays **pro-Trump** , **pro-Constitution** , and **pro-America**. **_Make your donation now:_** [https://DanielKeenanforCongress.com/Donate](https://contact.rightstreetjournal.com/l/SA2g8e0zvnmRykSlCcaPiQ/JnZPsWxQLqIpsqg7gcaBsQ/Nd0DiEut0vJbhbjALRP4UQ)

name: =?utf-8?B?SmFtZXMgT+KAmUtlZWZl?=
subject: Our culture has a sick hatred for integrity and achievement
body:
I learned firsthand how our culture despises achievement and wishes to destroy anyone willing to challenge the status quo

|
---
| | [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/3nDInhnkCQAEMvPFM2ZnXQ~~/AARclBA~/TITuMwCAnSy5pO-R4zkHqym_HPaE2LSVtq1DXRInmadvnYszXKp3jI4voMmdHam151GInRy8iGkA_msCNryGdrV27TsTQKIYbVJ71oHWb3QX04OyVSJTPQh0uuAP57bw5LLMh7llKGg48D8UAbz3Ud3JEr8lXhhqLLYz70pcMX-XW1pIkw6Lqc-FpVJV3wyMsGPAD8traE00IYYpNEaQiQ~~) Friend,

I learned firsthand how our culture despises achievement and wishes to destroy anyone willing to challenge the status quo, big government, or the Fake News media machine.

When I was ousted from Project Veritas, two big things (one you haven't heard about) happened to me.

FIRST: The media launched a vicious smear campaign against me like I've never seen before. **Make no mistake:** _They identified this as an opportunity to "cancel" me forever_ and tried everything in their power to destroy me and everything I've ever stood for.

They failed.

SECOND: I received an OVERWHELMING amount of support from patriots across the country. These brave men and women defended me, but more importantly, they stood up for the principles of liberty and free speech.

**One of my top supporters was The Atlas Society.**

Jennifer Grossman, the CEO of The Atlas Society, proudly stood by my side and even invited me to speak with a gathering of the organization's top student leaders about free speech and how Howard Roark, the fictional hero of _The Fountainhead_ by Ayn Rand, remains my inspiration to act with integrity.

Which is why I am personally reaching out to you.

I told Jennifer I would help The Atlas Society raise $25,000 in the next 48 hours by personally contacting my online supporters. [Please consider making an URGENT donation of any amount to The Atlas Society by clicking here.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/3nDInhnkCQAEMvPFM2ZnXQ~~/AARclBA~/TITuMwCAnSy5pO-R4zkHqym_HPaE2LSVtq1DXRInmadvnYszXKp3jI4voMmdHam151GInRy8iGkA_msCNryGdrV27TsTQKIYbVJ71oHWb3QX04OyVSJTPQh0uuAP57bw5LLMh7llKGg48D8UAbz3Ud3JEr8lXhhqLLYz70pcMX-XW1pIkw6Lqc-FpVJV3wyMsGPAD8traE00IYYpNEaQiQ~~)
[Donate >>](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/3nDInhnkCQAEMvPFM2ZnXQ~~/AARclBA~/TITuMwCAnSy5pO-R4zkHqym_HPaE2LSVtq1DXRInmadvnYszXKp3jI4voMmdHam151GInRy8iGkA_msCNryGdrV27TsTQKIYbVJ71oHWb3QX04OyVSJTPQh0uuAP57bw5LLMh7llKGg48D8UAbz3Ud3JEr8lXhhqLLYz70pcMX-XW1pIkw6Lqc-FpVJV3wyMsGPAD8traE00IYYpNEaQiQ~~)
Let me tell you more about The Atlas Society and how they are fundamentally changing the direction of our country.

_I will also tell you HOW The Atlas Society is spreading its message in what I consider one of the most innovative methods I 've EVER seen a nonprofit organization engage in before._

_**_So keep reading_!**_

My mentor, Andrew Breitbart, reminds us that politics is downstream from culture. But what is culture downstream from? Answer: Philosophy. That's where The Atlas Society shines, engaging young people with the virtues of reason, achievement, and benevolent self-interest in wildly creative, artistic ways.

Have you ever read Ayn Rand's _Atlas Shrugged_ or _The Fountainhead_?

These books changed how I saw the world and my role in it.

But they are 700+ pages long!

**Jennifer shared this terrifying statistic with me:** Daily reading of books among young people has fallen from 70% in the late 1970s to 12% today.

So, how do we preserve Rand's role as the greatest all-time recruiter for liberty? That's where The Atlas Society gets creative! They leverage art and technology to create programming for "_skimmers, swimmers, and deep divers_."
**Skimmers:** Social media memes and animated videos -- every single one of their 50 posts a week gets 40K comments, shares, and likes. The "Draw My Life" videos on concepts like Capitalism, Property Rights, and Free Speech reach MILLIONS of viewers. Links invite young people on a journey for deeper intellectual exploration.

**Swimmers:** Graphic novel adaptations of Ayn Rand's shorter books, Pocket Guides that distill big concepts like Postmodernism and Socialism into a 90-minute read. Weekly podcasts with top entrepreneurs and thought-leaders, and discussion groups like "Morals & Markets."

**Deep Divers:** They recruited an all-star academic faculty of philosophers and economists who guide students on a deeper study of Rand's philosophy, publish independent work, and provide programming at their summer conference for students (the Galt's Gulch Summit, where I spoke!).
Jennifer and The Atlas Society are accomplishing great things for our country, and I hope you will be one of the FIRST supporters of mine to make a donation and help me reach our $25,000 goal. Please use one of these links to donate:
[Donate $10 >>>](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/r-SkuPQctjgnJwlTFL2PeQ~~/AARclBA~/mEFj6H6ryDLfm6NyzVvQBDkmfvrefgI4DBdCnJB0a733DahYY4BxcNCsvMKjHe0Rp-UCFQumz1cg-axJiGdRddYJxPkdA1pYwWSRqggQ5JFi3F3ybNDj924FInekXKWgM7e2fraKxNZxX1s6adzj-H_8ooslB5tfdPpPWwoAQUe9iurUxswPcvL1j30aYNMQTDY6UKifg2ipaR7XvjDshg~~)

Ultimately, here is what The Atlas Society is fighting FOR:
* Free market capitalism
* Rational self-interest
* Respect for achievement and success
* Free speech
* The future of young people and our great country

And here is what The Atlas Society is fighting AGAINST:
* Cancel Culture
* Our Educational system indoctrinating young people to embrace socialism
* Our sick culture that demonizes success and embraces twisted ideas
* Big government

I am inviting you to support The Atlas Society with a donation of ANY amount.

As a personal favor to me, please make your donation within the next 48 hours so I can help Jennifer reach our goal of $25,000.

[Here is the link to donate one more time.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/3nDInhnkCQAEMvPFM2ZnXQ~~/AARclBA~/TITuMwCAnSy5pO-R4zkHqym_HPaE2LSVtq1DXRInmadvnYszXKp3jI4voMmdHam151GInRy8iGkA_msCNryGdrV27TsTQKIYbVJ71oHWb3QX04OyVSJTPQh0uuAP57bw5LLMh7llKGg48D8UAbz3Ud3JEr8lXhhqLLYz70pcMX-XW1pIkw6Lqc-FpVJV3wyMsGPAD8traE00IYYpNEaQiQ~~)

Well, NOT these students.

The Atlas Society is teaching students that they CAN accomplish great things, become leaders, and inspire others to do the same.

[Please take action by making a donation to The Atlas Society today. You can click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $500, $1,000, or ANY amount.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/3nDInhnkCQAEMvPFM2ZnXQ~~/AARclBA~/TITuMwCAnSy5pO-R4zkHqym_HPaE2LSVtq1DXRInmadvnYszXKp3jI4voMmdHam151GInRy8iGkA_msCNryGdrV27TsTQKIYbVJ71oHWb3QX04OyVSJTPQh0uuAP57bw5LLMh7llKGg48D8UAbz3Ud3JEr8lXhhqLLYz70pcMX-XW1pIkw6Lqc-FpVJV3wyMsGPAD8traE00IYYpNEaQiQ~~)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. name: The Flyover
subject: New Storm Threat, the 'Golden Dome,' and Fake Books
body:
Severe storms were expected to batter the [southern Plains, Midwest, and Southeast overnight and through Tuesday](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFugzAURb8GNqPHAwcvHrqwpWtHZOxH7MrYkf0SlH59RdQ_6HakK12de7-uy9WEGNLt0-ykectLoqNGYqbyRs5lZ1_IMHu65egoubwgoBQgBfaLMyG-lrF1eiNCGlrS_TROChHU1HqtVnlxZhudQiUl2nG1EtzYr3bqV7CqDfpsA4l9D6BAdsOGA27rANCrQaJrRiAXOJfuO4fEnrb4yk8qnc17G7Vnvtdm-GhwbnA-jqNLqz3Vz7zB-cQG50cVf-TJPF_ivawKziUZl6kKppRCFauJUdTwQ054E6LwgUXND_ZUkrhHE1IVxSaDMKkJ2qLd_QgxhnqZmhFuuwnxLcb_evOp8TcAAP__fheLoQ), putting more than 30 million Americans under threat from hurricane-force winds, flash flooding, and hail up to the size of tennis balls.

## New Tornado Threat Looms Over Midwest, South
Severe storms were expected to batter the [southern Plains, Midwest, and Southeast through Tuesday](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFugzAURb8GNqPHAwcvHrqwpWtHZOxH7MrYkf0SlH59RdQ_6HakK12de7-uy9WEGNLt0-ykectLoqNGYqbyRs5lZ1_IMHu65egoubwgoBQgBfaLMyG-lrF1eiNCGlrS_TROChHU1HqtVnlxZhudQiUl2nG1EtzYr3bqV7CqDfpsA4l9D6BAdsOGA27rANCrQaJrRiAXOJfuO4fEnrb4yk8qnc17G7Vnvtdm-GhwbnA-jqNLqz3Vz7zB-cQG50cVf-TJPF_ivawKziUZl6kKppRCFauJUdTwQ054E6LwgUXND_ZUkrhHE1IVxSaDMKkJ2qLd_QgxhnqZmhFuuwnxLcb_evOp8TcAAP__fheLoQ), putting more than 30 million Americans under threat from hurricane-force winds, flash flooding, and hail up to the size of tennis balls. One enhanced risk zone covered nearly all of Tennessee and Kentucky, affecting 13.6 million people. Another broader area from Indianapolis to Atlanta—including St. Louis, Louisville, Memphis, and Birmingham—was under slight risk warnings. [See a map here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDuO4zAMQE8jdwpo-ruFim3cZdstDSaiIs3IUiAxMXL7QTKZE0xHgODDe_x_XI8UYkiXf7SxEZfXxHuNLMLlNUoum_jCJOL5kqPlZPOKgIOGQWO7WgrxsfaNNY4ZuWvYtFM_zYgwT403w-RGgq4fz4AjzI7ObgI8EY62BSRognnSYMC2BZhhOHQOO3SnDqCduwGt6oFtkFwOHzkk8eziI9-5HM55a6LxItequr8KF4XLziT-e6dweelXhYvkkshmhcszSuHyU9D-0ZXvXFi_L3W-yakwfeot2J2r6GukkKqu-SZev0FctacQ9R6SbYqx1z3EGOo4qR4uG4X4kpNfffRu8CsAAP__UOyL2A). The storms follow a deadly stretch of extreme weather that left at least 28 dead and over 127,000 without power, mostly in Missouri and Kentucky.
## World’s First Bladder Transplant Succeeds
Doctors at UCLA and USC have performed the world’s first [successful human bladder transplant](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGO8yAQhJ_G7rCWBWJSUPxNuvztlRY2S-CETYT3YuXtT84rXDeakWY039d9uvtc8vb471dyHOu00bEXYqb2kVzbyqmRZ070qCXQFuqEgEaAESin4HN5T7oPLhIhqZ6cHPVoEcGOfXLxqrQxFiQttIC9qGjn2cB1waCu1i59dmcbGJQSwIIZVESFcVYA0iqDodNAIXNtw3fNGyeK5V1f1Ialrn1xifm5d-pfh7cOb8dxDG-faj3TDm_nh9OurYRdxNx2FvSiJtLP6jcxFx8CNYESL6i10kPitfTNheeRS8n7Zew0PFafy2eO_8To5fA3AAD__9EZeqc), giving 40-something father Oscar Larrainzar a new bladder and kidney during an eight-hour surgery on May 4. The landmark procedure followed a four-year collaboration between the schools and is part of an ongoing UCLA clinical trial. Larrainzar, who had been on dialysis for seven years, is reportedly doing well with fully functioning donor organs and no need for post-op dialysis. [See photos here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDGOgzAQRU8DnSNjYyCFi23osu2WyDADzGqwI3sSlNuvkits96UvPT29n9t0C8QUt-9woJc1TRHPwiiC-TMl5UP2jEFkxy0xYIQ0GW2c0k6ZZoJA_JraGvyKaNDW6Ju-7Qdj9NDXu7dOhzBfr64b3AIDdF3vrF5Aa2hmmJua_JumnWkarQftLnY11qyz1boZrDNQtRqBJOXLb6IoO678Sk_MlyUdNftd5F4q-1WZsTIjRaBwYpH3W5lxCUxrypGCKo-8YYqKImCeKauNmBVjgKLOlBmKWikXUfvjCFHNHAAwK8khljuHKJUZ6-zhfhIzla6vWr0dgfgjIv-q9_TmLwAA__9C34bL). Surgeons say the breakthrough could offer new hope to patients with severe bladder dysfunction.
## George Wendt, _Cheers_ Star, Dies at 76
George Wendt, the actor who brought Norm Peterson to life on NBC’s _Cheers_ , [died peacefully in his sleep at home](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGuozAQRb_GdI6GAQMpXGxDl223RE5mwF4ZG9mjIP7-KfmF1x3pSkdX599jebgQQ9r-up2trHlJfNbIIly-KLns4gs7Ec9bjsSJ8oKARoPR2C7kQryWviG7MiN3Ddt27McJEaax8fZJDqehbyeD6KB9jogjvO54p3UlM0AT7McGBtsWYAJz61bscH12AO3UGSTVA1OQXG7_c0jieY1XfnO5vfLeROtFjqq6PwpnhXO6jlzlMymcP2KFM5gvK5w5CRdxIe2cROG8cS4b65MTiSZ2pF-euVRdxRV9-qyP6C4mnXLZNQWu2okeB4VzUywdZ4gx1GFUPWy7C_F7SX7V8W3xJwAA__-O34XA) Tuesday morning. He was 76. Wendt starred in all 275 episodes of the hit series, [earning six consecutive Emmy nominations](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLHOpCAUhZ8GOybXC6IUFNvQzbZbGkauygbF4F0n8_Yb5xX-7iRf8uWc8-c5PkPKaV9-h40cz2Xc6X1mYqb6jVzqxmulwLzSUnKkPZYRATsJncR2jCHlz6ib6GYiJNWQa3vdD4gw9M3q7Mt0xtowTaBn2yttTR-M7UwfAKZomuRuG3TYtgADdA81o8L5pQDaQXUYhQaKiUt9_C1p55Xm_CkX1cdUtia7lfk4hfol0Av0V6iJ-HMzgf42C_R8CfTllfjfTU95UDkyyXufQL9QqQvJN-2RZaQQ5bQS1VO2qIwGbS0K9E118XinnNNpeqFh2ULK3wr8o98uh_8DAAD__3hWf7U) for his portrayal of the lovable Boston bar regular. A [native of Chicago](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL3u4yAQxJ8Gd1iwGH8UFNe4y7VXWiQshhP2RngVlLc_JfcI_2Y0xWg08_tz224-l3zuv_2BjiNtJ7arIDPWr2WqB6eKnjnhTiXgGWgDBVYqK0Fvwefy3oYuuIgIaDp0ehqmGUDNU5ecwTguNhqlx-gHs8zeRm1wsdM8PIZx7LL7tCkLWis1K9ubCAbi3SilZ2MhiEFhyEy1_0v55ISxvOmFtX_Q0RWXmJ-XML8ErALW1lqfqJR3IwoVn1T5f1LAyq-vyM8vAeuOVHeUDc_AMqAP8pEQ6yVPqoeke2apwYwAsFglYO2qC8-WS8nXOIlB7YfP5TuCf0Tu5eBfAAAA__-FJIHt), Wendt got his start in improv with the Second City comedy troupe before making it big in television. He later reprised the Norm role in _Frasier_ and other series, and fronted his own short-lived CBS sitcom. He is survived by his wife, Bernadette Birkett—who voiced Norm’s unseen wife on _Cheers—_ and their three children.

clean_body: Severe storms were expected to batter the , putting more than 30 million Americans under threat from hurricane-force winds, flash flooding, and hail up to the size of tennis balls. | | | | | | Wednesday, May 21, 2025 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1927, Charles Lindbergh completed the first solo, nonstop transatlantic flight in history, flying his Spirit of St. Louis from Long Island, New York, to Paris, France. () Wondering how to spend a productive weekend with your partner? Today's Wisdom Wednesday digs into that can help the happiest couples protect their connection. Enjoy! Today's sponsor is , offering an opportunity to invest in the real estate market. | Don’t feel like reading The Flyover? Tune in to The Flyover Podcast! New episodes drop daily—watch on YouTube or listen on Spotify and Apple Podcasts, all in under 15 minutes. | | New Tornado Threat Looms Over Midwest, South Severe storms were expected to batter the , putting more than 30 million Americans under threat from hurricane-force winds, flash flooding, and hail up to the size of tennis balls. One enhanced risk zone covered nearly all of Tennessee and Kentucky, affecting 13.6 million people. Another broader area from Indianapolis to Atlanta—including St. Louis, Louisville, Memphis, and Birmingham—was under slight risk warnings. . The storms follow a deadly stretch of extreme weather that left at least 28 dead and over 127,000 without power, mostly in Missouri and Kentucky. World’s First Bladder Transplant Succeeds Doctors at UCLA and USC have performed the world’s first , giving 40-something father Oscar Larrainzar a new bladder and kidney during an eight-hour surgery on May 4. The landmark procedure followed a four-year collaboration between the schools and is part of an ongoing UCLA clinical trial. Larrainzar, who had been on dialysis for seven years, is reportedly doing well with fully functioning donor organs and no need for post-op dialysis. . Surgeons say the breakthrough could offer new hope to patients with severe bladder dysfunction. George Wendt, Cheers Star, Dies at 76 George Wendt, the actor who brought Norm Peterson to life on NBC’s Cheers , Tuesday morning. He was 76. Wendt starred in all 275 episodes of the hit series, for his portrayal of the lovable Boston bar regular. A , Wendt got his start in improv with the Second City comedy troupe before making it big in television. He later reprised the Norm role in Frasier and other series, and fronted his own short-lived CBS sitcom. He is survived by his wife, Bernadette Birkett—who voiced Norm’s unseen wife on Cheers— and their three children. name: Gary Sinise
subject: Celebrating the 20th Anniversary of the National Memorial Day Parade
body:
| | | [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/avOp/?__vbtrk=MjkxNjc4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjkxNjc4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
Friend, it’s Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13 __and The Green Mile or the CBS television series CSI: NY – but it was in 1994 playing the role of Lt. Dan in Forrest Gump that changed my life and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. I've served as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. nearly every year since American Veterans Center revived it in 2005. **Now, I’m grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event.** This year will be a remembrance like no other, as we commemorate the 80th anniversary of victory in World War II and the 250th birthdays of the U.S. Army, Navy, and Marine Corps. **[Friend, the National Memorial Day Parade is ENTIRELY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous Americans like you. Will you help chip in today to help support the Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/avOp/?__vbtrk=MjkxNjc4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjkxNjc4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**
---
[ **Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/avOp/?__vbtrk=MjkxNjc4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjkxNjc4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/avOp/?__vbtrk=MjkxNjc4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjkxNjc4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, _the entire parade_ costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy’s Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! _That means that every dollar that’s contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event._ **But I want to reiterate that American Veterans Center does not take ANY federal funding for this event. It is funded _entirely_ by private citizens like you who want to honor those who have sacrificed so much for our country.** Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like:
* Record hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to Today before we lose these stories forever.

* Hold our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear first-hand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam.

* Produce veteran focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans the price of our freedom.

[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/avOq/?__vbtrk=MjkxNjc4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjkxNjc4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)[**Please join me in support of the National Memorial Day Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, or more right now.**](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/avOp/?__vbtrk=MjkxNjc4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjkxNjc4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct) If you’ve been looking for an opportunity to give back to those who have given so much for our freedom, this is one of the best possible ways you could do it. _And for a special group of veterans, this might be one of the last chances we get._ You see, with each year that goes by, we lose more and more of our World War II veterans, and for the few we have remaining, traveling to Washington, D.C., for the parade is difficult. WWII veterans were a key part of the first parade when it was revived in 2005, as they have been every year since for the last 20 years. _But this may be the last year we have the opportunity to have these brave men and women with us for the parade._** ** **That's why we are making a concerted effort to ensure these veterans are at this year's National Memorial Day Parade to honor them one last time. ** So this year, as we mark the 80th anniversary of victory in Europe and Japan to end World War II – and the 250th anniversaries of the Army, Navy, and Marine Corps – I encourage you to help us honor these brave veterans while we still have them with us.
---
[ **Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/avOp/?__vbtrk=MjkxNjc4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjkxNjc4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
And no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you. On Memorial Day – not just this momentous year of military milestones, but every year – please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. Visit a local veterans’ cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. _I believe that while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more._ _**[Friend, thank you for your support of America’s heroes, and please – if you’re able, make a gift to fund the National Memorial Day Parade right now during its 20th anniversary.](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/avOp/?__vbtrk=MjkxNjc4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjkxNjc4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**_ Sincerely, Gary SiniseHonorary Grand MarshalNational Memorial Day Parade
---
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/avOp/?__vbtrk=MjkxNjc4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjkxNjc4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
[ **Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/avOp/?__vbtrk=MjkxNjc4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjkxNjc4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. © American Veterans Center
1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201
---
| [Unsubscribe](https://app.vbout.com/index.php?r=Email/OptoutConfirmationForm&messageid=291678&trkid=692269248&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com)
---
215 N Payne Street, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood corruption
body:
take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life...

| | |
---
| | Dear Friend, Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children. You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace. But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...

And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas. Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. [**Today, I'm inviting you to support the very first children 's television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/3oUu0pE1_5uCvbYlaHR5eA~~/AARclBA~/ooF6Gglqvs-_XPwOlPaIW8vQPxBePnhu8odcm5Qlhb4zg8Qa5PO3cQNxkxe9Aq2RzaRqzqh4PBmmM19MwnbI81-ok5FXLtJspfLvpCQMjTXua5cQcCHviCj7kEHbNBydKVDfC6RASCwtLU4b8l_1w4HfgRx3IWkulcA4wkp2yetgQ9hcg4i7OTP_EmfzFfI98TC0Wk987PQ5I2NcbUUA5tLBMK8O0c5L2I0RhlxWyaNCTReET229yCex6UAZvyY4hcGSPHfg5j7Cx_w75OXKHcOPU2eg0YaZ4nxjt6jAv9E~) And it's only possible with the help of grandparents and seniors like you. Introducing:_ Iggy and Mr. Kirk_. This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of the truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. **[Because I can't beat the Hollywood groomers without your help.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/3oUu0pE1_5uCvbYlaHR5eA~~/AARclBA~/ooF6Gglqvs-_XPwOlPaIW8vQPxBePnhu8odcm5Qlhb4zg8Qa5PO3cQNxkxe9Aq2RzaRqzqh4PBmmM19MwnbI81-ok5FXLtJspfLvpCQMjTXua5cQcCHviCj7kEHbNBydKVDfC6RASCwtLU4b8l_1w4HfgRx3IWkulcA4wkp2yetgQ9hcg4i7OTP_EmfzFfI98TC0Wk987PQ5I2NcbUUA5tLBMK8O0c5L2I0RhlxWyaNCTReET229yCex6UAZvyY4hcGSPHfg5j7Cx_w75OXKHcOPU2eg0YaZ4nxjt6jAv9E~)** Millions of families are already watching Season One of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ on our streaming service BRAVE+, YouTube, and on DVD. And the reviews from parents, grandparents, and kids are incredible. One Mom of three little girls told us: "Our family was struggling through a pretty difficult day. But I turned on _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ and that was exactly what my heart needed as much as theirs." It's amazing that your simple response to this letter can make that kind of difference for a family. Each episode costs around $70,000 to produce. I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously we won't work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. [**That 's why I'm asking you to help us finish Season Two of ****_Iggy and Mr. Kirk_****by giving a gift of $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $70,000 per episode.**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/3oUu0pE1_5uCvbYlaHR5eA~~/AARclBA~/ooF6Gglqvs-_XPwOlPaIW8vQPxBePnhu8odcm5Qlhb4zg8Qa5PO3cQNxkxe9Aq2RzaRqzqh4PBmmM19MwnbI81-ok5FXLtJspfLvpCQMjTXua5cQcCHviCj7kEHbNBydKVDfC6RASCwtLU4b8l_1w4HfgRx3IWkulcA4wkp2yetgQ9hcg4i7OTP_EmfzFfI98TC0Wk987PQ5I2NcbUUA5tLBMK8O0c5L2I0RhlxWyaNCTReET229yCex6UAZvyY4hcGSPHfg5j7Cx_w75OXKHcOPU2eg0YaZ4nxjt6jAv9E~)**** Whether you can send $35, $25,000, anything in between, or anything higher or lower - please know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated. clean_body: take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... | | | | | Dear Friend, Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children. You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace. But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on Blue's Clues... ~ | | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses. And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas. Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. ~ And it's only possible with the help of grandparents and seniors like you. Introducing: Iggy and Mr. Kirk. This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of the truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. ~ Millions of families are already watching Season One of Iggy and Mr. Kirk on our streaming service BRAVE+, YouTube, and on DVD. And the reviews from parents, grandparents, and kids are incredible. One Mom of three little girls told us: "Our family was struggling through a pretty difficult day. But I turned on Iggy and Mr. Kirk and that was exactly what my heart needed as much as theirs." It's amazing that your simple response to this letter can make that kind of difference for a family. Each episode costs around $70,000 to produce. I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously we won't work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. ~** Whether you can send $35, $25,000, anything in between, or anything higher or lower - please know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated. As a special "Thank You" for your ~ , I'll send you Season One of Iggy and Mr. Kirk for your family to enjoy FREE on DVD. And with your ~, I'll also send you a copy of my children's book: Pride Comes Before the Fall which teaches children to be humble before God instead of prideful. I wrote Pride Comes Before the Fall with the great team at BRAVE books - the same God-focused conservative team that's bringing Iggy and Mr. Kirk to life. ## First Project Homecoming Flight Departs Houston
The Trump administration’s Project Homecoming initiative, in which illegal immigrants are offered $1,000 to return to their home countries, [chartered its first flight](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGO3CAQBuCnsTssGMN6KVyk2e7SprTGMBgibCyYO9--feQob5B2NPr1f_-vj-UDU07H9hN3mvk7lOWgq2Viprp4Oktl5FSOkNMWueXCkUtZQIIR0ghQi8eU34vu_bxKb1VPs5r09AQzqrGPs9LoR6e9gmD804CyClErabWbwATfp_kOkwaUUlJpOwQLTiOBDo_JSZg6LcknLnXgSEzf2EJ-ly-qgyt7n-fIfLZu_NHBq4PXdV2DW5uyt-P-6ODlYxMuYmWq4h9EeDqxsojls3E5BDZx1vKb3H3ayZU9HZvYiJv4PDzVC98dvLBycpkWMm5dp_Ehgh5JGINS2MkZ8QxTsICrhTEMkffc19mfV8o5tccN2XZM-W9v_r-1v2b4EwAA__9yYpWj) out of Houston on Monday with 64 Honduran and Colombian nationals. The initiative was announced by the White House earlier this month, offering illegal immigrants who self-deport a $1,000 stipend and the opportunity to [reenter the country legally in the future](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDuOxCAMQE9DOkbgkA8FxTbpZtstI0JMwoqECDy_268yc4TtLFl-8ns_1_FqQwz78m03NPT0adzxUSISYR5nPFImSyHtPoZlpRITrZTSCAIaLhoOcpxtiK9RVbOZxKxlhUZ2quuhqWVdraZBbH3fWq21rVH3aupVO-OkJ-mt70UVzAkTDUgphVT64jU4ZRGUbzsnoGNK4Bwo5QutSPi0xcdXumO-uLRV0axER2H1F4OBwbC_jlToXDEYTjKDQTTvmcFwK_z0YzAcOf2iI76mDV3awr7waG-7W7FwH3Ih_lHmyfNW8RAjLjbysG1hyXanwq1zeNB5KIUQnBIvGD3_RGMwVNnMxyPEGEp7SiybDfH9M_2v9N3AXwAAAP__gQ-UAw). Trump claimed the program would “save American taxpayers billions and billions of dollars.” It [costs about $17,000](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL1urDAQRp8GOiPbmL_CxW2229umRI49hokGjOzJsvv2EdlHSDfSSJ_OOR_3-e6QcF_-uw0sP2OadzgLATPkOcCRMjvGtEfCZeVCiVdOadZSd0J2Qqs5OKTXbOpgP2WYVA1WDWYYddeqtl5t8EMYBj-2ow-t6f3UtkqGUU6j1i50fY32GpOdVkpJZaYmTtobB9rEfvBSD5WREJBTbngFhqcrkV7pAbnxaavJrsxHqdp_lb5V-naeZxPT87K4_pW-HYmQ0ZfrzOkLPIs1beDThvsiyH3vfoUiIubC4u0peiOQCBZHArcNl-x2LqIARfGOUmcbjhOJsPQX4bI5pF8g_lvGh9U_AQAA__-8aorU) to arrest, detain, and deport an illegal immigrant, according to the Department of Homeland Security (DHS). In a social media post, DHS Secretary Kristi Noem [urged those in the country illegally](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLvOnDAQRp_GdCB7uBcu0rjbtCmR8QVGMhjZk2V5-8jZR_ib0RRz-c7581peGgOe2299OEkfH5fT3Tk4IpcW666YSBPG0wfcdsoh0k4xLsChr3lfg1isxvAsXWXlyu0sKifF2I0T9K1oq10O_Tobu07eT95qvZrBdIMdPJ9W3xo7VijLMd6DEIKLbm78DKbTDjo_jIbDyDruLFJMDe2O3EdnH574dqkx8aiC3ImuzNpfDBQDdd938zdrilY_ZYCByhTTw0AVMgbqigEJTWnLZwaKlyJmBsruuTa7TuRS_UWuswu-_prAc6vxOHBL-qSyP7Vj28I8cD4yUFWS9roxBMxDSb0dGsP_kPQztW8J_wIAAP__siSN3Q) to “take control of your departure and receive financial support to return home,” warning that those who don’t would face fines, arrest, deportation, and lose any chance of returning.
## Uvalde Strong Act Passes Legislature
The Texas Senate unanimously approved the Uvalde Strong Act, a measure that aims to [address failures in the law enforcement response](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGO2zAQRL9G6miQa1o6FSzSqLu0KYWVuZSIrLQCuWfZfx_4kCZ16hk8vJlfn9MnZs778hM3CvpMMu10ViZVKlOkQ4qiZtkT52XVyqKrikxg4WbszYCbImZ-Tb6NYbZxcC0F1_v-A25Xd23XMNvhiqlLbvDW0z36mQYCDwR9hx_YtTm8YfYGzjnr_HBJA9w9EvjU9XcLfeMtxaxSLrqS0hNr4pc8qFzusrUcVtWjNtcfDYwNjOd5Xn4_cX-HDYxV5TAb1mrqKqJ5X2oDY96OIg-KplA9ZK9kVP5tmVzNIshGkvl6IEcyVYvsi5kzs8HjL2B-mW8lw7TkyqhfhRoY2xLicWbmXLv3gGXDzN---n8vPwL8CQAA__8KtZbs) to the 2022 Robb Elementary School shooting that killed 21 people. House Bill 33, authored by former Uvalde mayor and first-term Republican State Rep. Don McLaughlin, requires local law enforcement and school districts to develop active shooter response plans. It also mandates regular training and incident reports. "_This is about keeping our schools safer and making sure law enforcement and first responders are never set up to fail_ ," [McLaughlin said](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkbGuozAQRb8GuomMcSApKLZJ97bdEg32GCwZD_LMS17-fkW0f7Dt0ehoju6fr_kLU05l_Y07TfoTeS70kkyqVOdAB1dFTVxiTuumklk3ZZ6tsVcwV7DdHDDl9-zaMC0m3LuWpm50481e-65vt8mYwS7G34Yrkul7F8d-CD114X5zFG5Lm6ZTZq626zrTufsl3q13SNbFYfTGjo0zFJJyvehGSj8oMb_5SfXieW_ztKke0vS_Gvto7ON83wkWLMol8Xnzjzb2kdljbuzjYwGhgkpwoAgJfD8xBwLRymUF9AqR_beksgIX2FEEZGPWE2R8AZXI1dNORaGSHFyEoPKyAOUPxfqGo7Ky5ywgfmPOIBhJ322dwvFKOScZzr51x5Q_Ofp_Izwn-zcAAP__536jHQ). The bill awaits Gov. Abbott's signature. On May 24, 2022, nearly 400 officers from multiple agencies waited over an hour to confront a gunman who took the lives of two teachers and 19 students. Two former district officials have been [charged with child endangerment](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLtuwzAMRb9G3mRI9HvQ0MVbunY0FD1sobRlSGyU_H3hTN27ESRxcO79ui03HTAc66fenaKnj8vhSkZH5NJi3RkTaQrx8BjWjTJG2ijGBQR0XHQc5GJ1wNfSVlbdhZ1k5ZQc2mGErpFNtale9gDeayPFKJrpLmQzWDNM_TjJwUyiCuqCiQ6klEK2U-0nMK120Pp-MAIG1gpnA8VU0-bIPXX2-IoPl2oT9wrVRnRm1nwwmBnMpZT6uBvry3VmMF95GMxnxEDBXCPGw_FMOvE_yzeYoy67_nYp81PnzH8eGu31m-Kxcm2IwdyMbSekZDBXSdmzBMSQ-8ty3XXAtxT9r8qHgt8AAAD__yOsiQ0).
## TxDOT Finds Giant Sloth Tooth
TxDOT crews [unearthed the fossilized remains](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLtuwzAMRb_G3mxItPwaNHTJlq4dDVmPiChjGRIbJ39fOOgfdDsggXMv7td1uRok3G6f5u41P0NaNn8U8sw-L87vKbNhTFsgvEUulDhySgsI6BvRNyAXZ5Bei6qdXoWbZe21HNU4Qd_Jro5aDGZyq5qNUn0fRjU6AdCFyVg3ynmaatSnTPQgpRRSzW2YwSrjQYVhtALGSgnvkFNuOXr2T1MCvdLD59ame006Mu-l6j4quFRwOY6jtTGn7fxWcCEM_jwjuT80mdHSSW9ZE1IpSKWhn3VN9rsB0XW9EkO7x73O2u0HEmEZziK3u0F65_L_1npo-A0AAP__Ra5-yA) of a giant ground sloth and perhaps other ancient megafauna while doing survey work for the construction of Loop 88 near Lubbock. Chris Ringstaff, a project planner with TxDOT's environmental affairs division, [identified the sloth by its distinctive tooth](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkb2y4yAMhZ8Gd2RA_osLF9vQ3W239GAjDHMxeEC5JG-_40ze4DaqjvTNp_Pva_nSPvi4_9UHzvS0aYlYS0AizIvBM2XS5FO0we-OSkjkKKUFBPRc9BzkYrQPr6VrzLwKM8kGZzl24x36VraNm0e5bt1dtPYuRuylNau1qFH0mx6wG8bGz9cx0YOUUshuutkJtk4jdHYYNwEj6wQaTynfyCHhUxcbXukH821LRxNmR3QW1v5hoBioWustPNY1bd8pBh_xSjFQhVJ-MVCXHgN1MRkocQ05MVCfHV6xEH9TeE7a1JS_ufXRFO435HpHvnsdib9fwY9HwcfxyRNujleniTt9nhgLj_gkBureDj1M7SDEyEA1eTZn9SH4Mlxy-6F9eLvQ7xr4meF_AAAA__8bkpvy). He said paleontologists are analyzing the fossils to determine if any belong to other large animals, such as mammoths or mastodons. The extinct giant ground sloth stood up to 9 feet tall and weighed over 500 pounds. “ _We’re here to get the road built, but who doesn’t love digging up big ol’ animals?_ ” [said Ringstaff](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLtuwzAMRb9G3hRItB0lg4cu3tK1o6EHHQulQ0NiXn9fOL_QjQAPLs69P5fp4jPl2_XbrzjIa-bphs9KKIJlSrhxES-ZbzPl6yKVWBZhnsBAr02vwU7JZ3pPXZOGYNLZNjhY17kT9K1tm2UAAw4Dptb1bYwuIiYXAC2aENrjHJq8I73pwVprbHc-zGeInUfo5qOLBpzqDKYsXA6yoODL15ne_MByiLw2NCwiW1Xtl4JRwVg3jFLuK3H0tHfZKQWjvPYn32XRnwyNpDdfWcG4UwrGXUPBaPrPrWDcCi65Cpcc9cy1Zqqa7iFw_NXEvOnTqSlD2p6ZKNfjLnpdfaaPl_xvzccAfwEAAP__D2CK_Q). name: The Maine Wire
subject: Maine House Votes to Withdraw from the National Popular Vote Interstate Compact
body:
Here's the latest breaking news at The Maine Wire

** Maine House Votes to Withdraw from the National Popular Vote Interstate Compact (https://mainepolicy.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a975bf67c40a8d8be91ad606d&id=0462daa36a&e=f093fa355c)
------------------------------------------------------------
By Libby Palanza on May 20, 2025 04:52 pm
The Maine House of Representatives has voted to withdraw from the National Popular Vote Interstate Compact, an agreement into which Maine entered during the previous legislative session. The National Popular Vote Interstate Compact is an agreement among the states that could bring about sweeping changes to how the President of the United States is elected. [...]

name: Nancy Northup
subject: FWD: Congress wants to greenlight violence against our clients
body:
Attack on abortion access happening TODAY
Dear Peter,

I've been meeting with allies on Capitol Hill all week to ensure they know how dangerous repealing the FACE Act will be. [**They're telling me that the bill will be debated TODAY as early as 10AM ET.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108075296/546783780/734415106?sourceid=1150699&utm_campaign=25emeus-0503aax-onv&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=faceact&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTc1YmZkNi0zNDM2LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vZW-UX3bjNNNcd0pc7VBk0ihrRUGZheZGVjX-2nnHmk=&emci=31ad34e6-b835-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=fa75bfd6-3436-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=954237)

[**Your representatives need to hear from you immediately—before the ONLY federal protection from violence that patients, providers, and reproductive health clinics have is stripped away.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108075297/546783781/734415106?sourceid=1150699&utm_campaign=25emeus-0503aax-onv&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=faceact&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTc1YmZkNi0zNDM2LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vZW-UX3bjNNNcd0pc7VBk0ihrRUGZheZGVjX-2nnHmk=&emci=31ad34e6-b835-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=fa75bfd6-3436-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=954237)

We can't sit by and let this happen. [**Thank you in advance for taking action now.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108075298/546783782/734415106?sourceid=1150699&utm_campaign=25emeus-0503aax-onv&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=faceact&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTc1YmZkNi0zNDM2LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vZW-UX3bjNNNcd0pc7VBk0ihrRUGZheZGVjX-2nnHmk=&emci=31ad34e6-b835-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=fa75bfd6-3436-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=954237)

In solidarity,
Nancy Northup
* * *
