Dr. Shea Bradley-Farrell, Ph.D. is a strategist in national security and foreign policy and president of Counterpoint Institute for Policy, Research, and Education in Washington, D.C. She is author of Last Warning to the West: Hungary’s Triumph Over Communism and the Woke Agenda (Dec. 2023), endorsed by multiple high-level conservative leaders. Shea worked directly with the Trump administration (2016-2020) at the highest levels including at the White House, U.S. Department of State, and Senior Advisor Ivanka Trump, on multiple issues while serving as VP of International Affairs for Concerned Women for America. Shea also served as Professor and Subject Matter Expert (SME) for the Defense Security Cooperation University (DSCU) of the U.S. Department of Defense (DoD) for a Trump administration national security mandate; she possesses an active U.S. security clearance and executive-level certifications. Shea works with multiple nations around the world at the highest senior levels of government to build U.S. relations and promote U.S. interests and security. Previously, she worked in international development focusing on economic development and research in the Middle East, Africa, and South America with donors including the U.S. Department of Labor, World Bank, Exxon, FedEx, and Kuwait Foundation for Advancement of Science. Shea regularly publishes Op-eds in outlets such as RealClear Politics, Human Events, NewsMax, National Review, Daily Signal, The Washington Times, The European Conservative, Daily Caller, the Federalist and many others. She is a weekly guest on TV news and radio and presents to venues all around the world such as Wilson Center for International Scholars, Foreign Services Institute, the U.S. Dept. of State, the Heritage Foundation, CPAC Hungary and the Gulf Studies Symposium. Shea holds a Ph.D. and M.S. in International Development from Tulane University, where she was Adjunct Lecturer in the International Development Studies Program in 2015. She has served in a variety of other academic positions, including at the American University of Kuwait and George Mason University.
\-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

name: Politibrawl Daily
subject: Young Trump official WRECKS CNN host for denial of South African genocide
body:
"It is disturbing to me that members of the media, including people on this very network, are trying to whitewash the facts!"

Young Trump official Tricia McLaughlin **[went to war with CNN's Victor Blackwell](https://substack.com/redirect/a761bf2d-5778-40dd-b7f2-c54a59280a7c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** over the Trump Administration's decision to accept 59 South African refugees fleeing persecution into the United States.
She refused to back down...
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/a761bf2d-5778-40dd-b7f2-c54a59280a7c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/a761bf2d-5778-40dd-b7f2-c54a59280a7c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"When the president says that there is genocide in South Africa, where is the evidence?" Blackwell asked McLaughlin, the Assistant Secretary for Public Affairs.
McLaughlin pushed back a against Blackwell's claim that Trump's use of the word "genocide" to describe the situation in South Africa was inaccurate as well as the suggestion that Trump is making a special exception for these 59 individuals because they are "white."
"I have to correct the facts where you're wrong, Victor, and you're wrong," McLaughlin said.
["](https://substack.com/redirect/a761bf2d-5778-40dd-b7f2-c54a59280a7c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[They've had their land seized based on the color of their skin.](https://substack.com/redirect/a761bf2d-5778-40dd-b7f2-c54a59280a7c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** There's been over 140 laws enacted that are race-based and to discriminate against racial minorities," McLaughlin argued. "It is quite frankly disturbing to be that members of the media, including people who are in this very network, are trying to whitewash the facts, and whitewash the fact that these individuals have faced discrimination."
Blackwell echoed his prior point more bluntly, "There is no genocide in South Africa, and frankly it does a disservice to people around the world who are facing genocide!"
"It does not exist!!" he added.
**["These individuals have faced discrimination,](https://substack.com/redirect/a761bf2d-5778-40dd-b7f2-c54a59280a7c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** racial violence and the seizure of their land!" McLaughlin countered.
Watch McLaughlin shatter Blackwell's narrative on live T.V.:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/a761bf2d-5778-40dd-b7f2-c54a59280a7c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

This is unbelievable... SpaceX just rescued two astronauts after NASA left them stranded in space for months...
But believe it or not, this may be only the _second_ most shocking piece of NASA news you'll hear today.
SpaceX founder, Elon Musk, is now being granted access to NASA as part of his DOGE initiative...
And he's poised to expose **[NASA's biggest secret](https://substack.com/redirect/e8d164c1-e995-4924-a1e3-3298d1475d37?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**.
Of all the conspiracies surrounding the Apollo moon landing missions... **[THIS](https://substack.com/redirect/e8d164c1-e995-4924-a1e3-3298d1475d37?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** may be the most shocking.
They've kept it a secret for decades...

# **Charlie Kirk WRECKS woke brat defending false Abrego Garcia narrative**
Charlie Kirk fact checked a woke student during a TPUSA speaking event for claiming the that the Trump administration needs to facilitate the return of deported suspected gang member Kilmar Abrego Garcia.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/ba7b225e-c9eb-4146-82a1-3380c93d1877?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"I care that everyone in the United States is afforded the rights under the Constitution!" the student told Kirk. "If we bypass that for him, what's stopping us from bypassing that for literally anybody else?!!"
Kirk simply answered, "Well, he wasn't an American, right?"
Watch Kirk calmly face the crowd and fact check the student on all of his false claims regarding the Abrego Garcia case.

# Quote of the Day:
> _**" Don't news people have to tell you what they know when they find it out? Isn't that the difference between news and a secret?!"**_
> \- Jon Stewart mocking Jake Tapper's ridiculous new book about Biden's mental decline
Jon Stewart tore CNN and Jake Tapper a new one for relentlessly pushing the anchor's new book "Original Sin: President Biden's Decline, Its Cover-Up, and His Disastrous Choice to Run Again" to their viewers after having falsely reported on Biden's mental fitness during his presidency.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/220e6baf-e5f3-434f-8919-191eacd83f6e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Stewart called out the awkwardness and poor taste in promoting the book following Biden's recent public cancer diagnosis.
"It's such a difficult time in terms of the pain his family must be feeling, and yet if you act now..." Stewart joked.

# Brandon Gill DEMOLISHES Democrat Jasmine Crockett for her party's unbelievable Biden Admin. hypocrisy
Young GOP Rep. Brandon Gill **[made a fool out of Democrat Congresswoman Jasmine Crockett](https://substack.com/redirect/020db27b-c145-4317-9387-bef0898379f1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for pointing the finger at Republicans for what her own party has done over the past 4 years.
He did not hold back...
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/020db27b-c145-4317-9387-bef0898379f1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/020db27b-c145-4317-9387-bef0898379f1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Crockett bemoaned Republicans and the Trump administration for circumnavigating the "rule of law."
"Imagine if the State of Colorado kept Trump off the ballot and other states followed suit. That would have been a problem," Crocket said. "The problem that we have right now is that if we continue down this road, then we will not have a rule of law because we have people that are currently serving and they're saying things like 'ignore the judge's order.'"
**[Gill easily rebuked the absurdity](https://substack.com/redirect/020db27b-c145-4317-9387-bef0898379f1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** of Crockett's argument, citing the illegal immigration crisis, election manipulation, gender ideology insanity, and more that the Democrats unlawfully force upon U.S. citizens.
"In the lead up to the 2024 election, Democrats knew that they couldn't fairly win. They were running a candidate whose cognitive state was in question - that was declining before our very eyes on nation T.V. - while they were trying to tell us that he was sharper than ever," Gill said. "Their political strategy reminds me of a line in Orwell's 1984 which was 'The party told you to reject the evidence of your eyes and ears. It was their final, most essential command.' And that was consistent with the Left's messaging."
Gill did not stop there, burning down every single one of Crockett's lies.
**["What we witnessed was a grotesque exercise of raw political power by the Democrats against against their enemies." ](https://substack.com/redirect/020db27b-c145-4317-9387-bef0898379f1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
Watch Gill's full argument for yourself:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/020db27b-c145-4317-9387-bef0898379f1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

We’re committed to driving meaningful change in places like your community by electing Democrats who will fight for working families and against authoritarianism. Our grassroots supporters remain the driving force behind our work, cycle after cycle – we’re relying on this team now more than ever.

name: LaMonica McIver
subject: I was charged by the Trump administration because I was doing my job
body:
The Trump administration just charged me with crimes for engaging in congressional oversight. This is a first—and it’s a flashing red light for our democracy.
| | |
---
| | [](https://thmnyxhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zZdrCBThLt05qkB9ix_nVpKhFmBbXMOrIjQlNFyvqMJ1hvWQYJYwkhEMTtxXJHnAEUtG11f-YpLMao_AeSFb3qg9ifZKya4YoRvCOAeiH1yGgHK_Q8_zYh_quhzeFItwS9ShNhz84n6qmk360_AIqhHWsIQuKSMWPfhZ3-Fb4BiGwLnShNt_3orYqYYpB8Ros9JlcLF74bA=&c=GP6NMRo4qoGvtvBM7d3x7pi8wVjRQJw0WqsMrWlb-QUW-Xb7us1yIQ==&ch=eftKFL42uf_NWs0YbtfU1eZ9rkEd6lw8VOcUl5fdxuvdviVqs9LzLw==)
---
| Friend
The Trump administration just charged me with crimes for engaging in congressional oversight. This is a first--and it's a flashing red light for our democracy.
I went to an ICE facility in my district to conduct oversight because that is my job and my lawful right as a member of Congress. It's clear: Trump and his administration don't want transparency or oversight, and they want to punish any person who dares to speak up. These baseless, politically motivated charges against me make that even more obvious. We must stand up together against an administration that weaponizes law enforcement to persecute its opponents before it's too late. My lawyers stand ready to fight back against the Trump administration's overreach, and protect democracy and our Constitutional separation of powers. [We need your help. I'm asking you to split a donation between me and National Ground Game PAC so we have the resources to win this legal battle. We need 500 more grassroots donations before our deadline at midnight to make sure Republicans know we won't be intimidated.](https://thmnyxhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zZdrCBThLt05qkB9ix_nVpKhFmBbXMOrIjQlNFyvqMJ1hvWQYJYwkhEMTtxXJHnAEUtG11f-YpLMao_AeSFb3qg9ifZKya4YoRvCOAeiH1yGgHK_Q8_zYh_quhzeFItwS9ShNhz84n6qmk360_AIqhHWsIQuKSMWPfhZ3-Fb4BiGwLnShNt_3ndMzrGyM6DH2nEHSCpqFNY=&c=GP6NMRo4qoGvtvBM7d3x7pi8wVjRQJw0WqsMrWlb-QUW-Xb7us1yIQ==&ch=eftKFL42uf_NWs0YbtfU1eZ9rkEd6lw8VOcUl5fdxuvdviVqs9LzLw==)

This is far bigger than just me--the rule of law is at stake. Our democracy as we know it is under threat.
[To ensure everyone who dares to speak truth to power is safe from political persecution, we must make as much noise and as big an impact as possible. Split a donation between me and National Ground Game PAC and share this with your friends.](https://thmnyxhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zZdrCBThLt05qkB9ix_nVpKhFmBbXMOrIjQlNFyvqMJ1hvWQYJYwkhEMTtxXJHnAEUtG11f-YpLMao_AeSFb3qg9ifZKya4YoRvCOAeiH1yGgHK_Q8_zYh_quhzeFItwS9ShNhz84n6qmk360_AIqhHWsIQuKSMWPfhZ3-Fb4BiGwLnShNt_3qRVF2Ti6SrJ4RmUDbp_5m0=&c=GP6NMRo4qoGvtvBM7d3x7pi8wVjRQJw0WqsMrWlb-QUW-Xb7us1yIQ==&ch=eftKFL42uf_NWs0YbtfU1eZ9rkEd6lw8VOcUl5fdxuvdviVqs9LzLw==)
We're in this together,
LaMonica

body:
A few weeks ago, I announced that I won’t be running for re-election in 2026. | | | **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108097999/546835199/-2067906510?refcode=header&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzU5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZGY2NzA3YS00ZjM2LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pVpXEzUmOUN3q0ziS5IE1n1uL3wonPMZDcDQXv2UbCs=)**
---
Peter, A few weeks ago, I announced that I won’t be running for re-election in 2026. It wasn’t an easy decision—but it was the right one for me and my family. **MAGA Republicans saw my announcement as an opportunity.** Just hours after, the head of the National Republican Senate Committee declared “Minnesota is in play, and we play to win.” That’s a huge warning sign, Peter. Republicans believe this is a chance to flip this seat red, and they’re going to throw everything they’ve got at it. Minnesotans deserve a senator who will carry forward the fight for economic opportunity, climate action, and reproductive freedom—not someone who will rubber-stamp Donald Trump’s extreme agenda. **We need to keep this seat blue, and that starts with building the strongest infrastructure possible right now. ** The DFL will work to elect a senator to carry on this work, but they need your help to defend this seat. Your support right now, months before the GOP starts pouring millions into this race, will make all the difference.
[**Peter, will you donate $10, $25, $50, or whatever you can afford right now to keep this seat and our state blue?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108098001/546835201/-1009413307?refcode=body&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzU5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZGY2NzA3YS00ZjM2LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pVpXEzUmOUN3q0ziS5IE1n1uL3wonPMZDcDQXv2UbCs=) | | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: A few weeks ago, I announced that I won’t be running for re-election in 2026. | | | = Peter, A few weeks ago, I announced that I won’t be running for re-election in 2026. It wasn’t an easy decision—but it was the right one for me and my family. MAGA Republicans saw my announcement as an opportunity. Just hours after, the head of the National Republican Senate Committee declared “Minnesota is in play, and we play to win.” That’s a huge warning sign, Peter. Republicans believe this is a chance to flip this seat red, and they’re going to throw everything they’ve got at it. Minnesotans deserve a senator who will carry forward the fight for economic opportunity, climate action, and reproductive freedom—not someone who will rubber-stamp Donald Trump’s extreme agenda. We need to keep this seat blue, and that starts with building the strongest infrastructure possible right now. The DFL will work to elect a senator to carry on this work, but they need your help to defend this seat. Your support right now, months before the GOP starts pouring millions into this race, will make all the difference. = | | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | = | = | | = Thank you, Tina ** | = = = Monthly supporters are the backbone of all we do. name: Ellen R. Malcolm, EMILYs List
subject: How we'll turn rage into a political shockwave:
body:
Here's my prescription, Peter: Turn your heartbreak into action. |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108098187/546835970/-1686146655?refcode=WUEFE550_20250521_ERMRemarks_PL_v1s2&sourceid=1056194&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMDdiYmRmMi00ZjM2LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c4UTV07LuRLxr_JfqO37VCSz-eoaRetZ5oInfOtx6vo=) Dear Peter,

When we started EMILYs List 40 years ago, we had a dream: that if we helped women gain political power, they would change the world. And they have.

But let me be honest with you — this dream didn't start with optimism. It started with anger. We were _pissed off_. We were sick of the old boys' club ignoring women candidates and shutting us out of power. So in 1985, we built something different: a network of people who believed in the power of early money, bold strategy, and big dreams.

Now we're facing a very different kind of fight — a nightmare, really. Donald Trump and his MAGA allies are hell-bent on tearing down our democracy, brick by brick. Every headline is more devastating than the last — and every day brings a fresh round of rage, fear, and heartbreak.

[**So here's my prescription, Peter: Turn that heartbreak into action.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108098195/546835978/-1686146655?refcode=WUEFE550_20250521_ERMRemarks_PL_v1s2&sourceid=1056194&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMDdiYmRmMi00ZjM2LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c4UTV07LuRLxr_JfqO37VCSz-eoaRetZ5oInfOtx6vo=) | [DONATE TO HELP WOMEN WIN](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108098203/546835986/-1686146655?refcode=WUEFE550_20250521_ERMRemarks_PL_v1s2&sourceid=1056194&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMDdiYmRmMi00ZjM2LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c4UTV07LuRLxr_JfqO37VCSz-eoaRetZ5oInfOtx6vo=)
---
Every time Trump makes you scream at the TV, throw $10 in your cookie jar. Every time you want to cry, or can't believe what you're reading, add another $10. And at the end of the month? Send the contents of that jar to EMILYs List, and we'll put it straight to work making change.

Here's how:

We're going to **send a shockwave through MAGA world** by helping Democratic pro-choice women win in 2026 — from local legislative races, to state court seats, to taking back the U.S. House.

We'll deliver so many victories that Republicans will have no choice but to face the truth: that they've lost the support of voters, that Donald Trump is a failed leader, and that unless they take action to stop him, they too will suffer grave political consequences. We want wins so big this cycle that they'll isolate Trump, block his dangerous agenda, and begin to rebuild our democracy. And with your cookie-jar support, I am absolutely sure we can do it.

This plan is already underway, Peter. We're already recruiting incredible candidates. We're training staff. We're reaching out to voters. And yes, we're raising the early money that will help women WIN in the weeks, months, and years ahead.

But we can't do any of it without you.

This is the strategy. This is the moment. And this is your call to act — not just once, but every time it feels like too much. Because if we act together, we will win.

[**So, Peter, please chip in now to build the most important political turnaround of our lifetimes.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108098206/546835992/-1686146655?refcode=WUEFE550_20250521_ERMRemarks_PL_v1s2&sourceid=1056194&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMDdiYmRmMi00ZjM2LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c4UTV07LuRLxr_JfqO37VCSz-eoaRetZ5oInfOtx6vo=)

clean_body: Here's my prescription, Peter: Turn your heartbreak into action. | = Dear Peter, When we started EMILYs List 40 years ago, we had a dream: that if we helped women gain political power, they would change the world. And they have. But let me be honest with you — this dream didn't start with optimism. It started with anger. We were pissed off. We were sick of the old boys' club ignoring women candidates and shutting us out of power. So in 1985, we built something different: a network of people who believed in the power of early money, bold strategy, and big dreams. Now we're facing a very different kind of fight — a nightmare, really. Donald Trump and his MAGA allies are hell-bent on tearing down our democracy, brick by brick. Every headline is more devastating than the last — and every day brings a fresh round of rage, fear, and heartbreak. = | = Every time Trump makes you scream at the TV, throw $10 in your cookie jar. Every time you want to cry, or can't believe what you're reading, add another $10. And at the end of the month? Send the contents of that jar to EMILYs List, and we'll put it straight to work making change. Here's how: We're going to send a shockwave through MAGA world by helping Democratic pro-choice women win in 2026 — from local legislative races, to state court seats, to taking back the U.S. House. We'll deliver so many victories that Republicans will have no choice but to face the truth: that they've lost the support of voters, that Donald Trump is a failed leader, and that unless they take action to stop him, they too will suffer grave political consequences. We want wins so big this cycle that they'll isolate Trump, block his dangerous agenda, and begin to rebuild our democracy. And with your cookie-jar support, I am absolutely sure we can do it. This plan is already underway, Peter. We're already recruiting incredible candidates. We're training staff. We're reaching out to voters. And yes, we're raising the early money that will help women WIN in the weeks, months, and years ahead. But we can't do any of it without you. This is the strategy. This is the moment. And this is your call to act — not just once, but every time it feels like too much. Because if we act together, we will win. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = With determination and gratitude, Ellen R. Malcolm Founder and Chair Emerita, EMILYs List = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email . We'd hate to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving all email, unsubscribe . Have a question? name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
subject: LaMonica McIver
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Trump is weaponizing the Department of Justice to target his political enemies.
#
**First** , ICE arrested an elected official conducting oversight of an ICE facility in Newark.
**Then on Monday** , the Attorney General brought charges against a member of Congress who was at the same ICE facility.
**So today, we’re standing with Representative LaMonica McIver**. She stood up against the Trump administration's illegal activity, and is now a political target.
They think if you can arrest one mayor, then all the other mayors will stop enforcing our rights.
They think if you can make an example of one member of Congress, all 434 other ones will stand back. **Hell no**.
[Will you make a $5 contribution today to support LaMonica? She has become a political enemy of the Trump administration, and they are weaponizing the Department of Justice against her.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250521-mciver.ejW6hA&refcode=em20250521-8907-P_FND_ANO_OPP&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8907%2E2526796%2EMKtlSb)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250521-mciver.ejW6hA&refcode=em20250521-8907-P_FND_ANO_OPP&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=8907%2E2526796%2EMKtlSb)**
Whether or not you can give today, **thank you for standing with this movement against the rise of fascism**.
We will keep you updated as more on this story develops.
In solidarity,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20250521-mciver?refcode=em20250521-8907-P_FND_ANO_OPP&t=21&refcode2=8907_2526796_MKtlSb&akid=8907%2E2526796%2EMKtlSb)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20250521-8907-P_FND_ANO_OPP&t=22&akid=8907%2E2526796%2EMKtlSb)**

name: Sean Feucht
subject: Last Minute Needs For A Weekend of Baptisms 🌊🌊🌊
body:
| | | [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=2a735733cefa4eee835f1a4db59b1ae9&_e=qbcGlE1kejLr8YO7uq65ESKJmp7Ek45IvN9U5K0oSiA1a39cLT2RhF62hompgL6Wjm_FHdYrf3HQcBJaUskMmD-tQ-sz6ImWayQMthxwAKlG5dBekqfGFBV1pM4K-dSEmXqJRtVCYALCYFLcS7cUtSD8_I1oui21YNQ5QuY5JsMHhW7iZIhCNHJxdncYdu05z_hytVHAzLLViuGKrQK0LZX7JsM3od0VLOhtK2HJwSJhXmobkG5LRpnu5aEs50hQtWTpzKlERjwAhYEiSH26MsJ7hKMRccEkSQdPeD3ZFadYRHoHUrxjaI4S-5ujagL0KEAt_Xnrh-ruNSSuVf-_aQ%3D%3D)
---
| | Dear Peter,
---
The Lord is moving and people are responding!!! Friday night, at 6PM on Santa Rosa beach, we're holding a MASS BAPTISM. Scores of new Believers have reached our asking for the opportunity to publicly profess their faith and be baptized, and this weekend we're making it happen! _**We need to raise the remaining costs of the event — $4,500 before Friday.**_ These funds will cover the last-minute production costs that have sprung up in the last few days. We want to celebrate and equip those who are making their faith public, send them off in a covering of the Holy Spirit.
---
| | [ **HELP FUND THE WEEKEND OF BAPTISMS >>> ** ](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=2a735733cefa4eee835f1a4db59b1ae9&_e=qbcGlE1kejLr8YO7uq65ESKJmp7Ek45IvN9U5K0oSiA1a39cLT2RhF62hompgL6Wjm_FHdYrf3HQcBJaUskMmD-tQ-sz6ImWayQMthxwAKlG5dBekqfGFBV1pM4K-dSEmXqJRtVCYALCYFLcS7cUtSD8_I1oui21YNQ5QuY5JsPOuRAL3qJauGkaRjDYV01F7qRYo3A9HFZpKiRYum2NJtVsE046blY3PeCyRuttMd0tHHfYVIExXvMQi_F49ze8LuW4fLt3ukS6qoksLyHTUYJ9qB5yl_g2bENXnWjQiduOX_XTXFzCbU_4Fj4PJUUS5PfiNbVl_1om8OgiFrvzxw%3D%3D)
---
| | We are expectant for the Holy Spirit to descend in power on the state of Florida, and I can’t wait to share testimonies from the weekend! Stay tuned — __He is on the move!__
---
| | Till all hear,
---
---
Sean

name: Anika Page
subject: You're Invited: Lunch with Lord Daniel Hannan on September 24, 2025
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/hannanevent?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| Good morning Friend,
The Mississippi Center for Public Policy is honored to host a special lunchtime event with **Lord Daniel Hannan** , one of the most influential voices in the global conservative movement and a key architect of Brexit. Lord Hannan will discuss America’s role in leading the free world—without bearing the entire cost—through the strength of the Anglosphere alliance: a network of nations united by language, law, and liberty. This is a rare opportunity to hear from a powerful international thinker with deep insights into national sovereignty, global leadership, and the values that unite America and its closest allies.
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=f58955061e&e=5703353baa)
---
_Click above to purchase your tickets!_
| **📅 Date:** Wednesday, September 24, 2025
**🕦 Time:** 11:30 AM
**📍 Location:** River Hills Country Club, Jackson, MS
**💵 Tickets:** $35 (includes lunch) Seats are limited, and we expect this event to sell out quickly. Don’t miss your chance to be part of this important conversation. We look forward to seeing you there!
---
| [Purchase Tickets Here!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=27c37d6b83&e=5703353baa "Purchase Tickets Here!")

| |
---
Warmest wishes,

Anika Page
Director of Operations

name: Gary Sinise
subject: Help me celebrate 20 years of the National Memorial Day Parade
body:
It’s Gary Sinise here...| | | [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=c8fd1ece39ab40f89826bf0f60b169bf&_e=QnJOSWCOxq-7q0BBAIMZJoe33F8KtAfCoTLF_QLblTKt5m2x04cqetTTD68xtCu6VFXC4riZrO5H5ehNOXBOp0WugwXhynU84TGnYqbljHQezEFE7gDxvJdJUyMCjRKisEsdsZ9yqw5A3qc_HUKFMRtnCkAN_2UX3NDvq7KlZtKqS3nQ0mkUg_qbfuNcRVgsH6fi-vsQfV8fj2oUPmKTVu9HKZOSPBXXJGG3-zJwtewhFa3hvOv4kaCC4K-YfT4OIE9KZNiQ_hpV7fe9xB1v8w6T07S9ryIy7o_KLnttCOO7Dmsw2bRj3U79a1uxFbT1)
---
Friend, It's Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13 __and The Green Mile or the CBS television series CSI: NY - but it was in 1994 playing the role of Lt. Dan in Forrest Gump that changed my life and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. I've served as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. nearly every year since American Veterans Center revived it in 2005. **Now, I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event.** This year will be a remembrance like no other, as we commemorate the 80th anniversary of victory in World War II and the 250th birthdays of the U.S. Army, Navy, and Marine Corps. **[Friend, the National Memorial Day Parade is ENTIRELY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous Americans like you. Will you help chip in today to help support the Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=c8fd1ece39ab40f89826bf0f60b169bf&_e=QnJOSWCOxq-7q0BBAIMZJoe33F8KtAfCoTLF_QLblTKt5m2x04cqetTTD68xtCu6VFXC4riZrO5H5ehNOXBOp0WugwXhynU84TGnYqbljHQezEFE7gDxvJdJUyMCjRKisEsdsZ9yqw5A3qc_HUKFMRtnCkAN_2UX3NDvq7KlZtL3WD2cdZnbDu_dYLp2W5SG07r9_8sEx7sgOIIekTgK77qGmyGumjX6UAti8W5TooW__Wp3K-wtW7mYnNmELVQUg2ZMnI3Snjh3enziNL5Th9X67UBPK7NkxUGuXu3KycOuGZh4docnzPc-ynz07ZUx)**
---
[ **Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=c8fd1ece39ab40f89826bf0f60b169bf&_e=QnJOSWCOxq-7q0BBAIMZJoe33F8KtAfCoTLF_QLblTKt5m2x04cqetTTD68xtCu6VFXC4riZrO5H5ehNOXBOp0WugwXhynU84TGnYqbljHQezEFE7gDxvJdJUyMCjRKisEsdsZ9yqw5A3qc_HUKFMRtnCkAN_2UX3NDvq7KlZtKr-fI2foRDoQ9jlqubEGF-RZyVWMIgTMW5pVZeWhhRAG2zmZwdjx_CsEriJvh-7XxWiglHO5SPld0YNaTbIybqPHa9Sa6E5ReKCuuly4R38JjTaN4ybou9GT_CFYaKP8BCS5QUw-BoCpxiUTNQRoER)
---
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=c8fd1ece39ab40f89826bf0f60b169bf&_e=QnJOSWCOxq-7q0BBAIMZJoe33F8KtAfCoTLF_QLblTKt5m2x04cqetTTD68xtCu6VFXC4riZrO5H5ehNOXBOp0WugwXhynU84TGnYqbljHQezEFE7gDxvJdJUyMCjRKisEsdsZ9yqw5A3qc_HUKFMRtnCkAN_2UX3NDvq7KlZtIda5Tp6BRrQ2Awvqk8fcTjFQqCw9DIRQPixIWdiUn2VEljToXUYUvaHhV9-OxNeA05N7nfAHFMR8Cha8mEqOX8RasonMMGIAf7BE6mvmUQfFB0swM_ACBc9L2XcJEGtv4Evdx3NVckTzmA5W417AFz)
---
The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, _the entire parade_ costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! _That means that every dollar that 's contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event._ **But I want to reiterate that American Veterans Center does not take ANY federal funding for this event. It is funded _entirely_ by private citizens like you who want to honor those who have sacrificed so much for our country.** Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like:
* Record hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to Today before we lose these stories forever.

* Hold our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear first-hand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam.

* Produce veteran focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans the price of our freedom.

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=c8fd1ece39ab40f89826bf0f60b169bf&_e=QnJOSWCOxq-7q0BBAIMZJoe33F8KtAfCoTLF_QLblTKt5m2x04cqetTTD68xtCu6w_V54fLf5FHMC3u7LuSORkLXA2wTPxvKVQirfFwUmnasY0itJvb3DNzBAuJMVTY8Vm8rYpagFNnCdLooEt0q305kUPiKAHYo5ScPD3iCggI07qk6lYAI2Tx6UyswtXaBvuwzmhxPOCV18n6IQTx0agoFdz_OYrTRDjzmDxxb64B7ZsqtrlIR_jMvo9uhW0x89qShnaMdie2fHHqsfr00qZrSRQRcjBfjTFulMuMbCBA%3D)[**Please join me in support of the National Memorial Day Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, or more right now.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=c8fd1ece39ab40f89826bf0f60b169bf&_e=QnJOSWCOxq-7q0BBAIMZJoe33F8KtAfCoTLF_QLblTKt5m2x04cqetTTD68xtCu6VFXC4riZrO5H5ehNOXBOp0WugwXhynU84TGnYqbljHQezEFE7gDxvJdJUyMCjRKisEsdsZ9yqw5A3qc_HUKFMRtnCkAN_2UX3NDvq7KlZtJB1DGzHBo0aR0Ko5XQ6nYa54eCpDFPhk0wDuR4a2E15hna01jXPGv-6LH0yLcRXUyMyhtjzwB62mwOtcYeUukNuqmET9reqL7JMU-XJWiNoYci4BWak7DWBXuGAxpuKZxjhcFXzXCcrjncyaV_jKU2) If you've been looking for an opportunity to give back to those who have given so much for our freedom, this is one of the best possible ways you could do it. _And for a special group of veterans, this might be one of the last chances we get._ You see, with each year that goes by, we lose more and more of our World War II veterans, and for the few we have remaining, traveling to Washington, D.C., for the parade is difficult. WWII veterans were a key part of the first parade when it was revived in 2005, as they have been every year since for the last 20 years. _But this may be the last year we have the opportunity to have these brave men and women with us for the parade._** ** **That's why we are making a concerted effort to ensure these veterans are at this year's National Memorial Day Parade to honor them one last time. ** So this year, as we mark the 80th anniversary of victory in Europe and Japan to end World War II - and the 250th anniversaries of the Army, Navy, and Marine Corps - I encourage you to help us honor these brave veterans while we still have them with us.
---
[ **Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=c8fd1ece39ab40f89826bf0f60b169bf&_e=QnJOSWCOxq-7q0BBAIMZJoe33F8KtAfCoTLF_QLblTKt5m2x04cqetTTD68xtCu6VFXC4riZrO5H5ehNOXBOp0WugwXhynU84TGnYqbljHQezEFE7gDxvJdJUyMCjRKisEsdsZ9yqw5A3qc_HUKFMRtnCkAN_2UX3NDvq7KlZtIkEVUhWUJOVXo84GG-KFjfK8Xp4wZbLdyOxFvdasQCjAmk2G5URJhFxLE97fyl-7bCZESPfQcMBHot1Ohqk9mKWRNQOSgUzae9Vz0yLP2xH0T_Xu0cqUURy3sqVH3TDI_joFWDPTf5reFnaVsdSblK)
---
And no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you. On Memorial Day - not just this momentous year of military milestones, but every year - please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. Visit a local veterans' cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. _I believe that while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more._ _**[Friend, thank you for your support of America's heroes, and please - if you're able, make a gift to fund the National Memorial Day Parade right now during its 20th anniversary.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=c8fd1ece39ab40f89826bf0f60b169bf&_e=QnJOSWCOxq-7q0BBAIMZJoe33F8KtAfCoTLF_QLblTKt5m2x04cqetTTD68xtCu6VFXC4riZrO5H5ehNOXBOp0WugwXhynU84TGnYqbljHQezEFE7gDxvJdJUyMCjRKisEsdsZ9yqw5A3qc_HUKFMRtnCkAN_2UX3NDvq7KlZtJSKT_6PDWyaQKUZKDEFcieWTGnPDBNfJQQtpTLHHBw0mtYp3nt90rXJso5NczF9DxdxzaUtFKqmxB6hiXtJ3GzcRadIrotTs___Pfh02_1t7PCUwvtkZq4hSuClKiJ67sTYO1vDMYYXyv6Ug0wHbiQ)**_ Sincerely, Gary SiniseHonorary Grand MarshalNational Memorial Day Parade
---
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=c8fd1ece39ab40f89826bf0f60b169bf&_e=QnJOSWCOxq-7q0BBAIMZJoe33F8KtAfCoTLF_QLblTKt5m2x04cqetTTD68xtCu6VFXC4riZrO5H5ehNOXBOp0WugwXhynU84TGnYqbljHQezEFE7gDxvJdJUyMCjRKisEsdsZ9yqw5A3qc_HUKFMRtnCkAN_2UX3NDvq7KlZtLH0C79pf2ItqdkhwKVMXS42wW51TMIZBJIRL0GE1_KSIr58kc1Cs8ptAHLFZ9wDutiLR_IfF_PVVxSQ0SaNGxU9T6ODfauayFC4sraUTrrPL3Gcm53kzQ1Y7ok12tw-19B4SoK5hBOBGY7gk1TqFM1)

[ **Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=c8fd1ece39ab40f89826bf0f60b169bf&_e=QnJOSWCOxq-7q0BBAIMZJoe33F8KtAfCoTLF_QLblTKt5m2x04cqetTTD68xtCu6VFXC4riZrO5H5ehNOXBOp0WugwXhynU84TGnYqbljHQezEFE7gDxvJdJUyMCjRKisEsdsZ9yqw5A3qc_HUKFMRtnCkAN_2UX3NDvq7KlZtLQ82wGGX8Up7lCF4cOt3UMfyRlcSiyg3YROaXUOnvP1z8WU3q2cgb7TDKWVXxgxjKy2MJKQLI5PNejnMUhIMEgv8A4ctsldP4Vmyk8fIfOL_DwX1swZvUTSAyJfNksBlV9ATCDS8KPZ3b2kq6ShPJm)

This speaks for itself, folks. Straight from _The Guardian_ :"_Donald Trump’s appointees at the Department of Justice have removed all of the senior civil servants working as managers in the department’s voting section and directed attorneys to dismiss all active cases, according to people familiar with the matter, part of a broader attack on the department’s civil rights division._ "This action represents a dramatic escalation in Trump's war on voting, coming after he ordered a permanent litigation freeze on voting cases back in January and then issued his suppressive, anti-voting executive order last month. It's worth noting that the staff removed are nonpartisan civil servants -- lawyers who are career DOJ employees and serve regardless of who is president. Any partisan presidential appointees from the Biden administration ended their jobs when Trump was inaugurated and have been gone for months. **Are we surprised? clean_body: The Guardian: Trump’s justice department appointees remove leadership of voting unit| | | | | This speaks for itself, folks. Straight from The Guardian :"Donald Trump’s appointees at the Department of Justice have removed all of the senior civil servants working as managers in the department’s voting section and directed attorneys to dismiss all active cases, according to people familiar with the matter, part of a broader attack on the department’s civil rights division. "This action represents a dramatic escalation in Trump's war on voting, coming after he ordered a permanent litigation freeze on voting cases back in January and then issued his suppressive, anti-voting executive order last month. It's worth noting that the staff removed are nonpartisan civil servants -- lawyers who are career DOJ employees and serve regardless of who is president. Any partisan presidential appointees from the Biden administration ended their jobs when Trump was inaugurated and have been gone for months. Are we surprised? No. But this action -- though expected, based on how this division was sidelined in Trump's first four years \-- highlights how badly we need to fight for our fundamental rights as citizens , from the outside of government. If you've saved your payment information with FastAction, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | The civil rights division, which was created in 1957 and is often referred to as the “crown jewel” of the justice department, has always been a cornerstone in the fight to protect our right to vote. But when Trump campaign lawyer and election denier Harmeet Dhillon -- who has argued in court in favor of voter suppression laws -- was confirmed to lead the department last month, she sent out new “mission statements” that made it clear the civil rights division was shifting its focus from protecting the civil rights of marginalized people to supporting Trump’s priorities. You don't have to read into that to get the message: Our fundamental rights, including voting and so much more, aren't going to be protected by this administration. In fact, they're going to be repeatedly attacked from within our government until they ensconce their control forever. | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country. Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. subject: This is how dictators rise to power
body:
Peter, what Trump just did should terrify every single person who believes in democracy.
He issued an Executive Order weaponizing the Department of Justice to go after ActBlue — the small-dollar fundraising platform that powers thousands of Democratic campaigns across the country.
Why? Because he’s terrified of us.
He knows grassroots Democrats are his biggest threat — and he’s trying to meddle with our ability to fight back before the election even begins.
This is how authoritarians seize power:
1️⃣ They discredit elections.
2️⃣ They silence the media.
3️⃣ And then — they come for the money.
Trump is officially coming for the money. This is an all hands on deck moment.

They’ve made their priorities crystal clear: protect their billionaire donors, gut our social safety net, and give Trump all the power he wants to keep rigging the system against the rest of us. Last week, Katherine Clark joined _Fast Politics with Molly Jong-Fast_ to lay it all out, from Trump’s corruption and chaos to the GOP’s billionaire-first agenda. This isn’t just bad policy. It’s a total abandonment of the people they’re supposed to represent. While Republicans cater to CEOs and special interests, Democrats are fighting to lower costs, protect democracy, and give every family a fair shot. But that fight takes resources — and that’s where you come in. **[Fair Shot PAC is working hard to elect Democrats who’ll actually deliver for working people — not the ultra-wealthy. The Trump administration's nomination of Casey Means as U.S. Surgeon General has sparked backlash from the MAGA base. Many are questioning her credentials and family's ties to progressive health policies that clash with the administration's America First agenda.
## **A Doctor Without a License or Board Certification**
At the center of the controversy are Casey Means's medical credentials. State records [show](https://substack.com/redirect/85ff440e-7753-49c2-b498-48f7df9c4861?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) the state placed her medical license on [inactive](https://substack.com/redirect/5b6fa056-dc59-4452-8e68-339f0b08e38e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) status in January 2024. This contradicts her claim that she voluntarily left conventional medicine, since she never formally surrendered the license.
Means also failed to complete her otolaryngology (ENT) surgical residency, reportedly dropping out just six months before finishing. She never earned board certification and cannot qualify unless she completes a residency. This is a serious shortcoming for someone nominated to be Surgeon General--a role that requires unquestionable clinical authority and public trust.

After quitting the program, Casey Means opened a functional medicine practice in Portland, Oregon, focusing on advocacy, entrepreneurship, and writing--such as her [newsletter](https://substack.com/redirect/00fff67d-dd91-4d49-9216-ef2fc129c48a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)--rather than providing clinical care. Her [website](https://substack.com/redirect/f1ef1363-3560-4937-92ac-5033154386c0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) states that she "is no longer seeing patients and is not able to comment on specific medical conditions or provide any medical guidance." However, in her social media, Means still refers to herself as "MD", short for Medical Doctor. This raises an important question: how can someone without an active license or completed residency be trusted to shape public health policy for over 300 million Americans?
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/925d9873-16ca-4bff-96ad-334843f1e1cf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
## **Surgeon General Nomination Raises Serious Red Flags**
Additionally, questions have emerged over Means's personal rebranding. Born Paula Means--and referred to as Dr. Paula Means in a U.S. News & World Report article--she began using her middle name, Casey, as she gained more prominence as a self proclaimed "wellness influencer" on social media.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..GuSE18yyI4hNmSbzddiLFsyOlREWMXtNG3ZHSHsWxDg?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=164089775)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/9ffb4ae9-aff2-44fc-b5bd-102c3ef07265?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Notably, old social media posts from 2021, uncovered under her former X handle "@DrCaseysKitchen," reveal Means enthusiastically celebrating her COVID-19 vaccination--a position that starkly contrasts with the "Make America Healthy Again" (MAHA) movement she now aligns herself with. The MAHA movement gained political momentum during the Biden administration, as opposition mounted against federal and Democrat-led state vaccine mandates amid growing evidence of life threatening adverse side effects from the COVID jabs.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/756abc9a-8df7-480a-913b-8ae6ae1d87ee?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
## **Fringe Practices and 'Witch Doctor' Beliefs**
> Casey Means has a well-documented history of medical unprofessionalism. In one of her 'medical' newsletters, she described engaging in rituals that sound more like witch doctor remedies than science-based medicine--using psilocybin mushrooms as "plant medicine," praying to inanimate objects, making manifestations, having "[visions](https://substack.com/redirect/e8c24a10-5bc6-4221-b78d-433cb380b70e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)," participating in full moon ceremonies, and claiming to communicate with trees and spiritual mediums. For someone being considered for the role of our nation's top doctor, these revelations raise serious concerns about her judgment, scientific credibility, and fitness to lead federal health policy.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/02dd9a29-1d15-467f-a672-e66b73cf6f73?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/8cf062c3-b5c4-4d04-ad2d-a9218b09d411?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/551e5c22-f74a-4d2a-a80c-cbe26953a954?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/34d707c2-87b8-493c-9bcd-bba9fdbe60a4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
## **Woke Family Ties**
Furthermore, Casey Means's family has embraced woke medical ideology. Her father, Grady Means, wrote
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/50f3a280-1108-43cc-8b43-b4f7380fa72a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/5e99b2f1-1e68-4747-bbb2-ef71f418bd55?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
## **Political Fallout**
It is also telling that HHS Security Robert F. Kennedy Jr.'s endorsement of Casey Means has drawn sharp criticism from his own allies, including his former 2024 running mate, Nicole Shanahan. Shanahan

---|---|---
Casey Means' lack of medical qualifications--paired with her embrace of woke medical ideology--underscores the Trump administration's ongoing vetting crisis, which is now plaguing the medical sphere. Dr. Fauci and HHS officials inflicted lasting damage on public trust. Confirming someone as unserious and unqualified as Casey Means risks compounding that harm to national health policy. Unfortunately, this is yet another symptom of a larger vetting crisis.

Her father, Grady Means, wrote | | ---|---|--- | | ---|---|--- Political Fallout It is also telling that HHS Security Robert F. Kennedy Jr.'s endorsement of Casey Means has drawn sharp criticism from his own allies, including his former 2024 running mate, Nicole Shanahan. Shanahan LOOMER UNLEASHED is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber. | | ---|---|--- Casey Means' lack of medical qualifications--paired with her embrace of woke medical ideology--underscores the Trump administration's ongoing vetting crisis, which is now plaguing the medical sphere. Dr. Fauci and HHS officials inflicted lasting damage on public trust. Confirming someone as unserious and unqualified as Casey Means risks compounding that harm to national health policy. Unfortunately, this is yet another symptom of a larger vetting crisis. You're currently a free subscriber to . name: Steve Kerrigan
subject: You’re Invited: 2025 Roosevelt Awards Dinner – A Night to Celebrate Our Values
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Massachusetts Democratic State Committee
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93809/images/Logo.png]
Peter,
We’re excited to invite you to one of the most inspiring nights of the year for Massachusetts Democrats: the 2025 Franklin and Eleanor Roosevelt Awards Dinner , taking place on Thursday, June 5 at the Fairmont Copley Plaza Hotel in Boston.
This event is more than a dinner - it’s a powerful tradition. For decades, the Roosevelt Awards have honored leaders who embody the courage, vision and moral clarity that define our Democratic values.
It’s a night where we reflect on the progress we’ve made, recognize those who are leading the way forward and renew our commitment to the work that still lies ahead.
At a time when democracy is being tested across the country, this event reminds us of the strength we have when we come together - as activists, as organizers and as Democrats - to stand up for what’s right.
Whether you’re a longtime party supporter, a local leader or a new voice in this movement, the Roosevelt Awards Dinner is a chance to connect, be inspired and help shape the future of our Commonwealth.
Event Details:
Thursday, June 5, 2025
6:00 – 8:00 PM
Fairmont Copley Plaza Hotel
138 St. James Avenue, Boston, MA
Get Tickets or Become a Sponsor [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/roo26fed]
Join us for an unforgettable evening as we celebrate the people and principles that keep our party, and our democracy, moving forward.
In solidarity,
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93809/images/Steve%20K%27s%20Signature.png]
Steve Kerrigan
Chair, Massachusetts Democratic Party

name: Royce White
subject: I’m grateful for Mike Lindell’s endorsement
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROYCE WHITE FOR SENATE
body:
Now, I need you to join him
| [ ](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=7fa15b53a95f4e61bc25076ddd8ef476&_e=Zs2FIoBfGakIFpy5fUOtd7JL48ZYfGaI2sQWB6j7WbdJAjh0urlFmBwGhEYkpVt7WvISCiGjOriSNRaCjUqbukWqDL94IqXnpSmIVwu17stUyvTxtuiBtYgjgXxIT8xyCcqcLGplcJnsSx6DNv0If7gNYqgjGKS90kI9Xe27rw8tK_ahxH5HlVkJ29HdoR_dMPZFrpmjqT0ZdF7tpptdebzrFQHeS_aFMQcwJ9L42AziJQib1rIIwwDfFp77YxFXUqx0LQ6ed7eTwQbnUXjUbyWo6NPXoP-bMp6_sM-cMy84wQmTKUYzAf1QoaEssbfjpgRuJXJ5ijWA_wRzFlo2XQ%3D%3D)
---
Peter,

Mike Lindell is an American patriot and hero. I'm proud of his work and proud to have his endorsement again. Mike Lindell is not a lukewarm Republican; he's a smash-mouth fighter, and that's why they've gone out of their way to take him out. They never go after the milquetoast!

[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=7fa15b53a95f4e61bc25076ddd8ef476&_e=Zs2FIoBfGakIFpy5fUOtd7JL48ZYfGaI2sQWB6j7WbdJAjh0urlFmBwGhEYkpVt7WvISCiGjOriSNRaCjUqbukWqDL94IqXnpSmIVwu17stUyvTxtuiBtYgjgXxIT8xyCcqcLGplcJnsSx6DNv0If7gNYqgjGKS90kI9Xe27rw8tK_ahxH5HlVkJ29HdoR_d2Y1kTy3LaAMLfj5o9x2LvkZsy7H8XMuGIR5G3G2lobLpts2FGDVC4o77O6XT0G9elghIP1aOP47bUt-wZD3ov0ixNnikAA7W6jOckWxP3lu6x7US_2887xWOuJPYYUnvm_YtYisDHZzDyYFs3DgIHw%3D%3D)
I'm even more proud to have his official endorsement. He knows that I'm the ONLY Republican who's willing to say what needs to be said, regardless of who gets offended.

Meet Royce White:

**Born and raised in the Twin Cities, Royce White was the son of a single mother and started playing sports at the age of 5 years old. Living in various neighborhoods growing up, much of his family remained in the Rondo community, where he spent much of his time and received schooling. White excelled at basketball and recieved a scholarship to play basketball at the University of Minnesota, and later transferred to Iowa State. He would go on to make Dean's List while receiving All Big-12 first-team honors and many other basketball awards.

_After being selected 16th overall by The Houston Rockets in the NBA draft, White began to voice concerns about the NBA 's collective bargaining agreement (CBA), specifically regarding mental health policy, which at the time did not exist. Eventually, his concerns became a public dispute between White and the NBA. This resulted in White demanding that the NBA, as a representative of the global corporate community, take up the responsibility of spearheading the mental health conversation - not just posturing through press statements, but through policy._

Royce then went on to win two championships in Canada before moving over to play Big 3 Basketball. White appeared at a game in a t-shirt that read "Free The Uyghurs." After a game-winning basket, White did a post-game interview on CBS, where he called for 2 Million Uyghurs to be freed and released from concentration camps. As the season went on, White would touch on taboo topics such as Gain of Function Research, The Federal Reserve, Julian Assange, Edward Snowden, Larry Hoover, Jeff Fort, Muammar Gaddafi, The Great Reset, Ivermectin, Me Too, etc.

Now, Royce White is running for Senate in Minnesota to take down the Radical Left. Republicans have not seen recent success in Minnesota, but Royce's campaign is different: a grassroots movement that's sick of the Radical Agenda pushed by Far Left Democrats Tina Smith and Ilhan Omar. Royce needs your help to pull off a fourth quarter comeback victory and FLIP Minnesota Red for Republicans.

** [**PASS ROYCE AN ASSIST**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=7fa15b53a95f4e61bc25076ddd8ef476&_e=Zs2FIoBfGakIFpy5fUOtd7JL48ZYfGaI2sQWB6j7WbdJAjh0urlFmBwGhEYkpVt7WvISCiGjOriSNRaCjUqbukWqDL94IqXnpSmIVwu17stUyvTxtuiBtYgjgXxIT8xyCcqcLGplcJnsSx6DNv0If7gNYqgjGKS90kI9Xe27rw8tK_ahxH5HlVkJ29HdoR_dUyPkivGfr1UptLkRUz9IyZtFp-C7SgYMD494MY_1kuRPyhKIVBOeboy_yQ4NB7rI1EmFhcbTvAOkfTnT4IfLQX2oAZtTnuTkBbg5PwxGuWss2Jgebj7oCcekFoabjKV0aX0LscWS1R_gPKJOq1R-aA%3D%3D)

name: Chuck Schumer
subject: It's Chuck Schumer with an urgent request:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Friend, it's Chuck Schumer with an urgent request.

Donald Trump wants autocracy, not democracy -- and we need to fight every day to stop that from happening. But _defeating_ Trump's allies to _halt_ his extreme MAGA agenda will take hard work and smart strategy.

[**Throughout my years in leadership, I've seen firsthand how valuable it is for the DSCC to receive up-to-the-minute input from supporters like you. So please, will you take the Democratic Strategy Survey today to help determine our strongest path to victory?**](https://go.dscc.org/go/21672?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250521-ChuckSchumer-SchumerStratSurvey-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250521-ChuckSchumer-SchumerStratSurvey-Pros-sl1&akid=20301%2E9716520%2E8BAwCA)

| | [ENTER SURVEY](https://go.dscc.org/go/21672?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250521-ChuckSchumer-SchumerStratSurvey-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250521-ChuckSchumer-SchumerStratSurvey-Pros-sl1&akid=20301%2E9716520%2E8BAwCA)
---

Trump's first 100 days were disastrous, but we know he's only getting worse. From the moment he was sworn in, **everything Trump's done with his Republican allies can be boiled down to this: MAGA billionaires win, American families lose.**

The Trump administration is costing us jobs, threatening our Constitution, handing unprecedented power over to Elon Musk, running Social Security and Medicaid into the ground -- and that's just the tip of the iceberg.

We know the best way to fight Trump's extremism is to elect Democrats to the Senate -- and we need your input to achieve that goal. **Winning elections takes every last one of us doing our part and making our voices heard, and that’s why I need to hear directly from top supporters like you.**

I know you support the fight for our democracy, [**so now's your chance to join in. If you're ready to chart a better course forward, will you spend a few minutes taking the DSCC's Democratic Strategy Survey before it closes at midnight?**](https://go.dscc.org/go/21672?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250521-ChuckSchumer-SchumerStratSurvey-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250521-ChuckSchumer-SchumerStratSurvey-Pros-sl1&akid=20301%2E9716520%2E8BAwCA)

| [ENTER SURVEY](https://go.dscc.org/go/21672?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250521-ChuckSchumer-SchumerStratSurvey-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250521-ChuckSchumer-SchumerStratSurvey-Pros-sl1&akid=20301%2E9716520%2E8BAwCA)
---

Anyone counting Democrats out is dead wrong, because I know with the help of this incredible team, we can flip seats on our pathway back to the majority.

Thank you for making your voice heard,

Chuck

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/21672?ask=5&t=9&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250521-ChuckSchumer-SchumerStratSurvey-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250521-ChuckSchumer-SchumerStratSurvey-Pros-sl1&akid=20301%2E9716520%2E8BAwCA)

[**P.S. Don't wait another second -- let's build on our strategy now! >>**](https://go.dscc.org/go/21672?ask=5&t=10&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250521-ChuckSchumer-SchumerStratSurvey-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250521-ChuckSchumer-SchumerStratSurvey-Pros-sl1&akid=20301%2E9716520%2E8BAwCA)
| |

[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-senate-democrats-2025-q2-recurring?refcode=DPE-footer&amount=5&recurring=1&t=1&refcode2=20301_9716520_8BAwCA&akid=20301%2E9716520%2E8BAwCA)

Friend,

**If you support President Trump and want to send him more reinforcements in Congress, then please read this:**

I’m not a politician. I’m a composer. But I care too much about the direction of this country not to jump into the fight to save it.

**That’s why I’m running for Nevada’s targeted 3rd Congressional District, why I’m seeking President Trump’s endorsement in my race,[and why I’m asking you to join me in this fight.](http://links.martynevada.com/u/click?_t=3a5223257aca4a93ac027b228c2c976d&_m=115d97b8208c4d748d233d92b5501e2f&_e=qlTMLSsWCEe2XPvgYIJfkx_-wJcgLxn7c8jk6o2IrBQ8mW91MtH0esKkiHbqlxCCkxs-kRNklRCjXEb5pA7ij1DP4520AunCrL3MgedPIIhd0BwzQn1JFBxw5yL7quGPepYcOK_Vyqt67NVXnFX198ka2C_prboq8HV0AE_uHTnWXJWaHelunSKZUNd2qIORaKnbKj_KgdR0KfNqk9O843fH0Dkn3-Q1ogJfl7VZ6OFedFPWhRLQ4hmv__ALBkLx2MeVpV689OM_60t-o4ZRIB-UXZk_NTcZiJDwXcOHj_-p2y2tMLufj206WLLZKAb-DwX-dQ6tki1R9BtF32q2cC-_Qr2oLj10X-uVciAcoVNdk6YLBPJaDlvMMUiSIAXiuHLseeq8TPH189mKCMQAgugRA3jKQMu_BRZ7vnXYn4Q%3D)**

[ ** JOIN MARTY » **](http://links.martynevada.com/u/click?_t=3a5223257aca4a93ac027b228c2c976d&_m=115d97b8208c4d748d233d92b5501e2f&_e=qlTMLSsWCEe2XPvgYIJfkx_-wJcgLxn7c8jk6o2IrBQ8mW91MtH0esKkiHbqlxCCkxs-kRNklRCjXEb5pA7ij1DP4520AunCrL3MgedPIIhd0BwzQn1JFBxw5yL7quGPepYcOK_Vyqt67NVXnFX198ka2C_prboq8HV0AE_uHTnWXJWaHelunSKZUNd2qIORaKnbKj_KgdR0KfNqk9O843fH0Dkn3-Q1ogJfl7VZ6OFedFPWhRLQ4hmv__ALBkLx2MeVpV689OM_60t-o4ZRIAx3GcFjVka3QGh_Jn_4ndHcUpBN-MdwImN16Ic2u9TIIWUiEQSG_k2aztVIuOj6iQ4MPkn1pjXBI6gLFIIAWDbZkxoL3pJDmKGupjB0qQ1cqhWH9vorDLsQfSPUunjaHp_eZrjZrSpIj-BOpOuU9uc%3D)
If you’re a fan of mine from my video game days, then you’ll know everything I’m about to tell you. But if you are just now getting to know me on this political journey, then let me reintroduce myself.

**I’m Marty O’Donnell, and even if you don’t recognize my name,_I bet you know some of my work._**

In the early days of my career as a composer, my business partner and I did numerous film scores and produced the iconic jingles, ‘We are Flintstone Kids...’ and ‘Mr. Clean, Mr. Clean.’

It was fun, but I decided I wanted to switch it up. So, I accepted a position at a small video game developer called Bungie as the Audio Director and Composer. It was here that I did the audio and music for the Halo video game series, _which sold more than eighty-one million copies and has been played billions of times._

My final project with Bungie was Destiny, where I had the honor of collaborating with Sir Paul McCartney to compose and produce an orchestral suite.

Through my work, it has been my humble blessing to have provided the soundtrack for the youth of millions worldwide.

**But the track I’m concerned with now is that of my country...**

This past November, the American people spoke loud and clear that they were DONE with the track liberal, Washington politicians had put us on, and they wanted off.

**With President Trump now back in the White House and Republicans in full control of Congress, they’ve been working to right the ship and get America back on the RIGHT track.**

But, sadly, there are still those working hard to derail us once again – and one of them is Congresswoman **Susie Lee** , whom I am now running against to defeat in NV-03.

This is one of just THIRTEEN Congressional seats in the entire country that President Trump won in 2024, but is still represented by a Democrat in the House...

[**I need your help to fix that.**](http://links.martynevada.com/u/click?_t=3a5223257aca4a93ac027b228c2c976d&_m=115d97b8208c4d748d233d92b5501e2f&_e=qlTMLSsWCEe2XPvgYIJfkx_-wJcgLxn7c8jk6o2IrBQ8mW91MtH0esKkiHbqlxCCkxs-kRNklRCjXEb5pA7ij1DP4520AunCrL3MgedPIIhd0BwzQn1JFBxw5yL7quGPepYcOK_Vyqt67NVXnFX198ka2C_prboq8HV0AE_uHTnWXJWaHelunSKZUNd2qIORaKnbKj_KgdR0KfNqk9O843fH0Dkn3-Q1ogJfl7VZ6OFedFPWhRLQ4hmv__ALBkLx2MeVpV689OM_60t-o4ZRILcjiPaxR0mcRyGzqNozPSU8NmnFqWYUn7mGlf8SRlZznOCY1lpru-6fYR1LpAs2vnsrYOusqE0z2OVYEiu5zEtbMMwn6WtJB9qDf2FHe_ONJZhoGdT4k0Y8VIpmcjzf_0F9EiDGpOCIy6jzyyDI03c%3D)

[ ** STAND WITH MARTY » **](http://links.martynevada.com/u/click?_t=3a5223257aca4a93ac027b228c2c976d&_m=115d97b8208c4d748d233d92b5501e2f&_e=qlTMLSsWCEe2XPvgYIJfkx_-wJcgLxn7c8jk6o2IrBQ8mW91MtH0esKkiHbqlxCCkxs-kRNklRCjXEb5pA7ij1DP4520AunCrL3MgedPIIhd0BwzQn1JFBxw5yL7quGPepYcOK_Vyqt67NVXnFX198ka2C_prboq8HV0AE_uHTnWXJWaHelunSKZUNd2qIORaKnbKj_KgdR0KfNqk9O843fH0Dkn3-Q1ogJfl7VZ6OFedFPWhRLQ4hmv__ALBkLx2MeVpV689OM_60t-o4ZRIL_lONNQDREzixO578L14eOPXvPWutruj2wt8H6nPHYOn5pJRHcNn_Oz8oJL6jJ4RfNH0jVhsFRA6JzbcYoHlVd319zYXoZuz_O9lBFc_4-bYJOVCVSMn_t665dE1Rpi3bQe0QlfZnWAkkqtj3_RE1U%3D)
Susie Lee is the darling of the Washington, D.C. political and special interest machine, and if she gets her way, we’ll reopen our borders to illegal crossings, weaken our standing on the world stage, let wokeism run amock, and allow corrupt Big Government to resume micro-controlling our lives and laundering our tax dollars.

I am in this fight to help President Trump and Republicans in Congress restore sanity and accountability in Washington, and ensure security, prosperity & freedom in our country.

**We can’t let corrupt radical politicians like Susie Lee and her allies take us back down the path of America’s imminent demise.**

As one of just thirteen Trump+ Democrat-held seats, NV-03 is one of the nation’s top-priority seats to flip in the midterms so we can build a leftist-proof House Majority.

**But that will also make it one of the most competitive and expensive, and I can’t win this without your help.**

[**I’m asking you to help us get this ship off the ground by chipping in $7, $28, $117, or anything you can today.**](http://links.martynevada.com/u/click?_t=3a5223257aca4a93ac027b228c2c976d&_m=115d97b8208c4d748d233d92b5501e2f&_e=qlTMLSsWCEe2XPvgYIJfkx_-wJcgLxn7c8jk6o2IrBQ8mW91MtH0esKkiHbqlxCCkxs-kRNklRCjXEb5pA7ij1DP4520AunCrL3MgedPIIhd0BwzQn1JFBxw5yL7quGPepYcOK_Vyqt67NVXnFX198ka2C_prboq8HV0AE_uHTnWXJWaHelunSKZUNd2qIORaKnbKj_KgdR0KfNqk9O843fH0Dkn3-Q1ogJfl7VZ6OFedFPWhRLQ4hmv__ALBkLx2MeVpV689OM_60t-o4ZRIIknHMjM1CoYC7UZuiQ8zU_x9ovZ1Filrj5OxaDg_hXn-wrb9mjxG5xIhGhKFwUDp_yzsXozsTiLAKinJ56eXaaN6aH4DsutGU6kVBqJv-fxkX5HE_ONL6mA5Vjc1_WnXMhr9nIac1Boqee0V1dQbX0%3D)

This is an all-hands-on-deck race, and how we start off is largely going to determine how we finish.

[**If you support President Trump and want to send him more reinforcements in Congress, then please chip in today to support our fight.**](http://links.martynevada.com/u/click?_t=3a5223257aca4a93ac027b228c2c976d&_m=115d97b8208c4d748d233d92b5501e2f&_e=qlTMLSsWCEe2XPvgYIJfkx_-wJcgLxn7c8jk6o2IrBQ8mW91MtH0esKkiHbqlxCCkxs-kRNklRCjXEb5pA7ij1DP4520AunCrL3MgedPIIhd0BwzQn1JFBxw5yL7quGPepYcOK_Vyqt67NVXnFX198ka2C_prboq8HV0AE_uHTnWXJWaHelunSKZUNd2qIORaKnbKj_KgdR0KfNqk9O843fH0Dkn3-Q1ogJfl7VZ6OFedFPWhRLQ4hmv__ALBkLx2MeVpV689OM_60t-o4ZRINbi0-inaRKZZdHWce-aHryDA6EPUOr_yYTV_s_y77iokyyG3gPlGdVYYVPAMcQxAE3JTO6ZjGHL1nd_6LhM7V-9AEugJg9tV1ZBxqDwaaMk16u851esG3MA6y3YbMQDHKuAg71XFkrDtDqyaeoDs3o%3D)

Thank you!

**Marty O’Donnell**
Republican for NV-03

[ ** STAND WITH MARTY » **](http://links.martynevada.com/u/click?_t=3a5223257aca4a93ac027b228c2c976d&_m=115d97b8208c4d748d233d92b5501e2f&_e=qlTMLSsWCEe2XPvgYIJfkx_-wJcgLxn7c8jk6o2IrBQ8mW91MtH0esKkiHbqlxCCkxs-kRNklRCjXEb5pA7ij1DP4520AunCrL3MgedPIIhd0BwzQn1JFBxw5yL7quGPepYcOK_Vyqt67NVXnFX198ka2C_prboq8HV0AE_uHTnWXJWaHelunSKZUNd2qIORaKnbKj_KgdR0KfNqk9O843fH0Dkn3-Q1ogJfl7VZ6OFedFPWhRLQ4hmv__ALBkLx2MeVpV689OM_60t-o4ZRIK1fkUpvhpgmMN73_0A8aICL9Gx_JW1zy8Q0H7xd80WotuqKdeKwIWZaNgs0zHz2Km_1WHmL6dXajnNOQydqFH5hseqmNx4DENl5Dlrw4hva1Z7X38cfeHWV_izpj411RQfPoTdTel3ui6LL2T8W9WI%3D)

| **ABOUT MARTY**
**Marty O’Donnell isn’t a politician** and he’s not taking any corporate PAC money. Marty will give us a voice – not special interests or Wall Street. It’s time to turn our nation around to make life better for Nevadans.

**Marty O’Donnell has an ear for solving problems.** He’s an award-winning composer who wrote the iconic soundtracks for the video games Halo and Destiny. Marty will cut through the noise in DC.

**Marty O’Donnell will be a champion for Nevada families.** As a husband, father, and grandfather, Marty can’t sit on the sidelines as local families struggle because of the problems created by Big Government.

Susie Lee is the darling of the Washington, D.C. political and special interest machine, and if she gets her way, we’ll reopen our borders to illegal crossings, weaken our standing on the world stage, let wokeism run amock, and allow corrupt Big Government to resume micro-controlling our lives and laundering our tax dollars. I am in this fight to help President Trump and Republicans in Congress restore sanity and accountability in Washington, and ensure security, prosperity & freedom in our country. We can’t let corrupt radical politicians like Susie Lee and her allies take us back down the path of America’s imminent demise. As one of just thirteen Trump+ Democrat-held seats, NV-03 is one of the nation’s top-priority seats to flip in the midterms so we can build a leftist-proof House Majority. But that will also make it one of the most competitive and expensive, and I can’t win this without your help. This is an all-hands-on-deck race, and how we start off is largely going to determine how we finish. Thank you! Marty O’Donnell Republican for NV-03 | ABOUT MARTY Marty O’Donnell isn’t a politician and he’s not taking any corporate PAC money. Marty will give us a voice – not special interests or Wall Street. It’s time to turn our nation around to make life better for Nevadans. Marty O’Donnell has an ear for solving problems. He’s an award-winning composer who wrote the iconic soundtracks for the video games Halo and Destiny. Marty will cut through the noise in DC. Marty O’Donnell will be a champion for Nevada families. As a husband, father, and grandfather, Marty can’t sit on the sidelines as local families struggle because of the problems created by Big Government. | PAID FOR BY MARTY FOR CONGRESS Don't want to receive any more of our emails?

Peter, it’s Valerie Foushee –

As I write this email, Republicans in Congress are ramming through Trump’s “big, beautiful” bill that would make **devastating cuts to Medicaid and SNAP while giving massive tax breaks to billionaires.**

If this bill passes:
* **More than 60,000 children in my district could lose access to SNAP benefits** , making it harder for their families to put food on the table
* **Over 100,000 people in NC-04 could be at risk of losing access to Medicaid benefits** that provide live-saving care, doctor visits, and prescription drugs

So let’s be clear: this isn’t about fiscal responsibility. I**t’s about slashing funds and benefits from working families to finance huge tax breaks for billionaires and big corporations.**

**I’m a strong NO vote** and I’m fighting in Congress to stop this bill — but we need to hear from _EVERYONE_ to turn up the pressure on Republicans and bring attention to their shameful scheme.

[So please, will you sign my petition now to defend Medicaid and SNAP and tell Republicans that we will hold them accountable if they gut these essential programs? ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108107371/546863927/-1623364705?source=SBD_VF_EM_PET_052025_SNAP_180DO_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNzQ5N2YyZi01ZDM2LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gtbT9owrV8zZj3wSIFulLLkPXUf1LJVjxH6x9Mv_Cto=&emci=360c0b29-5d36-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=f7497f2f-5d36-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=799895) | [ADD YOUR NAME →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108107372/546863934/-1623364705?source=SBD_VF_EM_PET_052025_SNAP_180DO_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNzQ5N2YyZi01ZDM2LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gtbT9owrV8zZj3wSIFulLLkPXUf1LJVjxH6x9Mv_Cto=&emci=360c0b29-5d36-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=f7497f2f-5d36-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=799895)

clean_body: If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | = Peter, it’s Valerie Foushee – As I write this email, Republicans in Congress are ramming through Trump’s “big, beautiful” bill that would make devastating cuts to Medicaid and SNAP while giving massive tax breaks to billionaires. If this bill passes: More than 60,000 children in my district could lose access to SNAP benefits , making it harder for their families to put food on the table Over 100,000 people in NC-04 could be at risk of losing access to Medicaid benefits that provide live-saving care, doctor visits, and prescription drugs So let’s be clear: this isn’t about fiscal responsibility. It’s about slashing funds and benefits from working families to finance huge tax breaks for billionaires and big corporations. I’m a strong NO vote and I’m fighting in Congress to stop this bill — but we need to hear from EVERYONE to turn up the pressure on Republicans and bring attention to their shameful scheme. | Thank you for taking action, Valerie Foushee * | | | ---|---|--- = Valerie is fighting to protect access to health care, working families, and to reform our criminal justice system. But she needs your help to continue to do this great work in Congress. Your donation right now will help protect Democrat Valerie Foushee by giving us a jumpstart on the next cycle. | = = Paid for by Foushee for Congress Valerie Foushee for Congress PO Box 16446 Chapel Hill, NC 27516 United States If you need to you can unsubscribe, You can also =.

name: Dan Crenshaw
subject: The DCCC targeting me?
body:
https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/poll-in-the-field-/?utm_campaign=20250416&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A

Peter,

Did you see the huge news from the DCCC?

House Democrats are planning to try and FLIP Republican-held districts right here in Texas – even some districts that President Trump won by more than 15 points,

And if that isn’t bad enough, my campaign just intercepted a poll trying to gauge the best lines of attack against me.

I fear that these lying attacks are imminent, and after the DCCC broke fundraising records last month, their warchest will be bottomless.

But with your help, we will fight these lies with the truth and the truth will win.

[So with lying attacks coming any day now, PLEASE make a contribution so that I’m able to fight back and hold the line for our shared America First values.](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/poll-in-the-field-/?utm_campaign=20250416&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A )

[CONTRIBUTE >> $100](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/poll-in-the-field-/?utm_campaign=20250416&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A /&amount=100)

[CONTRIBUTE >> $250](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/poll-in-the-field-/?utm_campaign=20250416&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A /&amount=250)

[CONTRIBUTE OTHER >>](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/poll-in-the-field-/?utm_campaign=20250416&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A /&amount=other)

Nancy Pelosi, Hakeem Jeffries, and the DCCC will do everything in their power to take me out and flip this district BLUE.

They want to destroy my reputation, take this seat, and send a message that strong conservatives — especially Trump allies — aren’t welcome in Congress.

But I’ve faced worse enemies than these.

As a Navy SEAL, I learned that you never win a fight alone — you win it with a team that has your back.

That’s why I’m asking: will you stand with me today?

Your support is how we punch back — with the truth, with strength, and with American grit.

[DEFEND THIS DISTRICT](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/poll-in-the-field-/?utm_campaign=20250416&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A)

When the radical Left targets a fighter like me, they won’t hold anything back. This district will be flooded with desperate attacks to defeat me.

But if we hold the line together — if patriots like you rise up — we will win.

[Please make a contribution so that I’m able to fight back and hold the line for our shared America First values.](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/poll-in-the-field-/?utm_campaign=20250416&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A )

In Service,

https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/poll-in-the-field-/?utm_campaign=20250416&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A

Dan Crenshaw
