name: John Kasich
subject: It doesn't have to be this way
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich for America, not authorized by any
body:
I participated in a TV interview recently, and I was asked a question I’ve been hearing more and more lately.| | | [](http://links.johnkasich.com/s/c/rcaneb6jeSiwLhMneJrBmB94K-4lLcQtP9-yc5oYDfic4plKQXIOA8eMNyGmknd-_Q99CH7EWjsHfF8DTD5gqHS-mXkBZjXksnhhfJyFrvtWtDVINRtLHWWZktQ7GrpR8lJx9WPyBYBWNJ_Is3bMC7cq0WyDUt_ZM_sYgEGACws7nP30SpTgVXxmdXEeFZwcISXrwlTwax_FuXs2j1KjIRPwNKx_pKbTSmKFS8YsUN1xAQ50pbMHFOJYAgQK3uRkNs_9EA/AviOSDkVbdAiJNVB5fA0j6gHzTWgjcwJ/9)
---
Peter, I participated in a TV interview recently, and I was asked a question I’ve been hearing more and more lately: Isn’t it really just one party - the Republicans - that’s responsible for the gridlock and division in Congress?

It’s a fair question, and I understand why people feel that way given that Republicans control both chambers of Congress and the White House. But in my experience, the truth is more complicated. Both political parties have contributed to the dysfunction we’re seeing in Washington.

Part of the problem is that our politics has turned into a zero-sum game, where one side believes it can only succeed if the other side loses. That kind of thinking doesn’t serve the American people. _We’re not opponents to be defeated at all costs_. **We’re citizens of the same country, and we each have a responsibility to treat one another with respect and elect leaders who are focused on solving problems, not scoring political points**.

What’s become increasingly clear is that it’s been so long since Congress functioned the way it’s supposed to that many of those we elect no longer seem motivated to offer bold, forward-looking ideas. Today, winning a majority in the U.S. Senate or House too often seems less about advancing a meaningful agenda for the American people - and more about blocking the other party from doing anything at all.

I'll give you an example that's been on my mind lately.

Republicans maintain a historically narrow majority in the U.S. House right now, and while even that slim majority affords them much of the power to move legislation, being in the minority doesn't mean you’re powerless.

What’s stopping Democratic leaders, or even a group of rank-and-file members, from stepping forward with a blueprint for their own budget proposal? What’s preventing them from introducing a comprehensive plan to reform healthcare or immigration, confront our runaway national debt, or take on any number of other issues that matter deeply to the American people?

The answer is nothing. Too many members of Congress have become so afraid to take a stand, worried it will be used against them in the next campaign, that they end up doing nothing. They say nothing and simply wait for the next election. But to what end? What is the point of running for office, and even winning a governing majority, if your only strategy is to block the other party from accomplishing anything?

The shame in all of this is that it doesn't have to be this way. In my experience, voters tend to reward those who have the courage to put forward bold ideas and clearly explain why they are taking the positions they are. Even when voters disagree, they respect honesty and conviction. The reality is often the opposite of what many in Congress fear.

During my 18 years in the U.S. House of Representatives, the Republican Party was in the minority for most of that time. But that didn’t stop me from advocating for big ideas and working with colleagues across the aisle to move them forward. Congressman Tim Penny (Democrat) and I introduced a budget plan year after year, and each time it gained more support, and in 1997, we passed a balanced federal budget for the first time in nearly 40 years.

Change doesn’t happen overnight, but it is always possible. I believe a major reason the American people have lost confidence in Congress and elected leaders is this persistent pattern of inaction fueled by toxic, win-at-all-costs mentality behind it. Imagine if we could turn that around. Imagine if our politics focused on the best ideas, regardless of where they come from, and on finding real, bipartisan paths to make them a reality.
---

What’s stopping Democratic leaders, or even a group of rank-and-file members, from stepping forward with a blueprint for their own budget proposal? What’s preventing them from introducing a comprehensive plan to reform healthcare or immigration, confront our runaway national debt, or take on any number of other issues that matter deeply to the American people? The answer is nothing. Too many members of Congress have become so afraid to take a stand, worried it will be used against them in the next campaign, that they end up doing nothing. They say nothing and simply wait for the next election. But to what end? What is the point of running for office, and even winning a governing majority, if your only strategy is to block the other party from accomplishing anything? The shame in all of this is that it doesn't have to be this way. In my experience, voters tend to reward those who have the courage to put forward bold ideas and clearly explain why they are taking the positions they are. Even when voters disagree, they respect honesty and conviction. The reality is often the opposite of what many in Congress fear. During my 18 years in the U.S. House of Representatives, the Republican Party was in the minority for most of that time. But that didn’t stop me from advocating for big ideas and working with colleagues across the aisle to move them forward. Congressman Tim Penny (Democrat) and I introduced a budget plan year after year, and each time it gained more support, and in 1997, we passed a balanced federal budget for the first time in nearly 40 years. Change doesn’t happen overnight, but it is always possible. I believe a major reason the American people have lost confidence in Congress and elected leaders is this persistent pattern of inaction fueled by toxic, win-at-all-costs mentality behind it. Imagine if we could turn that around. Imagine if our politics focused on the best ideas, regardless of where they come from, and on finding real, bipartisan paths to make them a reality. There are better days ahead. Thank you for being a part of this team and for standing with me. Your support truly makes all the difference. -John | | | Get the Latest Updates: | | | | ---|---|---|--- | | | | Paid for by Kasich for America, not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.JohnKasich.com

As a former Navy SEAL, I thrive in tough fights. I’ve faced worse odds overseas and am ready to bring that same grit to Washington | [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=bbb21cec383649f09b5db82a8267199c&_e=FWhJkfvdzESsJuyvTjtMfT5z51p1lhTJlBua-vf53PCNDxdDmStRPRpRnFuZC4erofqQ2jzwfHC4tNtsQ8bEYA2iLQY3vAEGQOdrnEmPYWr5SJidaZDRmgLHD3JbRymnKh0yExetAH5ARcxI-1OELVF5q3OzFXi755w8qJfBK5i0FockMxWeRd6hrxPQ013087C4aWSbritHUbchbdKG1PBvdyZQRBMmBrn6AnL3L4ooZT9r9oC7XujvUt1zMN7FqD7friT3W4NzIanCY9V6w9Z8kWDVowbkNxvtoGwGa61SnMVdMFDXfi6PecxFfALCLX55JjKnmK0AKh__cBECujRFUCEPT5GtTkWDonA87FfCkOTZLYYlSh58QQNk6HYMmixt22noJNyLXw6FDFzHT24E35QgJA0fcRr2zyIokE4UcdIQijpeXctFFhdViYdT)

Fellow Conservative,

My name is Adam Schwarze, and I’m a former Navy SEAL, Marine Corps veteran, and proud Minnesotan **running for U.S. Senate against Tim Walz’s handpicked lieutenant governor—a politician even more radical than her boss.** I’m requesting your support in this critical battle to restore common-sense conservative values to Minnesota.

I hold a Master’s from Harvard, a Master’s Certificate from Johns Hopkins in Security and Nuclear Deterrence, and an MBA. But my proudest achievement is serving our country to make my parents, especially my mom, proud. I want to serve you in the U.S. Senate, fighting for the values that have made Minnesota and America great for generations.

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=bbb21cec383649f09b5db82a8267199c&_e=FWhJkfvdzESsJuyvTjtMfT5z51p1lhTJlBua-vf53PCNDxdDmStRPRpRnFuZC4erofqQ2jzwfHC4tNtsQ8bEYA2iLQY3vAEGQOdrnEmPYWr5SJidaZDRmgLHD3JbRymnKh0yExetAH5ARcxI-1OELVF5q3OzFXi755w8qJfBK5i0FockMxWeRd6hrxPQ013087C4aWSbritHUbchbdKG1PBvdyZQRBMmBrn6AnL3L4ooZT9r9oC7XujvUt1zMN7FqD7friT3W4NzIanCY9V6wzDZLThfwDe-J-e-gcV1LB6iIy38o-VpkxN0G3PIcABeR2f3u6gFracycT_ei5m2Qg081jav6tyngFNbdYVmYJghSDEyy1_Je9NYS9dA3iSqCf5yfoHsDpgd8RGbr6Kt5yBeG-ff_N6yRR6-XInmzxAxmQCGLejbBY1DTnTSOB7y)

**I’m starting this race with absolutely nothing** , but because of the enormity of the race's outcome, I figured there is no harm in asking for your help. At the end of the day, my request of you will end in one of two ways:
* 1.) **[you contribute to help elect a former Navy SEAL to the United States Senate](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=bbb21cec383649f09b5db82a8267199c&_e=FWhJkfvdzESsJuyvTjtMfT5z51p1lhTJlBua-vf53PCNDxdDmStRPRpRnFuZC4erofqQ2jzwfHC4tNtsQ8bEYA2iLQY3vAEGQOdrnEmPYWr5SJidaZDRmgLHD3JbRymnKh0yExetAH5ARcxI-1OELVF5q3OzFXi755w8qJfBK5i0FockMxWeRd6hrxPQ013087C4aWSbritHUbchbdKG1PBvdyZQRBMmBrn6AnL3L4ooZT9r9oC7XujvUt1zMN7FqD7friT3W4NzIanCY9V6w_3iOn1Sk9iTgDcy09TuDD__0WROJ9GKeZPngKeGvrdXwJWxxH5xNVK_hrgZD7T-0Rbo3Eue3eSO17kYS6Re-8mNA0oAdjBnx2GWs3Lco74Q9SMOY5CTRT04qcOEN7-TU-UyZKsFte_5XAGNQL8ucMsylH8vIkCN4Y8Ep8trUjSq)**.
* 2.) you read this email without contributing, but you at least now know who I am.

[**HELP ME GET MY CAMPAIGN OFF THE GROUND
CONTRIBUTE $2 OR MORE **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=bbb21cec383649f09b5db82a8267199c&_e=FWhJkfvdzESsJuyvTjtMfT5z51p1lhTJlBua-vf53PCNDxdDmStRPRpRnFuZC4erofqQ2jzwfHC4tNtsQ8bEYA2iLQY3vAEGQOdrnEmPYWr5SJidaZDRmgLHD3JbRymnKh0yExetAH5ARcxI-1OELVF5q3OzFXi755w8qJfBK5i0FockMxWeRd6hrxPQ013087C4aWSbritHUbchbdKG1PBvdyZQRBMmBrn6AnL3L4ooZT9r9oC7XujvUt1zMN7FqD7friT3W4NzIanCY9V6w3TTMLCado8LOYeOxXhspbFog63H3FaGbPmPADbv80U2WvWaBeT8zOfxrGe8XXaKklrLUJubbiDPU-BSfJJ7sy2pILh6q7aRYVQZ98cAtVGmzhXcZV0P8U2S-daArPoARzyYg8UVHkMm6HLa2zJvcIPs60_0XzjG-spPGKeAYMF7)
**I’m not a career politician. I’m a regular guy from a working-class family who grew up playing hockey and answered our nation’s call on my 18th birthday in October 2001, just weeks after the 9/11 attacks.** I joined the Marine Corps to defend our country, and as a Navy SEAL, I deployed nine times to over 70 countries, risking my life to protect our freedoms and way of life. Unlike Tim Walz, who retired from the National Guard before his unit deployed to Iraq, I never backed down from serving our nation during war.

Minnesota is at a crossroads. Under Governor Walz and his lieutenant governor, our state has been dragged left by radical policies that fueled the violent unrest in Minneapolis in 2020, **defunded our police** , and burdened hardworking families with higher taxes and inflation. **While our streets burned, the lieutenant governor pushed lawsuits against law enforcement, undermining the officers keeping us safe.** This isn’t the Minnesota I grew up in—or the one any Minnesotan deserves.

**If you are reading this email right now and you don’t live in Minnesota, then I’m sure you’ll agree with me that every American must be represented by individuals in Congress who want to build a better version of the America we live in today—individuals of integrity.**

_**That’s not who my opponent is. **_

We have an incredible opportunity to elect a Republican to the U.S. Senate next year - something voters in this state haven’t done since they re-elected former Senator Norm Coleman in 2002. As a Republican, I know the odds are tough in a state that hasn’t voted red in a presidential election since 1976. But **as a former Navy SEAL, I thrive in tough fights. I’ve faced worse odds overseas and am ready to bring that same grit to Washington.**

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=bbb21cec383649f09b5db82a8267199c&_e=FWhJkfvdzESsJuyvTjtMfT5z51p1lhTJlBua-vf53PCNDxdDmStRPRpRnFuZC4erofqQ2jzwfHC4tNtsQ8bEYA2iLQY3vAEGQOdrnEmPYWr5SJidaZDRmgLHD3JbRymnKh0yExetAH5ARcxI-1OELVF5q3OzFXi755w8qJfBK5i0FockMxWeRd6hrxPQ013087C4aWSbritHUbchbdKG1PBvdyZQRBMmBrn6AnL3L4ooZT9r9oC7XujvUt1zMN7FqD7friT3W4NzIanCY9V6w7eTaeegMs6GUKRhYKB3o3ZUtQ4Ey59OnvkxAX9BBU4deuPlURYXNYDWAP4scYQ6kWCSh-tnoC5FVChwyYQ7lmZ8vCX7guiUOdNqj9zEFX390klGvQEyuTuH_BzmA4yKlPLF_jeFL9uI61W6xMe-RAEsoi6oILgrIwtli6603pWM)

Here’s what I stand for:
* Restoring law and order by supporting our police and cracking down on crime.
* Cutting taxes and regulations to ease the burden on retirees and small businesses.
* Securing our borders to protect our communities and sovereignty.
* Defending our Second Amendment rights and traditional values.
* Stopping the radical left’s agenda that’s eroding the America we love.

You don’t know me, but you know what men like me stand for and our reputation. So, **[I’m asking you to take a chance on me and support my campaign today, in its infancy, to help me get it off the ground and give us a shot at reclaiming a Senate seat we haven’t held in a generation](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=bbb21cec383649f09b5db82a8267199c&_e=FWhJkfvdzESsJuyvTjtMfT5z51p1lhTJlBua-vf53PCNDxdDmStRPRpRnFuZC4erofqQ2jzwfHC4tNtsQ8bEYA2iLQY3vAEGQOdrnEmPYWr5SJidaZDRmgLHD3JbRymnKh0yExetAH5ARcxI-1OELVF5q3OzFXi755w8qJfBK5i0FockMxWeRd6hrxPQ013087C4aWSbritHUbchbdKG1PBvdyZQRBMmBrn6AnL3L4ooZT9r9oC7XujvUt1zMN7FqD7friT3W4NzIanCY9V6wyZh6tCa47Vdl_U7ZtKfkL7FDkFQrrtEhOwygXTz5F-GyJBeA0sZFBf03Kt55Xpbpx6r6H3PT5uvLSn5mCP28Mtn80ICy9dPVvZlmXHuuqY0FC9X4-82x7ORHOzPmiU_sH0os_-K_1NULghmn1EY6FobCm-rG_G4hht8q1dAbcMZ)**.

This race won’t be easy. The Democrats have deep pockets, and the radical left will stop at nothing to keep this seat. **I’m running to serve you, to protect our way of life, and to ensure Minnesota remains a place where faith, family, and freedom thrive.**

**[Your gift today will give our nascent campaign a fighting shot.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=bbb21cec383649f09b5db82a8267199c&_e=FWhJkfvdzESsJuyvTjtMfT5z51p1lhTJlBua-vf53PCNDxdDmStRPRpRnFuZC4erofqQ2jzwfHC4tNtsQ8bEYA2iLQY3vAEGQOdrnEmPYWr5SJidaZDRmgLHD3JbRymnKh0yExetAH5ARcxI-1OELVF5q3OzFXi755w8qJfBK5i0FockMxWeRd6hrxPQ013087C4aWSbritHUbchbdKG1PBvdyZQRBMmBrn6AnL3L4ooZT9r9oC7XujvUt1zMN7FqD7friT3W4NzIanCY9V6w68DPeeu8QYKqXH6LtkfCPJ6aySWOl94xD3oeTh5jGxDd0mylnth9LgTbab_V5FD7YZ1zXv0DZ4O5ZKKdNBNUpgBFJewaXcre0KQgGzqSEEha7D5eXFt6sxBUCbibFJbxy6vhrlqU36fRHNO8gRsW7GU5oyY4miinm0Gn3KPJP1P)**

I hope you’ll invest in me right now – any amount will help.

With gratitude,
Adam Schwarze
Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota

I’m running to serve you, to protect our way of life, and to ensure Minnesota remains a place where faith, family, and freedom thrive. I hope you’ll invest in me right now – any amount will help. With gratitude, Adam Schwarze Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA** | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate

body:
https://maxinefororegon.com/ [https://maxinefororegon.com/]
Peter,
As a doctor, I was trained to listen to experts and put people first.
Republicans in Congress are doing the opposite .
They’re trying to gut due process, slash Medicaid and veterans' benefits, dismantle environmental protections, and defund Planned Parenthood—with no serious alternatives, no expert input, and no regard for the health and well-being of American families.
This chaos isn’t accidental—it’s the plan. That’s why they’re all-in on Trump and his MAGA agenda.
While the GOP prioritizes their personal gain, I’m staying laser-focused on building a future that works for everyone, no matter who you voted for, your zip code, or where you come from.
Oregonians don’t back down—we show up, speak out, and fight hard. We’ve seen you at protests, in packed town halls, and on the front lines of change.
Now it’s time to channel that energy and flip the House, Senate, and White House.
I’m taking a stand for what matters most—our families, future, and freedoms—and not budging. But I need your help.
We’re a grassroots operation that depends on small-dollar donors like you to succeed. If you’re in this fight with me, chip in just $1 to help my campaign protect my seat and stand up for what matters in Congress >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-25q2?refcode=X_250521_laserfocused_act&amount=1]

Maxine

name: Local Democracy Project
subject: Local democracy needs you!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Local Democracy Project
body:
| | |
We are living in historic times.
The Trump administration has ushered in an oligarchy, leading to a descent into authoritarianism, rampant corruption, and assaults on vital programs like Medicaid, Social Security, and the Veterans Administration.
[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsCgbBF5rm9TF3OCm2PlAzc830mH0SaEU79yenHkofnNxmYVU0KaNelsGDLQBgZYnw_TLU4ud3LTKaTO7PuapHWBtSwDuHOU_1PJDmfavtIPrFOwtNCv_TRZoQ5B3b1ylyahEyBX247ml6yAu6XTQHaM40y6duzPis5iBoPLGtjngY-w-myrCoOwfpW8QCiuto3NUdl3Vl7x4tmjM6-2yCGSt70jPuV3pu-0J9-cMXa7uKDgRnlPuJq1mjQgZaPmq312Hv1MiG4iYNDozprclGUKAGnUN8byTK6LdT8Kp6NB_UsYsCpK4b0uHRN0J9t-jO-TzeJLOD95kFC96Q5hcyZbQLgdC4VJQu3yW94qi-JxQ/4go/sIYDEpC6QESgap7UGYGJvg/h0/h001.SMcgqJ-m1aZ0Ucy89Bx6qCbaJ4AmNxsTp4Lra84FM1w)
**_Now, bold action is essential._**
We need champions of democracy— _people like YOU_ —to rise up and consider running for office in your community. For decades, Republicans have strategically secured over 100,000 local elected seats, reaping the benefits while the rest of us have fallen behind.
It’s time for a transformative shift. We must empower and expand local power-building organizations, reinforce existing efforts and launch new initiatives in underrepresented areas.
**Let’s reclaim these seats and restore balance.** Your voice matters, whether it’s on the city council, school board, or in Congress. Organizations like Run for Something, the School Board Integrity Project, and Victory Fund provide essential tools, training, and support for aspiring candidates.
**We are the change we seek! Join us in securing a future where our children thrive in health, prosperity, and security. Support the Local Democracy Project in fostering community leadership and rebuilding our democracy.**

name: Concealed Carry
subject: Your CCW Permit is approved! download here ✅
body:
Download it directly to your phone or computer in as little as 30 minutes...
| | | [](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21522/6374453/94894c47a9d075f13524d6b29c39ceffb6299534/ae43a10869bac40d1ad213b9ba23c7a49c9664be)
---
| | |
---
_May 21st, 2025_
---
| | |
---
| | It’s important you download your concealed carry certificate before it's banned for good.

Due to increased pressure from lawmakers, a website offering you a certificate for America’s Top CCW Gun Permit **could be shut down at any moment.**

Which is why it’s important you download your **Concealed Carry Certificate ASAP**.

Wait even one more day and we won’t be able to guarantee this certificate will be available to download.

This certificate is great for gun owners because it takes advantage of a little-known (but 100% legal) loophole - **[allowing you to get a CCW certification from this website](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21522/6374453/2954c54836d362128ffc6505f91bcc170cfafea8/ae43a10869bac40d1ad213b9ba23c7a49c9664be). You don’t even have to leave your house to do it!**

This loophole ensures you encounter:
* Zero government red tape (and no exposing your private info to the Feds)...
* Zero lines, classroom time or books to read...
* Zero gun range time (you don’t even need to fire a gun to get this permit).

**[It’s as simple as visiting this site and answering a few questions (they’re simple)](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21522/6374453/2954c54836d362128ffc6505f91bcc170cfafea8/ae43a10869bac40d1ad213b9ba23c7a49c9664be).**

Plus you can complete the entire certification process online.

Download it directly to your phone or computer in as little as 30 minutes.

**You don’t even need to own a gun to get this permit...** that’s why it’s named America’s #1 Concealed Carry Permit.

31 states have agreed to accept this permit so far. That’s because it’s simply the closest and easiest path to a semi-nationally recognized permit that’s available right now.

This permit isn’t just a basic concealed carry permit either. **It’s one of a kind... and is available to you No Matter what state you reside in.**

**Hurry and get it now.**

**[There are no guarantees this website](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21522/6374453/2954c54836d362128ffc6505f91bcc170cfafea8/ae43a10869bac40d1ad213b9ba23c7a49c9664be)** will be able to legally deliver this certificate to your email address after today!

subject: May Tracking Poll
body:

| Dear Friend,
---
It’s been one month since a Democrat entered the race against me, and now there’s a third major Democrat super PAC joining the DCCC and House Majority PAC to flip House races like this one across the country.
The Left is on the move. They’re energized, well-funded, and looking to flip seats like ours.
A lot can happen in 30 days, and it already has.
I need to know where I stand.
**[Please take my Monthly Tracking Poll to help me gauge where I am in this race.](https://r2.ddlnk.net/c/AQj9jBYQsZ4DGIy40Agg2cBN5yeMuwca6UtNGsOlP1qtM_w0ORyuKDBIXy5lty3RAFA)**

name: Lexy Doherty
subject: Halal food on Capitol Hill ≠ Muslim Conquest of Jerusalem
body:
As Capitol Hill's old catering vendor is replaced by a new one, the Hill’s Dunkin’ is being replaced with Starbucks, Subway with Jimmy John’s, and their Steak and Shake is being replaced by an Pakistani Street Food chain Cha Street Food which happens to be halal. | | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquiZXCwHHeaZCft4Kb1mgXVp967S8X2DjmXp56Rd2GXXkdSGzR6alORrPgoE_m_5xUf7wiPuz8QZIytjP32LdlaZjrscvY5syuCkWSBps1LvPnulWpN9VS_sHSnL-QoGfUZeUMFChozXZ3BrUPKsihOGBzXzyPottIN6ONFsNdufAkRJBEU34s3CG8Xx3vl5ltAXfgY0o5s0K30BN3ObP3Kku0xl77N_x9C4nzgE9AEEgk8Wa8gFuXUk3UF_0olrUEVR4BnY4uKV7enXDqHhs6MZREWvcvEfQrB-JP0PbYFMPX3UOIJPKhj77IVMUJApgxgWhs8MRElSlcgUC_LZ1lNiga0RJk4Ms96q3jR57bJjEszoVaaea444aekqSWY-7qSUou_XQW8tQe6YYlxD21u/4go/URLtoBO4R8uUlw1UsMb_og/h0/h001.oT7NCZUVSpKIYTMMo6ZOcC-XnKDW9MjoOjE-IBxJBpo)
---

Peter, There's a shakeup underway in the cafeterias underneath the House office buildings on Capitol Hill. As Capitol hills old catering vendor is replaced by a new one the Hill's Dunkin' is being replaced with Starbucks, Subway with Jimmy John's, and their **Steak and Shake is being replaced by an Pakistani Street Food chain Cha Street Food which happens to be halal. ** In case you aren't familiar with what _halal_ means, it is a dietary standard for Muslims akin to kosher for Jewish people, they don't serve pork, alcohol, and that the animals whose meat are used at the restaurant must have been slaughtered humanely. _This was my GOP opponent, Congressman Mike Collins 's reaction:_
---
| [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquiZXCwHHeaZCft4Kb1mgXVp967S8X2DjmXp56Rd2GXXt6Sqhwx9GX8kDkJvcbw1ch1ByKEk0q55Wxlwrn20jeCpXFRH4ijD7NctiA9yGTDQgrCihEtsCc_ghrLur1DK5YY6BtaKUO0TLH9t0M4jHIfKHn_COmjIbaXp75zGxMjjc_z43JmxhXXjY5d1DZw1OAI0u6QoCX4-Y-IaeoDr9IKwotR8dgngMT4tJ69SGfmIcWNpkxMhKZKisT0wwd7uQvU2acT7cJFs72d4oemtaSRW5l0yHvatAZdRh7Gk1s47BTX63bM31oINVzvB43MH7By5enTDWLEYByjPWTV4RRqkVIGywPBEJv_HvfkuSr4zOOLMHp-UokCxtokyBtrzoPVAYAZrw644uvFtsBZ4xOo/4go/URLtoBO4R8uUlw1UsMb_og/h1/h001.Au-NCJmg-w656VdYHPpV0hpqtWm0icRjZHZE42hWBnQ)
---
**
How can you get offended by this?** Has he never tried shawarma? Doner Kebab? Halal food is delicious and the food at this restaurant, CHA Street Food, a Pakistani-American fusion restaurant, looks _objectively as good if not better_ than Steak and Shake:

---
| [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquiZXCwHHeaZCft4Kb1mgXVp967S8X2DjmXp56Rd2GXXuVmxYyG2bBny0VKoh09mSiIPViXFEDKvYgL7nu1QdUiM3LWHgyzHGABO5Ms6Tj22S54gRlYiSWqWHQWdYlBk33LNNdklp7OynRhCQoFuMupbyVM_jwbgMxep2gtvE-LFa2U66bDoP8si2xrUtDZunj8cMMEVkW3MjEJpYq2P_aS7B6NfrmykJYRKNnl1koI8a_iL_X7kAxb8_JqQEkKKsw7aCXlgIyWZxu7rDE9ptWu5TA6PRhoGlw7t6I_omVEjPJhUGkSM9dZ4th_yVj94bdaW8FznT6vyvb5ms2krX-nmT06bSlq1w_aZssefLVhCgsajFmRCaP_neZh5QefDr3KQWurF7kG9fVBz36oNWcl/4go/URLtoBO4R8uUlw1UsMb_og/h2/h001.5QSgLqayGF9McoN1n9t8T4ZS8sWe0pfX96pTYEfCwOI)
---
This is why we can't have nice things. The Republicans putting us through financial hell and delivering our nation to the doorstep of facism _also_ are uncultured losers with no taste. And the bit about the muslim conquest of Jerusalem,**** that's a reference to the far-right's obsession with the Crusades, no different than Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth's "Deus Vult" tattoo -- a Crusader-era slogan associated with the contemporary white power movement. When I ran against Collins in 2024, **we broke**** _every_****Democratic fundraising and voter turnout record in Georgia 's 10th Congressional District.** And we proved that our historically red district isn't so red after all -- and now, we're back to finish what we started. [**Let 's give MAGA Mike something real to cry about, how about the coming blue conquest of Georgia's 10th Congressional district! Can we count on you to donate and help us launch this campaign with some real momentum and firepower?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquiZXCwHHeaZCft4Kb1mgXVp967S8X2DjmXp56Rd2GXXjEQT6Q5D26wF2xTXNw4_yXN_pBNgEUCcO6w5F-Oem-ffmB6WQveawZeBYamvUTtu9t--o6D2VDLT-ZkIg1AsdZTRCVufEWNsP4MzyMAtaDnbtkgl8nhxBPftURSSWHIwd1Mk0KZRcbmuRlnMuxuRW2mADadcbPqdPs74gEZ5Vwvc1Z83NdxGhOIVCftv0UkemzkMLyQw0Ht9emXXpukQ6SlXlErlxUgxDXJppVDSMd1n4BbYnkxR821JQnA1joRUOL9c1Jm7D5XaXI4Y6mo5QPM-fr3s3asJrHq2ORD4hMPtYjicWJmwHC3ENhHA8dJ2Vr7GmcIuhREXAuoeVG-nWjtl5lHaNLTQgA-RrntJdhN/4go/URLtoBO4R8uUlw1UsMb_og/h3/h001.HNpG1ifbDOwLqZdCkEFNvdmFUSlzBP5Kysn2CGAlif0)
---

When we win this I can't wait to try the Halal food in the House Cafeteria, maybe we can even send an order to Collins office while we wait for them to clear out! But seriously, thank you for your support and belief in our campaign. This week's launch is off to a momentous start and it's because of folks like you. Thank you,

clean_body: As Capitol Hill's old catering vendor is replaced by a new one, the Hill’s Dunkin’ is being replaced with Starbucks, Subway with Jimmy John’s, and their Steak and Shake is being replaced by an Pakistani Street Food chain Cha Street Food which happens to be halal. | | Peter, There's a shakeup underway in the cafeterias underneath the House office buildings on Capitol Hill. As Capitol hills old catering vendor is replaced by a new one the Hill's Dunkin' is being replaced with Starbucks, Subway with Jimmy John's, and their Steak and Shake is being replaced by an Pakistani Street Food chain Cha Street Food which happens to be halal. In case you aren't familiar with what halal means, it is a dietary standard for Muslims akin to kosher for Jewish people, they don't serve pork, alcohol, and that the animals whose meat are used at the restaurant must have been slaughtered humanely. This was my GOP opponent, Congressman Mike Collins 's reaction: | How can you get offended by this? Has he never tried shawarma? Doner Kebab? Halal food is delicious and the food at this restaurant, CHA Street Food, a Pakistani-American fusion restaurant, looks objectively as good if not better than Steak and Shake: | This is why we can't have nice things. The Republicans putting us through financial hell and delivering our nation to the doorstep of facism also are uncultured losers with no taste. And the bit about the muslim conquest of Jerusalem,** that's a reference to the far-right's obsession with the Crusades, no different than Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth's "Deus Vult" tattoo -- a Crusader-era slogan associated with the contemporary white power movement. When I ran against Collins in 2024, we broke** everyDemocratic fundraising and voter turnout record in Georgia 's 10th Congressional District. And we proved that our historically red district isn't so red after all -- and now, we're back to finish what we started. When we win this I can't wait to try the Halal food in the House Cafeteria, maybe we can even send an order to Collins office while we wait for them to clear out! But seriously, thank you for your support and belief in our campaign. This week's launch is off to a momentous start and it's because of folks like you. Thank you, | | Lexy Doherty for Congress 565 River Bottom Rd Athens, Georgia | | Sent via . subject: Compassionate Conservatives vs. Lethal Liberals
body:
A tale of two approaches to political disagreement and the health of our leaders

| |
---|---|---
| | | Forwarded this email? [Subscribe here](https://substack..U-rWTR-_vD9q2ZZNX82F55lEJFNb67OxChMSFYeoSkk?) for more
---
Goldstein For Congress - Please Subscribe and also visit us at www.goldsteinforcongress.com
* * *
# [Compassionate Conservatives vs. Lethal Liberals ](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1454853&post_id=164088441&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY0MDg4NDQxLCJpYXQiOjE3NDc4NDYyNDUsImV4cCI6MTc1MDQzODI0NSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE0NTQ4NTMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.6oceHoLM_-l9vnvffnsz5ZTO_dOf2p68fXb4qVprKzI)
### A tale of two approaches to political disagreement and the health of our leaders
| | [Jonathan Goldstein](https://substack.com/@jonathangoldstein81) and [Dr. Michael Goldstein](https://substack.com/@drmichaelgoldsteinct)
---
| May 21
---
| [](https://substack.com/@jonathangoldstein81)| | [](https://substack.com/@drmichaelgoldsteinct)
---|---|---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1454853&post_id=164088441&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY0MDg4NDQxLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc0Nzg0NjI0NSwiZXhwIjoxNzUwNDM4MjQ1LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMTQ1NDg1MyIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.9ACCWIrMUQMDXeqLG2bCIbJaB9NZ40EyATcdBaGPW3s&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1454853&post_id=164088441&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY0MDg4NDQxLCJpYXQiOjE3NDc4NDYyNDUsImV4cCI6MTc1MDQzODI0NSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE0NTQ4NTMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.6oceHoLM_-l9vnvffnsz5ZTO_dOf2p68fXb4qVprKzI&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1454853&post_id=164088441&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY0MDg4NDQxLCJpYXQiOjE3NDc4NDYyNDUsImV4cCI6MTc1MDQzODI0NSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE0NTQ4NTMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.6oceHoLM_-l9vnvffnsz5ZTO_dOf2p68fXb4qVprKzI)

| | [](https://substack..eWUg94CZkbLO39T3i1bWXwNC_K-p0cZk2irIbOlmd8Q?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/drmichaelgoldstein4ct/p/compassionate-conservatives-vs-lethal?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/3d1ae3fb-f37b-47c2-bdd9-2c2cd1dbd573?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Source [CNN](https://substack.com/redirect/21593ae5-a9c4-4123-9325-07c074e68c55?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
There's a divergence on how conservatives and liberals typically look at our presidential leaders.
Thanks for reading The Goldstein Substack! Subscribe for free to receive new posts and support my work.
[Pledge your support](https://substack..qFBH3N0ImhZOrwFX5Le0qcefePlSCeXcWCLwYor92Tg?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=164088441)
Conservatives have often said we may not always support the specific president in charge, but we always support the Office of the President. **The Office is bigger than the elected official.**
Since 2016, there has been a shift in emotional reactions to presidential elections. I can recall watching the 2016 election and the amount of crying that existed at the Javits Center when Hillary Clinton chose not to concede and left many of her supporters in limbo in the early hours of the morning.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/4f2c5112-c324-48b8-8c04-b83137558719?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Source [BBC](https://substack.com/redirect/9681519b-d9ad-4135-9029-495b3039edb6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
The common feeling was especially that the first female president did not happen in 2016 with Hillary and again it did not happen in 2024 with Kamala as first female Black/Caribbean/Indian President being elected.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/227335e6-d252-4eae-b56b-993f1701a7ec?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Source [NBC](https://substack.com/redirect/adc77121-ae1e-42eb-8af5-e732a154db41?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Since 2016 up until this election and then afterwards, the amount of hatred for President Donald J Trump has been a consistent theme by the liberals, MSNBC, CNN and all left media.
Almost every day and especially at dinners, I've had to sit at tables in the Tri-State Area where it's a common topic to discuss the vile hatred for President Trump and the explicit wishes for his demise. It is like the pre-appetizer for these meals and many assume I automatically subscribe to their misinformed hatred.
This is typically across all socioeconomic levels. With the diagnosis of President Biden's advanced prostate cancer, that has spread to his bones (with a Gleason score of 9, which indicates his **cancer** is among the most aggressive), the conservative focus, _**and I hate to make this a political differentiating factor has been one of compassion.**_
Conservatives (not just leaders being diplomatic) start with prayers for his prognosis and many reference the fact that everybody has a family member who will suffer or has suffered through cancer.
Conservatives then turn to a focus on the causes of prostate cancer and the fact that despite the Presidential Cadillac Concierge Coverage with a medical team around him, this was apparently "missed" given his age. _**More will be revealed about the choice not to perform a simple PSA blood test with a no-insurance cost of up to $300, despite claims that his last prostate screening was at the age of 72.**_
_**Now this will lead into an investigation as to whether the American public was misled or decevied and a call to action for an extension of prostate cancer screenings. Unfortantely this is where a divide will likely begin as to cognitive health etc that was also raised by the left against Trump.**_
There should be outrage in our healthcare system because **if they "missed" this for the President how many others in this country are doomed to the same plight**.
If the shoe was on the other foot, you would have so many more people wishing for death, a long and painful death, toTrump and a continuation of the modern liberal mentality that they're right and whoever goes against him should not be able to speak, should die or should be put away in jail. [Just remember when Trump had COVID](https://substack.com/redirect/8248d8dc-1238-4142-a5dd-df7f4829f881?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
**Back to Medicine - How do we prevent missed diagnosis?**
As far as the prostate issue, given the health concerns, many of these can be diagnosed by a simple PSA test, blood test and a rectal exam. [See CDC Reccomendations](https://substack.com/redirect/99e37f50-ade9-42b7-8169-64f9bc69c8d7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) for up to age 69 and then for testing over 70 if the following symptoms are present (**Difficulty starting urination. Weak or interrupted flow of urine, Urinating often, especially at night, Trouble emptying the bladder completely, Pain or burning during urination, Blood in the urine or semen, Pain in the back, hips, or pelvis that doesn't go away, Painful ejaculation.)**[See CDC List](https://substack.com/redirect/2880ed5f-23d5-4605-8fb4-c3bd002ee2e7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
This may be revised given the inexpensive tests to detect versus the costs of cancer treatments. It is time to treat patients first rather than statistics first.
**Next Steps**
As Americans in a politically divided nation, we need to look to the compassion again. There's way too much hatred in this country and it's usually across political lines. It's time we start seeing each other as individuals as humans as Americans first and put policy in politics aside.
You cannot be silent any longer - _**I will not be silent at these tables any longer and if your friends cannot respect your views and agree to disagree, then there is a fundamental issue with those relationships. I promise its not you, its them. Start having the tough conversations.**_
It is through healthy dialogue (with a respect for the other person and a pause before reacting emotionally) that we can stop the discord and sow the seeds of harmony. Time to unite, and usually this country unites in times of trouble. **We cannot remain the Divided States of America if we intend to prevail against our adversaries.**
**Thank you for your continued support and please reach out for assistance. Please subscribe and spread the word as we need your support to grow this message.**
Dr. Michael Goldstein & Jonathan Goldstein
_The father-son team continues on_ so please spread the word and lets really rebuild CT and this country together in a meaningful way.

name: Swamp Digest

* * *
**[Washington Just Lit the Fuse](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xtl=1n4moxy07lqrx7ggktfrqhtzow6rgtmqqcflnl0w5rn8eteijg6hsm43pr7w3w67874rk4glewkj1mpyrfsjp7ktnvkulw6qkgfvpjleh118rdist9jznha27alu09cl4b4chs2xuag9nfwyg29bjcs195uk8irhb4yy5fgum7dof4ma5dxea7sor6khtvnjizzbjd8gpuojhj5rrtadn8uligj6f12a0gasfpk6emccqkn75vma5jdoqe3b8eb40dt0c8qwqbyzkg7y6d6mud1h&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=swmezw&__onlt=h)** While the media focused on the digital dollar and CBDCs, something more dangerous happened behind the scenes: **Congress quietly passed the largest spending bill in U.S. history - $1.32 trillion.** And while politicians celebrate, **[you’re left to pay the price.](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xtl=1n4moxy07lqrx7ggktfrqhtzow6rgtmqqclestwmk7idpdj2jan9qdw6ld7v1x4klydr8cnnf09n5ph9w6v39o6iw5rvrlptpo8c1egdzgklslwi1ww8gcoyjbof07tojkgm4irupdal5enwnmt5ki2vozimr3gth716m9b4uz5dgbzgep2r8oclbjhjzsb2tfvmwyfhyxdsx3ffb5mf805f291xl9ko87fugghlsgma4yy1xvlb51o5q102h1fxs3qe3yuqfilew6arrcicz3tc&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=swmezw&__onlt=h)** This isn’t just politics - it’s a direct hit on your **purchasing power, retirement, and trust in the dollar.** Here's what's happening: Massive deficit spending → More debt → The Fed prints money to buy it → Dollar devaluation. The more they print, the less your money is worth. And now, with **[$1 trillion deficits every quarter,](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xtl=1n4moxy07lqrx7ggktfrqhtzow6rgtmqqd5xx041d0u9l218jurzp90my37tly3cd2qqvndzfrvb9toiavx95srneciviqwvdfzibzbcsaicu79nxh6gpx17zbc4057cd8vfqoer8gvald2teuay01b1s69yxn9419rcqbvcd2w6in11qkv1eu1z0aelfq272lqh7uqihb5lmmu7keih4dey7z615ug0rwkwinfe5pgxgmii1wac44ikp9istmk2hrovt0y994oj5v58acz6drjo&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=swmezw&__onlt=h)** we're locked in a loop: More borrowing → Higher interest → Bigger deficits → Repeat. As foreign buyers walk away from U.S. debt, the **Federal Reserve steps in,** quietly fueling inflation and undermining every dollar you've saved. **[The fallout is already here. The national debt is exploding. The interest payments are devouring the budget.](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xtl=1n4moxy07lqrx7ggktfrqhtzow6rgtmqqjxkxy1fceqjymzicln5ayinrr6neacx8rjyn5j0mr3pfokxv1leg5e9oxf25mr7h6vn7k4qtkqdgcqy5amdnao8w4unjyv3m0j7iv4je0aqmolajykrmmb5ox35tvtcdjy3onws46wia1aquf046phukxvqqszmxuteyxemltmd9by2b1qlvt507o2i3q0iy6wgv5pzr402pmkbgotf4415v5hx7rjriagkoai25mk0hpfcas13x9b1&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=swmezw&__onlt=h)** **The Consequences?** **Economic warfare,** plain and simple. And your traditional IRA or 401(k)? **Directly in the crosshairs.** A price tag every American will feel. It's no longer a warning - it's reality. Government spending may create a short-term GDP "bump" and it may look fine on paper - but don't be fooled. This is **not real growth.** It's artificial. Temporary. A mirage. **You can't control Washington. You can't stop inflation. But you can protect your retirement.** That's exactly why this **[Free Wealth Protection Guide was created.](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xtl=1n4moxy07lqrx7ggktfrqhtzow6rgtmqqjddc4xwvx0s7we2cfrvz4or1d6mcbbolhwxxdpomgpdjss8zr1kcm0ax7m2xbym9zkthelpmeouhk31bkjogv0fm4hyjw9t3myd5ltgz3v44ncyqh5hnsnzs3stzciok00zsdr2oxlnbz1x5qsccv669osswq0r6app9tpo8wb9kimskb11s8dfoc7n9yiwfvbiwyns3zw02l9wmp6g37xkuqdkfb1jo0ebc2liwun5scmvjrdvby5l&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=swmezw&__onlt=h)** It will help you learn how to protect your savings and how to diversify your retirement. [](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xtl=1n4moxy07lqrx7ggktfrqhtzow6rgtmqqjjwgz5nopxkegi8czvjxxeua369aca4dn7wiofan9a61vjhde44yq93fed324foa5pavzgo3ym9j5dtm9vkppbq058jjtlgiwomrrgdu6pfkmtvi3pnoxk5vxfffkml42r7x79ax1pcd8qddljpmasfw3pucnpvdg8jiokpta3ea2kh8oz3p0qyu4ncrhe90igky398e73jezwqcphh2n6dtzaork6qdoct3t3clbam22dp6rtlfkxl&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=swmezw&__onlt=h)

body:
Jason Crow For Congress [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88523/images/logoJC%20(1).png]
Hi team,

Dark money is corrupting our democracy. Corporate special interests and ultra-wealthy donors are spending millions to elect candidates who’ll protect their power and pad their pockets with tax cuts for the rich, at the expense of working people.

Jason Crow is fighting back. He recently introduced the End Dark Money Act in Congress to shine a light on secret political spending and put power back where it belongs — in the hands of the American people.

Jason doesn’t take a dime from corporate PACs. He’s not beholden to wealthy donors. He’s accountable to everyday Coloradans and to folks like you who believe our democracy should work for everyone, not just the well-connected few.

Will you add your name now as a citizen co-sponsor of Jason’s End Dark Money Act to demand transparency and root out political corruption? [https://act.jasoncrowforcongress.com/a/2025-05-dark-money]

ADD YOUR NAME [https://act.jasoncrowforcongress.com/a/2025-05-dark-money]

The same people who are trying to manipulate elections with dark money are the ones trying to gut Medicaid, take away food assistance from working families, deny climate change, and make it harder to hold power accountable. Jason’s bill would help stop them and send the message that our democracy is not for sale.

Thanks for taking action,

— Crow HQ
Jason Crow for Congress
8547 E Arapahoe Road, STE J-543
Greenwood Village, CO 80112
United States
www.jasoncrowforcongress.com [https://www.jasoncrowforcongress.com/] | info@jasoncrowforcongress.com [info@jasoncrowforcongress.com]

Happy National Waitress Day, Peter! I’m running for Congress, but I haven’t stopped waitressing here in Eau Claire. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108113105/546883015/-2087246159?refcode=em-5.21.25-all-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MGMyMjAwMy02NjM2LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nMyFI8DpAFBSP97zo7N86V0XD-O991aUEZdIzIYekS4=) I’ve been serving since I was a teenager – helping to put myself through school and make ends meet. I love this job, and I think there’s real dignity in hospitality work. I also believe the lessons you learn waiting tables can apply everywhere, even in Congress. This campaign is built on the same values you learn on the restaurant floor: hard work, respect, and showing up for people, no matter what. I think Washington could use more of these values -- and fewer career politicians and billionaires who’ve never waited tables in their life. That’s why I’m running - and that’s why I’m asking: [**On this National Waitress Day, can you throw some love into the tip jar to bring real change to Wisconsin’s 3rd District? Chip in $3 today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108113106/546883016/-2087246159?refcode=em-5.21.25-all-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MGMyMjAwMy02NjM2LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nMyFI8DpAFBSP97zo7N86V0XD-O991aUEZdIzIYekS4=) __If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: __ | | | ******[Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108113107/546883017/-2087246159?refcode=em-5.21.25-all-c&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MGMyMjAwMy02NjM2LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nMyFI8DpAFBSP97zo7N86V0XD-O991aUEZdIzIYekS4=)******

| | Fellow Conservative, I've spent my career fighting to rein in our out-of-control federal government. Fraud and waste have gone unchecked for decades, the entrenched bureaucrats stick around as our elected representatives come and go, and overregulation has resulted in businesses lost, opportunities never realized, and a less competitive nation on the world stage.

_Now we have a huge moment in front of us._ President Trump is reining in wasteful spending through his DOGE initiative, AND there's a potential game-changer in the House budget bill.

The REINS Act will finally restore constitutional balance and halt bureaucratic overreach.** ****This will be the most significant regulatory reform EVER.** This is no exaggeration. I could not be more optimistic about our country's future if we can fend off the left and put common-sense policies in place that make us stronger. **WILL YOU[SUSTAIN OUR FIGHT](http://trk.tedcruz._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1FLUhvdXNlRmlsZSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Q3J1el9Nb3N0LVNpZ25pZmljYW50LVJlZ3VsYXRvcnktUmVmb3JtLUV2ZXJfMjAyNTA1MTUmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1FbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1Nb3N0LVNpZ25pZmljYW50LVJlZ3VsYXRvcnktUmVmb3JtLUV2ZXImdXRtX2FnZW5jeT1QRyZhbW91bnQ9NzUmcmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUifQ/BxLqQgQb1JM4qPJ9T9DzIg) AT THIS CRITICAL TIME?**

clean_body: | | | = = Peter, let me set the scene for you. – The Washington Post revealed Democrats could = Republican seats from red to blue. – We only need to win = to take back the majority. – GOP mega-donors are rushing millions to get an early lead and ruin our chances. = = = NAME:= ID:= MEMBERSHIP:= = Let me be clear, Peter: These 29 Republican-held districts could decide the future of the House majority. If we win just THREE of them, we flip the House. It’s that simple. We’ll only win if we have the resources to connect with EVERY voter in districts like these. = | = = | = = | = = Keep the faith, Hakeem Hakeem Jeffries is the Democratic Leader of the U.S. House of Representatives. Like many of us, Hakeem was raised by a working-class family; His mom was a social worker and his dad was a substance abuse counselor. Now, as the top Democrat in the House, he’s fighting to stop MAGA extremism and reclaim the majority for Democrats. Hakeem is committed to electing a record number of Democrats in the next election and beyond. But he can’t compete with Republicans’ special interest cash without our support. Is there any way you could chip in to help? = We know you’re getting a lot of emails, but that’s because Democrats have a clear path to winning back the House – and Hakeem isn’t letting a single second go to waste. name: Rick Larsen
subject: The progress we make now is important
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen
body:
This year, I have been working hard to stand up for families in Northwest Washington and fight back against President Trump and the Republican Rip-Off.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108113432/546884469/-201694504?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOGNlM2JhMy02NzM2LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EHqvx3PoMRIu26wsO8lpmCC8iEqoqMtsB8gqFUtkipQ=&emci=cc4fb12b-7832-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=e8ce3ba3-6736-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=9494239)
---

| | **This year, I have been working hard to stand up for families in Northwest Washington and fighting back against President Trump and the Republican Rip-Off.** I hear that you are frustrated, scared, and worried. We must defend access to affordable health care, ensure Musk doesn't have access to our personal information, protect our infrastructure projects to safeguard these critical investments in our local communities, and never lose sight of our shared values. **My office is committed to ensuring that everyone in Northwest Washington is heard and their needs are met.** This year, we have already:
* Held telephone town halls with nearly 30,000 attendees
* Held an in-person town hall in Skagit County with roughly 300 attendees
* Held 182 meetings and events with community members, Washington state, and Northwest Washington state groups
* Answered over 47,000 messages from concerned Washingtonians

[**We cannot back down now. Continue to voice your concerns and join me in our continued fight to protect Northwest Washington values from the Republican Rip-Off.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108113433/546884470/1596212816?refcode=2025-05-21-work&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=e8ce3ba3-6736-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOGNlM2JhMy02NzM2LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EHqvx3PoMRIu26wsO8lpmCC8iEqoqMtsB8gqFUtkipQ=) [Donate Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108113434/546884471/1596212816?refcode=2025-05-21-work&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=e8ce3ba3-6736-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOGNlM2JhMy02NzM2LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EHqvx3PoMRIu26wsO8lpmCC8iEqoqMtsB8gqFUtkipQ=) **I know the news is disheartening, but we can still make progress right now. Here is what we have accomplished in just the last few weeks:**
* Recovered $775,000 for our district
* Restored funding to the Port of Anacortes that the Trump administration had rescinded
* Co-sponsored legislation to block un-elected Elon Musk's access to Americans' personal information
* Led legislation to end Trump's trade war and his abuse of tariffs and emergency powers
* Voted against the Republican Rip-Off budget
* Introduced legislation to reauthorize a community-led effort to restore marine habitats in the Northwest Straits region

**There is more work to be done, and we can not back down from our values now. Together, we can take on Trump and the Republican Rip-Off.** More soon, _Rick_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Rick Larsen instantly:

clean_body: This year, I have been working hard to stand up for families in Northwest Washington and fight back against President Trump and the Republican Rip-Off. | | | | This year, I have been working hard to stand up for families in Northwest Washington and fighting back against President Trump and the Republican Rip-Off. I hear that you are frustrated, scared, and worried. We must defend access to affordable health care, ensure Musk doesn't have access to our personal information, protect our infrastructure projects to safeguard these critical investments in our local communities, and never lose sight of our shared values. My office is committed to ensuring that everyone in Northwest Washington is heard and their needs are met. This year, we have already: Held telephone town halls with nearly 30,000 attendees Held an in-person town hall in Skagit County with roughly 300 attendees Held 182 meetings and events with community members, Washington state, and Northwest Washington state groups Answered over 47,000 messages from concerned Washingtonians = = I know the news is disheartening, but we can still make progress right now. Here is what we have accomplished in just the last few weeks: Recovered $775,000 for our district Restored funding to the Port of Anacortes that the Trump administration had rescinded Co-sponsored legislation to block un-elected Elon Musk's access to Americans' personal information Led legislation to end Trump's trade war and his abuse of tariffs and emergency powers Voted against the Republican Rip-Off budget Introduced legislation to reauthorize a community-led effort to restore marine habitats in the Northwest Straits region There is more work to be done, and we can not back down from our values now. Together, we can take on Trump and the Republican Rip-Off. name: Trisha Calvarese
subject: The people of Bennett deserve better
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trisha 4 Colorado
body:
| | |
---
Peter, on Sunday, tornados rocked the Eastern Plains — including Victoria’s home in Bennett, Colorado.
She survived, but her home is uninhabitable — windows blown out, doors ripped off their hinges, barn destroyed, cars wrecked, dog kennel and chicken coop crushed.
Victoria is now living out of a camper donated by neighbors — and there’s been no sign of relief from any federal office.
When I asked what she needed, she said: “What don’t we need?”
And what is Rep. Lauren Boebert doing while Coloradans struggle to recover? Promoting photos of herself with Kid Rock.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108113838/546885834/493215135?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk78-fr-wu&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMTE2NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTA5ZTU4OWQtNjgzNi1mMDExLWE1ZjEtNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=fizn1OWdBaJZTGoUPUIVC16VDqXzZVaEiil-KW7f4Qg=)
If she wants to spend her time that way, that’s fine. But she needs to get a different job – and I’m running to replace her.
**As your next representative, I’ll work to secure fast federal disaster relief; rebuild homes, farms and infrastructure; support mental health and emergency housing services and strengthen future rural emergency preparedness.**
**Colorado’s Eastern Plains and its people won’t be forgotten. I’ll show up for them.[If you believe in that and are ready for real leadership – a representative who actually cares – I hope you’ll consider donating to my campaign today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108113839/546885835/493215135?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk78-fr-wu&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMTE2NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTA5ZTU4OWQtNjgzNi1mMDExLWE1ZjEtNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=fizn1OWdBaJZTGoUPUIVC16VDqXzZVaEiil-KW7f4Qg=)**
| | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108113840/546885836/493215135?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk78-fr-wu&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMTE2NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTA5ZTU4OWQtNjgzNi1mMDExLWE1ZjEtNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=fizn1OWdBaJZTGoUPUIVC16VDqXzZVaEiil-KW7f4Qg=)
---
Thank you for standing with Colorado families.
—Trisha
P.S. _If anyone from Boebert’s office is reading this, please, reach out. I’ll give you contact info to get Victoria and her family the support they urgently need._

name: Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: Citizen Cosponors needed ASAP
body:
The Protect Children’s Innocence Act is moving forward
| | | | Friend,
Since day one, I’ve been fighting tooth and nail to protect America’s children from the radical, dangerous transgender agenda that’s targeting their innocence.
My Protect Children’s Innocence Act is a bold stand to stop the barbaric practice of so-called “gender-affirming care” that mutilates and harms our kids with irreversible surgeries, puberty blockers, and hormone treatments. **This is child abuse, plain and simple, and****_[with your help we’re going to put an end to it](http://email.email.greene4congress.com/c/eJxckkGP2yAQhX8NvhERILF98CFbK6kUbfe0u2oviMDYYYuBBZwo_fWVHTeten3zmPdpHnII1nS3BpVPiNKz0QlRitgOUXqovt-2nf48POHnlwuG9hv5NQ3pl8V5oQ-vU_I9fr7ufqhTqm7V12P_k1_WD3e-BXh4l8gVDNLYSS3bQjdV2UndFdCsS15WvKo2rDg3hGtCNjXriNqC1oqcCKebE9Q1qUtOSWEaSuiGbOh6XTJOqlXH60qXtJYlJ3oNHHEyB636COCAK-_6CCmtlB8K25xzDmnm2iO6T6DGCKurcRH05EB0P8j44aMBnOXN-ojve3DCAXywgP0FIg7emmyUkS5hNT3KvdDeiUFelRduVCIADspIAYP4Q4zYPk6B0bgesTbHERDdjnkQA2gzDoi1y41mMfkxKkCsdcqK5YjLSMkhSNM7xNr7arwAyGz-pbAwJhEgm1kO0WdQWZ2N1RFcMs55BU6BVFnMyX9RlxzvMrh8Z8C7vqPHw9vzaY_oVjhrNGLtf-L8o1j7zuD1-PL2UcRGh6ux1qRtiTjp52qmKi4N_R0AAP__zCrUSA)_.**
_I’m calling on YOU, Friend, to join me as a Citizen Cosponsor of this critical legislation._
---
[COSPONSOR NOW](http://email.email.greene4congress.com/c/eJxcklFv2yAUhX8NfiOywQnkwQ_trHRS1fWpq7oXROHaIcVAASfyfv1kx8umvp57uOfTPcghWNNNDWL3iJCj0QkRgugdIuSBv027Tn8-3OOn5zOG9kf5ex6Sb6vzTG5ep-Rr_Hy5-6XeE5_498f-oz5XN3eeAty8a-QGBmnsrLK20A1nndRdAU3FasZrzre0ODYVwI7tOGXvnJaEKqBMd2rbEdZ1W6L2hWlISbblllQVo3XJN12955qRvWR1qSuoUV0uQZs-AjiolXd9hJQ2yg-FbY45h7RwHRA5JFBjhM3FuAh6diByGGQ8-WgAZzlZH_F1D044gA8WsD9DxMFbk40y0iWs5ke5F9o7MciL8sKNSgTAQRkpYBB_iRE9xDkwGtcj2uY4AiK7MQ9iAG3GAdF2vdEiJj9GBYi2TlmxHnEdKTkEaXqHaHtdjVcAmc3_FBbGJAJks8gh-gwqq6OxOoJLxjmvwCmQKosl-R_qmuNdBpevDPhN90-H_Qc_zRjCWaMRbb-Iy4-i7SuFl8fnn6ciNjpcjLUm7Riqy36pZq7i3JA_AQAA___f-9V6)
Our children are under attack—taken from loving parents, pressured into life-altering decisions, and told to reject their God-given identity. We cannot sit idly by while the left pushes this evil on our kids.
The Protect Children’s Innocence Act will:

* **Make it a felony** to perform genital mutilation or chemical castration on minors.
* **Ban federal funds** , including Medicaid, from supporting these procedures.
* **Protect kids** from decisions they’re too young to make—decisions they’ll regret for the rest of their lives.

**_[I’ve got 45 cosponsors in Congress, but I need YOU to stand with me to show Washington the American people demand action](http://email.email.greene4congress.com/c/eJxcklFv2y4UxT8NfiNygBjnwQ9trbRS9W-lv9ZF2wuicO3QYaCAE3mffrLjZdNezz3c89M9yCFY000N4veIkJPRCRGC6B0i5LH-NlWd_ny8x_-9njG0L-XPeUgeVueZ3LxOyWP8fLv7rt5TPdVPz_0Pdt7e3HkKcPOukRsYpLGzyttCNzXvpO4KaLac8ZrV9Y4Wpwa6_Z5VO6U1Y5TTfVl2wAjlHYGqhOq9MA0pya7cke2WU1bWm47ta83JXnJW6i0wxMolaNNHAAdMeddHSGmj_FDY5pRzSAvXAZFDAjVG2FyMi6BnByKHQcYPHw3gLCfrI77uwQkH8MEC9meIOHhrslFGuoTV_Cj3QnsnBnlRXrhRiQA4KCMFDOI3MaKHOAdG43pE2xxHQKQa8yAG0GYcEG3XGy1i8mNUgGjrlBXrEdeRkkOQpneIttfVeAWQ2fxNYWFMIkA2ixyiz6CyOhmrI7hknPMKnAKpsliS_6CuOd5lcPnKgJ_y_w_9l_hylIhUwlmjEW3_EZcfRdsjhbfn168fRWx0uBhrTao4YmW_VDNXcW7IrwAAAP__i0LVYg)_.**

In Liberty,

**Marjorie Taylor Greene**
[](http://email.email.greene4congress.com/c/eJxckk-PmzAQxT-NuTkCGzAcOGyKspVW7Z62q_aCHHsg3vpfbJMo_fQVhKZVr2-e5_00z9x4rcZbh9geEXJSMiJCEH1ChDw332_1KM_Pe_zl9YKh_5r_Wobk0-a8kIfXCv4ezm9PP8QxNrfm88v0s7wUD3e6eXh4t8gdGK70orI-k13DRi7HDLqClawpm6ai2akbeVNAVR8Zk-2RCcnGqm5pUYm2HVugMlMdyUmVV6QoGC3zZjeWbSMZaTkrc1lAicp8DdpNAcBCKZydAsS4E85kujul5OPKdUDkEEHMAXZXZQPIxYHIwfDw4YICnPhNu4Dve3DEHpzXgN0FAvZOq6SE4jZisTxK0yCdHQy_CjfYWQwesBeKD2CGP8SIHsISGJSdEO1TmAGRek5mMCDVbBDttxutYnRzEIBob4UetiNuI8GN52qyiPb31XgD4En9S6FhjoOHpFbZB5dAJHFSWgawUVnrBFgBXKRhTf6LuuU4m8CmOwMeWUPNaQ9njkg9WK0kov1_4vqjaP9O4e3l9dtHFjrpr0prFWuGynxaq1mquHTkdwAAAP__UQPVfQ)

name: Josh Gottheimer
subject: I’m gearing up to take Trump down
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR GOVERNOR
body:
---
| | Friends, I’m gearing up to take Trump down when I’m Governor.

Trump and his right-wing enablers are hellbent on gutting Medicare, slashing Social Security, and targeting our communities.

**But this is Jersey. We don’t throw in the towel — We punch back.**

That’s what this race and this election are all about: Showing Donald Trump and his MAGA extremists that we won’t let chaos and recklessness erode our Jersey Values.

body:
I'm gearing up to make history again — with donors like you by my side.
#
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88833?refcode=em20250521-8960&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8960%2E614464%2EG569Le)
Hi, my name is Abigail Spanberger. I'm a three-term congresswoman from Virginia, a former CIA officer, and the only Democrat in America who can flip a Governor's seat in 2025.
**My opponent just launched over $1 million in ads.**
Soon the floodgates will open. The same billionaires who got Trump elected will come after me and everything we've built together.
_But I'm not intimidated by far-right extremists._
In 2018, I won a seat in Congress held by Republicans for fifty years, and I'm gearing up to make history again — with donors like you by my side.
**[Will you split a donation between State Democrats Committee and my campaign to help us run our own ads and win tough elections all over the country? Our election in Virginia this November will set the tone for Democrats in 2026 and beyond, so it's critical that we raise enough money to win decisively.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88833?refcode=em20250521-8960&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=8960%2E614464%2EG569Le)**

name: Jane Fonda
subject: Trump’s “Big Beautiful Bill”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
You deserve to know what’s being stolen from us.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108114704/546888871/1328794144?refcode=ea.0e84c93d-6a36-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ms=ea.0e84c93d-6a36-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBlODRjOTNkLTZhMzYtZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=-gS6jDSgYNsr06ORf4RdssZLdbMRokPAdu_Q9TZkyX0=&emci=efe0dc85-4c36-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=0e84c93d-6a36-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=4823105)
---
If you haven’t yet heard about Trump’s _“Big Beautiful Bill”_ that House Republicans are trying to ram through Congress, you should. **It will impact real lives. Real people. And once again, we’re witnessing Trump and his MAGA bandwagon put tax cuts for the wealthiest individuals over people like you.[Before I get into what’s actually in this bill, I’m counting on this grassroots movement to come together right now to help JanePAC elect climate leaders who will meet this moment head-on. If that’s worth a few bucks to you, then please consider chipping in today.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108114705/546888872/752884599?refcode=ea.0e84c93d-6a36-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ms=ea.0e84c93d-6a36-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBlODRjOTNkLTZhMzYtZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=-gS6jDSgYNsr06ORf4RdssZLdbMRokPAdu_Q9TZkyX0=)** Behind all the spin and slogans, what the GOP is proposing is one of the most dangerous climate rollbacks in history. **This bill claws back $6.5 billion in climate funds from the Inflation Reduction Act.** These are vital dollars already set aside and promised to the people. The rollbacks include billions in clean energy tax credits that help communities across the country lower their electricity bills and build good-paying jobs in solar, wind, and EV manufacturing. There are projects already underway — many of them in Republican districts — that would be stopped cold. They’re even pushing to loosen pollution rules; cancel funding to monitor smog and methane; speed up drilling permits on public lands; and scrap investments that help low-income communities breathe cleaner air. All of this chaos and destruction for _what_? To bankroll another round of tax giveaways for the ultra-wealthy. **Environmental groups are sounding the alarm. If this bill passes, there could be even more oil and gas drilling on public lands and a dangerous rise in planet-heating emissions in the United States.** This “Big Beautiful Bill” is nothing but a reckless, fossil-fueled betrayal dressed up with a bow. And it’s a brutal reminder of what we’re up against. Our planet doesn’t have four more years. The fight is happening right here, right now. We’re the first generation to feel the full weight of the climate crisis, and the last that can still shift the path we’re on. But it will take more than hope. It will take determination and people like you stepping up in moments like these when we need you most. **[At JanePAC, we’re organizing every single day to defeat climate deniers and elect the leaders who won’t cave to Big Oil. But we need your help now to build the strongest possible defense at the state and local levels against Donald Trump’s dirty fossil fuel agenda. clean_body: You deserve to know what’s being stolen from us. | If you haven’t yet heard about Trump’s “Big Beautiful Bill” that House Republicans are trying to ram through Congress, you should. It will impact real lives. Real people. And once again, we’re witnessing Trump and his MAGA bandwagon put tax cuts for the wealthiest individuals over people like you.= Behind all the spin and slogans, what the GOP is proposing is one of the most dangerous climate rollbacks in history. This bill claws back $6.5 billion in climate funds from the Inflation Reduction Act. These are vital dollars already set aside and promised to the people. The rollbacks include billions in clean energy tax credits that help communities across the country lower their electricity bills and build good-paying jobs in solar, wind, and EV manufacturing. There are projects already underway — many of them in Republican districts — that would be stopped cold. They’re even pushing to loosen pollution rules; cancel funding to monitor smog and methane; speed up drilling permits on public lands; and scrap investments that help low-income communities breathe cleaner air. All of this chaos and destruction for what? To bankroll another round of tax giveaways for the ultra-wealthy. Environmental groups are sounding the alarm. If this bill passes, there could be even more oil and gas drilling on public lands and a dangerous rise in planet-heating emissions in the United States. This “Big Beautiful Bill” is nothing but a reckless, fossil-fueled betrayal dressed up with a bow. And it’s a brutal reminder of what we’re up against. Our planet doesn’t have four more years. The fight is happening right here, right now. We’re the first generation to feel the full weight of the climate crisis, and the last that can still shift the path we’re on. But it will take more than hope. It will take determination and people like you stepping up in moments like these when we need you most. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Let’s fight like hell, Xx Jane = | = | = = Follow along: | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

body:
It’s time to draw a line in the sand. Please read:

Peter,
Whether you want to admit it or not, the Chinese Communist Party is quietly taking over America one farm at a time.
China already owns land in **27 states** , including properties alarmingly close to U.S. military bases. **
* **Our ****farmers are being undercut.**
* **Our food supply is at risk.**
* **The CCP is expanding its footprint on American soil.**

** We’re not just facing a serious economic threat. This is a full-blown national security crisis.
**It’s time to draw the line.**
President Trump’s Cabinet, including Treasury Secretary Bessent, is working overtime to rein in the abuse China has inflicted on the United States for far too long. But that’s not enough.
We need grassroots support to stop this takeover. That means citizens like YOU stepping up and demanding real action to thwart China’s takeover efforts.
[Peter, we’re begging you to add your name RIGHT NOW and support a federal ban on China buying U.S. farmland:](https://trk.emails.troydowning.) [](https://trk.emails.troydowning.) [ BAN CHINA FROM BUYING OUR LAND
](https://trk.emails.troydowning.-2dQ) [ SIGN THE PETITION TODAY
](https://trk.emails.troydowning.) Remember, Peter: **No Farms = No Food. No Action = No Freedom.**
America’s future depends on our actions today.
Thank you for your patriotic support,

name: Team Lizzie
subject: Survey Readout
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS
body:
ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/Non-Re-Elect%20Logo.png]
As we all navigate through these unprecedented times, it’s more important than ever to let leaders know your concerns and what you think they should do to mitigate them. That’s why we’ve been sending you these surveys, and why we are so grateful that so many of you have taken the time to weigh in.
With things happening so quickly, your responses help Lizzie and the team know where you are right now as well as if your thoughts and concerns have changed. If you haven’t weighed in yet, don’t worry—there’s still time to make your voice heard. Lizzie reads these responses closely, and what you share helps guide the decisions our team makes every day. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/pw8oOMCfzEOgkmRCk13TdA2]
SHARE YOUR THOUGHTS [https://secure.ngpvan.com/pw8oOMCfzEOgkmRCk13TdA2]
Lizzie and the team have reviewed your submissions, and we want to highlight some of the key themes. These are the top five issues you told us are weighing most heavily on your minds:
1️⃣ American Government Stability – The so-called “DOGE” group’s mass firings and dismantling of key agencies have many of you deeply alarmed.
2️⃣ Protecting the Constitution – Concerns about defiance of court orders and threats to the separation of powers were echoed again and again.
3️⃣ Foreign Policy – Aligning with Russia, abandoning Ukraine, and gutting diplomacy drew serious concern.
4️⃣ Social Security & Medicare – Cuts to services and efforts to make benefits harder to access are a major worry.
5️⃣ Education – Abolishing the Department of Education and stripping away federal support is seen as a direct attack on our future.
Many of you used the open-ended responses to describe a sense of chaos, a grim outlook, and a deep concern about where the country is headed. You spoke about the long-term consequences of these policy choices—from undermining scientific research to weakening democratic institutions.
But you didn’t stop at concern—you called for action. You urged legal challenges, political pressure, and a louder public response. And that’s exactly what Lizzie’s team is focused on.
One thing is clear: we have to do those things and we have to win back the House majority in 2026. We need leaders who will fight to protect our rights, stand up to extremists, and rebuild what’s being torn down.
If you haven’t filled out the survey yet, please take a moment. Your input truly helps shape the path forward. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/pw8oOMCfzEOgkmRCk13TdA2]
SHARE YOUR THOUGHTS [https://secure.ngpvan.com/pw8oOMCfzEOgkmRCk13TdA2]
Thanks for reading these emails and standing with us,
Team Lizzie

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: We’ve got another major race on our hands here in Wisconsin
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| Judge Chris Taylor is running for the Wisconsin Supreme Court, and the stakes couldn’t be higher.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=4728%2E35263%2EtJsFRU)
Peter, I’m reaching out today with some important news: **We’ve got another major race on our hands here in Wisconsin.** Judge Chris Taylor is running for the Wisconsin Supreme Court, and the stakes couldn’t be higher. Her opponent, Justice Rebecca Bradley, is a vocal extremist with a record of putting right-wing special interests ahead of Wisconsinites. From reproductive freedom, to workers’ rights, to free and fair elections, there are so many reasons why we need a fair, impartial leader on the bench. **That leader is Chris Taylor.** But the same deep-pocketed special interests like Elon Musk — who spent tens of millions to try and buy a seat on the Wisconsin Supreme Court — could get involved in this race. We can’t let them succeed, Peter. **[Will you join me in supporting Chris Taylor by pitching in $10 now? We must fight to protect our progressive majority.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/4591?refcode2=AU_STB_FR_FOT_GEN_AC_20250521_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=4728%2E35263%2EtJsFRU)** | | [DONATE $10](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/4591?refcode2=AU_STB_FR_FOT_GEN_AC_20250521_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=4728%2E35263%2EtJsFRU)
---

Tammy

body:
This never-before-seen footage, obtained exclusively by OMG, reveals the interior of the so-called temple on Epstein’s island.
[View in Web Browser](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kMtuwjAQRb_G3hHZYztOFl7wULroA2hVVSwHOymuYhKckDT9-gpK2c6cmXt0MbS1ryZD9IIAHLzrCAARcwJw2o0hnr_C48Ns2LTr2Sl9CeqyheUNHeAOHy1-80W_2_70m-45O1b6dfsx8DveT215h2-hSRnQ15epXlFnROWYpKXhWupM5nkm6cFYninU-0o45IC5syrnTmMGiMwJVVFvgIFiCjjXSjCeOMtTrlPJXIUoRUoku-YkGMroLfKuHzHGpgmJbQKtzaHv2-4qVhAoxtgkx7Oty3P3d2abQKC4KRMoBgLFfnpvo9tM-yURxbU0sZrW4-7tSc8Fjca1o69r36WaSPb5_4YOBn4DAAD__0SlcAc)

| | | | [****](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxkz7-S2ywUBfCnQZ00cPlnFSq-_TxOkUmymyaz1Q6CK5tEV2IRsrN5-ow0HjdpDz84HEdpjMNHx-wTA7jEsDAAJv9jAO-vN8rrT_r8qb4-p2_1u_lKejuF_-_0Cg88efdbPJXXlz_leflymAb7_eXHVTx4-Uj4wPfSBsnFcUvtsQqdHAJXFXbCKntQbXtQ1aXTXFmJXpvBQ-j7g_QaWuWNHnrVu5ZXsQMOmmsQwmrJRRO8MMIaxcPgnJKGKb73NI4wR-_EUm4u53mmxs9Ujd2llLTsHzsxOC3o14yNmzDMZRMMTvMvxAEJQ3TnPK9pi-hcY1oKxqkuSGnEmvp610ye1kJvy7xmj0we_6UMzCa2B1faxT3xjpKL54nJI_UMjKN5nQqTR9B3UTBvN4Br3r7dsqhyF9ItjmNcjGWKn_ep27BrB38DAAD__65Glfk)
Patriot,

Should Arlington County cooperate with ICE?| | | Friend, **The Arlington County Board just voted to limit local police cooperation with ICE — even in cases involving violent crime.**
_You heard that right._

name: campaign@keithellison.org
subject: $11 billion in public health funding is on the line
disclaimer_text: paid for by the Keith Ellison for Attorney General committee, PO Box 17224, Minneapolis, MN 55417
body:
Peter,

A federal court has issued a preliminary injunction to block $11 billion in devastating cuts to public health after Attorney General Ellison sued to stop them.

Health Secretary Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.’s attack on public health preparedness, especially in the wake of a global pandemic, is outrageous and unconstitutional.

Peter, states rely on this funding to respond to outbreaks, strengthen the public health workforce, and track emerging diseases.

Securing this block is a big win. But the fight isn’t over, and according to our records, we’re still missing your support this year.

If you haven’t already used it this year, will you take advantage of Minnesota’s Political Contribution Refund (PCR) program and make a fully refundable $75 donation and show Keith you have his back? We’re counting on 100 people to step up by the end of the week.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
CHIP IN $10 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em250521ke?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10]

Thank you,

Team Keith

Minnesota's Political Contribution Refund (PCR) program reset on January 1. You can now use your 2025 PCR to contribute up to $75 (or $150 for couples) and receive a full refund from the State of Minnesota.

Please take advantage of your PCR and make a REFUNDABLE $75 DONATION so Keith can continue fighting to help people afford their lives and live with safety, dignity, and respect.

body:
I’m going to keep fighting every single day to protect abortion rights not only in Kansas, but across the country

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108116720/546895944/-240735101?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjcwOWZjNi02ZDM2LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HtTG2FXLZtNaH4banZD9GTxhNmVKu-PoWR7wWpjWIU0=) Here’s the good news: It is indisputable that an overwhelming majority of Kansans supports abortion rights. **But here’s the bad news: National Republicans aren’t giving up their efforts to control women’s bodies. If anything, they’re becoming even more emboldened.** _How do we know this?_ We know it because National Republicans have already introduced dozens of bills to restrict reproductive freedom. We know it because Donald Trump’s Project 2025 explicitly calls for a national abortion ban. And we know it because the Kansas Republican Party has _openly stated_ that they support banning abortion in our state, with no exceptions. [_**I’m going to keep fighting every single day to protect abortion rights not only in Kansas, but across the country. But make no mistake: There is nothing National Republicans would love more than to replace me with an anti-abortion extremist. clean_body: I’m going to keep fighting every single day to protect abortion rights not only in Kansas, but across the country = Here’s the good news: It is indisputable that an overwhelming majority of Kansans supports abortion rights. But here’s the bad news: National Republicans aren’t giving up their efforts to control women’s bodies. If anything, they’re becoming even more emboldened. How do we know this? We know it because National Republicans have already introduced dozens of bills to restrict reproductive freedom. We know it because Donald Trump’s Project 2025 explicitly calls for a national abortion ban.
