subject: I was charged by the Trump administration because I was doing my job
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jonathan Nez for Congress
body:
| Peter, The Trump administration just charged me with crimes for engaging in congressional oversight. This is a first--and it's a flashing red light for our democracy. I went to an ICE facility in my district to conduct oversight because that is my job and my lawful right as a member of Congress. It's clear: Trump and his administration don't want transparency or oversight, and they want to punish any person who dares to speak up. These baseless, politically motivated charges against me make that even more obvious. We must stand up together against an administration that weaponizes law enforcement to persecute its opponents before it's too late. Democrats stand ready to fight back against the Trump administration's overreach, and protect democracy and our Constitutional separation of powers. [**We need your help. I 'm asking you to split a donation between me and Jonathan Nez**** so we have the resources to win this battle for our democracy. name: The Democratic National Committee
subject: The largest cuts to health care and food assistance in American history
body:
---
Derek, Last night, House Republicans stayed up all night to continue pushing the largest cuts to health care and food assistance in American history. If the House GOP’s budget is passed, 14 million Americans will lose their health care, and a program that 42 million Americans rely on to put food on the table will be at risk. Republicans held meetings on this bill in the middle of the night in hopes that the American people wouldn’t notice. But we did. For months, Democrats have been sounding the alarm about this bill — holding more than 100 town halls across the country, including in districts where Republicans won’t show up to meet with their own constituents. At the same time, it’s more important than ever that we have a Democratic Congress that will actually fight for the people they represent, not take away their basic necessities. We’re committed to competing _everywhere_ and making sure Republicans face the consequences of legislation like this at the ballot box. But to do that, we need your help. **[If our work to elect more Democrats is worth $3 to you and you’re in a position to help fund it, we’re asking you to make that contribution to the DNC today:](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-may-2025?refcode=em_20250521_3523_fr&amount=3&refcode2=3523_22930333_8l6Zbr&akid=3523%2E22930333%2E8l6Zbr)**

$3 to help Democrats win upcoming elections in 2025, 2026, and beyond so we can put more people in office who will check Trump’s power.
$3 because the only way we’ll effectively fight back is if we all come together now.
**[We’ve never needed a strong Democratic Party more than we do right now. If you can, please use this link to help support our work.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-may-2025?refcode=em_20250521_3523_fr&amount=3&refcode2=3523_22930333_8l6Zbr&akid=3523%2E22930333%2E8l6Zbr)**

Thank you,
The Democrats

_If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._
clean_body: Derek, Last night, House Republicans stayed up all night to continue pushing the largest cuts to health care and food assistance in American history. If the House GOP’s budget is passed, 14 million Americans will lose their health care, and a program that 42 million Americans rely on to put food on the table will be at risk. Republicans held meetings on this bill in the middle of the night in hopes that the American people wouldn’t notice. But we did. For months, Democrats have been sounding the alarm about this bill — holding more than 100 town halls across the country, including in districts where Republicans won’t show up to meet with their own constituents. At the same time, it’s more important than ever that we have a Democratic Congress that will actually fight for the people they represent, not take away their basic necessities. We’re committed to competing everywhere and making sure Republicans face the consequences of legislation like this at the ballot box. But to do that, we need your help. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | | ** | $3 to support the DNC’s work to organize everywhere and send a powerful message to Republicans that we’re coming for their jobs in 2026. $3 to help Democrats win upcoming elections in 2025, 2026, and beyond so we can put more people in office who will check Trump’s power. $3 because the only way we’ll effectively fight back is if we all come together now. ** Thank you, The Democrats If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._

Take a moment to think back to December 4, 2024. The day a man named Luigi Mangione allegedly killed the UnitedHealth CEO. Now fast forward to May 21, 2025. In the dead of night, MAGA Republicans entered the final stage of their sinister plan to gut Medicaid and Medicare, throwing tens of millions of people off life saving healthcare. On December 4, one person was killed. It made national headlines. Law enforcement launched a massive manhunt. CEOs hired extra security. Politicians repeated calls to denounce violence. And if human life is what we hold sacred above all else, then know this--the GOP budget cuts will kill far more Americans than Luigi Mangione ever could.
It begs the question--why do we express more outrage when a man with a gun allegedly kills one person, than we do when a politicians with pens deliberately kill tens of thousands? **Let 's Address This.**
**We need all hands on deck in 2025 to stand against fascism and disinformation. I invite you to join our movement for justice as a free or paid subscriber.**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..ezDAltFsZbUpB3BNJYpdi3DGsW8v2D68wmxT7uGDwUg?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=164050592)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/69d1cf6a-996e-4846-a3d1-e1c01b46fcfe?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
(L) Luigi Mangione is accused of killing (R) UnitedHealth CEO Brian Thompson.
## Republicans Gut Medicaid for HELL Corporations
Last night at 1AM, while most Americans were asleep, House Republicans launched their campaign to ram through a cruel and catastrophic decision--slashing Medicaid, Medicare, and food assistance. Why? To appease billionaire donors and HELL Corporation CEOs. I link this below as well, but [here's a handy campaign to let your member of Congress know that you oppose their cuts to Medicaid](https://substack.com/redirect/b2cda0eb-66f1-461a-a4d3-4e82bad86590?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). This move by Republicans is not fiscal responsibility--it is moral failure. People will die because of this campaign. And every Republican should be forced to look at their constituents in the eye and explain why billionaire greed matters more than basic human dignity.
According to _The Lancet_ , America's for-profit health system run by HELL Corporations1 is responsible for nearly **68,000 preventable deaths every year** --that's about **31,299 preventable deaths** in the 168 days since the United Health CEO's killing. Meanwhile, the WSJ reports that that DOJ has opened a criminal fraud investigation into UnitedHealth's Medicare practices. This isn't an isolated incident. Last year, a five-year investigation into UnitedHealth's practices by the FTC found that, "_OptumRx, the group's pharmacy benefit manager, along with its two main peers, Express Scripts and CVS Caremark Rx, have pocketed an extra $7.3 billion over cost thanks to price gouging_ " of overcharging cancer patients by more than 1000%.
These are the HELL Corporations that MAGA Republicans are bending a knee to, while tens of millions of Americans suffer. And sadly, it is not just MAGA Republicans.
## **Unity For Humanity Over Party Politics**
First, let's be clear that two things can be true at once. We can recognize that Republicans are openly repealing healthcare and capitulating to the for profit health exploitation industry--and we should oppose and categorically condemn these acts. And we can recognize that too many Democrats are sadly complicit and not doing enough to stop this assault on our health--and we also need to call that out. Until we stand united as Americans--above partisan politics--we will not have the healthcare we need to live.
For example, I have run for Congress twice, against two different members of Congress. Consider these facts from each of my runs for Congress. As you read these four facts, ask yourself what party you think my opponents belonged to?
1. Both of my opponents oppose guaranteed universal healthcare and have taken absurd amounts of money for their re-elections from HELL Corporations, including from UnitedHealth even as they exploit working Americans.
2. Both of my opponents then voted repeatedly to repeal the ACA, including repealing the protection on people with pre-existing conditions, and repealing the ban on charging women more than men for their healthcare.
3. Both of my opponents voted to gut the Americans with Disabilities Act to deny people with disabilities the right to sue when they face discrimination.
4. Both of my opponents are funded by Big Oil, which has enabled climate disaster and increased climate related health issues for tens of millions of people.

If you're thinking that I probably ran against two different Republicans, you would be wrong. One of my opponents is a Republican named Rob Wittman. And the other opponent is a Democrat named Bill Foster. The hypocrisy, cowardice, and lack of a moral compass of both members of Congress is revolting--and that's exactly why we cannot fall into the trap of being divided on this issue.
**If you 're finding value in this insight, please join us as a free or paid subscriber.**
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..ezDAltFsZbUpB3BNJYpdi3DGsW8v2D68wmxT7uGDwUg?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=164050592)
### **The Call to Action: Stand Against Corporate Exploitation**
Conservative or Progressive, Independent or Centrist -- I hope you stand united with all our neighbors in this country and take action to protect our healthcare. Here are two quick, free, and easy calls to action:
1. **Call Your Member of Congress** : Dial 866-426-2631 and demand they oppose Medicaid cuts. Share your personal healthcare story.
2. **Email Your Lawmaker** : Use this easy tool:[ caring.nu/protect-medicaid-2025](https://substack.com/redirect/b2cda0eb-66f1-461a-a4d3-4e82bad86590?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Tell them care matters more than tax breaks for billionaires.

## Conclusion
Think about this. In the 168 days since the UnitedHealth CEO was killed, nearly 32,000 Americans have died due to lack of healthcare access due to these exploitative HELL Corporations. And 168 days from now, some 32,000 more Americans will have died a similar fate. And I am willing to bet this is likely the first time you heard this horrifying fact so much as acknowledged by any corporate media outlet. This is the goal of HELL Corporations, the complicity of corporate funded politicians, and the failure of corporate media.
And rather than working to strengthen healthcare access, MAGA Republicans are emboldened to strip it away and deny tens of millions more people access to the life saving care they need to live. This is why we must keep going. Let's hold the powerful accountable. And let's never stop calling out injustice.
**Quick Ask!** I am doing everything in my power over the next four years to stave off fascism in the United States, and I need your support.**Subscribe and join the movement.**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..ezDAltFsZbUpB3BNJYpdi3DGsW8v2D68wmxT7uGDwUg?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=164050592)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/8913522d-33fa-4b98-800e-bf98cd418b8f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
1
We must stop using the sanitized term "health insurance companies" to describe what these corporations actually do. These are not benevolent entities that insure health or care--they exploit illness. And after denying us access to the care we need, they limit their own liability. Therefore, I call them what they are: Health Exploitation Limited Liability Corporations. Or, more succinctly: HELL Corporations.
**Quick Ask!** I am doing everything in my power over the next four years to stave off fascism in the United States, and I need your support.**Become a paid subscriber and join the movement.**

body:

# [Demand Trump drop plan to block access to Covid vaccines](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6d7a0a3a-b9b3-476a-a373-d7b3bad7f171/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb377146e-6b26-4e59-9f40-783a703d9276/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | The FDA announced it will be limiting access to COVID vaccines only to seniors and individuals considered "high risk" – **and **[**block the millions**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5cb415e5-937b-4d46-806a-4b19d7f0dc6e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** of others who want the vaccines from getting them. **This new ruling is the consequence of putting vaccine skeptic and conspiracy theorist RFK Jr. in charge of our nation's healthcare. COVID-19 still poses a serious threat to many of us – more than 47,000 Americans died from COVID-related causes last year. Now, it's unclear if those who want protection against the COVID virus will be able to get it this fall. The COVID vaccines have saved lives and got us back to living normal lives after the pandemic lockdowns. The Trump administration should not be limiting them now and putting our health at risk. [**Sign your name to tell the Trump administration: Don't block access to COVID vaccines!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0095c92a-c445-4537-b1ac-50ac761fe00d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

This new ruling is the consequence of putting vaccine skeptic and conspiracy theorist RFK Jr. in charge of our nation's healthcare. COVID-19 still poses a serious threat to many of us – more than 47,000 Americans died from COVID-related causes last year. Now, it's unclear if those who want protection against the COVID virus will be able to get it this fall. The COVID vaccines have saved lives and got us back to living normal lives after the pandemic lockdowns. The Trump administration should not be limiting them now and putting our health at risk. | | | | | | | Thank you, Left Action | | | | | | Other things you can do: Follow us on * Follow Us | | LeftAction Washington, District of Columbia info@leftaction.com | Having trouble viewing this email? | | | or

**NEW DEMOCRAT OPPONENT ENTERS THE RACE**
_Democrats are lining up to defeat me._

Fellow American, the Democrats are piling into my race to defeat me, and their reasons are crystal clear:

**
1. I proudly support President Trump.
2. I'm a steadfast conservative.
**
_**That's it.**_ They're coming after me because I stand firm for our values.

But I won't shy away from tough competition. **In 2020, my opponent raised $132 MILLION to defeat me, and _it didn't work._**

I'm sure my new opponents will use the same playbook to try to defeat me, but nobody will outwork me or my team. **We won't stop until we win for South Carolina.**

name: Bethany Mann for Congress
subject: Missouri voters spoke. Republicans didn’t listen.
body:
| |
---
Hi Friend,
---
On Saturday, I stood inside the Missouri Capitol at the _Save Our Say_ rally, joined by over 200 Missourians who are tired of being ignored and ready to fight back. We gathered because Republican lawmakers have launched a full-scale attack on your voice and your rights. They passed **HB 73** , a deceptive bill designed to overturn the will of Missouri voters and confuse us at the ballot box. As the _Jefferson City News Tribune_ reported, I said:
> **_" We're working toward the power of the many versus the 13 or so billionaires that it seems we're all fighting against."_**
**That 's why I'm running for Congress.** I'm not backed by corporations. I'm backed by people like you, people who want reproductive freedom, real healthcare access, and representatives who don't sell out to the highest bidder.
---
|
---
[**Help us defeat Bob Onder and defend reproductive rights.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqt_j19daSnqsgi4WNGft_jpizaNYeDzie2UNsR3lcMeyZB1uCOgU37aSrRGZbEWKMAKkGKj0O3jEKGQ0hnZJ8i1pra-Uvwrpn_ilx9HYcnEbyHLJ2GZy_rJj3Iks_eDCkj11Zwk-6zMKhtq7rG2RqRpf2NuaY8CkPHmfRyA7V6pmnDfUr0Ks0U9wcoZLnIqxNggFS5ZQt5bRjj93yKM4p7ALGR4D7hmMspqUy1uS99iWJRWNg6nivNdl8NS3bB7OjF_eLDoCYPofdcWJEZGmmEKIXUkn2hZkL5kp7PYmhgl6lxkSieuhmz8ONHOw9Kx7meH8CuzYrqBC4Gv6Oymi7MvChGxQ5T8vg9NRAT0XOn9dFaPzr97usU2z3seDCi9X5Q/4go/-Hn1QRYwRMavtvFjCd4WMQ/h0/h001.YQtRhS5Xb9ts2mF50gPaVEAahWv5gdDyos8LKp-bFzg) **[Every dollar you give goes toward beating Bob Onder ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqt_j19daSnqsgi4WNGft_jpizaNYeDzie2UNsR3lcMeyVjpI1BBHq8-6lbhrtJ__y7m2p1sYCIPHv6HX-DsVXQFaOXPg54DjO69isfQCQd0KRsHaX7mqwlE1vG9QMYwR54mnvfA09BMAZIoFzz3zhkmkwpZTaEgQoK-sRmsSXHkIKskwJX0snv6vMYyztjR-dL0ah30-IfotI1AwI66A1BZdGzyFpu9MymR6HWgDN94KasHWdL0AiIJqbISku-8-r6Tc8pqD1mWIOzkO8BqC772J5pPeqTs6Rb3wsI-z_v3wOuAzhAZl7jmd1P5QMgGA3Ea-xWq7LQH_foOrZ11AMVe9pQMWi3g2trRPlJCxVL3MoPMQPGan2efVurm2RFnsAM/4go/-Hn1QRYwRMavtvFjCd4WMQ/h1/h001.pjin0kbymkwM25VtkdwQsvKKocvk4xcEkehlXxNvXKU)and protecting the rights he's determined to destroy.** The truth is, they're trying to silence us because they're scared. When Missouri voters have a fair shot, we win. That's why they're rigging the process. We have to meet this moment head-on, with organizing, honesty, and grit. That's exactly what this campaign is doing. Thank you for being in the fight with me.

subject: Budgets reflect our values. Republicans just made theirs crystal clear.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
Americans deserve better than what Republicans are selling. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108118499/546902461/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250521_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyODQ5MGVkOC03MTM2LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ah3-B-ZCrZPXpvbo1up6r72zHeoXRmS_TSxkNiL7i5o=&emci=19490ed8-7136-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=28490ed8-7136-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=252045)

Team, I have a question for you: How morally bankrupt is a political party that tries to pay for tax breaks for billionaires by taking food away from hungry kids — and kicking families off their health care? Because that’s exactly what Republicans are pushing right now. Their latest budget is a **full-scale attack** on working families, slashing essential programs so the ultra-wealthy and powerful corporations can get even more tax breaks. Budgets are a reflection of our values, team, and Republicans have made theirs crystal clear: _billionaires first, everyone else last. _ I am fighting to protect programs that seniors, children, and families rely on. Republicans think that makes me and my fellow Democrats weak, but they are wrong. Let’s show Republicans the real strength of everyday Americans. If you’re able to, will you make a grassroots donation of any amount today? **[I’d be extremely grateful:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108118500/546902468/171185841?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250521_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyODQ5MGVkOC03MTM2LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ah3-B-ZCrZPXpvbo1up6r72zHeoXRmS_TSxkNiL7i5o=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108118501/546902475/171185841?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250521_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyODQ5MGVkOC03MTM2LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ah3-B-ZCrZPXpvbo1up6r72zHeoXRmS_TSxkNiL7i5o=)

clean_body: Americans deserve better than what Republicans are selling. Team, I have a question for you: How morally bankrupt is a political party that tries to pay for tax breaks for billionaires by taking food away from hungry kids — and kicking families off their health care? Because that’s exactly what Republicans are pushing right now. Their latest budget is a full-scale attack on working families, slashing essential programs so the ultra-wealthy and powerful corporations can get even more tax breaks. Budgets are a reflection of our values, team, and Republicans have made theirs crystal clear: billionaires first, everyone else last. I am fighting to protect programs that seniors, children, and families rely on. Republicans think that makes me and my fellow Democrats weak, but they are wrong. Let’s show Republicans the real strength of everyday Americans. name: Connor Miller
subject: slump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
Grassroots donations keep Sarah focused on fighting back inside and outside of Congress.
#
Hi. It’s Connor, Sarah’s Finance Director.
This wasn’t the email our team hoped to send today. But right now, we’re experiencing a significant slowdown in our campaign fundraising — right when we can least afford it.
Take a look:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250521-1?amount=5&refcode=em20250521-2020&refcode2=2020_21716_rdI0a3&akid=2020%2E21716%2ErdI0a3)
Meanwhile, Republicans in Congress are ramping up attacks on working families. Just this week, they’re pushing Trump’s “big beautiful” tax scam that slashes Medicaid and food assistance to give tax breaks to billionaires.
**Grassroots donations keep Sarah focused on fighting back inside and outside of Congress — not worried about fundraising.** That’s why I’m hoping Sarah and our team can count on you to step up today.
[**If you’re in the position to do so, can you pitch in $5 to power Sarah’s work and build a movement to meet this moment?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250521-1?refcode=em20250521-2020&amount=5&refcode2=2020_21716_rdI0a3&akid=2020%2E21716%2ErdI0a3)

Thank you!
Connor Miller
Finance Director

name: The New Pennsylvania Project
subject: Voting is more important than ever
body:
| | |
---
| | Hi Friend, You're invited! Thursday, May 22, at 6:30pm our founding CEO, Kadida Kenner, will be participating in an important conversation about the Pennsylvania Supreme Court:
* What it is
* How it impacts your life
* What’s at stake in 2025

From voting rights, LGBTQ+ rights, the environment, and so much more the PA Supreme Court is Pennsylvania’s last line of defense when it comes to protecting so many of our rights. This call will bring together several featured speakers who can speak about the impact of the courts on all these issues and as well as an informative overview of the Pennsylvania Supreme Court election that will be on your ballot this fall. Other guest speakers include Molly Parzen of Conservation Voters of Pennsylvania, Gillian Kratzer representing Fairness PA, and J.J. Abbott of Commonwealth Communications. Register now to secure your spot!

name: Wes Moore
subject: This policy is unacceptable
body:
I have news for Peter
# [](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/8?t=1&akid=76%2E1086043%2Ea0CcAL)
Hey Peter, it’s Wes Moore.
I’m fighting to protect Maryland from the Trump Administration’s attacks. In just a few weeks, Donald Trump has stripped $1.65B from critical programs Marylanders rely on.
Let me break down what that includes so far:
🎒 _Revoking over $480M in public school funding._
🏥 _Denying over $300M in healthcare funding._
👥 _Firing over 11,000 Maryland public servants._
These cuts aren’t just numbers. They’re attacks on anyone and everyone who relies on basic public services in our state.
**[If you’re ready to support my work standing up for Marylanders, will you chip in to our reelection campaign today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250521-1?refcode=em-20250521-1&refcode2=76_1086043_a0CcAL&akid=76%2E1086043%2Ea0CcAL)**
Our ability to protect Maryland from Trump's chaos depends on building a movement strong enough to push back.
Here in Maryland, we’re setting an example for the entire country. We’re working diligently to protect our state from these cuts. We’re refusing to abandon our public school students. We won’t turn our backs on the sick and needy.
**Today, I'm asking you to join me in this fight by supporting our campaign.**
**[If you can, chip in today to help us build the resources we need to stand up to these attacks. Whether it's $5, $25, or whatever you can give, your contribution helps.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250521-1?refcode=em-20250521-1&refcode2=76_1086043_a0CcAL&akid=76%2E1086043%2Ea0CcAL)**
**[Donate $5 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250521-1?amount=5&refcode=em-20250521-1&refcode2=76_1086043_a0CcAL&akid=76%2E1086043%2Ea0CcAL)**
Elevate,
Wes Moore

clean_body: I have news for Peter Hey Peter, it’s Wes Moore. I’m fighting to protect Maryland from the Trump Administration’s attacks. In just a few weeks, Donald Trump has stripped $1.65B from critical programs Marylanders rely on. Let me break down what that includes so far: 🎒 Revoking over $480M in public school funding. 🏥 Denying over $300M in healthcare funding. 👥 Firing over 11,000 Maryland public servants. These cuts aren’t just numbers. They’re attacks on anyone and everyone who relies on basic public services in our state. Our ability to protect Maryland from Trump's chaos depends on building a movement strong enough to push back. Here in Maryland, we’re setting an example for the entire country. We’re working diligently to protect our state from these cuts. We’re refusing to abandon our public school students. We won’t turn our backs on the sick and needy. Today, I'm asking you to join me in this fight by supporting our campaign. Elevate, Wes Moore

**🚨**URGENT: YOUR NAME IS MISSING!** 🚨

Peter, **I 'm Congressman Eric Burlison, and I sit on the DOGE Subcommittee**--the team working to **EXPOSE and ELIMINATE** government waste, fraud, and corruption at EVERY level.

But I just checked the roster... and **I don 't see YOUR name** on our official DOGE survey list.

🚨 **THIS IS A PROBLEM.** 🚨

Washington bureaucrats **LIVE OFF YOUR MONEY** --and if we don't hear from YOU, they'll keep wasting YOUR hard-earned tax dollars on:

❌ **Woke initiatives
****
**❌**DEI hiring mandates
****
**❌**Handouts to illegal aliens
****
**❌**Bogus "climate projects" that do NOTHING

**
**The Swamp is FREAKING OUT** because DOGE is **FINALLY holding them accountable!

**

President Trump surprised South African President Cyril Ramaphosa **[a damning video](https://substack.com/redirect/f1e95cdf-c7cc-4efa-ab4a-210dccb9573c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** during their visit, Wednesday, in front of the press that seemed to confirm claims that white Afrikaner farmers are being killed and stripped of their property rights in their homeland.
**[The South African leader was not expecting this...](https://substack.com/redirect/f1e95cdf-c7cc-4efa-ab4a-210dccb9573c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/f1e95cdf-c7cc-4efa-ab4a-210dccb9573c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/f1e95cdf-c7cc-4efa-ab4a-210dccb9573c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
The video montage showed black nationalists in South Africa chanting violent threats towards "the Boer" who are the white, Dutch-descended population who have lived in the country for hundreds of years. Trump also pointed to an image of many white crosses along the side of a road which he said were "graves" of murdered white farmers.
"Now this is very bad. **[These are burial sites right here. Burial sites,](https://substack.com/redirect/f1e95cdf-c7cc-4efa-ab4a-210dccb9573c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** ... over a thousand,... of White farmers. And those cars are lined up to pay love on a Sunday morning. Each one of those white things you see is a cross. And there is approximately a thousand of them," Trump explained. "They're all White farmers. The family of White farmers. And those cars aren't, driving, they are stopped there to pay respects to their family member who was killed. And it's a terrible sight. I've never seen anything like it. On both sides of the road, you have crosses. Those people are all killed."
Ramaphosa stayed calm but pushed back, saying he'd never seen the burial sites Trump described and asked for their location, noting that South Africa's crime affects everyone, not just white farmers.
Trump highlighted that **[50 white South Africans were recently granted refugee status](https://substack.com/redirect/f1e95cdf-c7cc-4efa-ab4a-210dccb9573c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** in the U.S., with Secretary of State Marco Rubio confirming more are coming. Through the meeting, Trump insisted farmers are fleeing due to systemic violence.
Watch the tense confrontation at the White House here:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/f1e95cdf-c7cc-4efa-ab4a-210dccb9573c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

This is unbelievable... SpaceX just rescued two astronauts after NASA left them stranded in space for months...
But believe it or not, this may be only the _second_ most shocking piece of NASA news you'll hear today.
SpaceX founder, Elon Musk, is now being granted access to NASA as part of his DOGE initiative...
And he's poised to expose **[NASA's biggest secret](https://substack.com/redirect/08f3d5c0-6fd2-4846-a43c-cb0f77dae15d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**.
Of all the conspiracies surrounding the Apollo moon landing missions... **[THIS](https://substack.com/redirect/08f3d5c0-6fd2-4846-a43c-cb0f77dae15d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** may be the most shocking.
They've kept it a secret for decades...
But you can finally get the full truth by **[clicking here now](https://substack.com/redirect/08f3d5c0-6fd2-4846-a43c-cb0f77dae15d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**.

They want to keep **[this secret](https://substack.com/redirect/08f3d5c0-6fd2-4846-a43c-cb0f77dae15d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** buried... so there's no telling what they'll do to stop **[this video](https://substack.com/redirect/08f3d5c0-6fd2-4846-a43c-cb0f77dae15d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**. [](https://substack.com/redirect/4037d03f-a452-4a35-81de-9a7e4bf3f0ad?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"JUST SHOWN IN THE OVAL OFFICE: Proof of Persecution in South Africa," The White House's caption read.
"President Trump never disappoints. He's on full savage mode," Texas congressional candidate Valentina Gomez commented on Trump's move.
Many media outlets including CNN have refuted the Trump administration's claim that widespread persecution is occurring in the African nation. Tim Kaine during a fiery hearing yesterday](https://substack.com/redirect/9f7c40e5-69b2-4d12-8c51-ad2baf322dee?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for only opposing the U.S. accepting the refugees "because they're white."

# RFK Jr. shuts down woke Democrat Senator for gaslighting him in front of congress
### _Our people are now the sickest people in the world because YOU have not done your job! "_
Secretary of Health RFK Jr. **[went off on Democrat Sen. Patty Murray](https://substack.com/redirect/52ee53a4-eb32-427f-b43f-edd934d2eab8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for making false claims regarding cuts to educational programming in the Trump administration's budget.
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/52ee53a4-eb32-427f-b43f-edd934d2eab8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/52ee53a4-eb32-427f-b43f-edd934d2eab8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Murray, Senator for Washington State, attempted to blame RFK for the closing of a Head Start, a federally funded child development program, in her state of Washington that "left parents scrambling."
RFK began answer her concerns, but Murray interrupted him, uninterested in his response.
**["You know, you made an accusation of me and I'm going to answer it."](https://substack.com/redirect/52ee53a4-eb32-427f-b43f-edd934d2eab8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** RFK slammed.
With tensions rising, RFK went full throttle.
"You've presided here for I think 32 years. You presided over the destruction of the health of the American people. Our people are now **[the sickest people in the world](https://substack.com/redirect/52ee53a4-eb32-427f-b43f-edd934d2eab8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** because YOU have not done your job!"
"Seriously?" Murray asked dryly, as if RFK's statement was completely ridiculous.
"What have you done about the epidemic of chronic disease?" RFK demanded, to which Murray had no response, so steered the conversation to another direction.
"Whose decision was it to fire scientists and terminate these NIH grants and the clinical trials?"
RFK, however, saw right through her line of questioning.
"Senator, I don't trust your information with all due respect. You told me, what three days ago, four days ago? That we had cut a clinical trial in your state and **[what you said turned out to be completely untrue](https://substack.com/redirect/52ee53a4-eb32-427f-b43f-edd934d2eab8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** and you knew it was untrue."
Murray tried to put RFK in a corner by pointing to what she claimed to be evidence of a patient who qualified for a specific clinical trial that faced administrative cuts, but RFK protected the patient's privacy.
"We shouldn't be talking about a patient's private information anyway." he said.
Watch the heated senate hearing showdown:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/52ee53a4-eb32-427f-b43f-edd934d2eab8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

clean_body: | = Peter, we’re falling behind on our fundraising, and folks aren’t donating to these emails like they used to. Honestly, we’re worried. We’re worried because online grassroots donations are what keep our team supporting Becca’s work for Vermonters. When fewer folks open our emails, it’s only a matter of time before our fundraising starts to dip as a result. And that’s what we’re seeing in ActBlue right now. Donations are down across the board, and we aren’t raising the kind of money that can scare off incoming MAGA attacks on Becca’s work. That’s why we’re reaching out for your help today. Becca is a strong voice for Vermonters in Congress, and we have to have her back at a time when the attacks are never-ending. She’s committed to calling out this administration’s attacks on working people, and our rights — but she can’t stay in this fight without you. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you in advance for any help you can give today. In solidarity, Team Becca mailto:beccabalintvt@beccabalint.com | Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont P.O. Box 291 Burlington, VT 05402

body:
A decade ago, Miami-Dade County was a deep blue county with hundreds of thousands more registered Democrats than Republicans. | | | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/JlwHFRB1haXRc9SljmlZzDjhzlXYRSUY4EyBWa74t5RQYHym5WYXCpD00mHx6F28neJokbUYNl2m-VL7L7-tSd4kAn4Grjjz_o_qr3bYGxAqcc9bFUOron5HzDD2HXjCbwDJDwbUzywQwz7Wo5O-w6pfJQ4pL5Jxp0KbtRHVH-5sA9LEx8UMPVnaLzyufEuE8DeGMcJM6AYG7iQikw91-oV-10BeqQat14NWat8DWUkwvwAzdXbi-TkRAsS8DtMqERMbo2emE6oDMK2SH7xTygg0sBYjplIKnHIRYPCAZ_oB9Uex94wR6nEXuqa5ECNMOAA8U0pTRawSys5I2pNl0ttD8qECsA9Fgu4eIm9Dl6WwZyyioc2WRDY7no4RTv7EBKPbnJKPG9QXPn91ggvt3ewh4vmV8HeglQ6pZ1eB2WbZeZQuMN-wFu77MJuI7Q/dZvADhcYkGAKSo3OqLseuEJDDGw8kCVY/9)

Peter, A decade ago, Miami-Dade County was a deep blue county with hundreds of thousands more registered Democrats than Republicans. **For the first time in history, the county,****_ _with more than 2.8 million people__**** _,_ has a Republican voter registration advantage!** That's in no small part because of the strength and dedication of Republicans across the state of Florida, who have helped turn a once-purple state into a deep red state. Peter, it's time we take the Florida blueprint across the nation and help other purple states become a deep-red state just like Florida, where freedom, prosperity, and the American dream can once again become alive. _**I know America has what it takes to get back on track**._ I know everyone's situation is different, and I hate to even ask you right now, but **_[could you please consider donating $10, $15, $25, $35, or any amount you can afford?](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/we2KZ_yV0dWu9NctUJBKoFZrYDoqaYtM8vSuyDH1JL7gsBgAEgCLGPUqgyAteoShOe_I37HGUClWhjOp7R8wis_yXLufiqJAZvT6Egzr9AffVNuOtkhuL0blecY3d831ablywPEayZjoclXRxTjYblGlprF7wrcPQZSl6HHXbpZTn7lTnNAIk44XeVbO5D0JqNf-mrelb3RW8lA6xMFgz74RQD9c7OSWoIu1-uSmmSZqPZs2t-tKYfIrAaAxAb1NcxI_y8itCepbG0T3gqYDTqv4lllh1mgns2rVgolGbRoYZF5KOv9Qj89yLV3SIZmv9fvbDovX9dsa-C9k3TBEmeBLmoBpvyLnfEHNmG0IQW3CN2MFyHYYj_NakiYWc18TROORD4FqfGvlKEwsz2dy18zVjh_tkxaJwzi-m2mXps74ql-UWE7Ah5JAp1SUWw/uirkavFC7ub5fd-cdFmVN6RS-ua5B1uX/9) _**
---
[ **DONATE $25 TO REGISTER GOP VOTERS** ](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/pYxWEIt-HfihxyyT5DybVVOhGMxJ1AyrzOfoKGCAyavWbL8EUjosJgGr8xWJf0YKC0aEVrdK76K_cZDc_XbOtpSzcXDOUkJKl_A5uuaOEBlzl9OxVBXHZX6gxech85G0oL-o9j4ayPMIXKwQuwxCoY5Gs2xKkaYiwi1ySji_oYACxb-DEDJGRRgBCgFBsxllKv-HWvYbu2q0jDGXKF06h5ju8wZdeewlklwo6abXYIIVnwTWmst7U_JnDng7v_xVEKAYVkVF8tF-E1fw16_-wxtRdQMtpfCBhkK-Lv_EfVwFyfn8Fpm1stBoR_gtzBPi1bOscr0sfEkP7TZ874XrTPW-UQiGSTPO9bgw6NQZrd2KBd7PHxwECrlgLkTmRrL0NS5_BPLxaxoa9l1aJrerSchinxNPurdFgDSC9DaYldNx9QUzII9LRgrrQgV0nA/KdB2PJQW9bbuV6SzyS6KLJvzqlsMklQ3/9)
---
We have an opportunity to change the country and help elect true conservative Republican across the county. But in order to do that, the work starts now. **_Please, instead of buying that cup of coffee tomorrow morning or that extra snack at lunch, could I count on you to donate to RON PAC to help us elect the next generation of conservative leaders in this country_**** _?_** I'm counting on you. In freedom,

| [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0706aa0d-41ea-4612-af83-aa0b275af689/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Peter, it’s Maggie Hassan with an important update: In case you missed it, yesterday I went head to head with Kristi Noem in a Senate hearing. When I asked Noem, Donald Trump’s Secretary of Homeland Security, to define habeas corpus — a basic legal principle — she couldn’t. Let me make this clear: Habeas corpus isn’t just a Latin phrase — it’s a critical protection that requires the government to bring someone they are detaining before a court and explain the legal basis for arresting them. Right now, it’s a fundamental freedom that the Trump administration is considering stripping away. We MUST band together to stand up for the rule of law and oppose the Trump administration’s unconstitutional actions. [If you can, please chip in to help Blue Amp Action and Democrats like me continue to take on the GOP and call out their human rights abuses:](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6155a5ac-b3b0-4afb-9a71-dd523f8522f1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5a878d98-27c4-42e1-9efd-fd59f41fe482/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Eric Sorensen
subject: I lost a job for being gay. It made me a better person.
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108120635/546910235/-1812448514?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMTMzZmIyMi03NzM2LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zXcdaOqYLa-FBytCzIi3yn0bwOIdM95gqkRAeUBbi7U=)
Hi there, Peter. I want to share something personal that’s been on my mind since my recent interview with _LGBTQ Nation_. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108120636/546910236/-791229840?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMTMzZmIyMi03NzM2LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zXcdaOqYLa-FBytCzIi3yn0bwOIdM95gqkRAeUBbi7U=&emci=fe99e91b-7736-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=f133fb22-7736-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=18052858) Years ago, when I was just starting out as a meteorologist in East Texas, I lost my job for being gay. Management told me flat out that, _“We can’t have a gay meteorologist at channel 7.”_ That moment could’ve broken me. And to be honest, for a while, it almost did. What I didn’t know back then -- when I was scared and closeted and jobless -- is that one day, I’d be serving my hometown in Congress. Openly. Proudly. Fighting for kids who feel like they don’t belong, and for working people who’ve been told to sit down or stay silent just for being who they are. As I said in that interview: **being fired for who I am gave me clarity.** It gave me purpose and made me a stronger advocate. And let’s be honest: that fight is far from over. Right now, anti-LGBTQ extremists are pushing their agenda in state legislatures and in Congress. Under Speaker Mike Johnson – the most anti-LGBTQ Speaker in modern history – our rights are under attack in ways we haven’t seen in decades. But here's the truth: **I’m still standing. We’re still standing.** And I’m going to keep fighting, not just as a gay man, but as your representative, your neighbor, and your advocate. [**If you believe in building a country where no one should lose their job for being who they are, chip in $3 today to support our campaign:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108120637/546910237/-1812448514?refcode=em-5.21.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMTMzZmIyMi03NzM2LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zXcdaOqYLa-FBytCzIi3yn0bwOIdM95gqkRAeUBbi7U=) | | **[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108120638/546910238/-1812448514?refcode=em-5.21.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMTMzZmIyMi03NzM2LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zXcdaOqYLa-FBytCzIi3yn0bwOIdM95gqkRAeUBbi7U=)**
---
Every donation is part of a campaign that helps us push back against hate, and send a message that **LGBTQ voices belong everywhere** , from the newsroom to the House floor.
Thanks for reading, and thanks for standing with me.
-Eric
PS - If you’d like to read the article, [**check it out here.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108120639/546910239/-791229840?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMTMzZmIyMi03NzM2LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zXcdaOqYLa-FBytCzIi3yn0bwOIdM95gqkRAeUBbi7U=&emci=fe99e91b-7736-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=f133fb22-7736-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=18052858)
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108120640/546910240/779985510?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMTMzZmIyMi03NzM2LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zXcdaOqYLa-FBytCzIi3yn0bwOIdM95gqkRAeUBbi7U=&emci=fe99e91b-7736-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=f133fb22-7736-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=18052858) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108120641/546910241/-1582993359?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMTMzZmIyMi03NzM2LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zXcdaOqYLa-FBytCzIi3yn0bwOIdM95gqkRAeUBbi7U=&emci=fe99e91b-7736-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=f133fb22-7736-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=18052858) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108120642/546910242/988740625?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMTMzZmIyMi03NzM2LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zXcdaOqYLa-FBytCzIi3yn0bwOIdM95gqkRAeUBbi7U=&emci=fe99e91b-7736-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=f133fb22-7736-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=18052858) Eric Sorensen is a meteorologist born and raised in Rockford, IL representing IL-17 in Congress. He’s seen firsthand the importance of establishing trust with the community, and he’s determined to use his expertise as a climate communicator to fight for Illinoisans on environmental justice and more in Washington. To support Eric, [consider making a grassroots contribution here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108120643/546910243/-1812448514?refcode=em-footer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMTMzZmIyMi03NzM2LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zXcdaOqYLa-FBytCzIi3yn0bwOIdM95gqkRAeUBbi7U=)

clean_body: | = Hi there, Peter. I want to share something personal that’s been on my mind since my recent interview with LGBTQ Nation. Years ago, when I was just starting out as a meteorologist in East Texas, I lost my job for being gay. Management told me flat out that, “We can’t have a gay meteorologist at channel 7.” That moment could’ve broken me. And to be honest, for a while, it almost did. What I didn’t know back then -- when I was scared and closeted and jobless -- is that one day, I’d be serving my hometown in Congress. Openly. Proudly. Fighting for kids who feel like they don’t belong, and for working people who’ve been told to sit down or stay silent just for being who they are. As I said in that interview: being fired for who I am gave me clarity. It gave me purpose and made me a stronger advocate. And let’s be honest: that fight is far from over. Right now, anti-LGBTQ extremists are pushing their agenda in state legislatures and in Congress. Under Speaker Mike Johnson – the most anti-LGBTQ Speaker in modern history – our rights are under attack in ways we haven’t seen in decades. But here's the truth: I’m still standing. We’re still standing. And I’m going to keep fighting, not just as a gay man, but as your representative, your neighbor, and your advocate. = | | = Every donation is part of a campaign that helps us push back against hate, and send a message that LGBTQ voices belong everywhere , from the newsroom to the House floor. Thanks for reading, and thanks for standing with me. -Eric PS - If you’d like to read the article, | Eric Sorensen is a meteorologist born and raised in Rockford, IL representing IL-17 in Congress. He’s seen firsthand the importance of establishing trust with the community, and he’s determined to use his expertise as a climate communicator to fight for Illinoisans on environmental justice and more in Washington. To support Eric, = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Thank you for supporting Eric Sorensen Eric Sorensen for Illinois P.O. Box 1172 Moline, IL 61265 United States

subject: A regular guy seeking a big job
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Schwarze for Senate
body:
You don’t know me, but you know what men like me stand for and our reputation | [](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=90b5de4d25124ab294d0939d26b6b37e&_e=wmxb4NVivwd_Bx5D7tLrtG2RU0LkJ-Tiu5RJjD1sGL3bJqxBRExkG9aW_wNiBW8gBD7zoyuADJ_AZ9wFfwTw3aaCzDCg9J_wcyY8hKOmbS7GFump9z-6eKSswn4kG52w4VcOKvX81zzUBUdw3i5ISWo4k7Eot-2UdVfp7j-8KprMW4AMD7zvrj85U9XBhxFAHecToObZaolnWeZTkTVW4cdTh167GrRFGngaYXbkfziV_fFlAwKLXwLj2axEv7ZHhxIvFuRFKGw1U3hK4y6sS-kEKpFdgvbONXZEUZG1oDRFGBRp8EHZr8Wy01eDYZ46z-wtmRpKZfPBHjM-Q-NEQEAC8IU1n54EjhvF9mNFJKOxyh_lM2WQkWoiEz_TNo0ew0ksfCEHZQmXKKxskAz3kmW0rIQb7dHBpIJKVVnBxt2bjy_QHZt5FwWRs2sUccnq)

Fellow Conservative,

My name is Adam Schwarze, and I’m a former Navy SEAL, Marine Corps veteran, and proud Minnesotan **running for U.S. Senate against Tim Walz’s handpicked lieutenant governor—a politician even more radical than her boss.** I’m requesting your support in this critical battle to restore common-sense conservative values to Minnesota.

I hold a Master’s from Harvard, a Master’s Certificate from Johns Hopkins in Security and Nuclear Deterrence, and an MBA. But my proudest achievement is serving our country to make my parents, especially my mom, proud. I want to serve you in the U.S. Senate, fighting for the values that have made Minnesota and America great for generations.

[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=90b5de4d25124ab294d0939d26b6b37e&_e=wmxb4NVivwd_Bx5D7tLrtG2RU0LkJ-Tiu5RJjD1sGL3bJqxBRExkG9aW_wNiBW8gBD7zoyuADJ_AZ9wFfwTw3aaCzDCg9J_wcyY8hKOmbS7GFump9z-6eKSswn4kG52w4VcOKvX81zzUBUdw3i5ISWo4k7Eot-2UdVfp7j-8KprMW4AMD7zvrj85U9XBhxFAHecToObZaolnWeZTkTVW4cdTh167GrRFGngaYXbkfziV_fFlAwKLXwLj2axEv7ZHhxIvFuRFKGw1U3hK4y6sS38OpWlbPID39fY1CZvkeQv6tu9Brm1T5mCtpcWDCNV6dtR-SVyG6Qgzudj8JKGTSK4CshP28UpSy7-08riD8RQnznTrbaQbTMgTHWi_J-K59LKkyIRnLQ6gU7DUNz3UZO2gzU1A3cTarJSN2kz5NjLBpqjGFUDI2QITYXp-8Ioq)

**I’m starting this race with absolutely nothing** , but because of the enormity of the race's outcome, I figured there is no harm in asking for your help. At the end of the day, my request of you will end in one of two ways:
* 1.) **[you contribute to help elect a former Navy SEAL to the United States Senate](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=90b5de4d25124ab294d0939d26b6b37e&_e=wmxb4NVivwd_Bx5D7tLrtG2RU0LkJ-Tiu5RJjD1sGL3bJqxBRExkG9aW_wNiBW8gBD7zoyuADJ_AZ9wFfwTw3aaCzDCg9J_wcyY8hKOmbS7GFump9z-6eKSswn4kG52w4VcOKvX81zzUBUdw3i5ISWo4k7Eot-2UdVfp7j-8KprMW4AMD7zvrj85U9XBhxFAHecToObZaolnWeZTkTVW4cdTh167GrRFGngaYXbkfziV_fFlAwKLXwLj2axEv7ZHhxIvFuRFKGw1U3hK4y6sS8MWZfI5hGS2DCH4Y0ksaLG9kIGLzfMc4viCony_vhTIea3_UHaS3ikOZO5i6-kKosYsuo3zL_v2rxNl1FuidbtTOuSygspv2cc9ylDKVruVYkj0T47mMp4-82PXli44Sodya-TJEIxmYBp_yKME5El7mfsk8vxLfWcIINlKQjoF)**.
* 2.) you read this email without contributing, but you at least now know who I am.

[**HELP ME GET MY CAMPAIGN OFF THE GROUND
CONTRIBUTE $2 OR MORE **](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=90b5de4d25124ab294d0939d26b6b37e&_e=wmxb4NVivwd_Bx5D7tLrtG2RU0LkJ-Tiu5RJjD1sGL3bJqxBRExkG9aW_wNiBW8gBD7zoyuADJ_AZ9wFfwTw3aaCzDCg9J_wcyY8hKOmbS7GFump9z-6eKSswn4kG52w4VcOKvX81zzUBUdw3i5ISWo4k7Eot-2UdVfp7j-8KprMW4AMD7zvrj85U9XBhxFAHecToObZaolnWeZTkTVW4cdTh167GrRFGngaYXbkfziV_fFlAwKLXwLj2axEv7ZHhxIvFuRFKGw1U3hK4y6sS58DvFl7RzBhMOpHUpxuv7DCeT8cLfplqe-SbNtEHtPNkw7ra4OQWMAszvLsiq9PNfQ4fsEDr8Ao6JtgR9nu--_ig84KM-ztxfRK-J6x_3akQP45TBni6zd-5Eynf_PPMDt2SWQbAj8dXfXK0K4FAetxC4NfC5BIbevtKLDugV14)
**I’m not a career politician. I’m a regular guy from a working-class family who grew up playing hockey and answered our nation’s call on my 18th birthday in October 2001, just weeks after the 9/11 attacks.** I joined the Marine Corps to defend our country, and as a Navy SEAL, I deployed nine times to over 70 countries, risking my life to protect our freedoms and way of life. Unlike Tim Walz, who retired from the National Guard before his unit deployed to Iraq, I never backed down from serving our nation during war.

Minnesota is at a crossroads. Under Governor Walz and his lieutenant governor, our state has been dragged left by radical policies that fueled the violent unrest in Minneapolis in 2020, **defunded our police** , and burdened hardworking families with higher taxes and inflation. **While our streets burned, the lieutenant governor pushed lawsuits against law enforcement, undermining the officers keeping us safe.** This isn’t the Minnesota I grew up in—or the one any Minnesotan deserves.

[**HELP ME GET MY CAMPAIGN OFF THE GROUND
CONTRIBUTE $2 OR MORE**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=90b5de4d25124ab294d0939d26b6b37e&_e=wmxb4NVivwd_Bx5D7tLrtG2RU0LkJ-Tiu5RJjD1sGL3bJqxBRExkG9aW_wNiBW8gBD7zoyuADJ_AZ9wFfwTw3aaCzDCg9J_wcyY8hKOmbS7GFump9z-6eKSswn4kG52w4VcOKvX81zzUBUdw3i5ISWo4k7Eot-2UdVfp7j-8KprMW4AMD7zvrj85U9XBhxFAHecToObZaolnWeZTkTVW4cdTh167GrRFGngaYXbkfziV_fFlAwKLXwLj2axEv7ZHhxIvFuRFKGw1U3hK4y6sS3Z_BSySWvQTh5lGlDcxPSvxXuOP3wPbRTl7HmXwNr_0QdPeIE7BeMbeDAaX2XLhuLRZueHuk99YUYzKQdKJF2pwssJO4WX-CsRfUAEvRTKhKkA2p7AvSmqW849QoelPpi4J08g0e5ZlWDwnOWIyorB8-W9vW-zcGkJTMI8WxIba)
[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=90b5de4d25124ab294d0939d26b6b37e&_e=wmxb4NVivwd_Bx5D7tLrtG2RU0LkJ-Tiu5RJjD1sGL3bJqxBRExkG9aW_wNiBW8gBD7zoyuADJ_AZ9wFfwTw3aaCzDCg9J_wcyY8hKOmbS7GFump9z-6eKSswn4kG52w4VcOKvX81zzUBUdw3i5ISWo4k7Eot-2UdVfp7j-8KprMW4AMD7zvrj85U9XBhxFAHecToObZaolnWeZTkTVW4cdTh167GrRFGngaYXbkfziV_fFlAwKLXwLj2axEv7ZHhxIvFuRFKGw1U3hK4y6sS6JpkAdtnMkdpNfzY45wW3h8UzbMlBpwQNA86BJxrWKuuiglIPIce016n5V8MSH5_2qCchFE3wcmRSYDN1vAEH6PYB0zn00ROtFQj8pn5icVXeCfBUPYLFTPoMn7IXMoIhIY-jUXlaiIJOi304uFsdEVI-jdNQAQzHoJ8lr2A9mO)

**If you are reading this email right now and you don’t live in Minnesota, then I’m sure you’ll agree with me that every American must be represented by individuals in Congress who want to build a better version of the America we live in today—individuals of integrity.**

_**That’s not who my opponent is. **_

We have an incredible opportunity to elect a Republican to the U.S. Senate next year - something voters in this state haven’t done since they re-elected former Senator Norm Coleman in 2002. As a Republican, I know the odds are tough in a state that hasn’t voted red in a presidential election since 1976. But **as a former Navy SEAL, I thrive in tough fights. I’ve faced worse odds overseas and am ready to bring that same grit to Washington.**

[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=90b5de4d25124ab294d0939d26b6b37e&_e=wmxb4NVivwd_Bx5D7tLrtG2RU0LkJ-Tiu5RJjD1sGL3bJqxBRExkG9aW_wNiBW8gBD7zoyuADJ_AZ9wFfwTw3aaCzDCg9J_wcyY8hKOmbS7GFump9z-6eKSswn4kG52w4VcOKvX81zzUBUdw3i5ISWo4k7Eot-2UdVfp7j-8KprMW4AMD7zvrj85U9XBhxFAHecToObZaolnWeZTkTVW4cdTh167GrRFGngaYXbkfziV_fFlAwKLXwLj2axEv7ZHhxIvFuRFKGw1U3hK4y6sSyL0rqC0ZJeAyI5jq_WLC6ECUiV_qd52rGlU2qN7IxPcosIDEOHG26iYfk5cd1sWYCh3hvvk1wNIOyvwGmWqciU91yjPl_Eh1zDd2bSxH-5zv7hOWCikThpTdBMOu2MpVMhHRHYwtCd1DJPTTHRP7SHPG4Z4K62CmogeUjwPdFlr)

[**HELP ME GET MY CAMPAIGN OFF THE GROUND
CONTRIBUTE $2 OR MORE**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=90b5de4d25124ab294d0939d26b6b37e&_e=wmxb4NVivwd_Bx5D7tLrtG2RU0LkJ-Tiu5RJjD1sGL3bJqxBRExkG9aW_wNiBW8gBD7zoyuADJ_AZ9wFfwTw3aaCzDCg9J_wcyY8hKOmbS7GFump9z-6eKSswn4kG52w4VcOKvX81zzUBUdw3i5ISWo4k7Eot-2UdVfp7j-8KprMW4AMD7zvrj85U9XBhxFAHecToObZaolnWeZTkTVW4cdTh167GrRFGngaYXbkfziV_fFlAwKLXwLj2axEv7ZHhxIvFuRFKGw1U3hK4y6sS9Tcr-AjJYv35Nut3LuiIu-QMEPM06AbNCfz-kCpKHE-HyJ_EQSibEINha1aLuOFmdjR5gTEd9GzLHAfM4C_t_6lVPVy7F-cu0VLQ2e_81Vd09zILMBUqXt3_ax62qFvOeFcCw_H5jbVSw994CL0ZbZL00FluqmXabNi_x7Gl--7)
Here’s what I stand for:
* Restoring law and order by supporting our police and cracking down on crime.
* Cutting taxes and regulations to ease the burden on retirees and small businesses.
* Securing our borders to protect our communities and sovereignty.
* Defending our Second Amendment rights and traditional values.
* Stopping the radical left’s agenda that’s eroding the America we love.

You don’t know me, but you know what men like me stand for and our reputation. So, **[I’m asking you to take a chance on me and support my campaign today, in its infancy, to help me get it off the ground and give us a shot at reclaiming a Senate seat we haven’t held in a generation](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=90b5de4d25124ab294d0939d26b6b37e&_e=wmxb4NVivwd_Bx5D7tLrtG2RU0LkJ-Tiu5RJjD1sGL3bJqxBRExkG9aW_wNiBW8gBD7zoyuADJ_AZ9wFfwTw3aaCzDCg9J_wcyY8hKOmbS7GFump9z-6eKSswn4kG52w4VcOKvX81zzUBUdw3i5ISWo4k7Eot-2UdVfp7j-8KprMW4AMD7zvrj85U9XBhxFAHecToObZaolnWeZTkTVW4cdTh167GrRFGngaYXbkfziV_fFlAwKLXwLj2axEv7ZHhxIvFuRFKGw1U3hK4y6sS7RVvMDeTqf5Tk6Auwy7kX9rkQOz1kt65yOH_ci50GU9_iN1EnlYh8BSDLdxXrcEL0KWmwTAEmHZH3IcrAJ7D4S-jwKF-UCPF7MQBfTzVCA5otJ2j72SIr81eJcKa829QbpXW0hvTwnJVryIg3ho_qsxfNv7rZQ5I18NdBWOIDfH)**.

This race won’t be easy. The Democrats have deep pockets, and the radical left will stop at nothing to keep this seat. **I’m running to serve you, to protect our way of life, and to ensure Minnesota remains a place where faith, family, and freedom thrive.**

**[Your gift today will give our nascent campaign a fighting shot.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=90b5de4d25124ab294d0939d26b6b37e&_e=wmxb4NVivwd_Bx5D7tLrtG2RU0LkJ-Tiu5RJjD1sGL3bJqxBRExkG9aW_wNiBW8gBD7zoyuADJ_AZ9wFfwTw3aaCzDCg9J_wcyY8hKOmbS7GFump9z-6eKSswn4kG52w4VcOKvX81zzUBUdw3i5ISWo4k7Eot-2UdVfp7j-8KprMW4AMD7zvrj85U9XBhxFAHecToObZaolnWeZTkTVW4cdTh167GrRFGngaYXbkfziV_fFlAwKLXwLj2axEv7ZHhxIvFuRFKGw1U3hK4y6sS9SdkNLxAbIeqrsLd_9aZ8Izw68qbIYsDazzq_0C8I2k8gWYDIV3MNAixKMIOv2AYkABONHqZdtwejWzLMtviumThtrypq7L9mdJdateQnLzCwIcJWsPCNlEJUsdilvR22TyEJfjHi9WJZLuGAwl1uu92R93u-E3LD27Etj8EKg8)**

I hope you’ll invest in me right now – any amount will help.

With gratitude,
Adam Schwarze
Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota

clean_body: You don’t know me, but you know what men like me stand for and our reputation | Fellow Conservative, My name is Adam Schwarze, and I’m a former Navy SEAL, Marine Corps veteran, and proud Minnesotan running for U.S. Senate against Tim Walz’s handpicked lieutenant governor—a politician even more radical than her boss. I’m requesting your support in this critical battle to restore common-sense conservative values to Minnesota. I hold a Master’s from Harvard, a Master’s Certificate from Johns Hopkins in Security and Nuclear Deterrence, and an MBA. But my proudest achievement is serving our country to make my parents, especially my mom, proud. I want to serve you in the U.S. Senate, fighting for the values that have made Minnesota and America great for generations. I’m starting this race with absolutely nothing , but because of the enormity of the race's outcome, I figured there is no harm in asking for your help. At the end of the day, my request of you will end in one of two ways: 1.) . 2.) you read this email without contributing, but you at least now know who I am. I’m not a career politician. I’m a regular guy from a working-class family who grew up playing hockey and answered our nation’s call on my 18th birthday in October 2001, just weeks after the 9/11 attacks. I joined the Marine Corps to defend our country, and as a Navy SEAL, I deployed nine times to over 70 countries, risking my life to protect our freedoms and way of life. Unlike Tim Walz, who retired from the National Guard before his unit deployed to Iraq, I never backed down from serving our nation during war. Minnesota is at a crossroads. Under Governor Walz and his lieutenant governor, our state has been dragged left by radical policies that fueled the violent unrest in Minneapolis in 2020, defunded our police , and burdened hardworking families with higher taxes and inflation. While our streets burned, the lieutenant governor pushed lawsuits against law enforcement, undermining the officers keeping us safe. This isn’t the Minnesota I grew up in—or the one any Minnesotan deserves. If you are reading this email right now and you don’t live in Minnesota, then I’m sure you’ll agree with me that every American must be represented by individuals in Congress who want to build a better version of the America we live in today—individuals of integrity. That’s not who my opponent is. We have an incredible opportunity to elect a Republican to the U.S. Senate next year - something voters in this state haven’t done since they re-elected former Senator Norm Coleman in 2002. As a Republican, I know the odds are tough in a state that hasn’t voted red in a presidential election since 1976. But as a former Navy SEAL, I thrive in tough fights. I’ve faced worse odds overseas and am ready to bring that same grit to Washington. Here’s what I stand for: Restoring law and order by supporting our police and cracking down on crime. Cutting taxes and regulations to ease the burden on retirees and small businesses. Securing our borders to protect our communities and sovereignty. Defending our Second Amendment rights and traditional values. Stopping the radical left’s agenda that’s eroding the America we love. You don’t know me, but you know what men like me stand for and our reputation. So, . This race won’t be easy. The Democrats have deep pockets, and the radical left will stop at nothing to keep this seat. I’m running to serve you, to protect our way of life, and to ensure Minnesota remains a place where faith, family, and freedom thrive. I hope you’ll invest in me right now – any amount will help. With gratitude, Adam Schwarze Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA** | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate

|

Ohio just ranked as the 13th worst state in the nation. Why?

Decades of Republican rule have left us struggling in every area that matters—education, healthcare, and the economy. This ranking isn’t _just_ embarrassing, it’s a crisis putting lives at risk.

[**If you want a government that works for you, chip in today to help Democrats defeat the GOP at the ballot box next year and take back control of Ohio >>> **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108120837/546911040/110658837?refcode=ODP_ATA_EM_FR_13thstate_250521_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YjhmNGI4Yy03NzM2LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4gjHaW0Mw6MIWjdXV4qJ4kZObHPUkl3ynVv7BcyxVJ4=)

Republicans aren’t trying to solve our state’s problems, they _are_ the problem.

They’ve spent years using their majorities to:
– Cut public school funding while attacking teachers
– Block Medicaid expansion and ignore the mental health crisis
– Let roads, bridges, and rural broadband fall apart
– Prioritize tax breaks and favors for wealthy donors

Ohioans are paying the price.

It’s clear that we can’t rely on Republicans to make Ohio better. They’re too busy trying to deliver favors for right-wing special interests and out-of-touch Republicans like Donald Trump and Elon Musk.

If we want to beat them at the ballot box next year so Democrats can take control of the state government and get our state back on the right track, we need to work hard early to raise money. Early donations from folks like you help us grow our staff so we can make critical investments down the line, like voter mobilization, launching ads, and supporting volunteers.

[_**Let’s send Ohio Republicans packing and take back our future. Can we count on you to chip in today?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108120838/546911041/110658837?refcode=ODP_ATA_EM_FR_13thstate_250521_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YjhmNGI4Yy03NzM2LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4gjHaW0Mw6MIWjdXV4qJ4kZObHPUkl3ynVv7BcyxVJ4=)

Thanks for being in this fight,

Ohio Dems

body:
Take action and write to your legislators today for transportation that works for ALL Oregonians!| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108121039/546911650/-1974740343?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQyMDI5OTEzLTc4MzYtZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=sHbSKXyskMxCQjRZS8V5P86wWMPIjIRBQmfChO7BgJY=&emci=24cc45a5-3b35-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=42029913-7836-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=2107230)
---
Dear Peter, We all have to go to work or school, the doctor’s office or the grocery store. But right now, our transportation system doesn’t work for a lot of people. People die on our streets, air pollution makes us sick, costs are high, and options are limited. Oregon is about to make some big transportation decisions that will affect us for years to come. That’s why OLCV is a part of [Move Oregon Forward](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108121040/546911651/-1295365595?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQyMDI5OTEzLTc4MzYtZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=sHbSKXyskMxCQjRZS8V5P86wWMPIjIRBQmfChO7BgJY=&emci=24cc45a5-3b35-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=42029913-7836-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=2107230), a coalition of transportation safety, climate, and environmental justice organizations from across the state working together to improve our transportation system. **[**Peter, will you tell your legislators that we need a 2025 transportation package that works for ALL Oregonians?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108121041/546911652/-1974740343?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQyMDI5OTEzLTc4MzYtZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=sHbSKXyskMxCQjRZS8V5P86wWMPIjIRBQmfChO7BgJY=&emci=24cc45a5-3b35-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=42029913-7836-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=2107230)**
---
[ **Take action now** ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108121042/546911653/-1974740343?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQyMDI5OTEzLTc4MzYtZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=sHbSKXyskMxCQjRZS8V5P86wWMPIjIRBQmfChO7BgJY=&emci=24cc45a5-3b35-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=42029913-7836-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=2107230)
---
Decision makers are starting from a framework that falls short on what we need. We need fair funding, accountability, and more robust investments in safety, transit, and pollution reduction. Legislators need to hear from us that the stakes are too high to settle for less. **[**Peter, will you email our legislators right now?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108121043/546911654/-1974740343?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQyMDI5OTEzLTc4MzYtZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=sHbSKXyskMxCQjRZS8V5P86wWMPIjIRBQmfChO7BgJY=&emci=24cc45a5-3b35-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=42029913-7836-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=2107230)**
---
[ **Take action now** ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108121044/546911655/-1974740343?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQyMDI5OTEzLTc4MzYtZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=sHbSKXyskMxCQjRZS8V5P86wWMPIjIRBQmfChO7BgJY=&emci=24cc45a5-3b35-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=42029913-7836-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=2107230)
---
In the future we envision together, kids safely walk, bike, or ride the bus to school, older adults can stroll without fear, and communities enjoy vibrant neighborhoods with cleaner air and affordable transportation choices. Make your voice heard so that every Oregonian has better, safer, cleaner ways to get where they need to go. Thank you for all you do,
---

clean_body: Take action and write to your legislators today for transportation that works for ALL Oregonians!| | | Dear Peter, We all have to go to work or school, the doctor’s office or the grocery store. But right now, our transportation system doesn’t work for a lot of people. People die on our streets, air pollution makes us sick, costs are high, and options are limited. Oregon is about to make some big transportation decisions that will affect us for years to come. That’s why OLCV is a part of , a coalition of transportation safety, climate, and environmental justice organizations from across the state working together to improve our transportation system. Decision makers are starting from a framework that falls short on what we need. We need fair funding, accountability, and more robust investments in safety, transit, and pollution reduction. Legislators need to hear from us that the stakes are too high to settle for less. In the future we envision together, kids safely walk, bike, or ride the bus to school, older adults can stroll without fear, and communities enjoy vibrant neighborhoods with cleaner air and affordable transportation choices. Make your voice heard so that every Oregonian has better, safer, cleaner ways to get where they need to go. Thank you for all you do, | | | | | ---|---|--- Oregon League of Conservation Voters 1110 SE Alder Suite 220 Portland, OR 97214 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Mark Guethle, IDCCA
subject: Here’s an update on everything on our plate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Illinois Democratic County Chairs' Association
body:
_[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108121669/546913790/-954014934?refcode=IDCCA_EMAIL_210525_NA_Newsletter&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU1NzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDU0MTRmYzctN2EzNi1mMDExLWE1ZjEtNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=64ZOBBdUO5z2iEbekWouZgDXhXNW5og1n4IwKlIUlRc=)_
Hey folks,

Welcome to our first IDCCA Newsletter – the place we’ll keep you updated on what we’re working on, things coming up on our calendar, and ways to support us all summer long.

First up, we had our annual Boot Camp training on Saturday with the National Democratic Training Committee. We trained over 150 new candidates and campaign operatives on how to win during the course of the day.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108121670/546913791/-954014934?refcode=IDCCA_EMAIL_210525_NA_Newsletter&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU1NzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDU0MTRmYzctN2EzNi1mMDExLWE1ZjEtNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=64ZOBBdUO5z2iEbekWouZgDXhXNW5og1n4IwKlIUlRc=)
Coming up next for us is our Annual Summer Brews event! Save the date for Monday, June 23rd at 5:30pm at Midwest Coast Brewing in Chicago. You can learn more information or RSVP now by clicking below.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108121671/546913792/840981096?refcode=IDCCA_EMAIL_210525_NA_Newsletter&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU1NzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDU0MTRmYzctN2EzNi1mMDExLWE1ZjEtNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=64ZOBBdUO5z2iEbekWouZgDXhXNW5og1n4IwKlIUlRc=) [RSVP](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108121672/546913793/840981096?refcode=IDCCA_EMAIL_210525_NA_Newsletter&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU1NzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDU0MTRmYzctN2EzNi1mMDExLWE1ZjEtNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=64ZOBBdUO5z2iEbekWouZgDXhXNW5og1n4IwKlIUlRc=)Here’s a big win for us: Department of Homeland Security Secretary Krisi Noem came to Springfield a couple weeks ago to spread misinformation and cruelty about immigration. We put out a statewide to County Parties and activists. Within 24 hours nearly 500 people stood outside the Governor’s Mansion and outside the State Capitol to stand up against ICE Barbie.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108121673/546913794/-954014934?refcode=IDCCA_EMAIL_210525_NA_Newsletter&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU1NzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDU0MTRmYzctN2EzNi1mMDExLWE1ZjEtNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=64ZOBBdUO5z2iEbekWouZgDXhXNW5og1n4IwKlIUlRc=)
Thanks for following along with this first IDCCA Newsletter, and we’ll be in touch soon about more ways to get involved.

– Mark

Federal law requires political committees use their “best efforts” to report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose contributions exceed $200 per election cycle. State law requires that we report the occupation and name of the employer of any individual who contributes over $500.

A copy of our reports are available for free online at FEC.gov. A copy of our report filed with the State Board of Elections is (or will be) available on the board’s official website, www.elections.il.gov, or for purchase from the Illinois State Board of Elections, Springfield, IL

First up, we had our annual Boot Camp training on Saturday with the National Democratic Training Committee. We trained over 150 new candidates and campaign operatives on how to win during the course of the day. = Coming up next for us is our Annual Summer Brews event! Save the date for Monday, June 23rd at 5:30pm at Midwest Coast Brewing in Chicago. You can learn more information or RSVP now by clicking below. = ’s a big win for us: Department of Homeland Security Secretary Krisi Noem came to Springfield a couple weeks ago to spread misinformation and cruelty about immigration. We put out a statewide to County Parties and activists. name: Briana Sewell
subject: Remembering Congressman Gerry Connolly
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Briana Sewell
body:
Dear ,

Words cannot fully express what Congressman Gerry Connolly meant to me, both personally and professionally. His passing leaves me, like so many, heartbroken yet deeply committed to continuing the fight he so fiercely believe in.

What began as a casual conversation after a congressional field hearing in Prince William County led to five incredibly rewarding years of service as a member of his staff. Years filled with purpose, passion, service, and the laying of the firm foundation on which I govern to this day.

While Fairfax County may have been where Gerry laid his head at night, you wouldn’t know it based upon how much time he spent in Prince William County. To us, he was more than our congressman, Gerry was our neighbor and our friend. He was always ready to extend a helping hand, provide wise counsel and deliver a perfectly-timed quip with a twinkle in his eye and a smirk on his face.

When many gave up on Prince William County, Gerry did not, he saw potential. He listened, deeply listened, and fought like hell for every voice to be heard. The same fire he brought to Capitol Hill, Gerry brought to our community and all who stood in the way of justice. He showed me, and so many others, what it means to show up, to fight, and most importantly, to deliver.

To Smitty and Caitlin: Thank you for sharing Gerry with us. His legacy lives on in every life he touched, every community he lifted, and in the values he instilled in all of us privileged to work alongside him.

To the residents of Prince William County: I grieve with you as I continue to fight for you, represent you, and deliver for you. Gerry never gave up, and neither will I.
Rest well, Gerry. We’ll take it from here.
#ForeverTeamConnolly
Yours in service,
Briana Sewell
