clean_body: Dear , Words cannot fully express what Congressman Gerry Connolly meant to me, both personally and professionally. His passing leaves me, like so many, heartbroken yet deeply committed to continuing the fight he so fiercely believe in. What began as a casual conversation after a congressional field hearing in Prince William County led to five incredibly rewarding years of service as a member of his staff. Years filled with purpose, passion, service, and the laying of the firm foundation on which I govern to this day. While Fairfax County may have been where Gerry laid his head at night, you wouldn’t know it based upon how much time he spent in Prince William County. To us, he was more than our congressman, Gerry was our neighbor and our friend. He was always ready to extend a helping hand, provide wise counsel and deliver a perfectly-timed quip with a twinkle in his eye and a smirk on his face. When many gave up on Prince William County, Gerry did not, he saw potential. He listened, deeply listened, and fought like hell for every voice to be heard. The same fire he brought to Capitol Hill, Gerry brought to our community and all who stood in the way of justice. He showed me, and so many others, what it means to show up, to fight, and most importantly, to deliver. To Smitty and Caitlin: Thank you for sharing Gerry with us. His legacy lives on in every life he touched, every community he lifted, and in the values he instilled in all of us privileged to work alongside him. To the residents of Prince William County: I grieve with you as I continue to fight for you, represent you, and deliver for you. Gerry never gave up, and neither will I. Rest well, Gerry. We’ll take it from here. #ForeverTeamConnolly Yours in service, Briana Sewell [] [] [] [] [] Paid for by Friends of Briana Sewell. Friends of Briana Sewell PO Box 1849 Woodbridge, VA 22195 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

subject: Democrats aren’t delivering

body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Voters are angry, Peter.

They want to see their politicians take a stand against Trump, but are
starting to realize that corporate Democrats are simply not up to the
challenge of taking on Elon Musk and Donald Trump.

So it’s no surprise that we’re seeing a rise in everyday people taking on
the Justice Democrats model of launching primary campaigns to challenge
establishment incumbents across the country. New York Magazine published a
new article about this rising trend, and we’re thrilled to see it.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250521?refcode=em20250521-36698&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36698_1203867_8N-P5l&akid=36698%2E1203867%2E8N-P5l ]logo for New York Magazine [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250521?refcode=em20250521-36698&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36698_1203867_8N-P5l&akid=36698%2E1203867%2E8N-P5l ]NY Mag headline reading "The 'Liberal Tea
Party' Moment Is Here for Democrats. It's going to a long, hot summer for
incumbents."

At Justice Democrats, challenging out of touch corporate incumbents has
been our mission since day one. We’ve been taking on entrenched incumbents
and replacing them with bold progressive leaders since 2017—more than
eight years!

The energy we’re seeing nationwide is exactly the sort of movement we have
been building and trying to inspire communities to do since our start.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250521?refcode=em20250521-36698&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36698_1203867_8N-P5l&akid=36698%2E1203867%2E8N-P5l ]Now we need to capture this momentum and turn it into real wins. Can
you chip in $5 today so we can elect a new generation of
Democrats who will fight for working people?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250521?refcode=em20250521-36698&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36698_1203867_8N-P5l&akid=36698%2E1203867%2E8N-P5l ]Chip in $5

The stakes could not be higher, and corporate Democrats are not
delivering.

As our Communications Director, Usamah Andrabi, told New York Magazine:
“Voters are starting to understand that a lot of Democratic officeholders
just fucking suck and are not up to the challenge of taking on Elon Musk
and Donald Trump. Voters want to see a fight, but instead they have
politicians who barely show up.”

People are hungry for leadership, and together we can deliver. Our track
record speaks for itself, but we’re only able to help elect leaders like
Rashida Tlaib or Ilhan Omar because of your grassroots support.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250521?refcode=em20250521-36698&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36698_1203867_8N-P5l&akid=36698%2E1203867%2E8N-P5l ]Every dollar helps us to train and staff new campaigns and build the
grassroots power needed to compete with corporate-backed Democrats. Please
donate right now to fuel our work.

Thank you for being a key part of this movement.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

name: Ilhan Omar
subject: The felony charge against Rep. LaMonica McIver is outrageous and must be dropped.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1643%2E791427%2EuSA0Sc)

[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-may25-mciver/?source=em250520-1-180&akid=1643%2E791427%2EuSA0Sc)
Friend— This is outrageous.
Trump’s Department of Justice has filed a felony charge of assaulting law enforcement against my colleague Rep. LaMonica McIver after a protest at an ICE facility in New Jersey a few weeks ago.
Let me be clear: **This is a political charge by the Trump administration that is meant to stifle dissent against their inhumane deportation agenda.**
**[Please, I need you to join me in calling on the DOJ to drop the charge against Rep. LaMonica McIver. We cannot let this stand.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-may25-mciver/?source=em250520-1-180&akid=1643%2E791427%2EuSA0Sc)
**[Sign on now](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-may25-mciver/?source=em250520-1-180&akid=1643%2E791427%2EuSA0Sc)**
Friend, arresting your political opponents is a longtime tactic of authoritarians like Trump.
It’s a way to intimidate regular people and send a message that if they are willing to arrest and charge a member of Congress, they have no problem doing it to you too.
But the truth is that Rep. McIver and the elected officials and activists who joined her at that ICE facility were acting with moral conviction. They were standing up for their constituents, regardless of their immigration status, and standing against ICE’s assault on due process and civil liberties.
And that kind of solidarity is the greatest threat to Trump’s regime. He needs us to stay divided, to turn neighbors against each other, and to scapegoat immigrants. When we stick together and rise above hatred, we can defeat the far-right.
So please:
**[Sign on to our petition and stand in solidarity with LaMonica McIver and everyone who is protesting Trump’s administration. This political felony charge must be dropped.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-may25-mciver/?source=em250520-1-180&akid=1643%2E791427%2EuSA0Sc)
**[Add your name](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-may25-mciver/?source=em250520-1-180&akid=1643%2E791427%2EuSA0Sc)**
In solidarity,
Ilhan Omar

PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS

You can also **[sign up to receive fewer emails](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=3&akid=1643%2E791427%2EuSA0Sc)**.

name: James O'Keefe
subject: Please join me in wishing Laura a Happy Birthday!
body:
Laura, like me, chose this path because it's our ethos to stand up to wrong. In a fundamental fight between light and darkness, Laura carries a torch down those dark roads that no one else wants to travel down . . . and she lights them up!
| If this is irrelevant to you, please click **[unsubscribe here](https://libersend.loomered.com/unsubscribe/wJCYyn7638HXOcoR8928MiNxO5nXTgGo6s7D8pT0763BW8929so/jNrcjifZkRuM7634SQt2EHxg/rL6zRqXzDDaJppF3qypnWA)** to be removed.
* * *
---
| [****](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/PO6QIO2bsHf9GtaaYSORUw/rL6zRqXzDDaJppF3qypnWA) [****](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/PO6QIO2bsHf9GtaaYSORUw/rL6zRqXzDDaJppF3qypnWA) Dear Friend,

Laura Loomer is like a sister to me, and **I 'd like you to join me in wishing her a happy 32nd birthday [**by supporting her work as an investigative journalist**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/PO6QIO2bsHf9GtaaYSORUw/rL6zRqXzDDaJppF3qypnWA).**

Few people in our nation are solely motivated by a mission of truth like Laura.

When Laura worked for me years ago at Project Veritas, I immediately noticed in her that unrelenting spirit and dogged determination that have unfortunately been lost with most journalists today.

**That spirit remains alive and well with Laura, and I ask that you lift her up today[**by showing her our gratitude.**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/PO6QIO2bsHf9GtaaYSORUw/rL6zRqXzDDaJppF3qypnWA)**

Being an independent journalist constantly under fire by a gallery of critics is a lonely, never-ending road, as there is **always darkness to expose**.

Laura, like me, chose this path because it's our ethos to stand up to wrong.

In a fundamental fight between light and darkness, Laura carries a torch down those dark roads that no one else wants to travel down **. . . and she lights them up!**

[**Let 's wish Laura a great 32nd birthday and help carry her through to the next one.**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/PO6QIO2bsHf9GtaaYSORUw/rL6zRqXzDDaJppF3qypnWA)

I appreciate your time and continued support for Laura. As always, **stay tuned for her next investigation.**

With Respect and Gratitude, James O'Keefe

name: LaMonica McIver
subject: BREAKING: These charges from the Trump administration are baseless
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=2555%2E4032634%2EHvT-Yz)
---
Hi, it's LaMonica McIver. Elizabeth Warren let me know I could reach out because the Trump administration just charged me with crimes for engaging in congressional oversight. The Trump administration just charged me with crimes for engaging in congressional oversight. This is a first—and it’s a flashing red light for our democracy. I went to an ICE facility in my district to conduct oversight because that is my job and my lawful right as a member of Congress. It’s clear: Trump and his administration don’t want transparency or oversight, and they want to punish any person who dares to speak up. These baseless, politically motivated charges against me make that even more obvious. We must stand up together against an administration that weaponizes law enforcement to politically persecute its opponents before it's too late. Democrats stand ready to fight back against the Trump administration’s overreach, and protect democracy and our Constitutional separation of powers. [**We need your help. I’m asking you to split a donation between me and Elizabeth Warren so we have the resources to win this battle for our democracy. We need 500 more grassroots donations before our deadline at midnight to make sure Republicans know we won’t be intimidated.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3016?t=8&akid=2555%2E4032634%2EHvT-Yz)

name: Team Vasquez
subject: They’re coming for SNAP
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gabe Vasquez for Congress
body:
Gabe Vasquez won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022. He's running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/lNYIdkhPikOBrh6RGc-KWg2?unsubscribedata=j6e9PD4yzYxvsnknCEPxPvgHo6RK%2BdVrIhsFG9vzyNf4s%2BT1%2But7Y7laogzbeYx0C0qZR1c1y%2BS%2BjZqRFgHuFkuUbaBXx0jth2OKztYIIlcKPR%2FZQuXZ3vl1IgwwJkpS%2BkMya7%2F7It2mDI2Pqgz9JxlAL3%2BGej%2BIxnKjcIPJo35vvoM12ItVIoTdl1mi1dzDgd9kjLKZhS%2BYmYQ7t2GoIrbmf32AGt%2FAUPriLUB9CoSHeQZ3yki9HWEJ4FfwhV%2FmpgZsbw0y8TBjiGGrTOl24AqClOR4diB1vpUfJGVj5yABjHVtvM8oSX7%2Fxe5kYI6jx5fjm6DNcubPlW3AEYW3EqD2HLrjNdD2E7otQoCacQS7JgWVyY%2FS9DSrCiSmZwtiSA0GF1ziC87ZSdlBR49KJn3NSIYD9tCninoRLww%2Byd4%3D)
---
| | Did you see this email from Gabe? This isn’t just another budget fight in Washington. **These cuts would hurt real people in New Mexico**. **SNAP is a lifeline**. It helps:
* Disabled veterans afford the food they need to stay healthy.
* Retired New Mexicans who worked their whole lives, but whose Social Security checks don’t stretch far enough to cover rising grocery bills.
* Parents and grandparents across our state who rely on SNAP to feed their families every day.

Cutting SNAP will lead to more hunger and will increase poverty. It’s that simple. We can’t let that happen. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Did you see this email from Gabe? This isn’t just another budget fight in Washington. These cuts would hurt real people in New Mexico. SNAP is a lifeline. It helps: Disabled veterans afford the food they need to stay healthy. Retired New Mexicans who worked their whole lives, but whose Social Security checks don’t stretch far enough to cover rising grocery bills. Parents and grandparents across our state who rely on SNAP to feed their families every day. Cutting SNAP will lead to more hunger and will increase poverty. It’s that simple. We can’t let that happen. We can’t allow Donald Trump and MAGA Republicans to strip away programs meant to help New Mexicans put food on the table every day just to fund more tax breaks for billionaires. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = Thanks, team — forwarding Gabe’s message below. Begin Forwarded Message from Gabe Vasquez: It's Gabe. House Republicans just advanced their latest budget proposal — and it’s cruel. The Republican proposal slashes SNAP — the program that puts food on the table for working families, children, and seniors across the country. Donald Trump’s “big, beautiful” bill? It’s just another big lie. I won’t sit back and be silent about these cuts — because I’m not just ashamed, I’m angry. Angry that Republicans are trying to take food off the tables of the working families in New Mexico. These cuts won’t just hurt families in cities and towns — they’ll hit our rural communities hardest, including the farmers who supply our local food systems. These cuts would devastate our communities just to fund more tax breaks for the ultra-wealthy. If we’re going to stop this kind of cruelty, we have to flip the House in 2026 — and holding NM-02 is the only way to get it done. = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = — Gabe | | | ---|---|--- = Together, we flipped NM-02 in 2022. name: Deb Haaland
subject: A feeling I’ll never forget
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
The week of Thanksgiving, I found myself staring at a near-empty kitchen cabinet.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=2095%2E400544%2EYWy2wz)
When it comes to the struggles facing working people across our country, **one of the most personal to me is making sure families can put food on the table.**
My heart breaks each time I hear from someone worried about paying for groceries as prices rise. It brings me back to a time in my life when I relied on food stamps to feed my child Somáh and myself.
**As a single mom working my way through law school, tortillas and pinto beans became our dinnertime staples.** That combo sustained us through some pretty lean years until one day, the week of Thanksgiving, I found myself staring at a near-empty kitchen cabinet.
I desperately hoped to cook Somáh a big holiday meal, so I went to apply for food stamps. My application was denied, and I broke down and cried right there in the office. It wasn’t until later on, when Somáh and I were couch surfing among friends to keep a roof over our heads, that we finally became eligible for the food assistance we so urgently needed.
When I meet working parents on the campaign trail who tell me they’re struggling to keep up with rising prices, I think back to those late nights when I’d sift through the bargain carts at my local grocery store. **The anxiety of having to choose between feeding your child or making rent is a feeling you never really forget – and it’s what motivates me to fight relentlessly to keep New Mexico affordable for working families.**
[**I understand the challenges hardworking New Mexicans are facing because I’ve lived them. If your budget allows for it, I hope you’ll chip in $5 to grow our grassroots campaign.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250521_1_foodstamps?amount=5&refcode=em20250521-2095&refcode2=2095_400544_YWy2wz&akid=2095%2E400544%2EYWy2wz)
I have a long list of priorities I’d like to tackle as governor, but at the top of that list is making sure our neighbors aren't going hungry because they can't afford to buy food.
**Right now, ultra-rich and out-of-touch leaders like Donald Trump and Elon Musk are gutting the programs that help working families get by.** Trump’s reckless tariffs are raising prices at the grocery store. He’s slashing funding for food banks. And now, he’s trying to rip away food stamps to pay for tax breaks for his rich friends.
Our state deserves a leader who will prioritize bringing down costs, not padding the pockets of billionaires.
[**If you can contribute $5 today, I’d be so grateful to help us build a winning campaign. But if that’s not something you can afford right now, just know I’m deeply thankful to have you as part of this team.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250521_1_foodstamps?amount=5&refcode=em20250521-2095&refcode2=2095_400544_YWy2wz&akid=2095%2E400544%2EYWy2wz)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250521_1_foodstamps?amount=5&refcode=em20250521-2095&refcode2=2095_400544_YWy2wz&akid=2095%2E400544%2EYWy2wz)**
Thanks for all you do,
Deb
P.S. Twenty-something years later, Somáh and I still make time to bond over a simple dinner of handmade tortillas and pinto beans. 💛
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250521_1_foodstamps?amount=5&refcode=em20250521-2095&refcode2=2095_400544_YWy2wz&akid=2095%2E400544%2EYWy2wz)
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_footer?refcode=em20250521-1&t=2&refcode2=2095_400544_YWy2wz&akid=2095%2E400544%2EYWy2wz)**
* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails-dh/?t=3&akid=2095%2E400544%2EYWy2wz)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/update-your-information-dh/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.debhaaland.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-dh/?t=4&akid=2095%2E400544%2EYWy2wz)

Email us: [info@debhaaland.com](mailto:info@debhaaland.com)
PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO

name: Suhee You
subject: We lost this battle, but the fight is far from over
body:
https://www.apipennsylvania.org [https://www.apipennsylvania.org]
Hi Peter,
Despite an incredible effort from grassroots organizers, community leaders, and everyday people like you, Mayor Ed Gainey lost his re-election bid. It’s a painful moment, not just for Pittsburgh, but for all of us who believe in a just, inclusive, and people-powered democracy.
Gainey, Pittsburgh’s first Black mayor, ran a campaign rooted in equity, affordable housing, labor justice, immigrant rights, and community safety. His signature achievement was a transformative housing agenda, aimed at preserving affordability in the city by requiring developers to include affordable units in new projects. This focus on housing made him a target for developers, who poured resources into defeating him.
He dared to challenge the corporate status quo. He pushed back against the political establishment and MAGA-aligned forces. He stood with working families, and he stood with our Asian American communities. Mayor Gainey’s work with our Asian American communities was central to his vision for Pittsburgh’s future. Through partnerships with organizations like API PA, his administration worked to amplify the voices and needs of our community, ensuring our concerns were represented in his policies and initiatives.
We want to be clear that this loss wasn’t for lack of effort. API PA, in coalition with organizations like PA United and One PA, poured everything we had into this race. Together with partners like the Working Families Party, SEIU Healthcare PA, 1Hood Power, and more, we built one of the largest grassroots mobilizations Pittsburgh has ever seen. We knocked 50,000 doors. We made 300,000 calls. Together, we collectively sent nearly 600,000 texts. We spent $665,000 to counter nearly $1 million in dark money and special interest spending.
We faced a significant challenge. Corey O’Connor, supported by Republican megadonors, corporate developers, and political insiders, was able to raise far more funds than Gainey. Additionally, a group called Common Sense Change ran a campaign with attack ads and canvassing efforts that spread misleading information. Their intention seemed to be to unseat a progressive Black mayor who stood up to corporate interests and replace him with a candidate they could more easily influence.
Make no mistake, this movement is not going away. This is not the end of our fight. In fact, it's only the beginning.
We’ve built real infrastructure, trained new leaders, and proved that grassroots organizing can go toe-to-toe with moneyed interests. And we’re not walking away. Not from Pittsburgh. Not from Western PA. Not from the vision of a Pennsylvania that works for all of us, not just the wealthy few.
Now, more than ever, we need to dig in. We need to defend our champions, build new ones, and prepare for the next fight, because you know just as well as we do, that it’s already underway. Can you chip in $25, $50, or whatever you can to help us rebuild, organize, and fight for our communities? [https://www.apipennsylvania.org/donate?am=25&amtOpts=&recurringAm=25&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=5shmdxnZDyhXdAfWNgy6qq9+O6iCuiFZ3eDknKko6jiC0fhEDX4kwyxU9y52QJd9GLBA4xcN/xRzBP8CvE1VAqUG8BTx0mchO3oYYG5610510UJwqp4zz+WNh77y++5AyiAhuLeBlok+i9frgCyfXkAasHchR21Qxem7zk37Flc=]
Donate Now [https://www.apipennsylvania.org/donate?am=25&amtOpts=&recurringAm=25&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=5shmdxnZDyhXdAfWNgy6qq9+O6iCuiFZ3eDknKko6jiC0fhEDX4kwyxU9y52QJd9GLBA4xcN/xRzBP8CvE1VAqUG8BTx0mchO3oYYG5610510UJwqp4zz+WNh77y++5AyiAhuLeBlok+i9frgCyfXkAasHchR21Qxem7zk37Flc=]
This movement began with leaders like Summer Lee and Sara Innamorato. Mayor Gainey carried the torch, and we will continue to carry it forward. Together, we can reclaim what we’ve lost and keep fighting for a future rooted in justice, dignity, and true democracy.
Let’s turn this setback into a comeback. With you by our side, we’re just getting started.
In solidarity,
Suhee You
Development Director
API PA
https://www.facebook.com/apipennsylvania [https://www.facebook.com/apipennsylvania] https://twitter.com/apipennsylvania [https://twitter.com/apipennsylvania] https://instagram.com/apipennsylvania [https://instagram.com/apipennsylvania] https://www.tiktok.com/@apipennsylvania [https://www.tiktok.com/@apipennsylvania] https://bsky.app/profile/apipennsylvania.bsky.social [https://bsky.app/profile/apipennsylvania.bsky.social]

API PA
PO Box 22611
Philadelphia, PA 19110
United States

name: Gaza Humanitarian Crisis via Our Revolution
subject: Add your name: UN says 14,000 Gaza babies could die in next 48 hours
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

🚨 This is URGENT: the UN just warned that 14,000 children could die if aid
does not reach them in the next 48 hours. [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/29330?t=1011&akid=8515%2E5885482%2EiCZ8YF ]Will you send an emergency
message to Congress that we will not rest until it takes action to finally
stop enabling these horrors? 🚨

Peter Willis,

The level of human suffering underway in Gaza has reached catastrophic
proportions. 53,000 have been killed. 2 million are slowly starving to
death. Every single day, more children die from bombs or starvation.

And it’s about to, somehow, get even worse. Netanyahu just launched a
major new ground offensive, saying that Israel plans to “take control of
the entire Gaza Strip.”

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/29329?source=email-20250521&t=1012&akid=8515%2E5885482%2EiCZ8YF ]Headline: Israel plans full takeover of Gaza Strip, Netanyahu says

We have to do something NOW. And Bernie is leading the way with a path
forward to end our government’s backing of Netanyahu’s devastating,
immoral war.

Congress continues sending BILLIONS in weapons to enable the endless
destruction, loss, and trauma in Gaza. It’s unconscionable. It’s morally
wrong. And Bernie is calling on Congress to take action and stop the
endless flow of weapons.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/29330?source=email-20250521&t=1013&akid=8515%2E5885482%2EiCZ8YF ]Together we can show Congress that the public will not rest until it
does something to finally stop Netanyahu. But it’s going to take ALL of us
standing with Bernie to finally stop the U.S. from enabling Israel’s wars.
Will you add your name?

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/29330?source=email-20250521&t=1014&akid=8515%2E5885482%2EiCZ8YF ]ADD YOUR NAME

It’s hard to believe, but there’s more. Reports just came out that Donald
Trump has hatched a terrifying and appalling plan to forcibly relocate up
to one million Gazans to Libya.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/29329?source=email-20250521&t=1015&akid=8515%2E5885482%2EiCZ8YF ]Headline: Trump administration working on a plan to move 1 million
Palestinians to Libya

Make no mistake: Trump's reckless and inhumane policy would be ethnic
cleansing plain and simple. And it would set an incredibly dangerous
precedent reminiscent of the darkest chapters of our history.

Bernie is speaking out all over the media and in the corridors of the
Senate, insisting civilian lives matter more than weapons profits and
rejecting AIPAC’s immense pressure to suppress criticism of Israel's
military aggression.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/29329?source=email-20250521&t=1016&akid=8515%2E5885482%2EiCZ8YF ]Headline: Bernie Sanders: Democrats 'not speaking up' on Gaza due to
fear of pro-Israel lobby

He is URGENTLY calling upon Congress to act – and Our Revolution has stood
alongside him every step of the way, mobilizing to end weapons sales to
Israel, opposing AIPAC’s attempts to silence critics of endless war, and
challenging Trump’s efforts to criminalize dissent here at home.

But as the suffering in Gaza only grows, NOW is the moment to speak
louder, clearer, and in greater numbers. We must urgently mobilize,
demanding Congress stop sending bombs, arms, and the implicit green-light
from Washington to a crisis that's already spiraled out of control.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/29330?source=email-20250521&t=1017&akid=8515%2E5885482%2EiCZ8YF ]Will you urgently stand with Bernie today and demand Congress
immediately halt the weapons sales fueling the devastation in Gaza?

Bernie said it plainly himself: never before have we faced a more critical
moment. With atrocities escalating by the hour, and humanitarian
catastrophe unfolding in real time, every moment Congress remains silent
equals more suffering, more displacement, more innocent lives lost.

Together, let’s come together to change that.

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

## Supreme Court Pauses Attempt to Keep Legislator From Voting
Most injunction stories seem to favor the Left—but here’s one they may not like as much. On Tuesday, the Supreme Court voted 7-2 to grant an injunction requiring the clerk of the Maine House of Representatives to count votes cast by Rep. Laurel Libby, who had been effectively suspended for her views on gender ideology. name: LaMonica McIver
subject: The Trump administration is going after me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand with Sanchez
body:
The Trump administration just charged me with crimes for engaging in congressional oversight. This is a first—and it’s a flashing red light for our democracy.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108122932/546918324/-1096746517?refcode=BLU_EM_SAN_2025-05-21_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5M2MxODFkNC03ZjM2LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Xp3F_DcS82gANK-UXyaEl-U330V9Y_CVD-rVS5CoxdA=)
---
Peter,

The Trump administration just charged me with crimes for engaging in congressional oversight. This is a first—and it’s a flashing red light for our democracy.

I went to an ICE facility in my district to conduct oversight because that is my job and my lawful right as a member of Congress. It’s clear: Trump and his administration don’t want transparency or oversight, and they want to punish any person who dares to speak up.

These baseless, politically motivated charges against me make that even more obvious. We must stand up together against an administration that weaponizes law enforcement to persecute its opponents before it's too late. Democrats stand ready to fight back against the Trump administration’s overreach, and protect democracy and our Constitutional separation of powers.

[_**We need your help. I’m asking you to split a donation between me and Linda Sánchez so we have the resources to win this battle for our democracy. We need 500 more grassroots donations before our deadline at midnight to make sure Republicans know we won’t be intimidated.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108122933/546918325/-1096746517?refcode=BLU_EM_SAN_2025-05-21_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5M2MxODFkNC03ZjM2LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Xp3F_DcS82gANK-UXyaEl-U330V9Y_CVD-rVS5CoxdA=)

This is far bigger than just me—the rule of law is at stake. Our democracy as we know it is under threat.

clean_body: The Trump administration just charged me with crimes for engaging in congressional oversight. This is a first—and it’s a flashing red light for our democracy. | = Peter, The Trump administration just charged me with crimes for engaging in congressional oversight. This is a first—and it’s a flashing red light for our democracy. I went to an ICE facility in my district to conduct oversight because that is my job and my lawful right as a member of Congress. It’s clear: Trump and his administration don’t want transparency or oversight, and they want to punish any person who dares to speak up. These baseless, politically motivated charges against me make that even more obvious. We must stand up together against an administration that weaponizes law enforcement to persecute its opponents before it's too late. Democrats stand ready to fight back against the Trump administration’s overreach, and protect democracy and our Constitutional separation of powers. = | = | = | = | = | = This is far bigger than just me—the rule of law is at stake. name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Peggy Flanagan Needs Our Support
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24-flanagan?refcode=250521em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24-flanagan?refcode=250521em]
Hi folks,
I want to tell you about someone who’s unbelievably great. Someone who understands what’s at stake in this moment, who listens, who leads, and who embodies the values that make Minnesota, well, Minnesotan . That person is Peggy Flanagan. And she’s running to represent our great state in the U.S. Senate.
If you’re ready to help Peggy win this race and support our fight to get our government to work for working families, please split a donation between her campaigns and Tobias Read now. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24-flanagan?refcode=250521em]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24-flanagan?refcode=250521em]
Listen, folks: Right now is when we need to build our power in the Senate with true fighters for the working class. Billionaires like Elon Musk have taken over the government. Republicans in Congress won’t stand up as Donald Trump wrecks our economy. And working families who were already struggling to get by are now paying even more for the things they need every day.
That’s why I’m proud to throw my support behind Peggy Flanagan to be the next senator for Minnesota. We need Democrats in the Senate who are going to fight with everything they've got for working people, and that’s exactly who she’s always been.
From her early days on the Minneapolis School Board to now serving as Minnesota’s Lieutenant Governor, Peggy is an organizer at heart.
She’s gutsy, smart, experienced, and ready to take on corrupt special interests in order to make life better for working people.
She’s the daughter of a single mom who understands what it’s like to worry the bottom could fall out at any moment. That lived experience drove her fight to raise the minimum wage and make paid family leave a reality for Minnesota families.
That’s the kind of fighter we need in Washington. Peggy is the partner I need to make real progress on the issues that matter — housing, child care, and the cost of living — and she’s the leader working families need right now.
But this race isn’t going to be a walk in the park. Peggy’s running a grassroots campaign and not taking a dime of corporate PAC money. That means she needs this team — grassroots supporters — to contribute the resources she needs to win.
Please, folks, if you can, split a donation today to Peggy’s campaign and Tobias Read today to send a champion for working families to the Senate and keep up our fight to make our government work for everyone. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24-flanagan?refcode=250521em]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24-flanagan?refcode=250521em]
Thanks for being a part of this,
Elizabeth Warren
Tobias Read is Oregon's Secretary of State. To support him directly, please donate here. [https://www.tobiasread.com]
Peggy Flanagan is running for U.S. Senate in Minnesota. You can support her directly here. [https://peggyflanagan.com/]
https://www.facebook.com/TobiasReadOR [https://www.facebook.com/TobiasReadOR] https://twitter.com/TobiasRead [https://twitter.com/TobiasRead] https://instagram.com/tobiasreador [https://instagram.com/tobiasreador]

Friends of Tobias Read (5208)
PO Box 42307
Portland, OR 97242
United States

body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108123442/546919979/-1787004069?refcode=header&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAzNTUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTVjMDJlY2EtODEzNi1mMDExLWE1ZjEtNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=aGppwvNaIHZ0yHOf_5ZCE4l8vob4ejDUo7hw-EVT0JU=) | The SAVE Act is being pushed as a “common sense” solution to a problem that doesn’t exist. **Here’s what they’re not telling you: This bill isn’t about security. It’s about voter suppression.** 🚨 In Minnesota, only 3 noncitizen votes were found out of over 13 million ballots cast in the last decade. 🚨 Requiring documentary proof of citizenship will **shut out voters** , especially students, seniors, and people without ready access to documents. 🚨 When Kansas tried something similar, **31,000 eligible voters** were blocked from voting. Secretary Simon testified before Congress to defend our elections. But he can’t do it alone. [**We need your help to fight back. Will you chip in $10 right now?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108123445/546919982/-76723109?amount=25&refcode=ss_em_fr_90DO_250521&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAzNTUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTVjMDJlY2EtODEzNi1mMDExLWE1ZjEtNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=aGppwvNaIHZ0yHOf_5ZCE4l8vob4ejDUo7hw-EVT0JU=) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed now.

clean_body: = | The SAVE Act is being pushed as a “common sense” solution to a problem that doesn’t exist. Here’s what they’re not telling you: This bill isn’t about security. It’s about voter suppression. 🚨 In Minnesota, only 3 noncitizen votes were found out of over 13 million ballots cast in the last decade. 🚨 Requiring documentary proof of citizenship will shut out voters , especially students, seniors, and people without ready access to documents. 🚨 When Kansas tried something similar, 31,000 eligible voters were blocked from voting. Secretary Simon testified before Congress to defend our elections. But he can’t do it alone. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed now. | **********=******** | ********=******** | ********=******** | ********=******** | ********=******** | ********=******** Join us in standing up for voting rights today. Team Simon | = | = With Steve’s leadership, Minnesota has led the nation in voter turnout for the past three out of four elections. His top priorities are defending our democracy, strengthening the freedom to vote for all eligible Minnesotans, pushing back against dangerous disinformation about our elections, providing support for small businesses, and enhancing security protections for our most vulnerable. = We are prohibited from accepting donations for Lobbyists or PACs during the regular Legislative Session. name: Indiana Democrats
subject: Protecting the Hoosier vote
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www
body:
|
---
Peter, This legislative session, Republicans passed several pieces of legislation that will make it harder for Hoosiers to cast a ballot and changed our election rules, including bills that:
* Ban the use of state-issued university or educational IDs for voting.
* Make school board elections partisan. Indiana will be one of only five states with partisan school races.
* Allow the state to use flawed often-flawed BMV data to remove voters from the rolls in just 30 days.

These changes and more will impact the ability of Hoosiers to make their voices heard next election and beyond. **[Your donation today will help us educate county parties and Hoosier voters on the importance of these changes, and how they can still participate in our democracy. Send $20 now or $10 a month to make it happen.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108123550/546920213/1764064610?refcode=250521vote&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiN2RhOTZmYi04MTM2LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pkeWn4dmj0DApw412QlZtOr2NK6VyXpDFgAtgHy91WY=)** Republicans rely on low voter turnout to win elections and keep power in our state. We can’t let them artificially turn 2026 into a low turnout contest by making it harder for certain voters to cast a ballot. **Indiana Democrats will always stand for the right to vote. There’s no reason why we should accept being nearly last in voter turnout.** **[Will you contribute to our rebuilding fund today to power our voter registration and education efforts over the next year and beyond?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108123551/546920214/1764064610?refcode=250521vote&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiN2RhOTZmYi04MTM2LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pkeWn4dmj0DApw412QlZtOr2NK6VyXpDFgAtgHy91WY=)** Thanks,
Indiana Democrats

Hey, it's Gwen Moore. I'll be brief.
The Trump administration filed its first criminal charges against a Member of Congress, my friend Rep. LaMonica McIver. She was conducting oversight at an ICE facility in her district and is now being targeted by the administration.
**I'm forwarding her message below — I hope you'll read it.**
[And, I'm asking you to split a donation between Rep. McIver and our movement today. We need to fight these charges and be ready for whatever the Trump administration does next. >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108123616/546920455/-1197175708?refcode=partner_ms_dh_em_gwenmoore&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85MzczOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTcxZDYzNC04MjM2LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XAT4kG_bwNMS9tXDKf647A8qRJ2ILH88mddwTFr6D2E=)

Friends,
The Trump administration just charged me with crimes for engaging in congressional oversight. This is a first — and it's a flashing red light for our democracy.
I went to an ICE facility in my district to conduct oversight because that is my job and my lawful right as a member of Congress. It's clear: **Trump and his administration don't want transparency or oversight, and they want to punish any person who dares to speak up.**
These baseless, politically motivated charges against me make that even more obvious. We must stand up together against an administration that weaponizes law enforcement to persecute its opponents before it's too late. Democrats stand ready to fight back against the Trump administration's overreach, and protect democracy and our Constitutional separation of powers.
[We need your help. I'm asking you to split a donation between me and Gwen Moore so we have the resources to win this battle for our democracy. We need 500 more grassroots donations before our deadline at midnight to make sure Republicans know we won't be intimidated. >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108123617/546920456/-1197175708?refcode=partner_ms_dh_em_gwenmoore&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85MzczOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTcxZDYzNC04MjM2LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XAT4kG_bwNMS9tXDKf647A8qRJ2ILH88mddwTFr6D2E=)

AMOUNT »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108123623/546920462/-1197175708?amounts=25,50,100,250,500,1000,2500&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85MzczOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTcxZDYzNC04MjM2LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XAT4kG_bwNMS9tXDKf647A8qRJ2ILH88mddwTFr6D2E=)

Split a donation between me and Gwen Moore and share this with your friends. >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108123624/546920463/-1197175708?refcode=partner_ms_dh_em_gwenmoore&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85MzczOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTcxZDYzNC04MjM2LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XAT4kG_bwNMS9tXDKf647A8qRJ2ILH88mddwTFr6D2E=)

LaMonica

name: Prudent Politics
subject: 20th Annual National Memorial Day Parade starts SOON!
body:
Please read the following message.
* * *

| | | | | [](https://e.nl.vintagetec.com/re?l=D0I2xueod8Iteknop5IbITmaymyaxq&s=CMBNBPDAGCMELFBH)
---
Friend, It's Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13 __and The Green Mile or the CBS television series CSI: NY - but it was in 1994 playing the role of Lt. Dan in Forrest Gump that changed my life and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. I've served as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. nearly every year since American Veterans Center revived it in 2005. **Now, I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event.** This year will be a remembrance like no other, as we commemorate the 80th anniversary of victory in World War II and the 250th birthdays of the U.S. Army, Navy, and Marine Corps. **[Friend, the National Memorial Day Parade is ENTIRELY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous Americans like you. Will you help chip in today to help support the Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?](https://e.nl.vintagetec.com/re?l=D0I2xueod8Iteknop5IcITmaymyaxq&s=CMBNBPDAGCMELFBH)**
---
[ **Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](https://e.nl.vintagetec.com/re?l=D0I2xueod8Iteknop5IdITmaymyaxq&s=CMBNBPDAGCMELFBH)
---
[](https://e.nl.vintagetec.com/re?l=D0I2xueod8Iteknop5IeITmaymyaxq&s=CMBNBPDAGCMELFBH)
---
The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, _the entire parade_ costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! _That means that every dollar that 's contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event._ **But I want to reiterate that American Veterans Center does not take ANY federal funding for this event. It is funded _entirely_ by private citizens like you who want to honor those who have sacrificed so much for our country.** Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like:
* Record hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to Today before we lose these stories forever.

* Hold our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear first-hand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam.

* Produce veteran focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans the price of our freedom.

[](https://e.nl.vintagetec.com/re?l=D0I2xueod8Iteknop5IfITmaymyaxq&s=CMBNBPDAGCMELFBH)[**Please join me in support of the National Memorial Day Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, or more right now.**](https://e.nl.vintagetec.com/re?l=D0I2xueod8Iteknop5IgITmaymyaxq&s=CMBNBPDAGCMELFBH) If you've been looking for an opportunity to give back to those who have given so much for our freedom, this is one of the best possible ways you could do it. _And for a special group of veterans, this might be one of the last chances we get._ You see, with each year that goes by, we lose more and more of our World War II veterans, and for the few we have remaining, traveling to Washington, D.C., for the parade is difficult. WWII veterans were a key part of the first parade when it was revived in 2005, as they have been every year since for the last 20 years. _But this may be the last year we have the opportunity to have these brave men and women with us for the parade._** ** **That's why we are making a concerted effort to ensure these veterans are at this year's National Memorial Day Parade to honor them one last time. ** So this year, as we mark the 80th anniversary of victory in Europe and Japan to end World War II - and the 250th anniversaries of the Army, Navy, and Marine Corps - I encourage you to help us honor these brave veterans while we still have them with us.
---
[ **Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](https://e.nl.vintagetec.com/re?l=D0I2xueod8Iteknop5IhITmaymyaxq&s=CMBNBPDAGCMELFBH)
---
And no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you. On Memorial Day - not just this momentous year of military milestones, but every year - please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. Visit a local veterans' cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. _I believe that while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more._ _**[Friend, thank you for your support of America's heroes, and please - if you're able, make a gift to fund the National Memorial Day Parade right now during its 20th anniversary.](https://e.nl.vintagetec.com/re?l=D0I2xueod8Iteknop5IiITmaymyaxq&s=CMBNBPDAGCMELFBH)**_ Sincerely, Gary SiniseHonorary Grand MarshalNational Memorial Day Parade
---
[](https://e.nl.vintagetec.com/re?l=D0I2xueod8Iteknop5IjITmaymyaxq&s=CMBNBPDAGCMELFBH)
---
[ **Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](https://e.nl.vintagetec.com/re?l=D0I2xueod8Iteknop5IkITmaymyaxq&s=CMBNBPDAGCMELFBH)
---
The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. (C) American Veterans Center
1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201
---

525-K East Market Street # 114
City: Leesburg
State: Virginia
Zip Code: 20176

[You can read our Privacy Policy by clicking here](https://e.nl.vintagetec.com/re?l=D0I2xueod8Iteknop5IlITmaymyaxq&s=CMBNBPDAGCMELFBH)

But this may be the last year we have the opportunity to have these brave men and women with us for the parade. That's why we are making a concerted effort to ensure these veterans are at this year's National Memorial Day Parade to honor them one last time. So this year, as we mark the 80th anniversary of victory in Europe and Japan to end World War II - and the 250th anniversaries of the Army, Navy, and Marine Corps - I encourage you to help us honor these brave veterans while we still have them with us. And no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you. On Memorial Day - not just this momentous year of military milestones, but every year - please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. Visit a local veterans' cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. I believe that while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more. _ Sincerely, Gary SiniseHonorary Grand MarshalNational Memorial Day Parade The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. name: Deb Haaland
subject: A broken leg and 3 options
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
A few years ago while visiting Shenandoah National Park, I took a bit of a tumble.
Peter, Deb Haaland here.
A few years ago while visiting Shenandoah National Park, I took a _bit_ of a tumble.
I was hiking up the side of a mountain when I slipped on a loose rock. It was a total freak accident — I couldn’t believe it! But there I was, covered in dirt with a pain in my leg and ankle and three options:
* Get airlifted down in a helicopter,
* take eight National Park staff away from their jobs to carry me down,
* or hike down myself.

**I chose to walk back down the mountain, Peter,** because I couldn’t stomach the idea of taking our National Park staff away from their work, even for a few hours. It turns out I hiked down all that way with a broken leg. I’ll be honest, I didn’t think my leg was actually broken at the time.
The federal workers who care for our public lands have absolutely crucial jobs to do. They preserve and protect our public lands for millions of visitors each year and for future generations. **Donald Trump and Elon Musk have made it clear they intend to auction off our lands to extractive industries like Big Oil. They’ve attempted to fire our dedicated National Parks and National Forests workers en masse.**
As Governor of New Mexico, I will be a fierce defender of our rivers, mesas, farmlands, and forests. I will always stand up for the dedicated workers who serve our communities. **[If you’re with me, will you split a donation to support my campaign and Heartland Patriots?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88665?refcode=em20250521-8947&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8947%2E614464%2EkYEmda)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88666?refcode=em20250521-8947&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=2&akid=8947%2E614464%2EkYEmda) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88666?refcode=em20250521-8947&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=3&akid=8947%2E614464%2EkYEmda) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88666?refcode=em20250521-8947&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=4&akid=8947%2E614464%2EkYEmda) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88666?refcode=em20250521-8947&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=5&akid=8947%2E614464%2EkYEmda) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88666?refcode=em20250521-8947&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=6&akid=8947%2E614464%2EkYEmda) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88666?refcode=em20250521-8947&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=7&akid=8947%2E614464%2EkYEmda) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88665?refcode=em20250521-8947&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=8&akid=8947%2E614464%2EkYEmda)
---
As a former Secretary of the Interior, it breaks my heart to see what this administration is doing to exploit our lands and those who care for them.
**But just like the day I chose to hike down the mountain on my broken leg, I am determined to stand up and do right by the workers who proudly serve our nation.**
**[New Mexicans need a governor who isn’t afraid of the tough fights that lie ahead. I can’t win this campaign without you, so please split a donation of $5 if you can afford it today.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88665?refcode=em20250521-8947&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=9&akid=8947%2E614464%2EkYEmda)**
Thanks for reading, Peter. It means a lot that Heartland Patriots allowed me to share this moment with you — because the fight to protect our public lands belongs to all of us.
Be fierce,
Deb
P.S. In case you’re wondering, not even a broken left fibula could keep me away from our beautiful parks for long. Here’s a photo of me from one of my favorite places to visit, Monument Valley Navajo Tribal Park.

clean_body: I’ve already taken it on the chin several times with the Left's lies, and it will only get worse as we get closer to election day. | Fellow American, I won’t sugarcoat this. I’m in the fight of my life. The attacks on President Trump and his most loyal defenders in the Senate have been relentless. They’re rushing millions of dollars into battleground Senate seats across the country. I’ve already taken it on the chin several times with their lies, and it will only get worse as we get closer to election day. It will be a bare-knuckle fight to the finish because Montana could determine who controls the Senate Majority. Fellow American, I know by the end of this campaign, I’m going to be black and blue from all the Left’s attacks and the media’s brazen anti-Trump bias. For America, Steve Daines PS: The attacks from Democrats and the biased news media will be unrelenting and they have an endless stream of money. Steve Daines is a fifth-generation Montanan, life-long sportsman and father of four serving the people of Montana as their Senator. Steve is committed to always putting Montana first as he works to bring real change to Washington and fights for more jobs, less government and common sense solutions to get our country back on track. Senator Steve Daines | | Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana

| Peter, The Trump administration just charged me with crimes for engaging in congressional oversight. This is a first—and it’s a flashing red light for our democracy. I went to an ICE facility in my district to conduct oversight because that is my job and my lawful right as a member of Congress. It’s clear: Trump and his administration don’t want transparency or oversight, and they want to punish any person who dares to speak up. These baseless, politically motivated charges against me make that even more obvious. We must stand up together against an administration that weaponizes law enforcement to politically persecute its opponents before it's too late. Democrats stand ready to fight back against the Trump administration’s overreach, and protect democracy and our Constitutional separation of powers. [We need your help. I’m asking you to split a donation between me and the Democratic Party of Georgia so we have the resources to win this battle for our democracy. clean_body: | = We know the 2026 midterms seem far away, but just take a look at this: = That’s right: Democrats have a very real chance of securing a Democratic majority in the Senate next year. But we can only make it a reality if we have the resources now. There’s no sugarcoating it — we’ve got a tall order to fill: Defend open seats currently held by Democrats in states like Michigan and New Hampshire, win in Georgia, and flip four GOP-held Senate seats. To do that will require a lot of resources. Organizing and building winning coalitions takes time and money, and we can’t give Republicans any chance of beating us to the punch. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you, — Flip the Senate = Paid for by SMP, www.SenateMajority.com, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: Jessica Mackler, EMILYs List
subject: Justice Riggs' win is proof that we still have power
body:
We fought, and we won. |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108124442/546923044/-1686146655?refcode=WUEFE553_20250521_RiggsReflection_ALL_v1s3&sourceid=1056201&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjc2Y2VhMS04NDM2LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mNjh9-gRdYRVO1udBN0GyHExLFeQ_GuSJmLe9N7WU_g=) Peter,

We all breathed a sigh of relief when Justice Allison Riggs was _finally_ officially certified the winner in North Carolina's Supreme Court race a couple of weeks ago. But I want to take a moment to reflect on _just how important_ that win was.

Earlier this month, Republican challenger Jefferson Griffin finally conceded — ending his six-month-long attempt to overturn the results of November’s election and disenfranchise thousands of voters.

**Griffin and his Republican allies tried everything in their power to silence us, but we didn't fall for it. We fought back.**

EMILYs List stood with Justice Riggs — and the voters whose rights were under attack — every step of the way. And after six long months, we helped ensure that the will of North Carolina voters was upheld with Justice Allison Riggs officially sworn in as justice.

This outcome is proof that we DO still have power.

Just because Republicans _think_ they can undermine democracy and sway election results in their favor doesn’t mean they'll get away with it.

**Democracy prevailed — all because we didn't back down.**

At a time when Republicans are doing everything in their power to silence us, EMILYs List is fighting for candidates like Justice Riggs who are critical to defending our rights and our democracy. [**Please consider donating to help fuel our fight to take back power nationwide:**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108124443/546923045/-1686146655?refcode=WUEFE553_20250521_RiggsReflection_ALL_v1s3&sourceid=1056201&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjc2Y2VhMS04NDM2LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mNjh9-gRdYRVO1udBN0GyHExLFeQ_GuSJmLe9N7WU_g=) | [DONATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108124444/546923046/-1686146655?refcode=WUEFE553_20250521_RiggsReflection_ALL_v1s3&sourceid=1056201&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjc2Y2VhMS04NDM2LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mNjh9-gRdYRVO1udBN0GyHExLFeQ_GuSJmLe9N7WU_g=)

clean_body: We fought, and we won. | = Peter, We all breathed a sigh of relief when Justice Allison Riggs was finally officially certified the winner in North Carolina's Supreme Court race a couple of weeks ago. But I want to take a moment to reflect on just how important that win was. Earlier this month, Republican challenger Jefferson Griffin finally conceded — ending his six-month-long attempt to overturn the results of November’s election and disenfranchise thousands of voters. Griffin and his Republican allies tried everything in their power to silence us, but we didn't fall for it. We fought back. EMILYs List stood with Justice Riggs — and the voters whose rights were under attack — every step of the way. And after six long months, we helped ensure that the will of North Carolina voters was upheld with Justice Allison Riggs officially sworn in as justice. This outcome is proof that we DO still have power. Just because Republicans think they can undermine democracy and sway election results in their favor doesn’t mean they'll get away with it. Democracy prevailed — all because we didn't back down. At a time when Republicans are doing everything in their power to silence us, EMILYs List is fighting for candidates like Justice Riggs who are critical to defending our rights and our democracy. = | = = Thank you, Jessica Mackler (she/her/hers) President, EMILYs List = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. Peter, Trump’s Deputy Chief of Staff for Policy, Stephen Miller, went on the record calling me "one of the most corrupt, shameless individuals ever to hold public office.”
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108124547/546923464/-2022258813?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1947-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTZlOTk0Mi04NTM2LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=84e22d6-fX_FFMH94M38W09L2HEYHbdlsKMiYoT2Pfs=)
Let me be clear: This isn’t just a personal attack. It’s part of a coordinated smear campaign to discredit my work, intimidate me, and silence anyone who holds Trump and his allies accountable.
**But here’s the thing: I’m not going anywhere.**

**I’ve taken on powerful interests before, including Donald Trump, and I won’t stop now – no matter how ugly the attacks get.****[If you’re with me, chip in $5 or more toward my campaign so that I can fight back against Trump’s revenge tour and support the work we’re doing to uphold the Constitution and block his MAGA agenda.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108124548/546923466/-2022258813?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1947-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTZlOTk0Mi04NTM2LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=84e22d6-fX_FFMH94M38W09L2HEYHbdlsKMiYoT2Pfs=)**

name: Senator Jennifer Boysko
subject: Boysko Bulletin: Invite to Two Town Halls
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/102624/images/Bulletin.jpeg]
Boysko Bulletin: Invite to Two Town Halls
Dear Peter,
Tonight, I will be joined by Delegate Irene Shin and Karen Keys-Gamarra to present commendations to members of our community.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/102624/images/2025%20May/05.21.25%20Town%20Hall%20%281%29.png]
We will gather at Herndon Community Center, 814 Ferndale Avenue in Herndon, at 6:30 pm, Wednesday, 5/21. We will have time to hear your concerns and answer your questions.
Then next week, I am joining Delegate Rip Sullivan for a town hall in Great Falls at the Grange, 5/28 at 6:30 pm.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/102624/images/2025%20May/May%2028th%20Great%20Falls%20Town%20Hall.png]
This time together is important - please bring your friends and neighbors. See you tonight in Herndon.
Kindest regards,
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/102624/images/2024%20February%20Images/electronic%20signature.png]
Jennifer B. Boysko
Member, Senate of Virginia
Representing the newly created 38th Senate District making up the northernmost portions of Fairfax County (Great Falls, Herndon, McLean, Reston, WolfTrap, parts of unincorporated Vienna and a slice of Falls Church)
PS If you would like to support my work, please visit my fundraising page [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jb27-website] .
Keep in Touch
I am back in District 38 with my Chief of Staff Karen Harrison, and aides, Kathy Shupe, and Juliet Morro. For constituent services and to schedule meetings with your community group, please call (703) 437-0086 or email Senator Boysko@senate.virginia.gov. Friend me on Facebook [https://bit.ly/2PskgOp] and follow me on X. [https://bit.ly/3uLhVhC]
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe.
Friends of Jennifer Boysko
PO Box 247
Herndon, VA 20172
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/LakmKKqoaEa-z1agKTAOVw2?unsubscribedata=z%2B0yu5xVUxUt%2F7s04GjBmWe3JAUWRHeQ0DHrHmRz3fYKSpmmt61wJDvSA8PcQ%2F%2FMSOAkCackuLJn%2FtVa5%2F0Up2BCi01g9SbxijDusOiQkl5mAc%2FVNzrhjULa58%2FwCDmiJWVNJLDh%2BX8hQ3hbbK%2BzPzN7kPcphHYVSdHoz%2F9XnFkXJno%2FAi6mQnZWSsCvvr4LUQWdKq3bH4QoZtppgp1hzfl77zamIC7WxQ1NbxVD7SMoyf4zLCoRqusN1hOcFhI2sjkjt4RjGX11M4AKMPf1n%2F2Oq31tbaOsC2Y%2F5Yu15cZEpQzZQQow09JElKwSSalN%2FY6iZfaE1QtBTR%2B1HBx0p0pXAAWZEdfpIdzYn0t%2BtkMaIJemoU%2B3kY4P%2BeoXsZvLy7iQyuIzHi4ZHB%2BeVxGMuuQcHQ2A7%2Fcuf8DWiO94mg61kSLKXQhcheTSiuHwl8xa .

name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez
subject: "We don't have the money"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Where's all the rest of it going?
#
I actually believe that people should age with dignity in this country.

I believe that people should have access to healthcare.
Before people say "We don't have the money" for it:
We “don't have the money” for a better social safety net because **we let *ssholes like Elon Musk gut Medicaid and Social Security in order for him to pay for _his own_ tax cuts** and _his own_ billion dollars in private federal contracts.
This guy takes billions and billions of _your_ tax dollars, of _your_ public funds — and it's not just Elon.
A lot of these “tech guys” that were standing behind Trump at the inauguration talk about themselves as “tech,” but **they're really just defense contractors**.
They're the new Boeing. They're the new Lockheed Martin.
They are robbing us of the tiny slivers of what we have left in our collective public social safety net in order to get billion dollar defense contracts.
Because here’s the thing: you could fire every single federal worker, and it would still be only 4% of the federal budget.
**Where's all the rest of it going?**
If you actually wanted to go after 'waste,' fraud, and abuse, you will go after defense contractors.
But the problem is those are the guys who are making the money off of cuts to Medicaid, Medicare, and Social Security.
The Trump trifecta has taken hold, along with their billionaire donors.
Our movement for working families and everyday people will have to fight harder than ever these next four years.
[Help us continue the fight with a grassroots contribution today.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250521.c6BPaw&refcode=em20250521-8909-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8909%2E2526796%2EpETwXc)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250521.c6BPaw&refcode=em20250521-8909-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=8909%2E2526796%2EpETwXc)**
In solidarity,
Alexandria

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20250521?refcode=em20250521-8909-P_FND_EGR_GRM&t=21&refcode2=8909_2526796_pETwXc&akid=8909%2E2526796%2EpETwXc)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20250521-8909-P_FND_EGR_GRM&t=22&akid=8909%2E2526796%2EpETwXc)**

Peter, Trump and Republicans have promised to make lives better and cheaper for Americans. Instead, here’s what they’ve done:

They’ve threatened to cut Medicaid.
* Medicaid is the backbone of both the American safety net and the American economy. Slashing it by hundreds of billions of dollars is no routine policy disagreement — **it’s an existential threat to the lives and livelihoods of millions.**

They’ve gone after affordable housing.
* Over 9 million Americans rely on federally subsidized housing sustained by the Department of Housing and Urban Development (HUD). **Now, Donald Trump is proposing to _defund_ HUD—the nation’s largest provider of affordable housing—by a staggering 50%.**

They’ve put Social Security on the chopping block.
* Their agenda involves **cutting and privatizing social security, and raising the retirement age.** Meanwhile, Democrats in Congress are fighting to preserve and expand it.

**These attacks on Medicaid, Social Security, and affordable housing are all _direct attacks_ on America.** These attacks go against everything I stand for, and I refuse to let them get away with this.

[Peter, it’s absolutely critical that we stand up and fight back against Donald Trump’s assault on working-class Americans. That’s why I have to ask: Will you chip in $3 or $7 to fuel my people-powered fight for _all of us?_ I can’t do this without you. »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108125252/546925860/-935925420?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20250521_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYmY3MjdhNy04NjM2LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XuOj8ImuUJQasWzOczKH3-UBHwBkm2jeJYkbrkqu18k=) | **[$25,000 MAY GOAL: RUSH $3 TO FIGHT BACK WITH RITCHIE »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108125254/546925862/-935925420?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20250521_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYmY3MjdhNy04NjM2LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XuOj8ImuUJQasWzOczKH3-UBHwBkm2jeJYkbrkqu18k=)**

Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in.

clean_body: As a top supporter, I’m counting on you >> | = Peter, Trump and Republicans have promised to make lives better and cheaper for Americans. Instead, here’s what they’ve done: They’ve threatened to cut Medicaid. Medicaid is the backbone of both the American safety net and the American economy. Slashing it by hundreds of billions of dollars is no routine policy disagreement — it’s an existential threat to the lives and livelihoods of millions. They’ve gone after affordable housing. Over 9 million Americans rely on federally subsidized housing sustained by the Department of Housing and Urban Development (HUD). Now, Donald Trump is proposing to defund HUD—the nation’s largest provider of affordable housing—by a staggering 50%. They’ve put Social Security on the chopping block. Their agenda involves cutting and privatizing social security, and raising the retirement age. Meanwhile, Democrats in Congress are fighting to preserve and expand it. These attacks on Medicaid, Social Security, and affordable housing are all direct attacks on America. These attacks go against everything I stand for, and I refuse to let them get away with this. = | = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = Thank you, Ritchie | | Paid for by Torres For Congress PO Box 580303, Bronx, NY 10458 www.torres.nyc Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in. Peter, please, consider making a =. To make the most powerful lasting impact and to join Ritchie in the fight for progressive values in Congress, make a=.** Click here to . Click here to . | | = =

name: Ben Waldon, Campaign Manager
subject: Introducing myself
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Governor
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q2-g?refcode=X_250521_benwaldonintro_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q2-g?refcode=X_250521_benwaldonintro_act]
Hi folks,
I’m Ben Waldon, Michael Bennet’s Campaign Manager.
With your help, we’re going to elect Michael as Colorado’s next Governor and lead the country by example, making Colorado a model for affordability and opportunity.
A little bit about me: In 2020, I helped flip the U.S. Senate as a core member of the Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee’s leadership team. In 2022, I worked as a Senior Advisor and Interim Campaign Manager for Senator Raphael Warnock’s successful re-election campaign. And last year, I managed Congresswoman Debbie Mucarsel-Powell’s Senatorial Campaign in Florida.
I’ve led high-stakes statewide campaigns, built exceptional teams, and delivered the results we need. And I’m incredibly excited about the opportunity ahead.
Between Michael's experience championing Colorado in the Senate and his promising vision for our state's future, I know we can do this. And while it’s clear we’re living through challenging times, I’m looking forward to the work ahead.
We've been hitting the campaign trail to talk with voters across Colorado and learn more about what they care about most. Michael knows Colorado can provide the vision, leadership, and hope our country needs during these dark and chaotic times, and I’m ready to do everything I can to help elect him.
Working together, right here in Colorado, is where we can most effectively fight Trump’s abhorrent policies and solve the most significant issues facing Coloradans.
Friend, we’ve got a lot of work to do, and we’d love to take it on with you alongside. Please chip in a few bucks to our campaign today to help us hit our May fundraising goal. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q2-g?refcode=X_250521_benwaldonintro_act]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q2-g?refcode=X_250521_benwaldonintro_act]
DONATE MONTHLY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q2-g?refcode=X_250521_benwaldonintro_act&recurring=1]
Excited to be on this team,
Ben Waldon
Campaign Manager

Fellow patriot,

The far left is already targeting 2026. _Why?_ Because they know our Senate majority is what’s standing between America and their radical agenda.

As your U.S. Senator, I’m doing exactly what I promised — **fighting every day** to secure our border, rein in reckless spending, and stop the woke insanity that’s infecting our institutions. But now, they’re gearing up to take me — _and our majority_ — down.

clean_body: We must show strength now. Can you help us hold the line? | Fellow patriot, The far left is already targeting 2026. Why? Because they know our Senate majority is what’s standing between America and their radical agenda. As your U.S. Senator, I’m doing exactly what I promised — fighting every day to secure our border, rein in reckless spending, and stop the woke insanity that’s infecting our institutions. But now, they’re gearing up to take me — and our majority — down. They’ll spend whatever it takes to hand the Senate gavel back to Chuck Schumer. We can’t afford to fall behind. Will you step up before midnight with a contribution of: 👉 👉 👉 👉 👉 Every dollar goes toward defending conservative fighters, holding the line in 2026, and making sure we have the resources to protect our majority and our America First priorities in Washington. I didn’t run for office to make friends in DC. I ran to stand up for working Americans, secure our country, and put our people first. Let’s make sure we can keep doing exactly that — with a Republican Senate majority behind us. Thanks for standing with me. For America, Senator Bernie Moreno FOLLOW BERNIE ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | Paid for by Bernie Moreno for Senate Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go: .

NPR: David Steiner of FedEx is tapped to be the U.S. Postal Service's new leader [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA007/1/89215/images/NPR_PostmasterGeneral.png]
President Donald Trump and the USPS Board of Governors have named former Waste Management CEO David Steiner to lead the Postal Service. Steiner was most recently the lead independent director at FedEx, a USPS competitor.
Brian Renfroe, president of the National Association of Letter Carriers — a union representing nearly 300,000 active and retired letter carriers — called the decision to place Steiner at the head of the USPS " an aggressive step toward handing America's mail system over to corporate interests ."
We want to hear from supporters in your area about this tactic. Will you take our one-click poll right away?
