name: Matthew Davis, LCV
subject: ACT NOW: House Republicans trying to jack up families’ costs and roll back clean energy progress under cover of darkness
body:
To view this mail in a browser, copy https://links.messages.lcv.org/servlet/MailView?ms=MTI1MTE3MzES1&r=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&j=MjIyMDI2NzkzMgS2&mt=1&rt=0 into your browser.
Peter, Just days ago, the House Budget Committee advanced its billionaire polluter tax
scam in the dead of night. The House Rules Committee just did the same thing —
they voted on this same bill at 1am on Wednesday. This isn’t an accident. They’re making decisions under cover of darkness because
they KNOW how cruel, costly, and unpopular this bill is. It would take a
sledgehammer to virtually all federal support for climate and clean energy
investments, driving up energy costs by hundreds of dollars per year for
families across the country. Congress needs to hear from you now, while there’s still time. This bill would
hurt millions of people for the sake of giving tax breaks to billionaires and
polluting corporations. Tell your members of Congress to vote against ANY attempt to gut environmental protections and clean energy incentives. https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/G8bxcKE_maH- Terminating almost all federal clean energy investments will raise electricity
and gas prices for families and businesses and stop our nation’s clean energy
progress in its tracks.But that’s not all, Peter. Here are some other lowlights from this
bill: Selling off our public lands to billionaire polluters damaging our communities, water, and health.Increasing families’ costs by ending clean energy and efficiency programs, rebates and incentives and repealing vehicle efficiency standards.Putting polluting billionaires above the law by creating pay-to-play schemes and other sweetheart deals for oil and gas executives to jam through massive infrastructure projects while sidestepping review, community input, and judicial scrutiny for drilling, pipelines, and methane gas exports.Threatening our health and increasing families’ medical costs by eliminating programs that clean up our schools, dirty diesel trucks and buses, and ports, while cutting funding to help communities track harmful air pollution.Gutting popular clean energy tax credits, which will mean higher electricity costs for struggling families and businesses, tanking the U.S. manufacturing resurgence, and ceding leadership to China. Time and time again we have seen that people, even in districts represented by
Republicans, want to keep the current clean energy initiatives. And they want to
keep public lands in public hands — not turn them over to polluters and real
estate developers. We have the power to make a difference and protect federal clean energy
investments and public lands, but we have to act NOW. Sign the petition and tell your members of Congress not to vote for ANY cuts to clean energy and community safeguards. https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/~ Thank you for taking action. Matthew Davis
Vice President of Federal Policy
League of Conservation Voters This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you,update your contact information https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=12511731&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjIyMDI2NzkzMgS2&spReportId=MjIyMDI2NzkzMgS2.Click here to unsubscribe https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=12511731&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjIyMDI2NzkzMgS2&spReportId=MjIyMDI2NzkzMgS2 from our supporter list.Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback here mailto:feedback@lcv.org?subject=, or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

740 15th St NW, Suite 700
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683 DONATE https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/rNykfEzANmC_

name: Florida Alert
subject: Disgrace
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
It’s the same playbook.
#

What a disgrace.
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-may25.7MLdP7&refcode=em250521-1-b&t=1&akid=10446%2E3935704%2EdWtebZ)
Florida State University recently suffered a shooting that killed two people and injured six. This is FSU’s second shooting.
But when a reporter asked Trump what he’d do to stop more violence, he refused to take action — saying “this has been going on for a long time.”
...
Team, there’s a reason why mass shootings have been going on for a long time: It’s because politicians like him would rather take cues from the NRA than actually get things done.
In fact, his administration is working to roll back all the work we’ve accomplished to reduce gun violence -- and threatening to investigate any state that stands in his way.
[**If Trump and his cronies refuse to act, then we must build a movement to elect leaders who *will.* Please chip in $3 to GIFFORDS PAC today.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-may25.7MLdP7&refcode=em250521-1-b&t=2&akid=10446%2E3935704%2EdWtebZ)

name: LaMonica McIver
subject: I was charged by the Trump administration because I was doing my job
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Shot PAC
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108126006/546928705/-1346133780?refcode=AU_FSP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20250521_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTk2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NjJmZTRiYi04ODM2LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=myW_-1_hrxdHWg3vRrPc6YzG7dBjxLX80E9k_zzXiwg=)
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108126007/546928706/1232407548?refcode=AU_FSP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20250521_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTk2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NjJmZTRiYi04ODM2LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=myW_-1_hrxdHWg3vRrPc6YzG7dBjxLX80E9k_zzXiwg=) Peter, The Trump administration just charged me with crimes for engaging in congressional oversight. This is a first — and it’s a flashing red light for our democracy. I went to an ICE facility in my district to conduct oversight because that is my job and my lawful right as a member of Congress. It’s clear: Trump and his administration don’t want transparency or oversight, and they want to punish any person who dares to speak up. These baseless, politically motivated charges against me make that even more obvious. Peter,

The Trump administration just charged me with crimes for engaging in congressional oversight. This is a first—and it’s a flashing red light for our democracy.

I went to an ICE facility in my district to conduct oversight because that is my job and my lawful right as a member of Congress. It’s clear: Trump and his administration don’t want transparency or oversight, and they want to punish any person who dares to speak up.

These baseless, politically motivated charges against me make that even more obvious. We must stand up together against an administration that weaponizes law enforcement to politically persecute its opponents before it's too late. Democrats stand ready to fight back against the Trump administration’s overreach, and protect democracy and our Constitutional separation of powers.

[We need your help. I’m asking you to split a donation between me and Valerie Foushee so we have the resources to win this battle for our democracy. clean_body: If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | = Peter, The Trump administration just charged me with crimes for engaging in congressional oversight. This is a first—and it’s a flashing red light for our democracy. I went to an ICE facility in my district to conduct oversight because that is my job and my lawful right as a member of Congress. It’s clear: Trump and his administration don’t want transparency or oversight, and they want to punish any person who dares to speak up. These baseless, politically motivated charges against me make that even more obvious. We must stand up together against an administration that weaponizes law enforcement to politically persecute its opponents before it's too late. Democrats stand ready to fight back against the Trump administration’s overreach, and protect democracy and our Constitutional separation of powers. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately, and be split between Valerie Foushee and LaMonica McIver. | = | = | = | = | = | = This is far bigger than just me—the rule of law is at stake. Our democracy as we know it is under threat. = We're in this together, LaMonica * | | | ---|---|--- = Valerie is fighting to protect access to health care, working families, and to reform our criminal justice system. But she needs your help to continue to do this great work in Congress. _“The SAVE Act Could Stop You From Voting”_
_— US News & World Report, March 31, 2025_
[**Rush a donation to All On The Line to help protect free and fair elections from the anti-democracy agenda →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108126235/546929352/-766669670?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_SAVEPassedNOR_email_20250521-AOTL-Tier1-SAVEPassedNOR_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250521-AOTL-Tier1-SAVEPassedNOR_&utm_campaign=SAVEPassedNOR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQwMmZlNGJiLTg4MzYtZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=5jNzAIWHYa9Qk4GtDo-IMQzyu8P87BXE7SElBoor7eo=)
Peter:
**The House of Representatives has passed the SAVE Act** — a blatant attempt to disenfranchise millions of voters by creating overly burdensome proof-of-identity requirements every time you register to vote.
Now we need to stop it from passing the Senate.
As US News & World Report explained: “**Even a driver’s license wouldn’t be enough for most people to register...** The SAVE Act will put everyday Americans’ right to vote at risk.”
Make no mistake: The SAVE Act is one of the biggest threats to voting rights we’ve seen in a generation — and we must do everything we can to prevent it from becoming law.
**We’re mobilizing Americans to contact their lawmakers and demand that they reject this bill. We will continue organizing to defend free and fair elections so we can build a truly representative democracy with fair maps. And grassroots supporters like you power our work.**
[**Can we count on you to make a donation to All On The Line today?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108126236/546929353/-766669670?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_SAVEPassedNOR_email_20250521-AOTL-Tier1-SAVEPassedNOR_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250521-AOTL-Tier1-SAVEPassedNOR_&utm_campaign=SAVEPassedNOR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQwMmZlNGJiLTg4MzYtZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=5jNzAIWHYa9Qk4GtDo-IMQzyu8P87BXE7SElBoor7eo=)

Millions of Americans would struggle to meet the SAVE Act’s paperwork requirements to register to vote, disproportionately affecting military voters, rural voters, tribal citizens, survivors of natural disasters, people of color, and working-class Americans.
**Let’s be clear about what this is about: making it more difficult for certain citizens to vote, all while claiming to address very false claims of widespread voter fraud.**
We need all hands on deck to stop the SAVE Act and push back on voter suppression in all its forms. [**Make a contribution to All On The Line today to help protect our democracy from brazen attacks like the SAVE Act.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108126243/546929360/-766669670?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_SAVEPassedNOR_email_20250521-AOTL-Tier1-SAVEPassedNOR_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250521-AOTL-Tier1-SAVEPassedNOR_&utm_campaign=SAVEPassedNOR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQwMmZlNGJiLTg4MzYtZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=5jNzAIWHYa9Qk4GtDo-IMQzyu8P87BXE7SElBoor7eo=)

clean_body: Contribute to help stop the anti-democracy agenda | “The SAVE Act Could Stop You From Voting” — US News & World Report, March 31, 2025 = Peter: The House of Representatives has passed the SAVE Act — a blatant attempt to disenfranchise millions of voters by creating overly burdensome proof-of-identity requirements every time you register to vote. Now we need to stop it from passing the Senate. As US News & World Report explained: “Even a driver’s license wouldn’t be enough for most people to register... The SAVE Act will put everyday Americans’ right to vote at risk.” Make no mistake: The SAVE Act is one of the biggest threats to voting rights we’ve seen in a generation — and we must do everything we can to prevent it from becoming law. We’re mobilizing Americans to contact their lawmakers and demand that they reject this bill. We will continue organizing to defend free and fair elections so we can build a truly representative democracy with fair maps. And grassroots supporters like you power our work. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Millions of Americans would struggle to meet the SAVE Act’s paperwork requirements to register to vote, disproportionately affecting military voters, rural voters, tribal citizens, survivors of natural disasters, people of color, and working-class Americans. Let’s be clear about what this is about: making it more difficult for certain citizens to vote, all while claiming to address very false claims of widespread voter fraud. We need all hands on deck to stop the SAVE Act and push back on voter suppression in all its forms. = We’ll keep you posted on new developments with the SAVE Act and other key battles. Stay tuned, The All On The Line Team = is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. Support our work to end gerrymandering. Text FAIR to 88228 to receive recurring updates from AOTL by automated text message. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. and | = | PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND. Contributions or gifts to The National Redistricting Action Fund are not tax deductible. 712 H St NE, Suite #25, Washington, DC, 20002 This email was sent to:dpwillis67@gmail.com

name: Congressman Pat Harrigan
subject: What we’ve been up to
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Pat Harrigan Committee
body:
[Top America-First Priorities]

| [](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=4fddff8d0ff64851b152aca9ff83192d&_e=QfoQ_FfgAZ-hemQAw1faX-TpM3fbElFEEmxlxCSM5tysuw3XVIJkEW2lSqefdi9rYXz4CgUOaouQ8mmHwLNGvgY5rlwJ9uJ9iQfGtLBSdOSmvVgropYSqbbtsF6A3hvb5K8kitch1HhjVuT6wVN9Koa0uyL5mWlSkCx4GPUS8APq4UlQyhIwTetdOK3WnlGhkDlk-Ygr4LG-ETrSLNe2xKkKS2cDK-34RX1I_S4akFE8GdMVJih6kSFyffDFfO4aqdgfAJnePfj6DCBWf9x_TIAlMQsNVvavLhzEkwlWAHN8FqbTkgfjQqjvmgTJOIgiP0089wmbJwt7x8sc5_iKfPa5as60RguzpPFsj0dNEWc%3D)
---
Patriot,

**Thank you for standing with me in April -- your support helped us reach our goal and is keeping us on track to: **

**Secure the Border.** We introduced the Financial Intelligence and National Security Act to cut off the illicit money flow funding drug cartels, human trafficking, and narco-terrorism, because if we're serious about securing the border, we have to follow the money.

| [**Support Border Security**](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=4fddff8d0ff64851b152aca9ff83192d&_e=QfoQ_FfgAZ-hemQAw1faX-TpM3fbElFEEmxlxCSM5tysuw3XVIJkEW2lSqefdi9rYXz4CgUOaouQ8mmHwLNGvgY5rlwJ9uJ9iQfGtLBSdOSmvVgropYSqbbtsF6A3hvb5K8kitch1HhjVuT6wVN9KiM1-jkxp1V3ooisUOs4eUiJhqolN6UzVedXh8kM8zpU8Uri_XAHuaPqmylF-9cm75tmOKrNKp3WD9gtXhyzn3XvTYXtZp18yja5hgcaz8IGwVs-S0H9zFpVULI9RDNI7stD8JBlJ9eSnX9gX5scAxH2VSWm_i5q3lbJX1WmeBMM9rA79kv8Wj07YCiAOC1W1_yVj2Dyp3Cca3iVTTG-Qmg%3D)
---

**Protect National Security.** We're backing the bold leadership of Secretary Driscoll and General George in transforming our Army, cutting waste, and reinvesting it into the future force we need to deter and defeat China and reestablish America as the world's leading superpower.

[**Support National Security**](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=4fddff8d0ff64851b152aca9ff83192d&_e=QfoQ_FfgAZ-hemQAw1faX-TpM3fbElFEEmxlxCSM5tysuw3XVIJkEW2lSqefdi9rYXz4CgUOaouQ8mmHwLNGvgY5rlwJ9uJ9iQfGtLBSdOSmvVgropYSqbbtsF6A3hvb5K8kitch1HhjVuT6wVN9KiM1-jkxp1V3ooisUOs4eUiJhqolN6UzVedXh8kM8zpUrIvAcgy4vSPKUwnZTCkw7UvUoVS8tHUTlinoVQcch_SE0zlN3oJ8dGIFthp0M0DSSZvbHhUMdfMyq7dTPSSc-JIMDdphC8oxHKZmNY6_M9xumXsWBSzY3JPwMMghq2vOn-OuerobVxpweQDL5fYq1DBEk9xC_-rebbHn8VOj-W0%3D)
---

**Restore integrity and sanity in our election system.** We've passed the SAVE Act and the No Rogue Rulings Act, two critical steps to restore integrity and sanity in our system. Proof of citizenship to vote isn't controversial, it's common sense, and it's Constitutional. And one unelected activist judge shouldn't be able to override the will of the American people. If you need an ID to buy cold medicine, you should need one to vote.

[**Support Election Integrity**](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=4fddff8d0ff64851b152aca9ff83192d&_e=QfoQ_FfgAZ-hemQAw1faX-TpM3fbElFEEmxlxCSM5tysuw3XVIJkEW2lSqefdi9rYXz4CgUOaouQ8mmHwLNGvgY5rlwJ9uJ9iQfGtLBSdOSmvVgropYSqbbtsF6A3hvb5K8kitch1HhjVuT6wVN9KiM1-jkxp1V3ooisUOs4eUiJhqolN6UzVedXh8kM8zpUYrcUqlkH4OEDppr1aSD9eG2TZr9bVlR6NbJmEpSuk9zjwwnXdVWjEtsryUwg3o8mt1qr0KZecbOUt7ygCRKciegYYNp2fF12IrCnTQLemmk9ZOHXBqNKcAT7-kQbhwh3WhK0vWfg1TBNzMR-w0nIFOivkwHsKHi5roQHVO4crS4%3D)

This is what America First looks like. We're just getting started.

Thank you,

[](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=4fddff8d0ff64851b152aca9ff83192d&_e=QfoQ_FfgAZ-hemQAw1faX-TpM3fbElFEEmxlxCSM5tysuw3XVIJkEW2lSqefdi9rYXz4CgUOaouQ8mmHwLNGvgY5rlwJ9uJ9iQfGtLBSdOSmvVgropYSqbbtsF6A3hvb5K8kitch1HhjVuT6wVN9Koa0uyL5mWlSkCx4GPUS8APq4UlQyhIwTetdOK3WnlGhgVCTW0JdwoxHwDhB5lDV4YuwZcyRTx9GtJEx7bnvmE9yetlYzBHjp7a7P13z9q5tNwZYSR2VvXTePtb7RrWmJY18HEL_QQ5xwtUNqsQK5UWgFNrjP_-M8iiEz9VAIc8xb2qe6WfoMaI5tl_Hr0Y0D9WmkfItpAqrnmFjP--e96o%3D)

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: 📎 Sharing my healthcare affordability agenda with Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Governor
body:
It's time Virginians had a Governor who doesn't just talk about the high cost of healthcare, but actually puts in the work to lower costs.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108126594/546930465/-735451259?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-05-21_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmY1NTg0YmEtOGEzNi1mMDExLWE1ZjEtNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=vzSoAFRd_lAYkvxIgRy5DFJB-_rQOwDBWtLtDmeA-B4=)
---
| Peter, wherever I go in our Commonwealth, people tell me they're getting squeezed — in the checkout line, when they pay their mortgage, and at the grocery counter.

**That's why, today, I am rolling out a straightforward agenda to make healthcare more affordable.**
* We will crack down on the middlemen, PBMs, responsible for inflating the cost of prescription drugs.

* We will enforce price transparency.

* We will expand access to quality care in rural and underserved communities.

* We will stop predatory medical billing.

* And we won't let primary care, maternal care, or behavioral care take a back seat.

It's time Virginians had a Governor who doesn't just talk about the high cost of living, but actually puts in the work.

[_**Now, if you're with me, I'm asking you to endorse my healthcare agenda today:**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108126595/546930466/1710905615?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmY1NTg0YmEtOGEzNi1mMDExLWE1ZjEtNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=vzSoAFRd_lAYkvxIgRy5DFJB-_rQOwDBWtLtDmeA-B4=&emci=625584ba-8a36-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=6f5584ba-8a36-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=8470899)

clean_body: It's time Virginians had a Governor who doesn't just talk about the high cost of healthcare, but actually puts in the work to lower costs. | = | Peter, wherever I go in our Commonwealth, people tell me they're getting squeezed — in the checkout line, when they pay their mortgage, and at the grocery counter. That's why, today, I am rolling out a straightforward agenda to make healthcare more affordable. We will crack down on the middlemen, PBMs, responsible for inflating the cost of prescription drugs. We will enforce price transparency. We will expand access to quality care in rural and underserved communities. We will stop predatory medical billing. And we won't let primary care, maternal care, or behavioral care take a back seat. It's time Virginians had a Governor who doesn't just talk about the high cost of living, but actually puts in the work. | More soon, Abigail Spanberger | | Paid for by Spanberger for Governor Spanberger for Governor P.O. Box 3121 Glen Allen, VA 23058 United States | = =

body:
Senate Dems need you in this fight!
| **FIRST: Bernie Sanders launched his Fighting Oligarchy tour!

THEN: Cory Booker made HISTORY with his 25 hour speech on the Senate floor!

_NOW: Adam Schiff is SLAMMING Trump and his MAGA mob for putting billionaires over the American people! ⬇️_** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90305?t=6&akid=19910%2E878179%2Edxvt8h) [**We need 2,000 supporters reading this to join the fight and THANK Senate Democrats like Sanders, Booker, and Schiff for always having our backs! You’ve been hand-selected »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90306?t=7&akid=19910%2E878179%2Edxvt8h) | [**THANK SENATE DEMOCRATS: DONATE $3 TO SIGN »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90306?t=8&akid=19910%2E878179%2Edxvt8h)
---
TO: Senator Cory Booker
FROM: A proud supporter
Subject: THANK YOU! Dear Senate Democrats,

**THANK YOU for leading the charge against Donald Trump and his MAGA minions as they attack our democracy!**

I know that Trump has put a huge target on your backs — so it means the world that you aren’t backing down even a little bit.

**_Our work is far from over:_ Republicans are plotting to END Social Security and Medicaid, DESTROY the federal government, and make Trump an untouchable KING.**

As a proud Democrat, you have my word that I will join your fight and do _everything_ I can to help take back the Senate and stop this dangerous administration.

[**So I'm signing this letter and donating $3 to the Voter Protection Project to show that I stand with you, and to THANK YOU for putting it all on the line to save our country! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90306?t=9&akid=19910%2E878179%2Edxvt8h) | [**RUSH $3 TO SIGN ON BEFORE WE CLOSE THIS LETTER AT MIDNIGHT »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90306?t=10&akid=19910%2E878179%2Edxvt8h)
---
**_X A proud Democrat_**
\- The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=19910%2E878179%2Edxvt8h). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=19910%2E878179%2Edxvt8h).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=19910%2E878179%2Edxvt8h) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=11&akid=19910%2E878179%2Edxvt8h). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=19910%2E878179%2Edxvt8h)

---
_Let me share a few reasons why this time will be different:_

**FIRST** , during my first run for Senate, I was a longtime Congressman with little to no name ID. This cycle, I will be entering the race as an established candidate who earned the support of nearly 2.7 million Michiganders.

**SECOND** , President Trump's victory in my state was a watershed moment. Michigan was long seen as a key pillar to the “blue wall” – in other words, a state that consistently votes Democratic. We’re entering the midterms with an entirely different landscape.

**THIRD** , the Democrats are already running with their tail between their legs. Gary Peters, our incumbent Senator, decided he would rather quit his job than face me in a race he was sure he would lose.
---
[ **HELP MIKE WIN** ](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=5cd1f870f80f4bd2a503bca7c037e432&_e=vzZQp8isyjuHDUQTZUAyU2yze8eMoy74oczIs6dDtG_dgv25kHUgYAgD1Bkd-rAds_Nd43g4vSGEobVePhIXs-q1ybOklqvDOxF1tumxDpja_WS3CKCIMj2tFEgmOKbSo8NTUORYRoiiipPymIeHPzPJSIqB-4fHiZgpbJSSJZ5WYHF7N7j62sF05WoBEtN4UsSMbwZBdUyarBle4a_E-4Qo6X43eRmOHtFjn4QVICnH9FUG9QBEGgm0fIPRScPet3JAAvgvD7SvTQ_4y-dtA1Ll8z6ErYoVGz1Z5UMjovK8_mcZIBv_iMwN98qLvOtn2I4iK2QTGPvDkjDeME65Jr339p1ffgADmdHZ_4s5gDOU3ibilhKSti0AAej0042Xym4U1t-znDyniFaa16axYOcfpLNq22FL5ZBZpRo_u97juWhLnlcYXGBfqLWAcoTcmpS2LlHD9DHmBtAJIn8j6OlYGiidJvps2MnM4eb5zTbUdSrf05gFmfeCwZqGWo3T)

If I’m going to win, I will need a top-notch team by my side and it would mean the world if you would join me. I’m ready to get to work on day one and be a man you will be proud to call Michigan's next Senator.

_**[To help prepare me for victory, I’m calling on every patriot reading this email to rush in my average donation of $17.50 or more right now. name: Team Haley
subject: re: DOGE's access to our personal data
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
null, will you speak out about Elon Musk by midnight?

null, will you speak out about Elon Musk by midnight?
| | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/2744?t=1&akid=162%2E49239%2E9EoYnE)
---
| | **TRUMP HAS GIVEN ELON MUSK ACCESS TO THE AMERICAN PEOPLE’S PERSONAL DATA**
---
We need YOU to speak out NOW about this gross violation of privacy. We're looking for another 27 responses to our live poll before midnight – including yours – so tell us immediately:
---
**Should DOGE have access to our personal data?**
---
| | | [YES](http://act.haleyformi.com/go/2748?email=&zip=&t=2&akid=162%2E49239%2E9EoYnE)
---
| [NO](http://act.haleyformi.com/go/2748?email=&zip=&t=3&akid=162%2E49239%2E9EoYnE)
---
Social Security numbers. Bank account information. Addresses. Citizenship status.

null, this is the kind of personal, sensitive data that Trump has handed over to the richest man in the world. And no one knows for sure what Elon Musk and his DOGE team plan to do with it.
Democrat Haley Stevens introduced a bill in the House to _block_ Elon Musk’s access to our private financial data. But as she fights to stop Trump and Musk from inflicting even more chaos and harm on everyday Americans, she needs to know if people like you are standing with her.
**That's why we're counting on 27 more responses from Cresco****before our live poll closes at midnight, and we're still waiting on yours, null****. Speak out right now:**
**Should DOGE have access to our
personal data?**
| | | [YES](http://act.haleyformi.com/go/2748?email=&zip=&t=4&akid=162%2E49239%2E9EoYnE)
---
| [NO](http://act.haleyformi.com/go/2748?email=&zip=&t=5&akid=162%2E49239%2E9EoYnE)
---
Thank you,

Team Haley
| |
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you chip in now to keep Michigan blue and take back the Senate for Democrats?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/2746?t=6&akid=162%2E49239%2E9EoYnE) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/2746?t=7&akid=162%2E49239%2E9EoYnE)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley

name: Adam Schiff
subject: We need to send Chris Pappas to the Senate
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=8601%2E5257348%2EbMrv1D ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Hi Derek,

If we want to flip the Senate from red to blue, we need to hold on to the
most competitive seats in the country.

That includes New Hampshire.

With incumbent Senator Jeanne Shaheen retiring, we need to make sure New
Hampshire has a strong candidate with a proven record of success running
for office.

That’s why I’m supporting Chris Pappas for the U.S. Senate.

I served alongside Chris in the House of Representatives and helped him
every step of the way. He won one of the toughest seats in the country in
2018 and has held that seat since (he even defeated Trump’s current press
secretary, Karoline Leavitt, for which we are indebted to Chris — imagine
her in Congress...).

Throughout his time in the House, Chris has never lost sight of what’s
most important: lowering costs, fighting for veterans’ benefits, taking on
Big Pharma, and making life easier for hardworking Americans.

We need Democrats in the Senate who will keep up these fights and take on
the Trump administration. That’s Chris Pappas.

Look, Chris’s race won’t be easy. Republicans have long been eyeing New
Hampshire as a pick-up opportunity, and GOP leaders like Mitch McConnell
and John Thune would love to flip this seat.

We can’t give them that satisfaction. That’s why we need to support Chris.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=abs-em-pappas25.90nCIT&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20250521_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=10&t=1004&akid=8601%2E5257348%2EbMrv1D ]Derek,
let’s make sure we send Chris to
represent New Hampshire in the United States Senate. Will you split
$10
between our campaigns today to help elect Chris and flip the Senate
majority?

name: Fair Fight Action
subject: The SAVE Act’s agenda doesn't stop on the federal level
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FAIR FIGHT ACTION
body:
The SAVE Act is evolving, and we need to be prepared for ALL attacks on voting freedom. |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108126889/546931730/1793776944?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20250521_f_SAVEReactivation_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjM2JlNTA3YS04YzM2LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=43PFS48nGWoaZ5P8HrNrBh2s7TcBxQ3LKeYcZKuEBcc=&emci=389cee67-8336-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=c3be507a-8c36-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=1037277)

| | Hey there, In the last year, we’ve seen the alarming evolution of a mass disenfranchisement bill known as the SAVE Act. Here’s an overview: **May 2024:** Rep. Chip Roy (R-TX) introduced the Safeguard American Voter Eligibility (SAVE) Act to the House of Representatives. ⏬⏬⏬ **July 2024:** It passed in the House for the first time. ⏬⏬⏬ **January 2025:** Texas Rep. Chip Roy reintroduced the SAVE Act in the House of Representatives, with Donald Trump eager to sign it into law. ⏬⏬⏬ **April 2025:** The SAVE Act passed the House of Representatives again. **Now, in May 2025, we’re seeing new movement on the SAVE Act.** On Tuesday afternoon, Senator Mike Lee requested unanimous consent on the Senate floor to fast-track the SAVE ACT — a blatant effort to advance legislation that has the potential to disenfranchise millions of Americans, _without hearing any arguments or concerns against it._ But Senator Alex Padilla objected to Lee's request, and when even just one senator objects, unanimous consent fails. **So as of now, the SAVE Act is still pending in the Senate, and it could come forward again at any moment. ** It’s clear: The attacks on fair and free elections are here to stay. We have to be ready for the SAVE Act’s supporters to try to ram it through as swiftly as possible. And we know that anti-voter extremists will keep attacking our basic freedoms. **That’s why we’re continuing to build our volunteer base. Whether they’re helping with on-the-ground outreach, making calls, or conducting research, our volunteers are crucial to our work. ** [**Sign up here to become a standing volunteer for Fair Fight Action, and share the type of work you might be interested in doing.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108126893/546931734/-955909?source=bsc_emm_ffa_20250521_f_SAVEReactivation_v1s1&refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20250521_f_SAVEReactivation_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjM2JlNTA3YS04YzM2LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=43PFS48nGWoaZ5P8HrNrBh2s7TcBxQ3LKeYcZKuEBcc=&emci=389cee67-8336-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=c3be507a-8c36-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=1037277) | [SIGN UP TO VOLUNTEER](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108126897/546931738/-955909?source=bsc_emm_ffa_20250521_f_SAVEReactivation_v1s1&refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20250521_f_SAVEReactivation_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjM2JlNTA3YS04YzM2LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=43PFS48nGWoaZ5P8HrNrBh2s7TcBxQ3LKeYcZKuEBcc=&emci=389cee67-8336-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=c3be507a-8c36-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=1037277)
---
We’re calling the SAVE Act what it is: an attempt to legalize voter suppression. And although the SAVE Act hasn’t been passed in the Senate yet, states across the country have had bills similar to the SAVE Act introduced on the state level.
**In Wyoming,** a bill would require anyone registering to vote to present documentary proof of U.S. citizenship.
**In Texas,** legislation would create proof of citizenship requirements for both new voter registration applicants and existing registered voters. It would even create new criminal penalties for election officials if an error is made during the citizen verification process.
**In Ohio,** different bills would require documentary proof of citizenship and ban ballot drop boxes. One of the bills would require everyone to vote via provisional ballot until their citizenship is verified, and mandates that those who are forced to vote provisionally for ANY reason and fail to follow up “timely” with accepted documentation would have their voter registration automatically CANCELED.
So you see friend, the agenda behind the SAVE Act is making its rounds on the state AND federal level. **What we’re seeing is a coordinated effort to strip our democracy apart and take away our freedom to vote. **
**That’s why it’s so important that we are in a position to fight back — with volunteers on standby, ready to jump into the action at any moment. **
[**Click here to sign up to become a volunteer with us. You can let us know about your preferred volunteer role!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108126901/546931742/-955909?source=bsc_emm_ffa_20250521_f_SAVEReactivation_v1s1&refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20250521_f_SAVEReactivation_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjM2JlNTA3YS04YzM2LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=43PFS48nGWoaZ5P8HrNrBh2s7TcBxQ3LKeYcZKuEBcc=&emci=389cee67-8336-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=c3be507a-8c36-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=1037277)
**If you’re unable to become a volunteer right now, there are other ways to pitch in![You can still help strengthen Fair Fight Action’s democracy-defense work by making a donation of $30 or whatever you can.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108126905/546931746/-814816234?amount=30&refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20250521_f_SAVEReactivation_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjM2JlNTA3YS04YzM2LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=43PFS48nGWoaZ5P8HrNrBh2s7TcBxQ3LKeYcZKuEBcc=)**

Chip Roy (R-TX) introduced the Safeguard American Voter Eligibility (SAVE) Act to the House of Representatives. ⏬⏬⏬ July 2024: It passed in the House for the first time. ⏬⏬⏬ January 2025: Texas Rep. Chip Roy reintroduced the SAVE Act in the House of Representatives, with Donald Trump eager to sign it into law. ⏬⏬⏬ April 2025: The SAVE Act passed the House of Representatives again. Now, in May 2025, we’re seeing new movement on the SAVE Act. On Tuesday afternoon, Senator Mike Lee requested unanimous consent on the Senate floor to fast-track the SAVE ACT — a blatant effort to advance legislation that has the potential to disenfranchise millions of Americans, without hearing any arguments or concerns against it. But Senator Alex Padilla objected to Lee's request, and when even just one senator objects, unanimous consent fails. So as of now, the SAVE Act is still pending in the Senate, and it could come forward again at any moment. It’s clear: The attacks on fair and free elections are here to stay. We have to be ready for the SAVE Act’s supporters to try to ram it through as swiftly as possible. And we know that anti-voter extremists will keep attacking our basic freedoms. That’s why we’re continuing to build our volunteer base. Whether they’re helping with on-the-ground outreach, making calls, or conducting research, our volunteers are crucial to our work. | We’re calling the SAVE Act what it is: an attempt to legalize voter suppression. And although the SAVE Act hasn’t been passed in the Senate yet, states across the country have had bills similar to the SAVE Act introduced on the state level. In Wyoming, a bill would require anyone registering to vote to present documentary proof of U.S. citizenship. In Texas, legislation would create proof of citizenship requirements for both new voter registration applicants and existing registered voters. It would even create new criminal penalties for election officials if an error is made during the citizen verification process. In Ohio, different bills would require documentary proof of citizenship and ban ballot drop boxes. One of the bills would require everyone to vote via provisional ballot until their citizenship is verified, and mandates that those who are forced to vote provisionally for ANY reason and fail to follow up “timely” with accepted documentation would have their voter registration automatically CANCELED. So you see friend, the agenda behind the SAVE Act is making its rounds on the state AND federal level. What we’re seeing is a coordinated effort to strip our democracy apart and take away our freedom to vote. That’s why it’s so important that we are in a position to fight back — with volunteers on standby, ready to jump into the action at any moment. If you’re unable to become a volunteer right now, there are other ways to pitch in = = Thank you for everything you do — together, The Fair Fight Action Team = | * 1270 Caroline Street | Suite D120-430 | Atlanta, GA 30307 ©2025 Fair Fight Action - All rights reserved. Emails like this one are the best way to communicate updates with voting rights activists like you. Thank you for being in the fight to ensure access to democracy for all. If you would like to receive fewer emails from us, please click . If you would like to no longer receive emails, please . | | PAID FOR BY FAIR FIGHT ACTION

name: Sara Jacobs
subject: Republicans want to gut Medicaid by the weekend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
Friends — this week we are in an all-out fight to protect critical programs from devastating budget cuts.
Late Sunday night, my Republican colleagues narrowly passed their 1,100+ page disaster of a budget bill through committee, and Speaker Mike Johnson is pushing for a full vote on it before Memorial Day — with the hopes that Americans will be too busy enjoying their long weekend to notice.
There’s a reason House Republicans are debating this bill in the middle of the night, avoiding their constituents, and being shady about what’s included – it’s a morally bankrupt bill, plain and simple.
Here’s some of what’s in it:
* $625 billion in cuts to Medicaid, which millions of Americans rely on for health insurance.
* $300 billion in cuts to SNAP, the nutrition assistance program that helps feed children and families all over the country.
* Trillions of dollars in tax breaks to billionaires and massive corporations at the expense of these critical programs.
Those numbers may sound abstract, so let’s be clear about what passing the bill and implementing these cuts would do:
→ Medicaid provides health care for 1 in 4 Americans – including 40% of all U.S. children and 80% of children living in poverty. In San Diego County, that’s 1 in 6 people. Without it, more people will have to rely on emergency services to get the care they need, paying more and further straining our hospitals.
→ SNAP helps more than 40 million Americans afford fresh produce and groceries — families with kids, seniors, and people with disabilities. Without it, more kids will go hungry, and businesses that accept SNAP benefits will be impacted too.
The cuts would hit children, seniors, and people with disabilities hardest. They’d shutter hospitals. Raise premiums. And experts say they could cause over 21,000 avoidable deaths.
And I can tell you this — plenty of the people who will be devastated by these cuts are represented by Republicans in Congress. So why is the GOP gutting essential programs their own constituents rely on?
Because Donald Trump promised his ultra-wealthy donors and corporate CEO pals massive tax breaks. And now, House Republicans are doing his bidding, no matter how cruel (or deeply unpopular) these cuts are across the country and even in their own districts.
I’m going to do everything I can to stop this budget from going through, but it could be brought to the floor as soon as today , and I need your help to build momentum against it.
Will you add your name right now to stand against the GOP’s dangerous budget bill? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/b7_Kwq47zUiG5M8W8uF1cQ2]
SIGN THE PETITION [https://secure.ngpvan.com/b7_Kwq47zUiG5M8W8uF1cQ2]
Then, forward this email to three friends who’ll speak out too. The more public outrage we build, the harder it will be for Republicans to jam this through quietly.
This budget is a cruel strategy just to make the rich richer, and I won’t stop fighting it.
-Sara
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
Congresswoman Sara Jacobs
California’s 51st District

name: Katie Porter (CA-GOV candidate)
subject: this race is wide open
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=39744%2E3422442%2E132c6H)
Dear Derek,
Gavin Newsom is termed out in 2026, which means that California will have to elect someone new as governor next year.
**[I’m running to bring fresh blood and new ideas to our state government. Will you support my campaign with a $5 donation today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250521_1_ak?refcode=em20250521-39744&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39744_3422442_132c6H&akid=39744%2E3422442%2E132c6H)**
California’s next governor will have to take on big challenges, including a decades-long housing crisis and federal attacks on our health care. She will not only have to take action to bring down the cost of living; she’ll also have to go toe-to-toe with a hostile White House to defend our state.
**California needs a fighter, and I have a track record of taking on the Trump administration to deliver for Californians.** In the early days of the pandemic, when we had few tools to address the crisis, it was my questioning of Trump’s CDC official that secured free COVID testing for all Americans regardless of insurance.
Next year, Californians will face a choice of who can best represent them in Sacramento and in the national conversation. With our incumbent governor termed out, _this race is wide open._
**[Can you chip in $5, so I have the resources to tell voters about my record getting things done for Californians and fighting to make life easier for working people?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250521_1_ak?refcode=em20250521-39744&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39744_3422442_132c6H&akid=39744%2E3422442%2E132c6H)**
Thanks,
Katie

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20250521-39744&amounts=&t=3&refcode2=39744_3422442_132c6H&akid=39744%2E3422442%2E132c6H)**
---

* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4g-emails?source=39744&t=4&akid=39744%2E3422442%2E132c6H)

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4g-unsubscribe?source=39744&t=5&akid=39744%2E3422442%2E132c6H)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Governor 2026
PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108127083/546932226/1487347718?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.05.21_Maggie-Hassan-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Y2U1OWUzMy04ZDM2LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sQL_Z4Hr-1umdHkx9WiavO-UthvWehQqD5lNbn3MSxY=) It’s Maggie Hassan with an important update:

In case you missed it, yesterday I went head to head with Kristi Noem in a Senate hearing.

When I asked Noem, Donald Trump’s Secretary of Homeland Security, to define habeas corpus — a basic legal principle — **she couldn’t.**

Let me make this clear: Habeas corpus isn’t just a Latin phrase — it’s a critical protection that requires the government to bring someone they are detaining before a court and explain the legal basis for arresting them.

**Right now, it’s a fundamental freedom that the Trump administration is considering stripping away.**

We MUST band together to stand up for the rule of law and oppose the Trump administration’s unconstitutional actions.

We MUST band together to stand up for the rule of law and oppose the Trump administration’s unconstitutional actions. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Maggie Hassan and Kirsten Gillibrand will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = With every good wish, Maggie Hassan * = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I am truly honored to have won reelection, and I promise to continue the critical work toward bipartisan solutions for New Yorkers as we enter this new term. While we had many victories in New York this election season, our fight to retake control of the Senate is far from over. = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

name: Rep. LaMonica McIver
subject: The Trump administration is going after me
body:
|
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108127353/546933244/81501546?refcode=WUEFH555_20250521_McIverSplit_ALL_v1s2&sourceid=1056211&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NmU3OGI4OS04ZTM2LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VOWmuGq9NpV0_qpXjKv73LnkzFL8Jt58qR1NeAW3zFE=) Peter,

The Trump administration is trying to prosecute me for doing my job and engaging in congressional oversight. This is a first — and it's a flashing red light for our democracy.

[**We need your help, Peter. I'm asking you to split a donation between me and EMILYs List, so we have the resources to win this battle for our democracy.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108127356/546933247/81501546?refcode=WUEFH555_20250521_McIverSplit_ALL_v1s2&sourceid=1056211&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NmU3OGI4OS04ZTM2LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VOWmuGq9NpV0_qpXjKv73LnkzFL8Jt58qR1NeAW3zFE=) | [FIGHT BACK](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108127359/546933250/81501546?refcode=WUEFH555_20250521_McIverSplit_ALL_v1s2&sourceid=1056211&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NmU3OGI4OS04ZTM2LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VOWmuGq9NpV0_qpXjKv73LnkzFL8Jt58qR1NeAW3zFE=)
---
I went to an ICE facility in my district for an oversight visit, as is my lawful right as a member of Congress. It's clear: _**Trump and his administration don't want transparency or accountability, and they want to punish any person who dares to speak up.**_

These baseless, politically motivated charges against me make that even more obvious. We must stand up together against an administration that weaponizes law enforcement to persecute its opponents before it's too late. Democrats stand ready to fight back against the Trump administration's overreach, and protect democracy and our Constitutional separation of powers.

This is far bigger than just me — the rule of law is at stake. Our democracy as we know it is under threat.

[**To ensure everyone who dares to speak truth to power is safe from political persecution, we must make as much noise and as big an impact as possible. clean_body: | = Peter, The Trump administration is trying to prosecute me for doing my job and engaging in congressional oversight. This is a first — and it's a flashing red light for our democracy. = | = I went to an ICE facility in my district for an oversight visit, as is my lawful right as a member of Congress. It's clear: Trump and his administration don't want transparency or accountability, and they want to punish any person who dares to speak up. These baseless, politically motivated charges against me make that even more obvious. We must stand up together against an administration that weaponizes law enforcement to persecute its opponents before it's too late. Democrats stand ready to fight back against the Trump administration's overreach, and protect democracy and our Constitutional separation of powers. This is far bigger than just me — the rule of law is at stake. Our democracy as we know it is under threat. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = We're in this together, LaMonica McIver (NJ-10) = = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. Josh Hammer is Senior Council at the Article III Project. Today he joins the show to discuss the judicial activism taking place within state and local jurisdictions. These Obama and Biden-era appointed judges are overstepping their reach and power to try and prevent the mandate the American people gave President Trump to fulfill. Judge Hannah Dugan literally tried to prevent ICE from arresting an illegal alien at her court for domestic abuse charges. Judge James Boasberg is demanding Kilmar Abrego Garcia, a citizen of El Salvador, to be returned to the U.S. Judge Amir Ali, a Biden appointee, has served in federal court for around 6 months and is already trying to reverse USAID payments that have been blocked by the Trump administration. Josh Hammer gives us expert insight on previous cases and how they were adjudicated. When looking at the Supreme Court, the Martin-Quinn score shows a liberal/conservative ideology scale in which our current Supreme Court judges rule. Even though 5 out of the 9 judges tend to judge in a Conservative fashion, Clarence Thomas is still the gold standard of Supreme Court judges.

name: Team Benson
subject: The corruption is coming from inside the White House
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR GOVERNOR
body:
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/203?t=1&akid=330%2E181023%2EiZYGaX)
Team,
It’s been about one month since Trump called for a sham investigation into ActBlue, the most significant vehicle that Democratic candidates and nonprofit organizations use to raise money from supporters across the country.
**Surprise, surprise — no corruption or wrongdoing has been found whatsoever.**
Let’s be honest: Trump’s investigation into ActBlue was _always_ about silencing Democratic grassroots donors and giving his billionaire friends more power. But if he’s really interested in investigating corruption, we would be happy to point him in the right direction.
He should start with himself. Trump hasn’t been back in office for long, but his White House has already made its mark as one of the most corrupt administrations we’ve ever seen.
In the past few months alone, he’s:
→ Accepted a $400 million plane from Qatar, which is a blatant violation of the Constitution.
→ Supported legislation that would benefit his “meme coin” and enrich himself and his family.
→ Allowed Elon Musk to dismantle key parts of our federal government while receiving billions of dollars in government contracts. In return, Elon has pledged to donate $100 million to Trump’s political operation.
That doesn’t even cover _half of it_ , and his corruption is only growing by the day. That’s why Michigan deserves a leader like Jocelyn, who’s running for governor to stand up to bullies and billionaires, fight corruption, and make government work for every Michigander.
**[If you agree that Michigan deserves a leader who fights for everyone — not just the wealthy and well-connected — add your name to our petition today →](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/signup/2505-actblue-petition?refcode=AU_JMB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250521_PM1_V1_S1&email=&akid=330%2E181023%2EiZYGaX)**
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/signup/2505-actblue-petition?refcode=AU_JMB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250521_PM1_V1_S1&email=&akid=330%2E181023%2EiZYGaX)**
Thank you!
— Team Benson
**[DONATE](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/1872?refcode=AU_JMB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250521_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=2&akid=330%2E181023%2EiZYGaX)**

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails-jbmi/?t=3&akid=330%2E181023%2EiZYGaX)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/signup/update-your-information-jbmi/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-jbmi/?t=4&akid=330%2E181023%2EiZYGaX)

23133 Woodward Ave, Number 116,
Ferndale, MI 48220

Democracy depends on ordinary people standing up and speaking out, and right now, that’s more urgent than ever. name: Wiley Nickel HQ
subject: No Kings!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wiley Nickel for North Carolina
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wiley-em-26fund [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wiley-em-26fund]
Peter —

Wiley has been hot on the campaign trail with energy and purpose. So we wanted to update you on one of his many stops across North Carolina.

On a bright day in Greensboro, Wiley stood shoulder to shoulder with thousands of dedicated community members at the 50501 No Kings! rally to defend our rights and freedoms. The streets of downtown Greensboro were overflowing with activists, community leaders, small business owners, educators, caretakers, and more with signs that said “Stand up, fight back, resist,” and “No kings.” These messages are a powerful rebuke to the Trump administration’s policies that threaten our democracy.

[https://lh7-rt.googleusercontent.com/docsz/AD_4nXc9KDVr0YFehF-Axx2mLOUobfJZcDpnqPmEG_Gps2-nEffnh7sk7llczlRgqhPtQRGZK9MnTkhhcI2I2YF9tavy-EKKptyR6m5bgi-OQep59F5mToYYkWnrt5ADATgvKws?key=k5XXLcrC5V6XLCE0i37Qgw] [https://lh7-rt.googleusercontent.com/docsz/AD_4nXfqmX1zl-QerFnQoFwDSx4ldfnnPfzhCgtpS8psnSJ2sEPbNhgJcCcjZomRrCvtORc84p3qdfrUz9pPpf3fG1AVl66AohN1-znjgHCGigxU5XLso-LyHLAxQb9wXYjJO1M?key=k5XXLcrC5V6XLCE0i37Qgw]

Wiley was deeply moved by the personal stories shared during the rally, especially those focusing on safeguarding essential programs like Social Security and our national parks from harmful cuts. These narratives underscored the necessity of holding our leaders accountable.

The event also fostered community connections. Participants donated children's books, planting seeds of empowerment and encouraging future generations to learn and grow. As the event wrapped up, attendees signed up to volunteer and continue the fighting for fairness and transparency.

[https://lh7-rt.googleusercontent.com/docsz/AD_4nXeLngRpxZrhggX7pnoiPTYw7bctrFBhKMq_0KGF7nWeqdWMAAws0o2dBJxI5LT7_Rb2T23e1UeHlmqjzur17ZwXA2UA6-hsxIzQDtL56AUTpYD01S2gNrVRYPuz866cVQg?key=k5XXLcrC5V6XLCE0i37Qgw] [https://lh7-rt.googleusercontent.com/docsz/AD_4nXeCiJlFOoEm9TFzv6hMZ8xw4cyr9Jq2-1GkNFsMqoaf33MAKMF1X2o3wybJyMnukkbWpPYHpYjZP30_UfPo6t9LRbvZ9YgmtXkeoxIqtY91GqFhz6nK2oAOcrQFg7haBYk?key=k5XXLcrC5V6XLCE0i37Qgw]

The rally was a glimpse of the future we're fighting for — and your continued support will help us build it.

Together, we can ensure that the values celebrated at the rally spreads throughout our state and across the country.

— Wiley Nickel HQ

United States

name: LaMonica McIver
subject: I was charged by the Trump administration because I was doing my job
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
The Trump administration is going after me.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250521-1&t=1&akid=2160%2E587540%2EzpMBqm)
Peter,
The Trump administration just charged me with crimes for engaging in congressional oversight. This is a first—and it’s a flashing red light for our democracy.
I went to an ICE facility in my district to conduct oversight because that is my job and my lawful right as a member of Congress. It’s clear: Trump and his administration don’t want transparency or oversight, and they want to punish any person who dares to speak up.
These baseless, politically motivated charges against me make that even more obvious. We must stand up together against an administration that weaponizes law enforcement to politically persecute its opponents before it's too late. Democrats stand ready to fight back against the Trump administration’s overreach, and protect democracy and our Constitutional separation of powers.
**We need your help.[I’m asking you to split a donation between me and Leaders We Deserve so we have the resources to win this battle for our democracy.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250521_1_mciver?refcode=em20250521-2160&amount=5&refcode2=2160_587540_zpMBqm&akid=2160%2E587540%2EzpMBqm) We need 500 more grassroots donations before our deadline at midnight to make sure Republicans know we won’t be intimidated.**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250521_1_mciver?amount=5&refcode=em20250521-2160&refcode2=2160_587540_zpMBqm&akid=2160%2E587540%2EzpMBqm)**
This is far bigger than just me—the rule of law is at stake. Our democracy as we know it is under threat.
**To ensure everyone who dares to speak truth to power is safe from political persecution, we must make as much noise and as big an impact as possible.[Split a donation between me and Leaders We Deserve and share this with your friends.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250521_1_mciver?refcode=em20250521-2160&amount=5&refcode2=2160_587540_zpMBqm&akid=2160%2E587540%2EzpMBqm)**
We're in this together,
LaMonica McIver
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250521_1_mciver?refcode=em20250521-2160&amount=5&refcode2=2160_587540_zpMBqm&akid=2160%2E587540%2EzpMBqm)

**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20250521-1&t=2&refcode2=2160_587540_zpMBqm&akid=2160%2E587540%2EzpMBqm)**

name: Team Kelly
subject: ICYMI: Kelly joins MN DFL Chair Richard Carlbom to talk Medicaid cuts
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Morrison for Congress
body:
https://kellyforcongress.org [https://kellyforcongress.org]
Hi Peter!
Team Kelly here - we hope you’re doing well!
Democrats across the country are finding ways to communicate with their constituents to combat the continued misinformation spread by the Trump administration. One way the Minnesota DFL is communicating is through their new Daily Call to Action - a daily zoom call with MN DFL Chair Richard Carlbom and guests!
Last week, they featured Kelly to talk more about Trump’s Medicaid cuts. We’ve attached the full video [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WBFKXtH5Et4] here [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WBFKXtH5Et4] [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WBFKXtH5Et4] , but wanted to recap the main points for you as well:
Medicaid covers about 80 million Americans and about 1.4 million Minnesotans . 33% of all births in Minnesota are covered by Medicaid. 3 in 10 Minnesota children rely on Medicaid. 62% of nursing home residents in Minnesota rely on Medicaid.
If these proposed cuts go through:
* Emergency services will be decreased
* Level one trauma centers in the state may be forced to close
* Hospitals in Greater Minnesota will close
* Nursing homes across Minnesota will shut down
* This medical debt crisis that we are already facing will get worse
* It will be catastrophic for our state budget, and will take resources away from other essential services like public education
Peter, as you know, these cuts would hurt all of us whether you rely on Medicaid or not.
On the bright side - Americans are fighting back, and it is working. Republicans are scrambling, and a critical handful of them have stood up against these Medicaid cuts. It is so evident that using your voice is making a difference!
Kelly is continuing to fight against this at every turn, and her unique experience as a physician in Congress is now more important than ever. We need to ensure that she is able to continue this work in Congress, and has the resources to run a strong campaign in 2026.
Peter, as we near the end of May, we are approaching our monthly fundraising deadline. We have a goal of raising $18,000 by the end of the month, and we could use your help.
Could you chip in $10, $15, $25, or whatever works best for you today to help us close this gap? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/morrison-email]
If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately.
Donate $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/morrison-email?express_lane=true&amount=10] Donate $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/morrison-email?express_lane=true&amount=25]
Donate $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/morrison-email?express_lane=true&amount=50] Donate $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/morrison-email?express_lane=true&amount=100]
Donate Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/morrison-email]
Thank you so much for your continued support, Peter! We are so lucky to have you a part of this team.
With gratitude,
Team Kelly
https://www.facebook.com/KellyMorrisonForCongress [https://www.facebook.com/KellyMorrisonForCongress] https://twitter.com/Morrison4MN [https://twitter.com/Morrison4MN] https://instagram.com/kellymorrisonforcongress [https://instagram.com/kellymorrisonforcongress] kellyforcongress.org [kellyforcongress.org]
Email is the best way to keep our supporters up to date.
If you only want to receive our most important emails, click here to receive fewer emails. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/hHyPtKcXyUeK_xcY7BEsAQ2]
We’d hate to see you go, but if you want you can unsubscribe here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/4Dh5T9ni_kaWmPt-auzpZw2?unsubscribedata=ceFcvbrGFW2kfJa0S6fVniblYNXjLoxQECP2a9zU6WSyzqXCMlm9RVu7LpGY%2Fs%2BMqrNkt3GR3Pfnkhgq%2FIORzyXSMHwmOWPrpD1cfwmocPb%2FF%2BmrkO9yGdICOyDEEu5261B%2BN5gy%2FeLwbMlA8dZzt3WaeW%2BnaTF1FNDPb0Mzbm5GkbVGuBC0N9%2BV005jzWVvRqUGXgYCg2ERmWjwB%2Bu2vW5FgDimvFdwPy6hHuLapbCuUsCUIuB1lvwZ9CedarkO9ta3UkXPmMv%2B88wcEDpBzUP%2F7U0e69iKO9vBX1EeehfOYGunlzF19qJe35C2UOdjhlRCKZuWqiXh27ADGKLFj8h0dv5SqU8OjhIkDghZmB3SEi7twj95dhRW%2FGaC%2Bbzs0fKnhKn%2Fb5l%2FJo1WoxKvvMs9BlxafU9gttW8yfuSIpOnD%2F3U3GNhYY30LIBqqnTo] .

name: Dr. Greg Murphy
subject: Don’t let the Democrats get away with this.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by friends to elect Dr
body:
Democrats have already raised millions to execute their plan for 2026. If we can’t keep up, we’ll be a sitting duck in this election. | [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=2d2463ce6bb0494599dcce9015a0771c&_e=6SnrL5RL5-eUg6Ag8mDyXCQc00yUvfO30fF_kyL2n5DO9zXIwZr0qp_mmeHjKPET8kGo_c3ch6kD61H1_OdjwKUF04ElqRHXeXSfj2vjTXt45fLyNvWuGlA1_YbsJUlGH5rNjtX3H3pLd-lsxLfE2PwybC8Stli2Ih8qtmLRANGaxDjooELBw-htfVffPs4d3LjukEOMdY5mSP3fo-YGxghSHFaavo1-QCcrDykv2tdDzCZYUM9ZWFllH0mSt_stK9ZP0b25zcOsaQhOcmWAQotywwyzHfBPeki8MFJtS0VihiOJtUgx2ounWi-qO0AEvcnA--dT5-_0a9pWbsP9mZsvFSvdbIbGX_YrNkk86IvKhdVnFvZ3va100JSTSleIZE3Udt1Xnp7fGfjl7sEG-BlthFWXGM1Gcc9U7quPo0w%3D)

---

Fellow Conservative,

Here’s the Democrats’ plan for 2026:

* Spend millions targeting Republicans like me to end our House Majority
* **Launch a 3rd sham impeachment trial against President Trump**
* Completely block President Trump’s Save America vision

Democrats have already raised millions to execute their plan for 2026. If we can’t keep up, we’ll be a sitting duck in this election.

Don’t let the radical Left get away with cutting all the progress we’ve made to rebuild America after Joe Biden’s catastrophic Presidency. name: Voter Verification 2025 Polling Team
subject: Help us get a leg up on the Democrats
body:
Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Unsubscribe
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj204i7u1o3rxu7t3ssmkyd7dzjsnevf7uql33xqt31ug4vkngcnbt3fop9cttznar1ie8x4vbi9nc673kn1g&__stmp=swmuih&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=swmuih&__onlt=t

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6jdgudkfveetzr5vafffhon7v66bdvoq9gjzmpiaq0rdkh743809g6gj9a9xqnh388q7m3xuv5am8lc5sge0g6p6rnq3ifbv7i91hppz1h8kdago5cpukuh6slvv8l4myr350z495b7pgvunic5by&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=swmuih&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=swmuih&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=swmuih&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=swmuih&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6jdgudkfveetzr5vafffhon7vrfe7d4o4yggc33216epfbtg0k7j0pqpdgeb3esum4n9y44kq8o4wnfhnzj4bels60mihczg7elic7hza7b09le1oemyx5gecasf6rjg6dogprwi5w93w17r7zg5q&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=swmuih&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=swmuih&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

As a dad and the Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania, I’m in the unique position to be able to push our state toward policy that will do right by my daughter and her generation. I believe we owe it to our kids and grandkids to make things better than how they were for us, and that’s why I feel so lucky I get to do that work as LG every day. [**I’m incredibly grateful I get to be part of that change, in no small part thanks to supporters like you. Every dollar you’re able to chip in goes a long way.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108128962/546938909/15868926?source=SBD_AD_EM_FR_052125_DAD_90DO_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjVhMjgzYi05MzM2LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nJL_yqrE7gBk6hFRnPck8yxiY6WCYnWOw6_3r6sXXrE=) | | [CHIP IN »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108128968/546938915/627196029?source=SBD_AD_EM_FR_052125_DAD_90DO_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjVhMjgzYi05MzM2LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nJL_yqrE7gBk6hFRnPck8yxiY6WCYnWOw6_3r6sXXrE=)
---
Right now, we’re witnessing an unprecedented rolling back of hard-won progress at the federal level because of the Trump administration. **From healthcare, to SNAP, to childcare, pretty much every critical service that working families rely on to get by is under threat.**
**The thing is, the goal shouldn’t just be “getting by.”** As the working class is striving toward better for their children, the Trump administration and national Republicans are actively fighting against their ability to do so. _It’s disturbing._
By going after funding for programs like SNAP and Medicaid, or subsidized childcare, we force families into a cycle of living pay-check to pay-check, never being able to get ahead. **In doing that, leadership is failing the people they were trusted to fight for.**
I’m reminded of my own parents, who I watched struggle to put food on our table despite their hard work. I think of how hard I’m willing to fight if it means even one fewer family has to go through that.
As your Lieutenant Governor, and especially as a father, I can’t understand taking resources _away_ from families trying to do better by their kids. I need you to know you can count on me to stand up for families, no matter their income, and make sure everyone has a fair shot at a better future.
[**If you’re with me, chipping in to my campaign today will make a huge difference in my ability to keep doing the work and deliver that better tomorrow for Pennsylvania.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108128971/546938921/15868926?source=SBD_AD_EM_FR_052125_DAD_90DO_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjVhMjgzYi05MzM2LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nJL_yqrE7gBk6hFRnPck8yxiY6WCYnWOw6_3r6sXXrE=)

name: GOTV PAC
subject: Let’s get real about what happened in 2024
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GET OUT THE VOTE PAC NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR ANY CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email3182025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email3182025&amount=25]
Peter,
We have to be brutally honest: 2024 was a bad year for Democrats.
We lost the popular vote. We lost the House and Senate. We lost working-class voters, voters of color, young voters.
And the polls? We won't sugarcoat it. They're devastating. Only 27% of Americans approve of congressional Democrats. Just 35% of Democrats say they're optimistic about the party's future.
The good news? A reckoning like this is long overdue. And that makes this the moment, not for another messaging pivot or press release, but for something deeper.
At GOTV PAC, we aren't waiting for the DNC to figure it out. We're building a new playbook in the states that will decide everything.
We're powering turnout in places like San Antonio , where we're backing Gina Ortiz Jones's campaign for mayor against a Greg Abbott acolyte. In Virginia , GOTV will do everything we can to ensure Democrats hold the House of Delegates and flip the governor's mansion for Abigail Spanberger. GOTV will accomplish this and more by making new inroads with the voters the establishment too often ignores. We're talking to these potential voters and giving them a reason to show up right now for the June 7th San Antonio mayoral election and for the June 17th Virginia primary.
And it only takes $10 to reach one of them. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email05212025&amount=10]

If the national party wants to survive, it has to stop playing it safe. The good news is, though, that we don't have to wait for permission from Washington to start fixing this.

Our professional phone bankers specialize in long- and short-term GOTV campaigns, event registration, voting assistance in heavily gerrymandered states, fundraising, and call time management. Our mission is to flip red districts blue, any elected position from dog walker to Congress member.
Learn more at: gotv.vote [https://www.gotv.vote/]
