name: Kristi Rogers
subject: I survived an IED explosion in Baghdad
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rogers for Senate
body:
It rattled me, but did not break my American spirit

| | | [](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=293de5a6223e4436ab53fb8020578890&_m=41bd02008cb14d1a9ecfaf17b42c8963&_e=nGab6FbcecS7mGEmoqKZjPt8a08GQw5OHaovqn2qE6bUC_wrKK8p3bWlJW88VXNuCHzw1hfnJMy-MIDYxf3od_edZ2LiE8Loh-k8YD1WHg-iHzX4TtV_739TyGrmrEOrlZInXapPjXAPwoIShqxqIvWdbZxT_pl8jfd3VSuefKcFbadnVMVrSxYj_vYdAXAYAzcpsuFvFDwwYeKZtjXumr6unFncLvibvwFCuoaj0n6ycaaSbHeFJXMPn_DnRGma1j_UfkNyCpK0lT0vahxByD9_WS0JKozLpuiNYOcHQudY8JK1t2ouFFGErMr2tWXG0B1J3fY7vKetsK89rEuNOuwTnK49T2kwmJZIsjPl6IVHKy_ow6LW1K_2fJmPJBzGE35vozMHEeYWzpsUbSiyLVxDgxYHvGsYd89grpOaILJ6VQ9jrSbZlaVYhZ_VRhdiimoE4jQiAVaYCQXfLOosRw%3D%3D)
---
| | Friend, _[](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=293de5a6223e4436ab53fb8020578890&_m=41bd02008cb14d1a9ecfaf17b42c8963&_e=nGab6FbcecS7mGEmoqKZjPt8a08GQw5OHaovqn2qE6b_r8pVy2bc1I8ub-0EpY6-n2xTdhoSqRwybVARrZo1rlzYsE4TDmSbon3r1GrA7Zvt9bxTx6qsZOLWlUqdZ3bfrngS39cxht2L1r_URACX2ihBWUIW2hPAOukGqXLsR3lku2Ea7bZIaBcp7nfziGBahvVe2yz_ehwK7IsI2IuEnzA9CCIhK3Z_akxlWHZ2HnoH4-RIMcbTqflPfbwo_eVvqmH5VSsSVBQP-NMJRAGmcf7Dyy_5-Ge_Ww8rvg3jZ99iy44kbGiKbjrKKCryxEDM9XhDz7OMrVgTB2IVbs0so5bCYks6PTfoXxHjdgvQ6h2KJelnN5p0qa9S_B9mFvoyCvp1W3Qf7dS3wqHB7DKH-MTYGHa_HylDHyB87TxP5O2amMI7JtHi5w5_oR46WxF2)_ For over a month now, you’ve been hearing from my husband Mike Rogers, his campaign team, and supporters across Michigan about **why 2026 is a make-or-break election, why Mike is the right leader at the right time, and how flipping this seat is key to keeping the Senate red and advancing President Trump’s agenda.** All of that is true. Today, I wanted to take a moment to share a bit of my story — and why I know, beyond a doubt, that Mike Rogers is a man worthy of your trust and support. I was deployed to Iraq in the height of the conflict in the Middle East while working for the Department of Defense.

Here’s a picture of me from back then:
---
[](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=293de5a6223e4436ab53fb8020578890&_m=41bd02008cb14d1a9ecfaf17b42c8963&_e=nGab6FbcecS7mGEmoqKZjPt8a08GQw5OHaovqn2qE6bUC_wrKK8p3bWlJW88VXNuCHzw1hfnJMy-MIDYxf3od_edZ2LiE8Loh-k8YD1WHg-iHzX4TtV_739TyGrmrEOrlZInXapPjXAPwoIShqxqIvWdbZxT_pl8jfd3VSuefKcFbadnVMVrSxYj_vYdAXAYAzcpsuFvFDwwYeKZtjXumr6unFncLvibvwFCuoaj0n6ycaaSbHeFJXMPn_DnRGma1j_UfkNyCpK0lT0vahxByD9_WS0JKozLpuiNYOcHQudY8JK1t2ouFFGErMr2tWXGvb9QGECcEpAr2de0N34PeaeOLXapEzSi6pApYC8VJeGAgiQbh9yho7LQi9qV21ryfipLKOjddKza1r3JzJiu8StC2uvykt4GQ2CKtjXvjsQDM03jHc53nLobgXFbBQq74Xu6NDYqj64ei4zNvgEE1Q%3D%3D)
---
And on a fateful day, my team and I were traveling through the city of Baghdad. You have to understand that just getting around the region as Americans at this point was incredibly dangerous. We were told to stay in the middle lane of the highway, to keep as much of a distance between us and the explosive devices that lined the roads as possible. The terrorists were always waiting for their opportunity to attack. **_Suddenly — it happened._** I can still remember what it was like to have my head spinning, with my ears ringing and surrounded by smoke. When I finally realized what happened, I was incredibly grateful to have made it out alive, as others in the car next to us were not as lucky. After this incident, my husband often jokes that when there’s a bump in the night at home,_he sends me to check things out and make sure we are safe_. _**[But the truth is that my husband, Mike Rogers, is the strongest, most courageous, and honorable man I’ve ever known.](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=293de5a6223e4436ab53fb8020578890&_m=41bd02008cb14d1a9ecfaf17b42c8963&_e=nGab6FbcecS7mGEmoqKZjPt8a08GQw5OHaovqn2qE6bUC_wrKK8p3bWlJW88VXNuCHzw1hfnJMy-MIDYxf3od_edZ2LiE8Loh-k8YD1WHg-iHzX4TtV_739TyGrmrEOrlZInXapPjXAPwoIShqxqIvWdbZxT_pl8jfd3VSuefKcFbadnVMVrSxYj_vYdAXAYAzcpsuFvFDwwYeKZtjXumr6unFncLvibvwFCuoaj0n6ycaaSbHeFJXMPn_DnRGma1j_UfkNyCpK0lT0vahxByD9_WS0JKozLpuiNYOcHQudY8JK1t2ouFFGErMr2tWXGqRu4UFntedAQtgQJC8d2QPcRfWtey0_3itFKPuuQOlf79xipXVjTkM3xwGb1PwSHZJJsB25I5RpgnvT9a5gyG80vFc_siTpnmd9JFZsuN06jV1_6wIUbUBUzKimiRmMUUnChZ1DX-JO9s3YIFzMkew%3D%3D)**_ It takes guts to get back into politics these days — especially with the folks on the other side gearing up to spend tens of millions of dollars to lie about you and your family in the name of scoring cheap political points. As a young man, Mike fought cancer and worked two jobs — one on the floor of an automotive factory, and one in security — just to put himself through college. My husband is an Army veteran, former FBI agent, and even chaired the House Intelligence Committee in the tough days after 9/11. He also has been taking the fight to Communist China — going so far as to break from his fellow Republicans to blow the whistle on the threats that the CCP poses. _It just doesn’t get any tougher than that._ Mike is the kind of man that does what is right, no matter the personal consequence.

[_**And he is the kind of man that is deserving of your support. Because with Mike in the Senate, you can know that there is someone in your corner, fighting for you and preserving our great American values.**_](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=293de5a6223e4436ab53fb8020578890&_m=41bd02008cb14d1a9ecfaf17b42c8963&_e=nGab6FbcecS7mGEmoqKZjPt8a08GQw5OHaovqn2qE6bUC_wrKK8p3bWlJW88VXNuCHzw1hfnJMy-MIDYxf3od_edZ2LiE8Loh-k8YD1WHg-iHzX4TtV_739TyGrmrEOrlZInXapPjXAPwoIShqxqIvWdbZxT_pl8jfd3VSuefKcFbadnVMVrSxYj_vYdAXAYAzcpsuFvFDwwYeKZtjXumr6unFncLvibvwFCuoaj0n6ycaaSbHeFJXMPn_DnRGma1j_UfkNyCpK0lT0vahxByD9_WS0JKozLpuiNYOcHQudY8JK1t2ouFFGErMr2tWXG8ZsHtmlrFcHtutFRO9157aDWvipT7fVc5oUtj_0KrhtDQvrefXIwhL_jDcsmTNzG6PRTncmJsAHwycgBNySy4Jk9ojFxsEbt8KrjAUwSCuvNgFdY4lcwDrVUaUlzbX8SFkw6zGG8xk84QaGShTstvQ%3D%3D)
---
[ **SUPPORT MIKE ROGERS BY CLICKING HERE** ](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=293de5a6223e4436ab53fb8020578890&_m=41bd02008cb14d1a9ecfaf17b42c8963&_e=nGab6FbcecS7mGEmoqKZjPt8a08GQw5OHaovqn2qE6bUC_wrKK8p3bWlJW88VXNuCHzw1hfnJMy-MIDYxf3od_edZ2LiE8Loh-k8YD1WHg-iHzX4TtV_739TyGrmrEOrlZInXapPjXAPwoIShqxqIvWdbZxT_pl8jfd3VSuefKcFbadnVMVrSxYj_vYdAXAYAzcpsuFvFDwwYeKZtjXumr6unFncLvibvwFCuoaj0n6ycaaSbHeFJXMPn_DnRGma1j_UfkNyCpK0lT0vahxByD9_WS0JKozLpuiNYOcHQudY8JK1t2ouFFGErMr2tWXGbCkxW5J_77MyVPHYctJ3gdSVAs2pD63ltHLYUdBNkSUwYDPog5_rwhyFMRxBIx_mME6FEHszNdtNVKZjIobzDQg6Dldo3nb6PjtjCOGVnAlvLKHgFg_N28zGTa6Aq0pKojaq4MFF-UPdXAxi2h6Umg%3D%3D)
---
Thank you for your time, thank you for your support and thank you for not giving up on politics and our great American experiment, Kristi Rogers
---
[](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=293de5a6223e4436ab53fb8020578890&_m=41bd02008cb14d1a9ecfaf17b42c8963&_e=nGab6FbcecS7mGEmoqKZjPt8a08GQw5OHaovqn2qE6bUC_wrKK8p3bWlJW88VXNuCHzw1hfnJMy-MIDYxf3od_edZ2LiE8Loh-k8YD1WHg-iHzX4TtV_739TyGrmrEOrlZInXapPjXAPwoIShqxqIvWdbZxT_pl8jfd3VSuefKcFbadnVMVrSxYj_vYdAXAYAzcpsuFvFDwwYeKZtjXumr6unFncLvibvwFCuoaj0n6ycaaSbHeFJXMPn_DnRGma1j_UfkNyCpK0lT0vahxByD9_WS0JKozLpuiNYOcHQudY8JK1t2ouFFGErMr2tWXGl_baG9li10kksKfvs1YzEpn52bshnCRwyPPjAHOXbEXuGLpoCLoVKy_sJjEBbTuv2_2dGf3jYjHPyZCdGSUbnR37jQZCsC7Ua7dApeHeFeWgoKv9Q75GznWB9lvtXsVvg0vUHrvcdro43XVKPyGVTA%3D%3D)
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com[](mailto:mark@convert-digital.com). Don't want to receive these emails anymore? Click [here.](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=293de5a6223e4436ab53fb8020578890&_s=41bd02008cb14d1a9ecfaf17b42c8963&_t=QGuoyw_yxAteybAPWQYej5INoqyWY5-M1dbg_yss2C0BdP5H72oLHSK4F3jxq8bVQZLyPk3BGKxpDICGD9tpfXDZ7u-IjHMqlJ_bL8FfWKbqmegy3TmGgUd2mqyZJ_AQ) Rogers for Senate P.O. Box 132 St. Joseph, MI 49085

name: LaMonica McIver
subject: I was charged by the Trump administration because I was doing my job
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Nevada State Democratic Party, NVDEMS
body:
| | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu4ksFa5SF7IXH6Sr7Lz9yTMf4-sY6VeSEC179lZSts0N9RBT6LlsX9Orp0YS7gGIt4rYEjV69r7QCC0gjGViV__-IQKmsPOht0Wq8AMiiZensLMXok2_nlb6pGJcNXpFMrai2Zaw-lM8mLt2DmoLHiwUyTrUhx1th0p7Ij7npPGf49893UiNkbn6LHRVHhWzKULUesgq1_vUAP7m6Je2WCV3oZ95Z8lBpcWgY8VNim-tXhJT7-GB96eQE7D3AFvhVIsc9gnNEJzAIUPvcbjR0Nx-JzKe34Wbk_E8gCMjtvnEeB2u7400jV2t_hKsXryvByzQrshwmmhQ_LZBi_q47jTBb7WYaxwnfTuE0Bmci2TOyZnYGXkCI7oSr-8dIvDf0KiFZbOS-FNfmmaE2pqyix6n1sVbNIyu2we_m1RQzNwQ-NySwCUo9KICNj928wrQNDuOEKT3yHV4bjcVIr16vM/4go/ip437u92QXKN_erd_GTUew/h0/h001.BFUdYNOxfegAqHCFCHNw5xZFZF9BZkjJasxg3B3aE2s)
---
Friends,
The Trump administration just charged me with crimes for engaging in congressional oversight. This is a first—and it’s a flashing red light for our democracy.
I went to an ICE facility in my district to conduct oversight because that is my job and my lawful right as a member of Congress. It’s clear: Trump and his administration don’t want transparency or oversight, and they want to punish any person who dares to speak up.
These baseless, politically motivated charges against me make that even more obvious. We must stand up together against an administration that weaponizes law enforcement to politically persecute its opponents before it's too late. Democrats stand ready to fight back against the Trump administration’s overreach, and protect democracy and our Constitutional separation of powers.
**[_We need your help. I’m asking you to split a donation between me and NV Dems so we have the resources to win this battle for our democracy. We need 500 more grassroots donations before our deadline at midnight to make sure Republicans know we won’t be intimidated._](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu4ksFa5SF7IXH6Sr7Lz9yTMf4-sY6VeSEC179lZSts0N9RBT6LlsX9Orp0YS7gGIt4rYEjV69r7QCC0gjGViV_j89U74aSYyzrVJtjP5SBHJ2ihF0IK4fZuYAIomCmmNw4nZgxjRv3klt6Vp0DOqado9DdWeynQ2PWN1DFHqfR1UDwLj-Rf_zV2Wqvmw8JBSmLqaOhZFpoHhE2dC2s19neXrcJMtqMRgob8aZfp0I6z1NobpTEoPXkP6on9PAV4Pz5bn6kzFYjfBYxy6-5b0oVfCAPZ2sRNlmMccjClMlT7_BUzi4oizdWiA5ymzkj7E8q3_UfhnvnIJDKDYAOJCbY3vxGx7E62XhqsgbWPdVya1k26xT0QPqa-RAP_eQ8to0_hAKtn-yW_Trke7VC2anFXJF_s1jD40XxbOIN7xzZvzKC6Z0LtpDrn7dLfe4HLxI/4go/ip437u92QXKN_erd_GTUew/h1/h001.iFx24u_ns3TmC-B-IOrPd01Plggb8PrdEg2iPro_8jM)**

clean_body: | | | | Friends, The Trump administration just charged me with crimes for engaging in congressional oversight. This is a first—and it’s a flashing red light for our democracy. I went to an ICE facility in my district to conduct oversight because that is my job and my lawful right as a member of Congress. It’s clear: Trump and his administration don’t want transparency or oversight, and they want to punish any person who dares to speak up. These baseless, politically motivated charges against me make that even more obvious. We must stand up together against an administration that weaponizes law enforcement to politically persecute its opponents before it's too late. Democrats stand ready to fight back against the Trump administration’s overreach, and protect democracy and our Constitutional separation of powers. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | ---|---|--- | | This is far bigger than just me—the rule of law is at stake. Our democracy as we know it is under threat. We're in this together, LaMonica The Nevada State Democratic Party fights for progress in the Silver State. We believe that we are stronger together than on our own, and that America succeeds when everyone gets a fair shot, everyone does their fair share, and everyone plays by the same rules. | | Paid for by the Nevada State Democratic Party, NVDEMS.com, not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: Jane Kleeb (via Democrats.org)
subject: We just ousted the longest-serving Republican mayor in the COUNTRY
body:
---
Derek, it’s Jane Kleeb, Chair of the Nebraska Democratic Party and DNC Vice Chair, with major news: **Last week, Nebraska Democrat John Ewing ousted the longest-serving Republican mayor in the country to become Omaha’s first Black mayor.** National news outlets are pointing to this victory as a bellwether for the 2026 midterms. | [ ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-ne-partner?amount=10&refcode=em_20250521_3506_fr&refcode2=3506_22930333_itDWXi&akid=3506%2E22930333%2EitDWXi)
---
While Trump and his Republicans are putting Medicare and SNAP benefits on the chopping block, attacking our veterans’ health care access, inciting losing trade wars, and making life hell for the American people, Democrats are organizing in every corner of this country and winning — from the Wisconsin Supreme Court down to Omaha’s mayoral race.
We’re defeating billionaires and long-time incumbents nationwide, but securing these wins takes a major war chest. **[As Democrats across the country continue mobilizing together to defeat the MAGA right, I’m asking you to split a donation between the Nebraska Democratic Party and the Democratic National Committee so we can keep building this momentum to stop Trump and his cronies for good.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-ne-partner?refcode=em_20250521_3506_fr&amount=10&refcode2=3506_22930333_itDWXi&akid=3506%2E22930333%2EitDWXi)**

_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your split contribution between the Nebraska Democratic Party and the Democratic National Committee instantly._

The fight to retake Congress in 2026 won’t be easy, Derek.
But this victory is a testament to the fact that when Democrats organize everywhere AND invest everywhere, we win — no matter who we’re up against.
As we look ahead to electing Democrats across the country who will stop Trump’s agenda and keep up these momentous victories, we’re counting on you to fuel our fight. Will you split a contribution between the DNC and the Nebraska Democratic Party today so we can gear up to win in 2026?
Win by win, we’re chipping away at the MAGA chokehold on our country. Let’s keep it up!!! 💪
Getting things done together,
Jane Kleeb
Nebraska Democratic Party Chair
DNC Vice Chair
ASDC President

Let’s keep it up!!! 💪 Getting things done together, Jane Kleeb Nebraska Democratic Party Chair DNC Vice Chair ASDC President If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._

name: Jon Ossoff for Senate
subject: You deserve an explanation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
body:
Here it goes:
#

Peter -
We've ramped up the number of emails and texts we've sent in the last few days, so we thought you deserved an explanation about why that is - and why these messages are so important.
Here it goes:
Starting with the obvious, this is going to be one of the closest and most expensive Senate races of the next election. There is a very good chance it is the most expensive Senate race ever.
Jon Ossoff is the only Democratic Senator up for an election in a state won by Donald Trump. That makes him MAGA's #1 target.
But that spending isn't a year away, it's starting now. Republicans are already raising huge sums of money to defeat Jon, and we're already getting attacked in ads.
Now when you look at the way we fund our campaign, it isn't with seven and eight figure checks these outside groups get. It's from lots and lots of people making small donations. And there is no single greater source of those donations than emails like this.
In just a few days, we'll close the books on our May fundraising drive. And the truth is, ever since Marjorie Taylor Greene said she wasn't running, our fundraising has slowed.
So we need to pick it up to reach our goals. Goals that aren't arbitrary but numbers we need to reach to win. So we're turning to you now with a humble request:
**[Can you please contribute $5, or whatever it is that you can afford today, directly to Jon Ossoff's campaign for U.S. Senate in Georgia? Believe us, we would not crowd your inbox if these messages and requests were not so important.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-may25.ZUBy2n&refcode=em250521&t=1&akid=368%2E5691347%2EZfUHHv)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[CONTRIBUTE $10](https://act.electjon.com/go/1525?c0=ossoff-em-may25.m5wiqz&refcode=em250521&t=20&akid=368%2E5691347%2EZfUHHv)**
---

Thank you,
Team Ossoff

name: Rob Bonta for California
subject: California has a new housing law, and Rob’s ready to enforce it
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB BONTA FOR CALIFORNIA ATTORNEY GENERAL 2026 FPPC ID #145642
body:
Rob has made it clear: building more homes – and keeping them affordable – is a top priority.
# [](https://act.robbonta.com/go/3?refcode=em20250521&t=1&akid=1798%2E1088799%2EwCLbPY)
Did you see? **California has a new law on the books to help us build more affordable housing** – and Rob is making sure it’s enforced.
The Attorney General co-sponsored Senate Bill 1037 – a law which went into effect this year and imposes bigger financial penalties when local governments deny or delay the homes California desperately needs. The message to cities and counties is clear: prepare your housing element on time and follow state law when you receive a housing development application.
Now, Rob’s issuing a legal alert to make sure officials across the state know exactly what’s required – and to make it clear _Rob is ready to act_ if they break the law.
It’s on all of our communities to build their fair share of housing, and this law gives Rob another tool to make sure local governments do their part.
**Rob has made it clear: building more homes – and keeping them affordable – is a top priority.** It’s why he launched a Housing Justice Team, and why his office is working with the legislature to pass more laws that make sure California is building enough affordable housing.
As the People’s Attorney, Rob is committed to solving big problems, delivering real results, and making sure no one gets left behind.
**[If you stand with the AG, can you pitch in to our campaign today? If we’re going to make progress on the biggest issues facing our state, such as the housing crisis, then we need a team of grassroots supporters to have our back.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-20250521?refcode=em20250521-1798&amount=5&refcode2=1798_1088799_wCLbPY&akid=1798%2E1088799%2EwCLbPY)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-20250521?refcode=em20250521-1798&amount=5&refcode2=1798_1088799_wCLbPY&akid=1798%2E1088799%2EwCLbPY)**
In solidarity,
The Team at Rob Bonta for CA Attorney General 2026

**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-wrapper?refcode=em20250521&t=3&refcode2=1798_1088799_wCLbPY&akid=1798%2E1088799%2EwCLbPY)**

subject: There is not a single a congressional district where cutting Medicaid is supported by more than 15% of voters:
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20250521-1361-foote&t=1001&akid=1361%2E342411%2E7tdfd7 ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter,

While Republicans are fighting to cut Medicaid–the largest single source
of coverage in the United States, the Squad is fighting to make health
care a guaranteed right.

Republicans are putting tax breaks for billionaires above the needs of
their constituents—there is not a single a congressional district where
cutting Medicaid is supported by more than 15% of voters:

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250521-movement.xLG30a&refcode=em20250521-1361&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1361%2E342411%2E7tdfd7 ]A map from Data for Progress showing that in not a single congressional
district are cuts to medicaid supported by more than 15%

Medicare for All is a line in the sand. Health care for everyone. No
exceptions.

Medicare for All is a bedrock policy for the Squad because they know the
status quo is failing millions:

No one should go broke to afford insulin.
No one should have to choose between putting food on the table or seeing a
doctor.
No one should be denied care because of their income or job.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250521-movement.xLG30a&refcode=em20250521-1361&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=1361%2E342411%2E7tdfd7 ]Will you chip in now to support Alexandria, Ayanna, Ilhan, and Rashida

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: BREAKING: We just reintroduced the College For All Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Education should be a right, not a luxury reserved only for the wealthy.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20250521-5068-footer&t=1&akid=5068%2E420207%2EmviYcl)
Peter, I have some big news.
**Today Bernie Sanders and I are reintroducing the _College For All Act_ in Congress.**
With the Trump administration actively working to undermine higher education, defund universities, and dismantle the Department of Education, we need bold action to fight back and make sure _everyone_ can access a quality education.
That’s exactly why we’re reintroducing this bill — to free students from a lifetime of debt, invest in working people, and transform higher education across America.
[**If you’re with us in the fight to make sure _everyone_ can get a quality education without being crushed by student debt, will you add your name in support of the _College For All Act_ today?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/pj-em-20250521?source=em20250521-5068&akid=5068%2E420207%2EmviYcl)
**[Add Your Name](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/pj-em-20250521?source=em20250521-5068&akid=5068%2E420207%2EmviYcl)**
Here’s just some of what this bill would do:
* **Guarantee tuition-free community college for every student

**
* **Make public four-year colleges tuition-free for families earning up to $150,000 (or $300,000 for married households)

**
* **Double Pell Grants, GEAR UP funding, and investments in minority-serving institutions**

Peter, education should be a right, not a luxury reserved only for the wealthy. But right now, students are being crushed by debt while the Trump administration is focused on massive tax breaks for billionaires.
We’re fighting to change that, but in order to succeed, we need to show Congress that this movement is too big to ignore.
[**So Peter, if you agree it’s time to ensure every American can attend college without going into debt, please add your name today in support of the _College For All Act_.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/pj-em-20250521?source=em20250521-5068&akid=5068%2E420207%2EmviYcl)
**[Add Your Name](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/pj-em-20250521?source=em20250521-5068&akid=5068%2E420207%2EmviYcl)**
In solidarity,
Pramila Jayapal
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20250521-5068-footer&t=2&refcode2=5068_420207_mviYcl&akid=5068%2E420207%2EmviYcl)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=5068%2E420207%2EmviYcl)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

name: Crow for Congress
subject: Trump’s afraid of losing control — again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
body:
Jason Crow For Congress [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88523/images/logoJC%20(1).png]
Team,

Donald Trump is already obsessed with the midterms — and for good reason.

He remembers what happened last time Democrats took the House: proper oversight and accountability. That’s why he’s wasting no time.

Trump is already endorsing MAGA loyalists, recruiting candidates, and raising boatloads of cash to hold onto Congress and protect himself from any future oversight.

But Jason Crow is fighting back, and he needs your support.

Jason is leading up Democratic efforts this cycle to recruit the next generation of leaders who will help us take back the House. We need some frontline fighters who can win tough races, flip critical districts, and stop Trump’s dangerous agenda in its tracks.

He’s not doing it for headlines or clout. He’s doing it because he knows what’s at stake if we don’t flip the House, especially with Trump back in power.

But Trump and his allies are already raising hundreds of millions of dollars to lock in their majority. If we’re going to compete — and win — we need major grassroots support from people like you.

Will you pitch in to help Jason recruit and support strong Democratic candidates across the country and flip the House in 2026? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-may25?amount=]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-may25?amount=10&express_lane=true]

We can’t let Trump rewrite the rules of our democracy. Not on our watch.

Thank you,

Crow for Congress

Peter — This U.S.
Senate race in Georgia isn’t just another election.

It’s the one race MAGA is banking on.

See, as the only Democratic Senator up for re-election in a state Trump
won, I am, quite literally, their #1 target.

You know the stakes. And you know your support is crucial. If you are
ready to make a donation today, please use this link to split a donation
between my campaign and Tammy Baldwin today:

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/4513?c0=stb-em-ossoff.8HlnUn&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20250521_PM1_V1_S1&t=1004&akid=4726%2E35263%2EtFpqAS ]secure.actblue.com/donate/stb-em-ossoff

Otherwise, I hope you’ll give me a minute or two to explain why your
support is so important.

They’re going to come after me with every dirty trick in the book and will
spare no expense to defeat me.

That means we need to build the largest statewide campaign Georgia has
ever seen.

That means more rallies. More organizers. More outreach — and early
outreach — to voters in every corner of the state.

All of that takes resources. And it’s why donations from supporters like
you are so important to our campaign.

The road ahead won’t be easy. But I know how to win tough fights. I’ve
done it before.

I can’t do it alone, which is why I’m asking:

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/4513?c0=stb-em-ossoff.8HlnUn&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20250521_PM1_V1_S1&t=1005&akid=4726%2E35263%2EtFpqAS ]Please, consider splitting a contribution between my re-election and
Tammy Baldwin. Every donation counts in a race as close as this one will
be.

My friend, Sacramento is failing our kids. This isn’t new; it’s part of a pattern that started with Prop. 57, pushed by Kamala Harris when she was AG, which downgraded crimes like these, putting our kids at risk. The Democrats who did this should be ashamed! And what does Gavin Newsom have to say? Just weak posturing—he cares more about his new podcast than he does about the people of California or reining in the radicals in his party. When I’m Governor, this kind of sick extremism will not stand. I will work tirelessly to ensure our children are protected, not exploited--and that California becomes a place where every child can thrive. ${Recipient.First_Name}, I’m asking for your help to make this vision a reality. I can’t do this for you I can only do this with you. Your contribution shows the left that you will not stand for this. It will power our mission to knock on **1 MILLION** doors before the primary, fund hard-hitting ads, and help me reach Californians who want real change. Please donate $25 or $50 to help us lead the primary and fight for California.
---

# Meet Steve Hilton
---
I love California so much. I moved to the Bay Area over a decade ago. I’ve raised my family here, taught at Stanford, started a business, written books, hosted a TV show ... lived the California dream. It’s my home, in the deepest sense. I’m a proud American, and an incredibly proud Californian too. But I’ve never forgotten where I came from. My parents were immigrants – they fled communism in Hungary to start a new life in England. In a free country. I appreciate exactly what that means.We didn’t have much money. My mother worked in a shoe store, my stepfather worked construction. My dad, who died when I was a kid, was the goalie for the Hungarian national ice hockey team. In 2012 we moved to California. I hosted a TV show — The Next Revolution with Steve Hilton — and podcasts: California Rebel Base, The Steve Hilton Show, Big Ideas Book Club. Through my policy organization, Golden Together, I’ve set out the changes we need to make to get this state back on track. Over the last few years, I’ve traveled the state, meeting people from all walks of life and backgrounds, in every part of California. I’ve spent time with business owners and workers in every industry, struggling with the absolute nightmare it’s become to start and grow a company here. I’ve seen the struggles so many Californians face raising a family given the unbelievable costs of living here. To make real change happen in government, you need the ability to think differently, the courage to challenge establishment groupthink and the conviction to follow through. That’s what I will bring to this job – to the urgent necessity of restoring the California Dream for everyone, and making this beautiful state, that we love so much, truly Golden Again.
---
[ **SUPPORT STEVE** ](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=a29182ed3fdf427ea78e258dcbe16312&_e=U8UlF6lSIJT_8hhlZlR3u7hgvZgdWRDlFdnJbWoQSOx44pQBSQfTTpoj9jkbgSc6GvzZUP1sW9tUU2omGnO0cvPjMxh9OMyv0anC7rKQJYQjUhZXF_c-hajrCIWKfIRJgQ6dlN9X8-d0A4NOUWz60GpnLfTM7LoVFgIbnNB6U89MwzKbFvrX9v0VlRdfx6e3FFTNzQ3jvkHBGoovAqOVsidnnl4j0MyBlSZUrUap81ax6o-iVSbghXf_wd2doRW6e9TL6Or_FpTWEeRY5AtOepSRb-U-LI53YePLxz9ot2RNgau-NaEnERizJUV5irQqBdfzZH9kfSdp0Vt7qBmgq--C3bhu_daVPzjSqm1wUZChDZis7L59fLUm8dAW6ZwqGLus0Ww2gNL2ikm9Lxkapu6GXo4K7lTu0L7L-NjiL0Y%3D)

---
Friend, If we thought congressional Republicans’ Billionaire Budget was cruel before, it’s getting even worse. **In an attempt to woo some of the most conservative members of their caucus, Republican leadership appears to be making even deeper cuts to Medicaid,** including shifting more costs to the states, which will result in cuts as states will be unable to meet the demand. They’re also trying to accelerate red-tape reporting requirements, which will result in eligible recipients losing their healthcare coverage. According to the Center for American Progress, **these cuts will kill over 20,000 Americans each year. This is policy violence.** **Additionally, congressional Republicans are looking to cut SNAP (food assistance) by hundreds of billions of dollars** —and, for the first time, requiring states to chip in. This too will result in massive cuts as state budgets are stretched thin. And why are Republicans seeking to cut more than $1 trillion from Medicaid and SNAP, plus cutting everything from Pell Grants to veterans’ benefits? In order to offset the cost of their massive $5.5 trillion tax handout to the rich and corporations. **This Billionaire Budget reflects the largest transfer of wealth from everyday people to the richest 1% in our country’s history.** [**We need all Democrats to stay united against this disastrous Billionaire Budget— and we need just four Republicans to join us in order to stop this bill. Add your name demanding Congress reject massive cuts to Medicaid, SNAP, and more to pay for more tax cuts for billionaires.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39Vp4gkIh90ovDrixVFaBLc32CpAaZ5zvifbp2V-udQrSmZC3httNw2wEW5LsPw-pmsu9ci1jCthHoXO4Nl2VLQ3rbzvDAbqaUQW0ponYjK44DENleSTiFlzKegpSOq65bYWDmE46O0XWwyOhuRgBLD075EEG7CT9qxkEWFswx7V2ZgiGe6V77zDNhTMyj0J0EfjZ4HpA2_rAuJTh4LSDTnmoIpKWiEWF-y7h_rqpj4lO2EPwMrBfkuMklMEDS9Als83aZPVWLIgtA1w6YUTq10omkWNXC_Ql9hLXDJo4ratAtOUy8gxWk5kGSjbjmFskMpGxE2pA6DscwLqKon6Li4w0YrVpndn5WDo1J2FEk4Be7JqFogQtfiAikWilKvaF_WV5_A251SVwrV8Xm9eNUXnCabFrkYMV50th3gY--1aisLXx7r2B0V_VCi5XdpUG4-f8W2vHBBIldU5zHAdHBBf11EH22JdstI82g2A-X7WJBNuqgsDmXRAyiiVt78qbl_JiXqrIsC0WeJV4dhivmI/4go/JXm2EqRmTjSpaYakwxoopw/h1/h001.WUa5ES7dTg8HsolxtigbrjY-9Usa82LotU7GC6Ic_H8) | [TAKE ACTION](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39Vp4gkIh90ovDrixVFaBLc32CpAaZ5zvifbp2V-udQrSmZC3httNw2wEW5LsPw-plBoBdyLzIErZJq6UlOcgJMxuPOZ4yoRtw4cG1v0n16hIjUvN9VqpSqvuxrx1vg49wsCvnRtwtwynhLN8SP1p0CZwYtSTYn2YQHEv0N46W3KXrbcOFfLXVD6JaoyyrrInCItFTy9b2lvTalQpVAypLLAFJTESQTE2XZEVQfYXnFZJ6Ug5IbZJmsgPQlz3oKBsuqfNB7YGqPXfBv2WY4jGwaJgA6ETXcrQdVRIdiZ2PnHKngv24OoHvqSVBfFXiMkNKlfUoaP_Fa0jXBwi1iomUtdB1R7FQ_LLVPi3Msae-wLpNztnSLSmkJdBZSN24a_jE-nBH8i1tmT0a3HmQXF1ocIh9pRw1IWNj8Q5hyxdJphuA6j83NwQ7u58mvdX1guS67BRvMs93-iKd_gRMvzkmLt42vwFl0vbNKDnxSpmmdR5SRtWBkI0mujvmcBIdXSAkbPwj7RGEzGy1jbm1lSP-_/4go/JXm2EqRmTjSpaYakwxoopw/h2/h001.EUKYvReYMRHI-WsXJ_BlChLD1lsQ3x38Xv5lNEJDPxU)
---
**Healthcare and nutrition are basic needs.** Cutting these to pay for more tax cuts for billionaires is obscene.
Another proposed change in the GOP Billionaire Budget is kicking 4.5 million children of immigrant parents off of the Child Tax Credit, while simultaneously increasing the number of lower-income families who do not receive the full CTC because their families make TOO LITTLE money―an average of $23,000 a year.
I’ve introduced the _End Child Poverty Act_ to replace the Child Tax Credit and cover all children, including children from the lowest-wealth families who are left out of the tax credit system. **My legislation would create a universal, monthly child allowance of over $400 per child.**
Instead of cuts to programs and services that vulnerable families rely on, congressional Republicans are harming their own constituents in order to hand even more tax breaks to their billionaire donors.
[**Add your name now to demand Congress reject the Billionaire Budget that cuts Medicaid, SNAP, and more to pay for more tax cuts for the rich and corporations.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39Vp4gkIh90ovDrixVFaBLc32CpAaZ5zvifbp2V-udQrSmZC3httNw2wEW5LsPw-pnYxdrWj56JvkZXWDd84T2Id87wP6qL4_34PDgWXWpvz6yqM6K5wQtl_wi13uzNEmNwE1O5wF07spkmJzc5QoYgIO8xCbSFuWGD8o7NLLOSHs6hXE99e7hqHa5vlXodhuy8rCxfRgKtLPbP6s3QP_1PGte0wv1WJUxBBLFxAwryYSVFeWoa8w4dUec6aT2ukVnRtisGGDuLibmJd9mYlg5uEk2t-7QpldoLWQtf1SWTsl4bDyoDqE7dHShVyUmvnXwSAV4I7zcU1NQSdQSJhL-PGtnFCVRrL6rItiaXdexJvjb84O-inySGQVh9a5BJV-YIh86Fhdmg6TQFxdHPgxK6Kh372s1aTqyuhO-IGSn6P0nEbfhbjFVkJ1Dh4nOIKi08dzvfINekZDmEF_cTOWedH992zjyREpJjPxXYkoR_1hf2e50zpun9tjlmDX1VaWo1Grsm7uGhy9tW711lH5Kh/4go/JXm2EqRmTjSpaYakwxoopw/h3/h001.stsX4ryEAqdHpJO_CrwPYoIZUhBFpdyhIToAI5wjmNw)
Together, we’re demanding a democracy of, by, and for the people, not the billionaires.
With you in this fight,
Rashida

clean_body: Take Action: Demand Congress reject massive cuts to Medicaid and SNAP, which will be used to pay for more tax cuts for billionaires. | | | Friend, If we thought congressional Republicans’ Billionaire Budget was cruel before, it’s getting even worse. In an attempt to woo some of the most conservative members of their caucus, Republican leadership appears to be making even deeper cuts to Medicaid, including shifting more costs to the states, which will result in cuts as states will be unable to meet the demand. They’re also trying to accelerate red-tape reporting requirements, which will result in eligible recipients losing their healthcare coverage. According to the Center for American Progress, these cuts will kill over 20,000 Americans each year. This is policy violence. Additionally, congressional Republicans are looking to cut SNAP (food assistance) by hundreds of billions of dollars —and, for the first time, requiring states to chip in. This too will result in massive cuts as state budgets are stretched thin. And why are Republicans seeking to cut more than $1 trillion from Medicaid and SNAP, plus cutting everything from Pell Grants to veterans’ benefits? In order to offset the cost of their massive $5.5 trillion tax handout to the rich and corporations. This Billionaire Budget reflects the largest transfer of wealth from everyday people to the richest 1% in our country’s history. | Healthcare and nutrition are basic needs. Cutting these to pay for more tax cuts for billionaires is obscene. Another proposed change in the GOP Billionaire Budget is kicking 4.5 million children of immigrant parents off of the Child Tax Credit, while simultaneously increasing the number of lower-income families who do not receive the full CTC because their families make TOO LITTLE money―an average of $23,000 a year. I’ve introduced the End Child Poverty Act to replace the Child Tax Credit and cover all children, including children from the lowest-wealth families who are left out of the tax credit system. My legislation would create a universal, monthly child allowance of over $400 per child. Instead of cuts to programs and services that vulnerable families rely on, congressional Republicans are harming their own constituents in order to hand even more tax breaks to their billionaire donors. Together, we’re demanding a democracy of, by, and for the people, not the billionaires. With you in this fight, Rashida Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Rashida Tlaib for Congress, please .

The 1776 Project Foundation is committed to implementing an effective strategy that will win back our schools one school board at a time. All we need is to get our guide in the hands of AS MANY school board members as we possibly can as quickly as we can! That’s where you come in, Friend! Just $5 prints one copy for a brave school board member. Seriously, just $5! Then, UNLOCK your FREE digital copy and send to as many of your local school board members as you can! I can’t thank you enough for your support. Sincerely, Aiden Buzzetti, President 1776 Project Foundation | | | 7816 Rose Garden Lane Springfield, VA 22153 |

We know there’s a lot going on in the news, but here’s what you need to know about our race against Schweikert right here in Arizona:

**FACT: David Schweikert voted to pave the way for Medicaid cuts, putting Trump one step closer to getting his “big, beautiful bill” passed.** We know tens of thousands of Arizonans are at risk of losing their healthcare if Trump’s budget is passed.

**FACT: DCCC calls AZ-01 a top “district in play.”** AZ-01 will be one of the most competitive House races in 2026, so we need all hands on deck to flip this seat blue.

**FACT: Republicans poured massive resources into trying to throw Marlene off the ballot last year.** Republicans _know_ Marlene can beat Schweikert. They’ll likely try even more anti-democratic antics to keep our race from gaining the momentum we need to send a new, courageous voice to represent Arizona families.

body:
These special elections represent critical opportunities to build our Democratic power and elect more Democrats who will fight back against Trumpism in their state legislatures. | | |
---
| |
---|---
Already this year, Democrats won five majority-deciding special elections, flipped two seats Trump won by double digits, and defended Wisconsin’s liberal Supreme Court majority. Races like these are the most immediate opportunities for Democrats to defend and build sustainable power. **But our work isn’t over yet – take a look at some of our upcoming races:** | **Date** | **State** | **Seat**

6/10

6/10

6/24

8/5
| Rhode Island | SD-04
